theorem number_theory_607382 (f : ℕ → ℕ) (fpos : ∀ n, 0 < n → 0 < f n)
(hf : ∀ n, f (f n) = n.divisors.card) : ∀ p, Nat.Prime p → Nat.Prime (f p) := by

have lm : ∀ n : ℕ, n.divisors.card = 2 ↔ n.Prime := by
    intro n; constructor
    · intro h; have : 2 ≤ n := by by_contra!; interval_cases n; any_goals simp at h
      rw [Nat.prime_def]; constructor; exact this; intro m mdvd
      replace h : n.divisors = {1, n} := by
        have auxcard : ({1, n} : Finset ℕ).card = 2 := by
          rw [card_eq_two]; use 1; use n; simp; linarith
        have : {1, n} ⊆ n.divisors := by simp [subset_iff]; linarith
        apply eq_iff_card_le_of_subset at this; simp [h, auxcard] at this
        symm; exact this
      replace mdvd : m ∈ n.divisors := by simp; constructor; exact mdvd; linarith
      rw [h] at mdvd; simp at mdvd; exact mdvd
    intro npr; simp [npr.divisors, card_eq_two]; use 1; use n; simp
    exact Ne.symm npr.ne_one

  have lm' : ∀ n ≠ 0, n.divisors.card = 1 ↔ n = 1 := by
    intro n nne; constructor
    · intro hn; rw [card_eq_one] at hn; rcases hn with ⟨a, ha⟩
      simp [Finset.ext_iff] at ha; have := (ha 1).mp (by simp; exact nne)
      have := (ha n).mp (by simp; exact nne); linarith
    intro hn; simp [hn]

  intro p ppr; rw [← lm, ← hf]; have hfp : ∀ p, p.Prime → f (f p) = 2 := by
    intro q qpr; rw [hf, qpr.divisors, card_eq_two]; use 1; use q; simp
    exact Ne.symm qpr.ne_one

  rw [hfp p ppr]; have ff2 := hf (f 2); rw [hfp 2 Nat.prime_two] at ff2
  have auxsubs : (f 2).divisors ⊆ Icc 1 (f 2) := by
    simp [subset_iff]; intro d hd _; specialize fpos 2 (by simp); constructor
    · apply Nat.pos_of_dvd_of_pos at hd; specialize hd fpos; linarith
    apply Nat.le_of_dvd; all_goals assumption
  apply eq_iff_card_le_of_subset at auxsubs; simp [← ff2] at auxsubs; by_cases h : 2 < f 2

  · have : f 2 - 1 ∣ f 2 := by
      suffices : f 2 - 1 ∈ Icc 1 (f 2); simp [← auxsubs] at this; exact this.left
      simp; rw [Nat.le_sub_iff_add_le]; all_goals linarith
    nth_rw 2 [show f 2 = f 2 - 1 + 1 by rw [Nat.sub_add_cancel]; linarith] at this
    simp [Nat.dvd_add_self_left] at this; linarith
  push_neg at h; have := fpos 2 (by simp); interval_cases hf2 : f 2

  · have hfp' : ∀ p, p.Prime → f p = 1 := by
      intro p ppr; specialize fpos p ppr.pos; suffices : (f p).divisors.card = 1
      · rw [card_eq_one] at this; rcases this with ⟨a, ha⟩
        simp [Finset.ext_iff] at ha; have := (ha 1).mp (by simp; linarith)
        have := (ha (f p)).mp (by simp; linarith); linarith
      rw [← hf, hfp p ppr, hf2]
    have : Nat.divisors 4 = {1, 2, 4} := by decide
    apply_fun fun t => t.card at this; simp [← hf] at this
    apply_fun f at this; rw [hfp' 3 Nat.prime_three, hf (f 4), lm'] at this
    apply_fun f at this; rw [hf, show Nat.divisors 4 = {1, 2, 4} by decide] at this; simp at this
    rw [← hf2, hfp 2 Nat.prime_two] at this; linarith
    specialize fpos 4 (by simp); linarith

  rfl

theorem my_favorite_theorem (x y : ℤ) : x^5 + 3 * x^4 * y - 5 * x^3 * y^2 - 15 * x^2 * y^3 + 4 * x * y^4 + 12 * y^5 ≠ 33 := by

by_contra h

  have h1 : x - y ∣ 33 := by
    use (x + 3 * y) * (x + y) * (x - 2 * y) * (x + 2 * y)
    linarith
  have h2 : x + y ∣ 33 := by
    use (x + 3 * y) * (x - y) * (x - 2 * y) * (x + 2 * y)
    linarith
  have h3 : x - y ≤ 33 := by
    apply Int.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) h1
  have h4 : x - y ≥ -33 := by
    linarith[Int.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) (Int.neg_dvd.2 h1)]
  have h5 : x + y ≤ 33 := by
    apply Int.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) h2
  have h6 : x + y ≥ -33 := by
    linarith[Int.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) (Int.neg_dvd.2 h2)]

  have h7 : x ≤ 33 := by omega
  have h8 : x ≥ -33 := by omega
  have h9 : y ≤ 33 := by omega
  have h10 : y ≥ -33 := by omega

  interval_cases x <;> interval_cases y <;> omega

theorem number_theory_95263 {A B : ℕ} (hA : A > 0) (hB : B > 0)
    (hAB : B = A + 1 ∨ B = A - 1) (h : Nat.ofDigits A [2, 3, 1] + Nat.ofDigits B [3,4] = Nat.ofDigits (A + B) [9,6]) :
    A + B = 13 := by

dsimp[Nat.ofDigits_cons] at h

  zify at hA hB h
  zify
  simp at h

  have eq : ↑A^2 - 3 * ↑A - 2 * ↑B - (4 : ℤ) = 0 := by linarith

  rcases hAB with (rfl|rfl)
  · -- so either $A^2 - 5A -6 = 0$
    have eq' : ↑ A^2 - 5 * ↑ A - (6 : ℤ) = 0 := by rw[Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one] at eq; omega

    have eq'' : (↑ A - 6) * (↑ A + (1 : ℤ)) = 0 := by linarith
    rw[mul_eq_zero] at eq''
    rcases eq'' with (eq''|eq'')

    · rw[sub_eq_zero] at eq''
      rw[eq'', Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, eq'']
      rfl

    · rw[Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, eq''] at hB
      exfalso
      exact lt_irrefl _ hB

  · have le : 1 ≤ A := by
      rw[← Nat.cast_zero, Nat.cast_lt] at hA
      rwa[Order.one_le_iff_pos]
    rw[Nat.cast_sub le, sub_pos] at hB
    have eq' : ↑ A^2 - 5 * ↑ A - (2 : ℤ) = 0 := by
      rw[Nat.cast_sub le, Nat.cast_one] at eq; linarith
    have eq'' : ↑ A^2 = 5 * ↑ A + (2 : ℤ) := by rw[← sub_eq_zero, ← sub_sub, eq']

    have ltfive : ↑ A ≤ (6 : ℤ) := by
      rw[← not_lt]
      intro lt
      have square_lt : (6 : ℤ) * A < A^2 := by
        rw[pow_two, mul_lt_mul_right] <;> assumption

      have : (5 : ℤ) * ↑A + 2 < ↑A ^ 2 := by
        trans 6 * A <;> linarith
      rw[← eq''] at this
      exact lt_irrefl _ this

    have : (A : ℤ) ∈ Finset.Ioc 0 6 := by simp[hA, ltfive]

    fin_cases this <;> {exfalso; simp at eq'}

theorem number_theory_213140 (m n p : ℕ) (hm : m > 0) (hn : n > 0)

        rw [← dvd_gcd_mul_iff_dvd_mul, m_coprime, one_mul] at m_dvd
        obtain ⟨α,hα⟩ := m_dvd

        have n_dvd : n ∣ (2 * m + 3) * (4 * n + 1) := by

        rw [hα, hβ, (by ring_nf : n * β * (m * α) = (α * β) * m * n)] at eq
        simp at eq

        · rcases eq with eq | mzero

            · rw [β1.2, mul_one] at hβ eq

              have pminus8_coe : (p : ℤ) - 8 = Int.ofNat (p - 8) := by

              have new_eq_N : m * (p - 8) = 13 := by

              rcases this with primem | m1

theorem algebra_155546 {u : ℕ → ℝ} (hu1 : u 1 = 5)
    (hun : ∀ n ≥ 1, u (n + 1) = u n + (2 * n + 5)) :
    (∀ n ≥ 1, u n = n ^ 2 + 4 * n) ∧
    (∀ n ≥ 1, (∑ i ∈ Finset.Icc (1 : ℕ) n, (2 * i + 3 : ℝ) ^ 2) / n ≥ (n + 4) ^ 2) := by

have goal1 : ∀ n ≥ 1, u n = n ^ 2 + 4 * n := by
    intro n hn
    induction n, hn using Nat.le_induction with
    | base =>
      norm_num [hu1]
    | succ n hn ih =>
      rw [hun _ hn, ih]
      rify
      ring
  use goal1
  have h₁ (n : ℕ) (hn : n ≥ 1) : ∑ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 n, ((2 * i + 3) : ℝ) = u n := by
    induction n, hn using Nat.le_induction with
    | base =>
      norm_num [hu1]
    | succ n hn ih =>
      rw [Finset.sum_Icc_succ_top (by omega), ih]
      rify
      linear_combination -hun n hn
  intro n hn
  have h₂ := Finset.sum_mul_sq_le_sq_mul_sq (Finset.Icc (1 : ℕ) n) (fun i ↦ 1) (fun i ↦ (2 * i + 3 : ℝ))
  simp [h₁ n hn, goal1 n hn] at h₂
  rw [show (n ^ 2 + 4 * n : ℝ) ^ 2 = n * ((n + 4) ^ 2 * n) by ring, mul_le_mul_left (Nat.cast_pos'.mpr hn)] at h₂
  rwa [ge_iff_le, le_div_iff₀ (Nat.cast_pos'.mpr hn)]

theorem algebra_93047 : IsGreatest {k : ℕ | ∃ a : ℤ, ∑ i ∈ Finset.range k, (a + i + 1) = 45} 90 := by

{

  suffices : ∀ k : ℕ, (∃ (a : ℤ), ∑ i ∈ Finset.range k, (a + i + 1) = 45) → k ∣ 90
  constructor

  simp
  use -45
  norm_num

  unfold upperBounds
  simp
  intros k a h
  apply Nat.le_of_dvd (by norm_num)
  apply this
  use a

  have hsum : ∀ k : ℕ, (∑ i ∈ Finset.range k, (i : ℤ))*2 = k * (k-1) := by {
    intro k
    by_cases hk0 : k = 0
    rw [hk0]
    trivial
    have : ∑ i ∈ Finset.range k, (i : ℤ) = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range k, i := by norm_num
    rw [this]
    rw [←Ne.eq_def,←Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero] at hk0
    norm_cast
    rw [Finset.sum_range_id_mul_two]
  }

  intros k h
  rcases h with ⟨a,ha⟩

  rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib,Finset.sum_add_distrib,Finset.sum_const,Finset.sum_const] at ha
  simp at ha
  by_cases hk1 : 1 ≤ k
  have ha' : (k : ℤ)*(2*a + k + 1) = 90 := by {
    have : (90 : ℤ) = 45 * 2 := by norm_num
    rw [this,←ha]
    rw [mul_add,mul_add,add_mul,add_mul,hsum] -- Here we use Gauss' sum of integers
    ring
  }
  rw [←Int.natCast_dvd_natCast]
  use 2*a+k+1 -- Since we have written 90 as a product of k and another integers, the claim follows.
  rw [ha']
  trivial

  simp at hk1
  rw [hk1] at ha
  simp at ha

}

def man_cnt := 49
def woman_cnt := 50
def p_peter_left_is_man : ℚ := man_cnt / (man_cnt + woman_cnt)
def p_peter_left_is_man_and_right_is_man : ℚ :=
  p_peter_left_is_man * (man_cnt - 1) / (man_cnt + woman_cnt - 1)
def p_peter_satisfied : ℚ := 1 - p_peter_left_is_man_and_right_is_man
theorem combinatorics_4040_a : p_peter_satisfied = (25:ℚ) / 33 := by
  rw [p_peter_satisfied, p_peter_left_is_man_and_right_is_man, p_peter_left_is_man, man_cnt, woman_cnt]
  ring
def p_one_man_is_satisfied : ℚ := p_peter_satisfied
def e_number_of_satisfied_man : ℚ := (1 + man_cnt) * p_one_man_is_satisfied
theorem combinatorics_4040_b : e_number_of_satisfied_man = (1250:ℚ) / 33 := by

rw [p_peter_satisfied, p_peter_left_is_man_and_right_is_man, p_peter_left_is_man, man_cnt, woman_cnt]
  ring

def p_one_man_is_satisfied : ℚ := p_peter_satisfied

def e_number_of_satisfied_man : ℚ := (1 + man_cnt) * p_one_man_is_satisfied

theorem combinatorics_4040_b : e_number_of_satisfied_man = (1250:ℚ) / 33 := by
  rw [e_number_of_satisfied_man, man_cnt, p_one_man_is_satisfied, combinatorics_4040_a]
  ring

theorem algebra_98011 (x b : ℝ) (hx : x > 1) (hb: b ≥ 2)
(h1 : 3 * Real.logb b (Real.sqrt x * Real.logb b x) = 56)
(h2 : Real.logb (Real.logb b x) x = 54) (h2' : 0 < Real.logb b x) (h2'': Real.logb b x ≠ 1)
: b = 216 := by

have h_b_nn : 0 ≤ b := by linarith
  have h_b_p : 0 < b := by linarith
  have h_b_no : b ≠ 1 := by linarith
  have h_x_p : 0 < x := by linarith
  have h2''' : 0 ≤ Real.logb b x := by linarith

  have h2: (Real.logb b x)^(54:ℝ) = x := by
    exact (Real.logb_eq_iff_rpow_eq h2' h2'' h_x_p).mp h2
  nth_rw 1 [← h2] at h1

  have {y : ℝ} (h: 0 ≤ y) : √ (y^(54:ℝ)) = y^(27:ℝ) := by
    calc
      √ (y^ (54:ℝ)) = √ (y^((27:ℝ)*2)) := by norm_num
      _ = √ ((y^(27:ℝ))^2) := by
        rw [Real.rpow_mul h (27:ℝ) (2:ℝ)]
        norm_cast
      _ = y^(27:ℝ) := by
        norm_cast
        apply Real.sqrt_sq (pow_nonneg h 27)

  rw [this h2'''] at h1
  norm_cast at h1
  ring_nf at h1

  have (x : ℝ) : x ^ (28:ℝ)  = x ^ 28 := by norm_cast
  rw [← this (Real.logb b x) , Real.logb_rpow_eq_mul_logb_of_pos h2'] at h1
  have h1: 54 * Real.logb b (Real.logb b x) = 54 * 56 / 84 := by linarith

  rw [← Real.logb_rpow_eq_mul_logb_of_pos h2', h2] at h1
  norm_num at h1

  have hx' : (Real.logb b x)^(54:ℝ) = 36^(54:ℝ) := by rw [h1]
  rw [h2] at hx'
  have hx'': b^(36:ℝ) = x := by
    exact (Real.logb_eq_iff_rpow_eq h_b_p h_b_no h_x_p).mp h1

  rw [hx'] at hx''
  norm_cast at hx''
  have : (↑((36:ℕ)^54):ℝ) = (216:ℝ) ^36 := by norm_num
  rw [this] at hx''
  exact (pow_left_inj₀ h_b_nn (by norm_num) (by norm_num)).mp hx''

theorem algebra_22229 (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (h₀ : ∀ x, x ≤ 3 → f x = 2 * x + 1)
    (h₁ : ∀ x, x > 3 → f x = 8 - 4 * x) :
    ∑ᶠ x ∈ {x | f x = 0}, x = -1 / 2 := by

    intro x hx
    by_cases hx' : x ≤ 3
    · rw [h₀ x hx'] at hx
      linarith
    · push_neg at hx'
      rw [h₁ x hx'] at hx

  have h₃ : f (-1 / 2) = 0 := by
    rw [h₀ _ (by norm_num)]
    norm_num
  have h₄ : ∀ x, f x = 0 → x = -1 / 2 := by
    intro x hx
    by_cases hx' : x ≤ 3
    · rw [h₀ x hx'] at hx
      linarith
    · push_neg at hx'
      rw [h₁ x hx'] at hx
      linarith
  have h₅ : ∑ᶠ x ∈ {x | f x = 0}, x = -1 / 2 := by
    have h₆ : {x | f x = 0} = {-1 / 2} := by
      ext x
      simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
      constructor
      · apply h₄
      · intro hx
        rw [hx]
        exact h₃
    rw [h₆]
    simp
  exact h₅

theorem number_theory_601111 :

    List.Nodup (Nat.digits 10 n)} 10395 := by

constructor
  · -- Subgoal : Prove that 10395 satisfies the conditions.

    have h_10395_valid : 10000 ≤ 10395 ∧ 10395 < 100000 ∧ (∃ k : Nat, 10395 = 45 * k) ∧ List.Nodup (Nat.digits 10 10395) := by

    intro n h_n

    have h_9990_not_five : 45 * 222 = 9990 ∧ 9990 < 10000 := by
      norm_num

      intros k h_k

      · have h_digits_10035 : Nat.digits 10 10035 = [5, 3, 0, 0, 1] := by norm_num

      · have h_digits_10080 : Nat.digits 10 10080 = [0, 8, 0, 0, 1] := by norm_num
        rw [h_digits_10080]
        simp [List.Nodup]
      · have h_digits_10125 : Nat.digits 10 10125 = [5, 2, 1, 0, 1] := by norm_num
        rw [h_digits_10125]
        simp [List.Nodup]
      · have h_digits_10170 : Nat.digits 10 10170 = [0, 7, 1, 0, 1] := by norm_num
        rw [h_digits_10170]
        simp [List.Nodup]
      · have h_digits_10215 : Nat.digits 10 10215 = [5, 1, 2, 0, 1] := by norm_num
        rw [h_digits_10215]
        simp [List.Nodup]
      · have h_digits_10260 : Nat.digits 10 10260 = [0, 6, 2, 0, 1] := by norm_num
        rw [h_digits_10260]
        simp [List.Nodup]
      · have h_digits_10305 : Nat.digits 10 10305 = [5, 0, 3, 0, 1] := by norm_num
        rw [h_digits_10305]
        simp [List.Nodup]
      · have h_digits_10350 : Nat.digits 10 10350 = [0, 5, 3, 0, 1] := by norm_num
        rw [h_digits_10350]
        simp [List.Nodup]

    have h_n_ge_10395 : n ≥ 10395 := by
      rcases h_n with ⟨h_five_lower, h_five_upper, h_div_45, h_no_repeats⟩
      obtain ⟨k, h_n_eq_45k⟩ := h_div_45
      have h_k_ge_223 : k ≥ 223 := by omega
      have h_k_ge_231 : k ≥ 231 := by
        by_contra h_k_lt_231
        have h_k_le_230 : k ≤ 230 := by nlinarith
        have h_k_in_223_230 : 223 ≤ k ∧ k ≤ 230 := ⟨h_k_ge_223, h_k_le_230⟩
        have h_repeats : ¬List.Nodup (Nat.digits 10 (45 * k)) := h_k_lt_231_repeats k h_k_in_223_230
        rw [← h_n_eq_45k] at h_repeats
        contradiction
      nlinarith
    exact h_n_ge_10395

theorem inequalities_224814 (a b c : ℝ) (ha : 0 < a) (hb : 0 < b) (hc : 0 < c)
    (h : a^2 + b^2 + c^2 = 1) :
    Real.sqrt 3 ≤ a * b / c + b * c / a + c * a / b := by

have h4 : a * b / c + b * c / a + c * a / b ≥ Real.sqrt 3 := by

    have h1 : (a * b / c + b * c / a + c * a / b) ^ 2 ≥ 3 := by

      have h2 : (a * b / c + b * c / a + c * a / b) ^ 2 = (a * b / c) ^ 2 + (b * c / a) ^ 2 + (c * a / b) ^ 2 + 2 * ((a * b / c) * (b * c / a) + (b * c / a) * (c * a / b) + (c * a / b) * (a * b / c)) := by
        ring
      rw [h2]

      have h3 : (a * b / c) * (b * c / a) + (b * c / a) * (c * a / b) + (c * a / b) * (a * b / c) = a^2 + b^2 + c^2 := by
        field_simp
        ring
      rw [h3, h]

      have h4 : (a * b / c) ^ 2 + (b * c / a) ^ 2 + (c * a / b) ^ 2 ≥ 1 := by

        have _ : (a * b / c - b * c / a) ^ 2 + (b * c / a - c * a / b) ^ 2 + (c * a / b - a * b / c) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := by
          nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a * b / c - b * c / a), sq_nonneg (b * c / a - c * a / b), sq_nonneg (c * a / b - a * b / c)]
        nlinarith
      nlinarith [h4]

    have h5 : a * b / c + b * c / a + c * a / b ≥ 0 := by
      apply add_nonneg
      apply add_nonneg

      · apply div_nonneg
        · apply mul_nonneg
          · linarith
          · linarith
        · linarith

      · apply div_nonneg
        · apply mul_nonneg
          · linarith
          · linarith
        · linarith

      · apply div_nonneg
        · apply mul_nonneg
          · linarith
          · linarith
        · linarith

    have h7 : (Real.sqrt 3) ^ 2 = 3 := Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)

    nlinarith [h1, Real.le_sqrt_of_sq_le (show (Real.sqrt 3) ^ 2 ≤ (a * b / c + b * c / a + c * a / b) ^ 2 by nlinarith)]

  linarith [h4]

theorem algebra_231729 (a : ℕ → ℝ) (ha : ∀ n, 0 < a n)
    (h1 : a 1 = 1) (h2 : a 2 = 1) (h3 : a 3 = 997)
    (h4 : ∀ n, a (n + 3) = (1993 + a (n + 2) * a (n + 1)) / a n) :
    ∀ n, ∃ m : ℤ, a n = m := by

have h0 : a 0 = 2 := by
    specialize h4 0; simp [h1, h2, h3] at h4
    norm_num at h4
    apply congr_arg (fun x => x * (a 0)/997) at h4
    rw [div_mul, div_self (by linarith [ha 0])] at h4
    norm_num at h4; assumption

  have h4' : ∀ n, a (n + 3) * a n = 1993 + a (n + 2) * a (n + 1) := by
    intro n
    specialize h4 n; rw[h4]
    rw [div_mul, div_self (by linarith [ha n])]; ring_nf

  have h5 : ∀ n, a (n + 3) * a n - a (n + 4) * a (n+1) = 1993 + a (n + 2) * a (n + 1) - (1993 + a (n + 3) * a (n + 2)) := by
    intro n
    rw [h4' (n+1), h4' n]
  simp at h5

  have h6 : ∀ n, a (n+4) + a (n+2) = a (n+3) / a (n+1) * (a (n+2) + a n) := by
    intro n; specialize h5 n
    apply congr_arg (fun t => (t + a (n + 4) * a (n + 1) + a (n + 3) * a (n + 2)) / (a (n+1))) at h5

    conv_lhs at h5 =>
      calc (a (n + 3) * a n - a (n + 4) * a (n + 1) + a (n + 4) * a (n + 1) + a (n + 3) * a (n + 2)) / a (n + 1)
      _ = a (n + 3) * (a n + a (n + 2)) / a (n + 1) := by ring_nf
      _ = a (n + 3) / a (n + 1) * (a (n + 2) + a n) := by ring_nf
    conv_rhs at h5 =>
      calc (a (n + 2) * a (n + 1) - a (n + 3) * a (n + 2) + a (n + 4) * a (n + 1) + a (n + 3) * a (n + 2)) / a (n + 1)
      _ = (a (n + 2) + a (n + 4)) * (a (n + 1) / a (n + 1)) := by ring_nf
      _ = (a (n + 2) + a (n + 4)) := by rw [div_self (by linarith [ha (n+1)]), mul_one]
      _ = a (n + 4) + a (n + 2) := by ring_nf
    exact h5.symm

  have h7: ∀ n, a (2*n+4) + a (2*n+2) = 3 * a (2*n+3) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    |zero => simp; rw [h4 1]; simp; rw [h3, h2, h1]; norm_num
    |succ n ih =>
      calc  a (2 * (n + 1) + 4) + a (2 * (n + 1) + 2)
      _ = a (2 * (n + 1) + 3) / a (2 * (n + 1) + 1) * (a (2 * (n + 1) + 2) + a (2 * (n + 1))) := by rw [h6 (2 * (n+1))]
      _ = a (2 * (n + 1) + 3) / a (2 * (n + 1) + 1) * (a (2 * n + 4) + a (2 * n + 2)) := by ring_nf
      _ = a (2 * (n + 1) + 3) / a (2 * (n + 1) + 1) * 3 * a (2*n+3) := by rw [ih]; ring_nf
      _ = a (2 * (n + 1) + 3) * 3 := by ring_nf; rw [mul_assoc (a (5 + n * 2)), mul_inv_cancel₀ (by linarith [ha (3+n*2)]), mul_one];
      _ = 3 * a (2 * (n + 1) + 3)  := by ring_nf

  have h7': ∀ n, a (2*n+4) = 3 * a (2*n+3) - a (2*n+2) := by intro n; linarith [h7 n]

  have h8: ∀ n, a (2*n+5) + a (2*n+3) = 998 * a (2*n+4) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    |zero => simp; rw [h4 2, h4 1]; simp; rw [h3, h2, h1]; norm_num
    |succ n ih =>
      calc  a (2 * (n + 1) + 5) + a (2 * (n + 1) + 3)
      _ = a (2 * (n + 1) + 4) / a (2 * (n + 1) + 2) * (a (2 * (n + 1) + 3) + a (2 * (n + 1) + 1)) := by rw [h6 (2 * (n+1) + 1)]
      _ = a (2 * (n + 1) + 4) / a (2 * (n + 1) + 2) * (a (2 * n + 5) + a (2 * n + 3)) := by ring_nf
      _ = a (2 * (n + 1) + 4) / a (2 * (n + 1) + 2) * 998 * a (2*n+4) := by rw [ih]; ring_nf
      _ = a (2 * (n + 1) + 4) * 998 := by ring_nf; rw [mul_assoc (a (6 + n * 2)), mul_inv_cancel₀ (by linarith [ha (4+n*2)]), mul_one];
      _ = 998 * a (2 * (n + 1) + 4)  := by ring_nf
  have h8': ∀ n, a (2*n+5) = 998 * a (2*n+4) - a (2*n+3) := by intro n; linarith [h8 n]

  intro n
  induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ih
  match n with
  |0 => use 2; trivial
  |1 => use 1; simp [h1]
  |2 => use 1; simp [h2]
  |3 => use 997; trivial
  |n'+4 =>

    have hevenodd := Nat.even_or_odd n'
    cases' hevenodd with heven hodd
    · unfold Even at heven; obtain ⟨r, hr⟩ := heven;
      conv_rhs at hr =>
        calc r+r
        _ = 2*r := by ring_nf
      rw [hr, h7' r]
      obtain ⟨ml, hml⟩ := ih (2 * r + 3) (by linarith)
      obtain ⟨mr, hmr⟩ := ih (2 * r + 2) (by linarith)
      use 3*ml-mr
      rw [hml, hmr]
      norm_cast
    · unfold Odd at hodd; obtain ⟨r, hr⟩ := hodd;
      rw [hr, h8' r]
      obtain ⟨ml, hml⟩ := ih (2 * r + 4) (by linarith)
      obtain ⟨mr, hmr⟩ := ih (2 * r + 3) (by linarith)
      use 998*ml-mr
      rw [hml, hmr]
      norm_cast

theorem algebra_187535 {a : ℝ} (ha : 1 < a ) (ha' : a^2 - 1 ≠ 1) :
    logb a (sqrt (a^2 - 1)) * logb (1 / a) (sqrt (a^2 - 1))^2 /
    (logb (a^2) (a^2 - 1) * logb (a ^ ((1 : ℝ) / 3)) ((a ^ 2  - 1) ^ ((1 : ℝ) / 6))) =
    logb a (sqrt (a^2 - 1)) := by

have : 0 < a^2 - 1  := by
    have : 1^2 < a^2 := by rel [ha]
    linarith

    ring

  rw [show 1/a = a^(-1:ℝ) by norm_cast; simp]

  rw [aux (by positivity)]

  rw [logb_rpow_eq_mul_logb_of_pos (by assumption)]

  have : logb a b ≠ 0 := by exact logb_ne_zero_of_pos_of_ne_one ha this ha'
  field_simp
  ring

theorem algebra_12907 :
    IsLeast {x : ℝ | ∃ a b : ℤ, a > b ∧ x > 0 ∧ x = (a + b) / (a - b) + (a - b) / (a + b)} 2 := by

simp [IsLeast, lowerBounds]
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  . -- The minimum value is achievable by setting a = 1, b = 0.
    use 1
    use 0
    norm_num
  . -- The value 2 is a lower bound to (a + b) / (a - b) + (a - b) / (a + b).
    intro x a b _ xpos hx
    let y : ℝ := (a + b) / (a - b)
    simp [show (a + b) / (a - b) = y by dsimp [y], show (a - b) / (a + b) = 1 / y by rw [<-one_div_div], -one_div] at hx
    have h : 0 ≤ (Real.sqrt y - Real.sqrt (1 / y)) ^ 2 := by
      positivity
    rw [hx]
    replace h : 2 * Real.sqrt y * Real.sqrt (1 / y) ≤ Real.sqrt y ^ 2 + Real.sqrt (1 / y) ^ 2 := by
      linarith only [h]
    rw [mul_assoc, <-Real.sqrt_mul, mul_one_div_cancel, Real.sq_sqrt, Real.sq_sqrt] at h
    norm_num at h ⊢
    exact h
    simp
    all_goals try

      by_contra! yneg
      absurd hx
      simp [<-ne_eq, <-lt_or_lt_iff_ne, -one_div]
      right
      calc
        y + 1 / y < 0 + 0 := by apply add_lt_add; exact yneg; simp; exact yneg
        _ < x := by norm_num; exact xpos
    by_contra! hy
    rw [hy] at hx
    simp at hx
    rw [hx] at xpos
    linarith only [xpos]

theorem algebra_223772 (n : ℕ)
  (hn : n ≥ 10)
  (f : ℕ → ℝ)
  (hf : ∀ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), f k = (n.choose k) * (2/5 : ℝ)^k * (1/5 : ℝ)^(n-k)) :
  (∀ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), k ≠ 9 → f k < f 9)
  ↔ n = 13 := by

constructor
  . intro hk

    have : 25 < 2 * n := by
      have h8:= hk 8 (by simp; omega)
      rw [hf , hf] at h8
      . field_simp at h8
        rw [← pow_add, ← pow_add] at h8
        rw [show 8 + (n - 8) = n by omega] at h8
        rw [show 9 + (n - 9) = n by omega] at h8
        have hpos1: (0 : ℝ) < (5 : ℝ) ^ n := by positivity
        rw [div_lt_iff₀ hpos1] at h8
        field_simp at h8
        rw [show (2:ℝ)^9 = 2*2^8 by norm_num] at h8
        have hpos2 : (0 : ℝ) < 2 ^ 8 := by norm_num
        rw [← lt_div_iff₀ hpos2] at h8
        rw [← mul_assoc] at h8
        field_simp at h8
        norm_cast at h8

        have h8 :  n.choose 8 * 9 < n.choose 9 * 9 * 2 := by linarith
        have := Nat.choose_succ_right_eq n 8
        norm_num at this
        rw [this] at h8
        rw [mul_assoc] at h8

        have hpos3 : 0 < n.choose 8 := by
          apply Nat.choose_pos
          omega
        rw [mul_lt_mul_left hpos3] at h8
        omega

      . simp; omega
      . simp; omega

    have : n < 14 := by
      have h10:= hk 10 (by simp; omega)
      rw [hf, hf] at h10
      . field_simp at h10
        rw [← pow_add, ← pow_add] at h10
        rw [show 10 + (n - 10) = n by omega] at h10
        rw [show 9 + (n - 9) = n by omega] at h10
        have hpos1: (0 : ℝ) < (5 : ℝ) ^ n := by positivity
        rw [div_lt_iff₀ hpos1] at h10
        field_simp at h10
        rw [show (2:ℝ)^10 = 2*2^9 by norm_num] at h10
        have hpos2 : (0 : ℝ) < 2 ^ 9 := by norm_num
        rw [← mul_assoc, ← lt_div_iff₀ hpos2] at h10
        field_simp at h10
        norm_cast at h10
        have h10 :  n.choose 10 * 10 * 2 < n.choose 9 * 10 := by linarith
        have := Nat.choose_succ_right_eq n 9
        norm_num at this
        rw [this] at h10
        rw [mul_assoc] at h10
        have hpos3 : 0 < n.choose 9 := by
          apply Nat.choose_pos
          omega
        rw [mul_lt_mul_left hpos3] at h10
        omega
      . simp; omega
      . simp; omega

    have : n = 13 := by omega
    exact this

  . intro hn k hk
    subst n
    simp at hk
    rw [hf, hf]
    . interval_cases k
      all_goals simp [Nat.choose_eq_factorial_div_factorial]
      all_goals
      . norm_cast
        repeat rw [Nat.factorial_succ]
        norm_num

    . simp
    . simp; exact hk

        replace h5 : ∀ z : ℝ, z ≠ 0 → f (1 / z) = 1 / z * (f (1 / z)) ^ 2:= by

        replace h5 : ∀ x : ℝ, x ≠ 0 → f x = x * (f x) ^ 2:= by

        by_cases h6 : ∀ x : ℝ, x ≠ 0 → f x ≠ 0

    .

        intro h

        .

            specialize h 1 (by simp)
            simp at h
            exact h
        .

            intro x y hx hy hxy
            have h1 : 1 / x ≠ 0:= by
                by_contra H
                simp at H
                trivial
            have h2 : 1 / y ≠ 0:= by
                by_contra H

            have h3 : 1 / (x + y) ≠ 0:= by

            rw [h (1 / x) h1, h (1 / y) h2, h (1 / (x + y)) h3]

      rw [ha2] ; simp; ring_nf
  have ha4 := calc
    1 / (b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 - a ^ 2) = 1 / (b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 -( b + c )^ 2) := ha3
    _ = 1 /(-2* b * c) := by simp ;ring_nf
    _ = - 1 / (2 * b * c):= by ring_nf

    have e := congrArg (fun t  => t - a - c) h ;beta_reduce at e
    rw [show a + b + c  - a - c = b  by ring_nf] at e ; rw[e]
    simp
  have hb3 : 1 / (a ^ 2 + c ^ 2 - b ^ 2) = 1 / (a ^ 2 + c ^ 2 -( a + c )^ 2) := by
      rw [hb2] ; simp; ring_nf
  have hb4 := calc
    1 / (a ^ 2 + c ^ 2 - b ^ 2) = 1 / (a ^ 2 + c ^ 2 -( a + c )^ 2) := hb3
    _ = 1 /(-2* a * c) := by simp ;ring_nf
    _ = - 1 / (2 * a * c):= by ring_nf

  have hc2: c = -a - b :=  by
    have e := congrArg (fun t  => t - a - b) h ;beta_reduce at e
    rw [show a + b + c  - a - b = c  by ring_nf] at e ; rw[e]
    simp
  have hc3 : 1 / (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 - c ^ 2) = 1 / (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 -( a + b )^ 2) := by
      rw [hc2] ; simp; ring_nf
  have hc4 := calc
    1 / (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 - c ^ 2) = 1 / (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 -( a + b )^ 2) := hc3
    _ = 1 /(-2* a * b) := by simp ;ring_nf
    _ = - 1 / (2 * a * b):= by ring_nf

  rw[ha4,hb4,hc4]

    have ha5: -1 /(2 * b * c)= -( a / a )/(2 * b * c) := by

    have hb5: -1 /(2 * a * c)= -( b / b )/(2 * a * c) := by
      rw[div_self];exact hb
    have hc5: -1 /(2 * a * b)= -( c / c )/(2 * a * b) := by
      rw[div_self];exact hc
    rw[ha5,hb5,hc5];ring_nf
  rw[he,h];simp

lemma modEq_iff_modEq_cancel_of_coprime {a b d n: ℕ}
  (hd: d ≠ 0) (hn: n ≠ 0) (co: Nat.Coprime n d):
  d*a ≡ d*b [MOD d*n] ↔ a ≡ b [MOD n] := by
  constructor
  · intro h
    have: n = (d*n) / (Nat.gcd (d*n) d) := by
      rw [Nat.gcd_mul_right_left, mul_div_cancel_left₀ _ hd]
    rw [this]
    refine h.cancel_left_div_gcd ?_
    refine Nat.mul_pos ?_ ?_
    <;> apply Nat.zero_lt_of_ne_zero (by assumption)
  · intro h
    rw [← Nat.modEq_and_modEq_iff_modEq_mul co.symm]
    constructor
    · rw [Nat.modEq_iff_dvd]
      simp only [Nat.cast_mul, ← mul_sub]
      apply Int.dvd_mul_right
    · exact Nat.ModEq.mul rfl h

lemma mul_modEq_iff_modEq_inv_mul {a b x n a_inv: ℕ}
  (h: a_inv * a ≡ 1 [MOD n]):
  a*x ≡ b [MOD n] ↔ x ≡ a_inv * b [MOD n] := by
  constructor
  · intro h1
    have h2: a_inv ≡ a_inv [MOD n] := rfl
    replace h2 := h1.mul h2
    rw [mul_assoc, mul_comm a _, mul_assoc, mul_comm b _] at h2
    apply Nat.ModEq.trans ?_ h2
    nth_rw 1 [← mul_one x]
    apply Nat.ModEq.mul rfl h.symm
  · intro h1
    have h2: a * x ≡ a * (a_inv * b) [MOD n] := by
      apply Nat.ModEq.mul rfl h1
    apply h2.trans ?_
    nth_rw 2 [← one_mul b]
    rw [← mul_assoc, mul_comm a _]
    apply h.mul rfl

theorem number_theory_6285 {x:ℕ}:
  589 * x ≡ 1026 [MOD 817] ↔ x ≡ 17 [MOD 43] := by

  have h1: 589 * x ≡ 1026 [MOD 817] ↔ 31 * x ≡ 54 [MOD 43] := by
    have h1: 589 = 19 * 31 := by norm_num
    have h2: 1026 = 19 * 54 := by norm_num
    have h3: 817 = 19 * 43 := by norm_num
    rw [h1, h2, h3, mul_assoc]
    apply modEq_iff_modEq_cancel_of_coprime
    <;> norm_num

  have h2: 31 * x ≡ 54 [MOD 43] ↔ x ≡ 17 [MOD 43] := by
    have: x ≡ 17 [MOD 43] ↔ x ≡ 25 * 54 [MOD 43] := by
      constructor
      all_goals
        intro h
        apply h.trans ?_
        rfl
    rw [this]
    apply mul_modEq_iff_modEq_inv_mul
    rfl

  rw [h1, h2]

theorem inequalities_6613 {a b c : ℝ} (ha : 0 < a) (hb : 0 < b) (hc : 0 < c)
    (h : a * b + b * c + c * a = 3) :
    12 ≤ (a + b) * (a + b * c) + (b + c) * (b + c * a) + (c + a) * (c + a * b) := by

nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - 1), sq_nonneg (b - 1), sq_nonneg (c - 1),
    mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos ha hc, mul_pos hb hc,
    h, mul_self_nonneg (a - b), mul_self_nonneg (a - c), mul_self_nonneg (b - c)]

theorem number_theory_82568: {n: ℤ | 0 < n ∧ ∃ x y: ℤ, x ∣ n ∧ y ∣ n ∧ 0 < x ∧ x < (n: ℚ) / 3 ∧
(n: ℚ) / 3 < y ∧ y - (n: ℚ) / 3 = (n: ℚ) / 3 - x } = {n: ℤ | ∃ m: ℤ, 0 < m ∧ n = 6 * m} := by

ext n
  constructor

  .
    intro h
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at *
    rcases h with ⟨ln, h⟩
    obtain ⟨x, y, h⟩ := h
    rcases h with ⟨dx, dy, hx1, hx2, hy1, h⟩

    have d3: 3 ∣ n := by
      by_contra! o
      replace h: x + y = (2 * n) / (3: ℚ) := by
        nlinarith
      replace h: 3 * (x + y) = 2 * n := by
        field_simp at h
        norm_cast at h
        omega
      have i: 3 ∣ 2 * n := by
        rw [← h]
        simp
      have h1: IsCoprime (3: ℤ) 2 := by norm_num
      have s: 3 ∣ n := by
        apply IsCoprime.dvd_of_dvd_mul_left h1 i
      tauto
    apply exists_eq_mul_right_of_dvd at d3
    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := d3
    have lk: 0 < k := by omega
    simp [hk] at *
    norm_cast at h
    apply exists_eq_mul_right_of_dvd at dy
    obtain ⟨q, hq⟩ := dy
    have u1: k < y := by
      nlinarith
    have u2: y < 2 * k := by nlinarith
    have lq1: q < 3 := by
      nlinarith
    have lq2: 1 < q := by
      nlinarith
    have sq: q = 2 := by omega
    simp [sq] at *
    have d2: 2 ∣ 3 * k := by
      rw [hq]
      simp
    replace d2: 2 ∣ k := by
      have h1: IsCoprime (2: ℤ) 3 := by norm_num
      apply IsCoprime.dvd_of_dvd_mul_left h1 d2
    apply exists_eq_mul_right_of_dvd at d2
    obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := d2
    use m
    constructor
    .
      omega
    .
      rw [hm]
      omega

  .
    intro h
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at *
    obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := h
    rcases hm with ⟨hn, h⟩
    simp only [h]
    constructor
    .
      omega
    .
      use m
      use 3 * m
      constructor
      .
        simp
      .
        constructor
        .
          rw [show 6 * m = 2 * (3 * m) by ring]
          simp
        .
          constructor
          .
            omega
          .
            constructor
            .
              rw [lt_div_iff₀]
              norm_cast
              linarith
              norm_num
            .
              constructor
              .
                rw [div_lt_iff₀]
                norm_cast
                linarith
                norm_num
              .
                rw [show ↑(3 * m) = 3 * (m: ℚ) by norm_cast]
                rw [show ↑(6 * m) = 6 * (m: ℚ) by norm_cast]
                field_simp
                ring

import Mathlib
theorem number_theory_95080 (S : Finset ℕ) (hS : S ⊆ Finset.Icc 1 30)
    (hS' : S.toSet.Pairwise fun m n ↦ ¬(5 ∣ m + n)) :
    S.card ≤ 13 := by

classical

  have hIcc_mod (r : ℕ) (hr : r < 5) :
      ((Finset.Icc 1 30).filter fun m ↦ m ≡ r [MOD 5]).card = 6 := by
    interval_cases r <;> decide

  have hS_mod (r : ℕ) (hr : r < 5) : (S.filter fun m ↦ m ≡ r [MOD 5]).card ≤ 6 :=
    (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.filter_subset_filter _ hS)).trans (hIcc_mod r hr).le

  have : (S.filter fun m ↦ m ≡ 0 [MOD 5]).card ≤ 1 := by
    by_contra! h_contra : 1 < _
    obtain ⟨a, b, ha, hb, hab⟩ := Finset.one_lt_card_iff.mp h_contra
    rw [Finset.mem_filter] at ha hb
    exact hS' ha.left hb.left hab <| Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero <| ha.right.add hb.right

  have hS_14:
      (S.filter fun m ↦ m ≡ 1 [MOD 5]).card
        + (S.filter fun m ↦ m ≡ 4 [MOD 5]).card
          ≤ 6 := by
    by_cases hS₁ : ∃ m ∈ S, m ≡ 1 [MOD 5]
    · have : ∀ m ∈ S, ¬(m ≡ 4 [MOD 5]) := by
        by_contra! hS₄
        obtain ⟨m, hm, hm'⟩ := hS₁
        obtain ⟨n, hn, hn'⟩ := hS₄
        have : m ≠ n := by
          rintro rfl
          have := hn'.symm.trans hm'
          rw [Nat.ModEq] at this
          norm_num at this
        exact hS' hm hn this <| Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero <| hm'.add hn'
      have : (S.filter fun m ↦ m ≡ 4 [MOD 5]).card = 0 := by
        rwa [Finset.card_filter_eq_zero_iff]
      rw [this, add_zero]
      exact hS_mod 1 (by decide)
    · push_neg at hS₁
      have : (S.filter fun m ↦ m ≡ 1 [MOD 5]).card = 0 := by
        rwa [Finset.card_filter_eq_zero_iff]
      rw [this, zero_add]
      exact hS_mod 4 (by decide)

  have hS_23:
      (S.filter fun m ↦ m ≡ 2 [MOD 5]).card
        + (S.filter fun m ↦ m ≡ 3 [MOD 5]).card
          ≤ 6 := by
    by_cases hS₁ : ∃ m ∈ S, m ≡ 2 [MOD 5]
    · have : ∀ m ∈ S, ¬(m ≡ 3 [MOD 5]) := by
        by_contra! hS₄
        obtain ⟨m, hm, hm'⟩ := hS₁
        obtain ⟨n, hn, hn'⟩ := hS₄
        have : m ≠ n := by
          rintro rfl
          have := hn'.symm.trans hm'
          rw [Nat.ModEq] at this
          norm_num at this
        exact hS' hm hn this <| Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero <| hm'.add hn'
      have : (S.filter fun m ↦ m ≡ 3 [MOD 5]).card = 0 := by
        rwa [Finset.card_filter_eq_zero_iff]
      rw [this, add_zero]
      exact hS_mod 2 (by decide)
    · push_neg at hS₁
      have : (S.filter fun m ↦ m ≡ 2 [MOD 5]).card = 0 := by
        rwa [Finset.card_filter_eq_zero_iff]
      rw [this, zero_add]
      exact hS_mod 3 (by decide)

  have h_filter_aux {p q : ℕ → Prop} [DecidablePred p] [DecidablePred q] :
      (S.filter (fun m ↦ p m ∨ q m)).card ≤ (S.filter p).card + (S.filter q).card := by
    rw [Finset.filter_or]
    apply Finset.card_union_le

  calc

    S.card = (S.filter fun m ↦ m ≡ 0 [MOD 5]).card + (S.filter fun m ↦ ¬m ≡ 0 [MOD 5]).card :=
      (Finset.filter_card_add_filter_neg_card_eq_card _).symm
    _ ≤ 1 + (S.filter fun m ↦ ¬m ≡ 0 [MOD 5]).card := by
      gcongr
    _ = 1 + ((S.filter fun m ↦ ¬m ≡ 0 [MOD 5]).filter fun m ↦ (m ≡ 1 [MOD 5] ∨ m ≡ 4 [MOD 5])).card
        + ((S.filter fun m ↦ ¬m ≡ 0 [MOD 5]).filter fun m ↦ ¬(m ≡ 1 [MOD 5] ∨ m ≡ 4 [MOD 5])).card := by
      rw [add_assoc]
      congr 1
      exact (Finset.filter_card_add_filter_neg_card_eq_card _).symm
    _ = 1 + (S.filter fun m ↦ (m ≡ 1 [MOD 5] ∨ m ≡ 4 [MOD 5])).card
        + ((S.filter fun m ↦ ¬m ≡ 0 [MOD 5]).filter fun m ↦ ¬(m ≡ 1 [MOD 5] ∨ m ≡ 4 [MOD 5])).card := by
      congr 3
      ext m
      simp
      intro hm _
      simp_rw [Nat.ModEq] at hm ⊢
      rcases hm with hm | hm <;> (rw [hm]; decide)
    _ = 1 + (S.filter fun m ↦ (m ≡ 1 [MOD 5] ∨ m ≡ 4 [MOD 5])).card
        + (S.filter fun m ↦ (¬m ≡ 0 [MOD 5]) ∧ ¬(m ≡ 1 [MOD 5] ∨ m ≡ 4 [MOD 5])).card := by
      rw [Finset.filter_filter]
    _ = 1 + (S.filter fun m ↦ (m ≡ 1 [MOD 5] ∨ m ≡ 4 [MOD 5])).card
        + (S.filter fun m ↦ (m ≡ 2 [MOD 5] ∨ m ≡ 3 [MOD 5])).card := by
      congr 3
      ext m
      mod_cases m % 5 <;> (simp [Nat.ModEq] at H ⊢; simp_rw [H]; decide)
    _ ≤ 1 + 6 + 6 := by
      gcongr
      · exact h_filter_aux.trans hS_14
      · exact h_filter_aux.trans hS_23

theorem number_theory_97186 :
{(a, b, c) : ℕ × ℕ × ℕ | a ≥ 2 ∧ b ≥ 1 ∧ c ≥ 0 ∧ Real.logb a b = c ^ 2005 ∧ a + b + c = 2005}.ncard = 2 := by

suffices h : {(a, b, c) : ℕ × ℕ × ℕ | a ≥ 2 ∧ b ≥ 1 ∧ c ≥ 0 ∧ Real.logb a b = c ^ 2005 ∧ a + b + c = 2005} = {(2004, 1, 0), (1002, 1002, 1)} by rw [h]; simp

  apply Set.eq_of_subset_of_subset

  intro (a, b, c) habc
  obtain ⟨ha, hb, hc, h1, h2⟩ := habc

  have h1 : a ^ (c ^ 2005) = b := by
    rw [(Real.logb_eq_iff_rpow_eq _ _ _)] at h1
    norm_cast at h1
    all_goals norm_cast <;> linarith
  rw [←h1] at h2

  match c with
  | 0 => simp at h1 h2; simp [h1, h2] -- First solution
  | 1 => simp at h1 h2; simp; omega -- Second solution
  | c + 2 => -- In this case b is too big, obtain a contradiction
    have : 2005 > 2005 := by calc
    2005 = a + a ^ (c + 2) ^ 2005 + (c + 2) := by rw [h2]
       _ > a ^ (c + 2) ^ 2005 := by omega
       _ ≥ 2 ^ (c + 2) ^ 2005 := by apply (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_left ha)
       _ ≥ 2 ^ 2 ^ 2005       := by apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right; simp; apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_left; simp
       _ ≥ 2 ^ 2 ^ 4          := by repeat apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right; simp; apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right <;> simp
       _ > 2005               := by simp
    linarith

  intro (a, b, c) habc
  simp; simp at habc; cases habc <;> simp [*]

open Polynomial

namespace algebra_210421

theorem exists_eq_mul_and_eq_mul_of_mul_eq_mul
    {a b x y : ℤ} (h : IsCoprime a b) (hxy : a * x = b * y) :
    ∃ k : ℤ, x = b * k ∧ y = a * k := by
  by_cases hb : b = 0
  · subst hb
    rw [isCoprime_zero_right] at h
    obtain rfl | rfl := Int.isUnit_eq_one_or h
    · simpa using hxy
    · use - 1 * y
      simpa using hxy
  · have h1 : b ∣ a * x := by simp [hxy]
    have h2 : b ∣ x :=
      IsCoprime.dvd_of_dvd_mul_left (IsCoprime.symm h) h1
    obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := h2
    use k
    simp only [true_and]
    apply mul_left_cancel₀ hb
    rw [← hxy]
    ring

end algebra_210421

open algebra_210421

theorem algebra_210421 {P : ℤ[X]} (hP0 : |coeff P 0| < 1000)
    (hP : eval 19 P = 1994 ∧ eval 94 P = 1994) : coeff P 0 = 208 := by

by_cases hb : b = 0
  · subst hb
    rw [isCoprime_zero_right] at h
    obtain rfl | rfl := Int.isUnit_eq_one_or h
    · simpa using hxy
    · use - 1 * y
      simpa using hxy
  · have h1 : b ∣ a * x := by simp [hxy]
    have h2 : b ∣ x :=
      IsCoprime.dvd_of_dvd_mul_left (IsCoprime.symm h) h1
    obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := h2
    use k
    simp only [true_and]
    apply mul_left_cancel₀ hb
    rw [← hxy]
    ring

end algebra_210421

open algebra_210421

theorem algebra_210421 {P : ℤ[X]} (hP0 : |coeff P 0| < 1000)
    (hP : eval 19 P = 1994 ∧ eval 94 P = 1994) : coeff P 0 = 208 := by

  let Q := Polynomial.divX P
  have hQ : X * Q + C (coeff P 0) = P := (X_mul_divX_add P)

  rw [← hQ] at hP
  simp only [eq_intCast, eval_add, eval_mul, eval_X, eval_intCast, Int.cast_id] at hP
  rcases hP with ⟨hP1, hP2⟩
  set m := eval 19 Q with hm
  set n := eval 94 Q with hn

  have eq1 : 19 * m = 94 * n := by
    apply add_right_cancel (b := coeff P 0)
    rw [hP1, hP2]
  have eq2 : ∃ k : ℤ, m = 94 * k ∧ n = 19 * k :=
    exists_eq_mul_and_eq_mul_of_mul_eq_mul (by norm_num) eq1

  obtain ⟨k, hmk, hnk⟩ := eq2
  simp only [hn, hnk] at hP2
  ring_nf at hP2
  rw [abs_lt] at hP0

  have hk : k = 1 := by
    by_cases hk : 2 ≤ |k|
    · rw [le_abs'] at hk
      absurd hP0
      rcases hk with hk1 | hk2
      <;> linarith
    · simp only [le_abs, not_or, not_le, n] at hk
      rcases hk with ⟨hk1, hk2⟩
      replace hk1 : k ≤ 1 := by linarith only [hk1]
      replace hk2 : k ≥ -1 := by linarith only [hk2]
      interval_cases k
      · absurd hP0
        linarith
      · absurd hP0
        linarith
      · rfl
  subst hk
  rw [← hn, hnk] at hP2
  apply add_left_cancel (a := 19 * 1 * 94)
  rw [hP2]
  norm_num

theorem algebra_9129 {s : ℝ → ℝ} (hs : s = fun t => t ^ 2 + 3 / t) :
    deriv s 2 = 13 / 4 := by

rw [hs, deriv_add (differentiableAt_pow 2),
    deriv_div (differentiableAt_const 3) differentiableAt_id' (by norm_num)]
  norm_num

  . apply DifferentiableAt.div
    . exact differentiableAt_const 3
    . exact differentiableAt_id'
    . norm_num

theorem number_theory_635098 (N : ℕ) (hN : 2 ≤ N) :
  ∏ i ∈ Icc 2 N, ((1 : ℝ) - (fib i : ℝ) ^ 2 / (fib (i + 1) : ℝ) ^ 2) = fib (N + 2) / (2 * fib N * fib (N + 1)) := by

by_cases hN2 : N = 2
  · rw [hN2]
    simp
    norm_num
  have hNge : N ≥ 3 := by
    omega
  have h1 : ∏ i ∈ Icc 2 N, ((1 : ℝ) - (fib i : ℝ) ^ 2 / (fib (i + 1) : ℝ) ^ 2)
    = ∏ i ∈ Icc 2 N, ((fib (i - 1) * fib (i + 2) : ℝ) / (fib (i + 1) ^ 2)) := by
    apply prod_congr rfl
    intro i hi
    simp at hi
    have ipos : i + 1 > 0 := by
      linarith
    have neq : fib (i + 1) ≠ 0 := by
      have pos1 : fib (i + 1) > 0 := by
        exact fib_pos.mpr ipos
      linarith
    field_simp
    have aux1 : (fib (i + 1) : ℝ) ^ 2 - (fib i) ^ 2 =
      (fib (i - 1) * fib (i + 2) : ℝ) := by
      have aux2 : fib (i - 1) = fib (i + 1) - fib (i) := by
        rw [show i + 1 = i - 1 + 2 by omega, fib_add_two]
        rw [show i - 1 + 1 = i by omega]
        simp
      rw [aux2]
      have aux3 : fib (i + 2) = fib (i + 1) + fib (i) := by
        rw [fib_add_two]
        ring
      rw [aux3, Nat.cast_sub]
      norm_num
      ring
      exact fib_le_fib_succ
    rw [aux1]
  rw [h1, prod_div_distrib, prod_mul_distrib]
  have eq1 : ∏ x ∈ Icc 2 N, (fib (x + 1) : ℝ) = (∏ x ∈ Icc 2 (N -2), (fib (x + 1) : ℝ))* fib (N) * fib (N + 1) := by
    have seteq1 : Icc 2 N = insert N (Icc 2 (N - 1)) := by
      nth_rw 1 [show N = N - 1 + 1 by omega]
      nth_rw 2 [show N = N - 1 + 1 by omega]
      refine Eq.symm (Icc_insert_succ_right ?_)
      omega
    have seteq2 : Icc 2 (N - 1) = insert (N - 1) (Icc 2 (N - 2)):= by
      nth_rw 1 2 [show N - 1 = N - 2 + 1 by omega]
      refine Eq.symm (Icc_insert_succ_right ?_)
      omega
    rw [seteq1, prod_insert, seteq2, prod_insert]
    rw [show N - 1 + 1 = N by omega]
    norm_cast
    ring
    simp
    omega
    simp
    omega
  have neq1 : ∏ x ∈ Icc 2 N, (fib (x + 1) : ℝ) ^ 2  ≠ 0 := by
    have pos : ∏ x ∈ Icc 2 N, (fib (x + 1) : ℝ) ^ 2 > 0 := by
      apply prod_pos
      intro i hi
      norm_cast
      simp at hi
      have ipos : i + 1 > 0 := by
        linarith
      have neq : fib (i + 1) ≠ 0 := by
        have pos1 : fib (i + 1) > 0 := by
          exact fib_pos.mpr ipos
        linarith
      exact pow_two_pos_of_ne_zero neq
    linarith
  have neq2 : ((2 : ℝ) * (fib N) * (fib (N + 1))) ≠ 0 := by
    have pos1 : fib N > 0 := by
      apply fib_pos.mpr
      linarith
    have pos2 : fib (N + 1) > 0 := by
      apply fib_pos.mpr
      linarith
    norm_cast
    positivity
  field_simp
  have eq2 : (∏ x ∈ Icc 2 N, (fib (x - 1) : ℝ)) = ∏ x ∈ Icc 0 (N - 2), (fib (x + 1) : ℝ) := by
    let t : ℕ → ℕ := fun x => x + 2
    let s : ℕ → ℕ := fun x => x - 2
    refine prod_nbij' s t ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_
    · simp
      unfold s
      omega
    · simp
      unfold t
      omega
    · simp
      unfold t s
      omega
    · simp
      unfold t s
      omega
    · simp
      unfold s
      intro a ha1 ha2
      congr
      omega
  rw [eq2]
  have eq3 : ∏ x ∈ Icc 2 N, (fib (x + 2) : ℝ) = ∏ x ∈ Icc 3 (N + 1), (fib (x + 1) : ℝ) := by
    let s : ℕ → ℕ := fun x => x + 1
    let t : ℕ → ℕ := fun x => x - 1
    refine prod_nbij' s t ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_
    · simp
      unfold s
      omega
    · simp
      unfold t
      omega
    · simp
      unfold t s
      omega
    · simp
      unfold t s
      omega
    · simp
  rw [eq3, prod_pow, eq1]
  have eq4 : (∏ x ∈ Icc 0 (N - 2), (fib (x + 1) : ℝ)) =
    fib 1 * fib 2 * (∏ x ∈ Icc 2 (N - 2), (fib (x + 1) : ℝ)) := by
    have seteq1 : Icc 0 (N - 2) = insert 0 (insert 1 (Icc 2 (N - 2))) := by
      refine Finset.ext_iff.mpr ?_
      intro i
      simp
      omega
    rw [seteq1, prod_insert, prod_insert]
    norm_num
    simp
    simp
  rw [eq4]
  norm_num
  have eq5 : fib 3 * ∏ x ∈ Icc 3 (N + 1), (fib (x + 1) : ℝ) =
    (∏ x ∈ Icc 2 (N - 2), (fib (x + 1) : ℝ)) * fib (N + 2) * fib (N + 1) * fib (N) := by
    have seteq1 : Icc 2 (N + 1) = insert 2 (Icc 3 (N + 1)) := by
      refine Eq.symm (Icc_insert_succ_left ?_)
      linarith
    have aux1 : fib 3 * ∏ x ∈ Icc 3 (N + 1), (fib (x + 1) : ℝ) =
      ∏ x ∈ Icc 2 (N + 1), (fib (x + 1) : ℝ) := by
      rw [seteq1, prod_insert]
      ring_nf
      simp
    rw [aux1]
    have seteq2 : Icc 2 (N + 1) = insert (N + 1) (Icc 2 N) := by
      refine Eq.symm (Icc_insert_succ_right ?_)
      linarith
    have seteq3 : Icc 2 N = insert N (Icc 2 (N - 1)) := by
      nth_rw 1 [show N = N - 1 + 1 by omega]
      nth_rw 2 [show N = N - 1 + 1 by omega]
      refine Eq.symm (Icc_insert_succ_right ?_)
      omega
    have seteq4 : Icc 2 (N - 1) = insert (N - 1) (Icc 2 (N - 2)):= by
      nth_rw 1 2 [show N - 1 = N - 2 + 1 by omega]
      refine Eq.symm (Icc_insert_succ_right ?_)
      omega
    rw [seteq2, prod_insert, seteq3, prod_insert, seteq4, prod_insert]
    rw [show N - 1 + 1 = N by omega, show N + 1 + 1 = N + 2 by omega]
    norm_cast
    ring
    simp
    omega
    simp
    omega
    simp
  have eq6 : ((∏ x ∈ Icc 2 (N - 2), ↑(fib (x + 1))) * ∏ x ∈ Icc 3 (N + 1), ↑(fib (x + 1))) * (2 * ↑(fib N) * ↑(fib (N + 1))) =  (∏ x ∈ Icc 2 (N - 2), (fib (x + 1) : ℝ)) * ((fib 3 : ℝ) * ∏ x ∈ Icc 3 (N + 1), ↑(fib (x + 1))) * ((fib N : ℝ) * (fib (N + 1) : ℝ)) := by
    norm_num
    ring
  rw [eq6, eq5]
  ring

import Mathlib
theorem number_theory_11500 (n : ℕ) (hn : n > 2^3) :
    Nat.gcd (n^3 + 3^2) (n + 2) = 1 := by

refine Eq.symm (Nat.gcd_greatest (Nat.one_dvd (n ^ 3 + 3 ^ 2)) (Nat.one_dvd (n + 2)) ?hd)
  intro e h₁ h₂

  have : e ∣ n ^ 2 * (n + 2) := Dvd.dvd.mul_left h₂ (n ^ 2)
  have sec : e ∣ (n ^ 2 * (n + 2) - (n ^ 3 + 3 ^ 2)) := Nat.dvd_sub' this h₁
  have : n ^ 2 * (n + 2) - (n ^ 3 + 3 ^ 2) = 2 * n ^ 2 - 9 := by
    refine (Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add ?h).mpr ?_
    nlinarith
    have : n ^ 2 * (n + 2) = n ^ 3 + 2 * n ^ 2 := by ring
    rw [this]
    have : 2 * n ^ 2 - 9 + (n ^ 3 + 3 ^ 2) = 2 * n ^ 2 + (n ^ 3 + 3 ^ 2) - 9 := by
      symm
      refine Nat.sub_add_comm ?h
      nlinarith
    rw [this]
    have : 2 * n ^ 2 + (n ^ 3 + 3 ^ 2) - 9 = 2 * n ^ 2 + n ^ 3 + 3 ^ 2 - 9 := by ring_nf
    rw [this]; simp only [Nat.reducePow, add_tsub_cancel_right]; rw [add_comm]
  rw [this] at sec

  have r : (2 * n ^ 2 - 9) ≤ 2 * n * (n + 2) := by apply Nat.sub_le_of_le_add; nlinarith
  have sec : e ∣ (2 * n * (n + 2) - (2 * n ^ 2 - 9)) := by refine Nat.dvd_sub r (Dvd.dvd.mul_left h₂ (2 * n)) sec
  have : 2 * n * (n + 2) - (2 * n ^ 2 - 9) = 4 * n + 9 := by
    refine (Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add r).mpr ?_
    have j : 4 * n + 9 + (2 * n ^ 2 - 9) = (2 * n ^ 2 - 9 + 9) + 4 * n := by ring
    have : 2 * n ^ 2 - 9 + 9 = 2 * n ^ 2 := by
      apply Nat.sub_add_cancel
      nlinarith
    rw [j, this]; ring
  rw [this] at sec

  have sec : e ∣ ((4 * n + 9) - 4 * (n + 2)) := by
    refine Nat.dvd_sub ?H sec ?h₂
    linarith
    exact Dvd.dvd.mul_left h₂ 4
  have : (4 * n + 9) - 4 * (n + 2) = 1 := Eq.symm (Nat.eq_sub_of_add_eq' rfl)
  rw [this] at sec; exact sec

import Mathlib
theorem number_theory_641227 (k : ℕ) (hk : Odd k) : ¬Prime ⌊(2 + √5) ^ k⌋ := by

set a:= 2 + √5 with ha
  set b:= 2 - √5 with hb
  set c : ℕ → ℝ:= fun n => a ^ n + b ^ n with hc
  clear_value a b c

  have h1 : ∀ x : ℝ, x = a ∨ x = b → x ^ 2 = 4 * x + 1:= by
    intro x hx
    rcases hx with hx | hx
    all_goals
      subst x a b
      ring_nf
      field_simp
      ring_nf
  have h2:= h1 b (by simp)
  replace h1:= h1 a (by simp)

  have h3 : ∀ n : ℕ, c (n + 2) = 4 * c (n + 1) + c n:= by
    intro n
    simp [hc]
    replace h2 : b ^ n * b ^ 2 = b ^ n * (4 * b + 1):= by rw [h2]
    replace h1 : a ^ n * a ^ 2 = a ^ n * (4 * a + 1):= by rw [h1]
    ring_nf
    linarith

  replace h2 : c 1 = 4:= by
    simp [hc]
    subst a b
    ring_nf
  replace h1 : c 0 = 2:= by
    simp [hc]
    ring_nf

  have h4 : ∀ n : ℕ, (∃ x : ℤ, c n = x) ∧ (∃ y : ℤ, c (n + 1) = y):= by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      simp [hc]
      subst a b
      refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
      .
        use 2
        simp
        ring_nf
      .
        use 4
        simp
        ring_nf
    | succ n ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨⟨x, hx⟩, ⟨y, hy⟩⟩
      refine ⟨⟨y, hy⟩, ?_⟩
      rw [show n + 1 + 1 = n + 2  by omega]
      rw [h3 n]
      use (4 * y + x)
      rw [hx, hy]
      simp
  replace h4 : ∀ n : ℕ, (∃ x : ℤ, c n = x):= by
    intro n
    exact (h4 n).1

  have h5 : ⌊a ^ k⌋ = c k:= by
    specialize h4 k
    rcases h4 with ⟨x, hx⟩
    rw [hx]
    simp [hc] at hx
    suffices ⌊a ^ k⌋ = x by rify at this ; linarith
    apply Int.floor_eq_iff.2
    set d:= -b with hd
    clear_value d
    replace hd : b = -d:= by linarith
    rw [hd] at hx
    replace hd : d = √5 - 2:= by linarith
    ring_nf at hx
    rw [show (-1 : ℝ) ^ k = -1 by exact Odd.neg_one_pow hk] at hx
    have hd1 : d ≥ 0:= by
      subst d
      have g : (5 : ℝ) ≥ 2 ^ 2:= by linarith
      replace g : √5 ≥ √(2 ^ 2):= by exact Real.sqrt_le_sqrt g
      field_simp at g
      linarith
    have hd2 : d < 1:= by
      subst d
      have g : (5 : ℝ) ≤ (5 / 2) ^ 2:= by linarith
      replace g:= Real.sqrt_le_sqrt g
      field_simp at g
      linarith
    have hd3 : d ^ k ≥ 0:= by positivity
    have hd4 : d ^ k < 1:= by refine pow_lt_one₀ hd1 hd2 (by exact Nat.ne_of_odd_add hk)
    rw [←hx]
    refine ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩

  have h6 : ∀ n : ℕ, c (n + 1) ≥ 4 ∧ c (n + 2) ≥ 4:= by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      simp
      rw [h3 0, h2, h1]
      norm_num
    | succ n ih =>
      rw [show n + 1 + 1 = n + 2 by omega]
      rw [show n + 2 + 1 = n + 3 by omega]
      specialize h3 (n + 1)
      rw [show n + 1 + 2 = n + 3 by omega] at h3
      rw [h3]
      rw [show n + 1 + 1 = n + 2 by omega]
      refine ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
  replace h6 : ∀ n : ℕ, c (n + 1) ≥ 4:= by
    intro n
    exact (h6 n).1

  have h7 : ∀ n : ℕ, (∃ x : ℤ, c n = 2 * x) ∧ (∃ y : ℤ, c (n + 1) = 2 * y):= by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      simp
      rw [h1, h2]
      constructor
      .
        use 1
        simp
      .
        use 2
        simp
        ring_nf
    | succ n ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨⟨x, hx⟩, ⟨y, hy⟩⟩
      refine ⟨⟨y, hy⟩, ?_⟩
      rw [show n + 1 + 1 = n + 2 by omega]
      rw [h3 n, hx, hy]
      use (4 * y + x)
      simp
      ring_nf
  replace h7 : ∀ n : ℕ, (∃ x : ℤ, c n = 2 * x):= by
    intro n
    exact (h7 n).1

  by_contra H
  specialize h7 k
  rcases h7 with ⟨q, hq⟩
  rw [hq] at h5
  have hk1 : k ≠ 0:= by exact Nat.ne_of_odd_add hk
  specialize h6 (k - 1)
  rw [show k - 1 + 1 = k by omega] at h6
  replace h6 : q ≥ 2:= by
    rify
    linarith
  replace h5 : ⌊a ^ k⌋ = 2 * q:= by
    rify
    linarith
  rw [h5] at H
  replace H : Nat.Prime ((2 * q).natAbs):= by exact Int.prime_iff_natAbs_prime.mp H
  have g : 2 ∣ (2 * q).natAbs:= by
    zify
    rw [abs_of_pos (by linarith)]
    simp
  have g1 : Nat.Prime 2:= by decide
  replace g2 : 2 = (2 * q).natAbs:= by exact (Nat.prime_dvd_prime_iff_eq g1 H).mp g
  zify at g2
  rw [abs_of_pos (by linarith)] at g2
  linarith

open Nat
theorem primeFactors_factorial
  {M : ℕ}
  (h : 1 < M) :
  Nat.totient (M !) = M ! * ∏ p ∈ (Finset.range (M + 1)).filter (fun p => Nat.Prime p), (1 - 1 / (p: ℚ)) := by

have h1: ↑(φ M !) = ↑M ! * ∏ p ∈ (M !).primeFactors, (1 - (p: ℚ)⁻¹) := Nat.totient_eq_mul_prod_factors (M !)

  rw [h1]

  have primeFactors_fact: ∀(M : ℕ),
    (M !).primeFactors = (Finset.range (M + 1)).filter (fun p => Nat.Prime p) := by

    intro M
    ext p
    simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_range, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    constructor
    · -- p ∈ (M !).primeFactors → p ≤ M
      intro h
      simp at h
      have :p ≤ M := (Nat.Prime.dvd_factorial h.1).mp h.2.1
      exact ⟨by omega, h.1⟩
    · -- p ≤ M → p ∈ (M !).primeFactors
      intro h
      simp
      have h2 : p ∣ M ! := by
        exact (Nat.Prime.dvd_factorial h.2).mpr (by omega: p ≤ M)
      exact ⟨h.2, h2, by positivity⟩

  congr
  . exact primeFactors_fact M
  . simp

theorem algebra_247560 : ∏ i ∈ Finset.range 59, (1 - cos (angle (61 + i)) / cos ((angle (1 + i)))) = 1:= by

have h2 : (∏ i ∈ Finset.range 59, cos (angle (60 - (1 + i)))) = (∏ i ∈ Finset.range 59, cos (angle (1 + i))) := by
    let bij : ℕ → ℕ := fun i => 58 - i
    let bij' : ℕ → ℕ := fun i => 58 - i
    refine Finset.prod_nbij' bij bij' ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_
    intro i hi
    simp at hi
    simp
    unfold bij
    omega
    intro i hi
    simp
    unfold bij'
    omega
    intro i hi
    unfold bij
    unfold bij'
    simp at hi
    omega
    intro i hi
    simp at hi
    unfold bij
    unfold bij'
    omega
    intro i hi
    unfold bij
    have eq1 : (60 - (1 + (i : ℤ))) = (1 + ↑(58 - i)) := by
      simp at hi
      omega
    have eq2 : (60 - (1 + (i : ℝ))) = (1 + ↑(58 - i)) := by
      norm_cast
      norm_cast at eq1
    rw [eq2]
  have haux : ∀ (i : ℕ), i ∈ Finset.range 59 → cos (angle (1 + i)) ≠ 0 := by
    intro i hi
    unfold angle
    by_contra hc
    obtain ⟨k, aux1⟩ := Real.cos_eq_zero_iff.mp hc
    simp at hi
    have ineq1 : π * (1 + ↑i) / 180  < π / 2 := by
      refine (div_lt_iff₀ ?_).mpr ?_
      linarith
      have lt_aux : (i : ℝ) < 59 := by
        norm_cast
      have aux2 : π / 2 * 180 = π * 90 := by
        field_simp
        ring
      rw [aux2]
      refine (mul_lt_mul_left ?_).mpr ?_
      positivity
      linarith
    rw [aux1] at ineq1
    have ineq2 : (2 * (k : ℝ) + 1) < 1 := by
      by_contra hc
      have aux3 : (2 * (k : ℝ) + 1) ≥ 1 := by
        simp
        simp at hc
        exact hc
      have pos : π > 0 := by positivity
      nlinarith
    have ineq3 : (2 * ↑k + 1) * π / 2 > - π / 2 := by
      rw [←aux1]
      have pos : π > 0 := by positivity
      have ineq_aux : (1 + (i : ℝ)) / 180 > - 1 / 2 := by
        refine (div_lt_div_iff₀ ?_ ?_).mpr ?_
        linarith
        linarith
        linarith
      nlinarith
    have ineq4 : (2 * (k : ℝ) + 1) > -1 := by
      by_contra hc
      have aux3 : (2 * (k : ℝ) + 1) ≤ -1 := by
        simp at hc
        exact hc
      have pos : π > 0 := by positivity
      nlinarith
    norm_cast at ineq2
    norm_num at ineq4
    have odd : Odd (2 * k + 1) := by
      unfold Odd
      use k
    have ineq5 : 2 * k + 1 > -1 := by
      norm_cast at ineq4
    interval_cases (2 * k + 1)
    obtain hc := Int.not_even_iff_odd.mpr odd
    exact hc (Even.zero)
  have h3 : ∏ i ∈ Finset.range 59, cos (angle (1 + i)) ≠ 0 := by
    refine Finset.prod_ne_zero_iff.mpr (haux)
  have h1 : ∀ (i : ℕ), i ∈ Finset.range 59 → 1 - cos (angle (61 + ↑i)) / cos (angle (1 + ↑i))
    = cos (angle (60 - (1 + i))) / cos (angle (1 + i)) := by
    intro i hi
    obtain aux := haux i hi
    field_simp
    rw [Real.cos_sub_cos]
    have eq1 : (angle (1 + ↑i) - angle (61 + ↑i)) / 2= - π / 6 := by
      unfold angle
      field_simp
      ring_nf
    rw [eq1]
    have eq2 : sin (-π / 6) = - 1 / 2 := by
      have auxneg : - π / 6 = - (π / 6) := by
        field_simp
      simp [auxneg, Real.sin_neg]
      field_simp
    rw [eq2]
    field_simp
    have eq3 : π / 2 - ((angle (1 + ↑i) + angle (61 + ↑i)) / 2) =
      angle (60 - (1 + ↑i)) := by
      unfold angle
      field_simp
      ring
    rw [←eq3]
    exact Eq.symm (cos_pi_div_two_sub ((angle (1 + ↑i) + angle (61 + ↑i)) / 2))
  calc
    _ = ∏ i ∈ Finset.range 59, cos (angle (60 - (1 + i))) / cos (angle (1 + i)) := by
      apply Finset.prod_congr
      simp
      intro x hx
      exact (h1 x hx)
    _ = (∏ i ∈ Finset.range 59, cos (angle (60 - (1 + i)))) / (∏ i ∈ Finset.range 59, cos (angle (1 + i))) := by
      exact Finset.prod_div_distrib
    _ = 1 := by
      rw [h2]
      field_simp

theorem algebra_22181 {a b c : ℝ} (ha : a ≠ 0) (hb : b ≠ 0) (hc : c ≠ 0)
    (h : 1 / a + 1 / b + 1 / c = 0) :
    b * c / a ^ 2 + a * c / b ^ 2 + a * b / c ^ 2 = 3 := by

let x:= 1 / a
        let y:= 1 / b
        let z:= 1 / c

        have hx : x = 1 / a:= by rfl
        have hy : y = 1 / b:= by rfl
        have hz : z = 1 / c:= by rfl

        have h1 : x + y + z = 0:= by linarith

        have h2 : x ^ 3 + y ^ 3 + z ^ 3 - 3 * x * y * z = 0:= by
            calc _ = (x + y + z) * (x ^ 2 + y ^ 2 + z ^ 2 - x * y - y * z - z * x):= by ring_nf
                 _ = 0 * (x ^ 2 + y ^ 2 + z ^ 2 - x * y - y * z - z * x):= by rw [h1]
                 _ = 0:= by ring

        replace h2 : x ^ 3 + y ^ 3 + z ^ 3 = 3 * x * y * z:= by linarith

        rw [hx, hy, hz] at h2

        calc _ =  (a * b * c) / a ^ 3 + (a * b * c) / b ^ 3 + (a * b * c) / c ^ 3:= by
                    field_simp
                    ring_nf

             _ = (a * b * c) * ((1 / a) ^ 3 + (1 / b) ^ 3 + (1 / c) ^ 3):= by ring_nf

             _ = (a * b * c) * (3 * (1 / a) * (1 / b) * (1 / c)):= by rw [h2]

             _ = 3:= by field_simp

theorem number_theory_636168 (p q m : ℕ) (ppr : p.Prime) (qpr : q.Prime)
    (hne : p ≠ q) (Anton Berta Clara : Set ℕ) (hA : Anton = {n | p ∣ n})
    (hB : Berta = {n | q ∣ n}) (hC : Clara = {n | m * p ∣ n}) :
    Nat.nth (fun n => n ∈ Anton ∪ Berta ∪ Clara) (p + q - 1) = p * q := by

have sbst : Clara ⊆ Anton := by
    simp [Set.subset_def, hC, hA]
    intro x hx; apply dvd_trans _ hx
    simp

  have : (fun n => n ∈ Anton ∪ Berta ∪ Clara) = (fun n => n ≡ 0 [MOD p] ∨ n ≡ 0 [MOD q]) := by
    ext n; rw [Set.union_eq_left.mpr]
    simp [hA, hB, Nat.ModEq]; omega
    exact Set.subset_union_of_subset_left sbst _
  rw [this]; clear * - ppr qpr hne
  have := ppr.two_le; have := qpr.two_le

  have hc : #({n ∈ range (p * q) | n ≡ 0 [MOD p] ∨ n ≡ 0 [MOD q]}) = p + q - 1 := by
    rw [filter_or, card_union, ← filter_and]
    repeat rw [range_eq_Ico]
    rw [← @Nat.cast_inj ℤ]; repeat rw [Nat.cast_sub]
    push_cast; repeat rw [Nat.Ico_filter_modEq_card]
    field_simp; rw [card_eq_one.mpr]; ring
    use 0; simp [Finset.ext_iff, Nat.ModEq]
    intro n; constructor
    · rintro ⟨h, pdvd, qdvd⟩; revert h
      contrapose!; intro npos
      rw [← Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero] at pdvd qdvd
      apply Nat.le_of_dvd; omega
      apply Nat.Coprime.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd
      any_goals assumption
      rw [ppr.coprime_iff_not_dvd]
      rw [Nat.prime_dvd_prime_iff_eq ppr qpr]
      exact hne
    intro h; simp [h]; any_goals omega
    apply Nat.le_add_right_of_le
    apply card_le_card; rw [filter_and]
    apply inter_subset_left

  rw [← Nat.count_eq_card_filter_range] at hc
  rw [← hc, Nat.nth_count]
  simp [Nat.ModEq]

theorem number_theory_641141 (N : ℕ) (hN : N > 0) :
  ∑ d ∈ N.divisors, (1 : ℚ) / d = (∑ d ∈ N.divisors, d) / N := by

norm_num

  · simp

    · exact hn
  · simp

  · simp
    unfold t
    intro d hd1 hn
    exact Nat.div_div_self hd1 hn

    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := hd1

    have neq1 : (d : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by
      norm_cast

      simp at hk
      exact hn hk
    have neq2 : (k : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by

      by_contra hc
      rw [hc] at hk
      simp at hk
      exact hn hk

theorem number_theory_304352 (A B : Fin 2 → ℝ) (hA : A = ![√1998, 0])
    (hB : B = ![0, √2000]) : {P : Fin 2 → ℝ | ∃ a b : ℚ, P =
    ![↑a, ↑b] ∧ P ∈ segment ℝ A B} = ∅ := by

simp [Set.ext_iff, segment]; intro P a b hP t tpos s spos hst h
  simp [hA, hB, hP, funext_iff] at h
  have h' := h 1; simp at h'; replace h := h 0; simp at h
  let ha := h; let hb := h'; rw [← eq_sub_iff_add_eq] at hst
  rw [hst] at ha; rw [← eq_div_iff] at hb; rw [hb] at ha
  apply_fun fun t => t ^ 2 at ha
  rw [mul_pow, sub_sq, sq_sqrt, div_pow, sq_sqrt] at ha
  norm_num at ha
  replace ha : b / √2000 = 1 / 2 * (b ^ 2 / 2000 + 1 - a ^ 2 / 1998) := by
    linarith only [ha]
  rw [one_div_mul_eq_div, div_eq_div_iff_comm, div_eq_iff, sqrt_eq_iff_eq_sq] at ha
  norm_cast at ha; obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ : IsSquare 2000 := by
    rw [← Rat.isSquare_natCast_iff]; push_cast
    use 2 / (b ^ 2 / 2000 + 1 - a ^ 2 / 1998) * b
    nth_rw 1 [ha]; ring
  rw [← pow_two] at hk
  have : k ^ 2 < 45 ^ 2 := by omega
  rw [Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_left] at this
  have : 44 ^ 2 < k ^ 2 := by omega
  rw [Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_left] at this; any_goals omega
  any_goals positivity
  rw [← ha]; positivity
  simp; intro beq0; simp [beq0] at h' hP
  simp [h'] at hst; simp [hst] at h
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ : IsSquare 1998 := by
    rw [← Rat.isSquare_natCast_iff]; push_cast
    rw [sqrt_eq_iff_eq_sq] at h; norm_cast at h
    use a; rw [h]; ring; simp
    rw [← h]; positivity
  rw [← pow_two] at hl
  have : l ^ 2 < 45 ^ 2 := by omega
  rw [Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_left] at this
  have : 44 ^ 2 < l ^ 2 := by omega
  rw [Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_left] at this; all_goals omega

theorem number_theory_222434
  (S : Set (ℕ × ℕ × ℕ))
  (hS : S = {(a, b, c) : ℕ × ℕ × ℕ | a.lcm b = 1000 ∧ b.lcm c = 2000 ∧ c.lcm a = 2000}) :

      exact dvd_lcm_left a b
    . rw [← hab]

import Mathlib
def A (k e : ℕ) : ℕ := (k+1)*(e-k+1)*(e+2) / 2
def sum_of_powers (n : ℕ) (p : ℕ) : ℕ :=
  match p with
  | 0 => n
  | 1 => n*(n+1)/2
  | 2 => n*(n+1)*(2*n+1)/6
  | 3 => (n*(n+1)/2)^2
  | 4 => n*(n+1)*(2*n+1)*(3*n^2+3*n-1)/30
  | _ => 0
def L (e : ℕ) : ℕ :=
  let n := e+1
  let s := e+2
  let sigma0 := s^2 * sum_of_powers n 2 + sum_of_powers n 4 - 2*s * sum_of_powers n 3
  (s^2 * sigma0) / 4
lemma lemma_1 : sum_of_powers 2 2 = 5 := by sorry

lemma lemma_2 : sum_of_powers 2 3 = 9 := by sorry

lemma lemma_3 : sum_of_powers 2 4 = 17 := by sorry

lemma lemma_4 : sum_of_powers 3 2 = 14 := by sorry

lemma lemma_5 : sum_of_powers 3 3 = 36 := by sorry

lemma lemma_6 : sum_of_powers 3 4 = 98 := by sorry

lemma lemma_7 : L 1 = 18 := by sorry

lemma lemma_8 : L 2 = 136 := by sorry

lemma lemma_9 : L 1 = 18 := sorry

lemma lemma_10 : L 2 = 136 := sorry

theorem number_theory_608491 : ∃ (n : ℕ), n = 2448 ∧ n = (L 2) * (L 1) := by

unfold sum_of_powers
  norm_num

lemma lemma_2 : sum_of_powers 2 3 = 9 := by
  unfold sum_of_powers
  norm_num

lemma lemma_3 : sum_of_powers 2 4 = 17 := by
  unfold sum_of_powers
  norm_num

lemma lemma_4 : sum_of_powers 3 2 = 14 := by
  unfold sum_of_powers
  norm_num

lemma lemma_5 : sum_of_powers 3 3 = 36 := by
  unfold sum_of_powers
  norm_num

lemma lemma_6 : sum_of_powers 3 4 = 98 := by
  unfold sum_of_powers
  norm_num

lemma lemma_7 : L 1 = 18 := by

  have : L 1 = 18 := by

    have n : 1 + 1 = 2 := by norm_num
    have s : 1 + 2 = 3 := by norm_num
    have s2 : 3^2 = 9 := by norm_num

    have sp2 : sum_of_powers 2 2 = 5 := lemma_1
    have sp3 : sum_of_powers 2 3 = 9 := lemma_2
    have sp4 : sum_of_powers 2 4 = 17 := lemma_3

    have term1 : 9 * 5 = 45 := by norm_num
    have term2 : 2 * 3 * 9 = 54 := by norm_num
    have term3 : 45 + 17 - 54 = 8 := by norm_num
    have term4 : 9 * 8 = 72 := by norm_num
    have term5 : 72 / 4 = 18 := by norm_num

    calc
      L 1 = (3^2 * (3^2 * 5 + 17 - 2 * 3 * 9)) / 4 := by
        unfold L
        simp only [n, s]
        simp only [sp2, sp3, sp4]
      _ = (9 * (45 + 17 - 54)) / 4 := by
        simp only [s2, term1, term2]
      _ = (9 * 8) / 4 := by
        simp only [term3]
      _ = 72 / 4 := by
        simp only [term4]
      _ = 18 := by
        simp only [term5]

  exact this

lemma lemma_8 : L 2 = 136 := by

  have : L 2 = 136 := by

    have n : 2 + 1 = 3 := by norm_num
    have s : 2 + 2 = 4 := by norm_num
    have s2 : 4^2 = 16 := by norm_num

    have sp2 : sum_of_powers 3 2 = 14 := lemma_4
    have sp3 : sum_of_powers 3 3 = 36 := lemma_5
    have sp4 : sum_of_powers 3 4 = 98 := lemma_6

    have term1 : 16 * 14 = 224 := by norm_num
    have term2 : 2 * 4 * 36 = 288 := by norm_num
    have term3 : 224 + 98 - 288 = 34 := by norm_num
    have term4 : 16 * 34 = 544 := by norm_num
    have term5 : 544 / 4 = 136 := by norm_num

    calc
      L 2 = (4^2 * (4^2 * 14 + 98 - 2 * 4 * 36)) / 4 := by
        unfold L
        simp only [n, s]
        simp only [sp2, sp3, sp4]
      _ = (16 * (224 + 98 - 288)) / 4 := by
        simp only [s2, term1, term2]
      _ = (16 * 34) / 4 := by
        simp only [term3]
      _ = 544 / 4 := by
        simp only [term4]
      _ = 136 := by
        simp only [term5]

  exact this

lemma lemma_9 : L 1 = 18 := lemma_7
lemma lemma_10 : L 2 = 136 := lemma_8

theorem number_theory_608491 : ∃ (n : ℕ), n = 2448 ∧ n = (L 2) * (L 1) := by
  use 2448
  constructor
  · rfl

theorem algebra_308562 (x y z k : ℝ)
  (hx : x / (y + z) = k)(hyz : y + z ≠ 0)
  (hy : y / (z + x) = k)(hzx : z + x ≠ 0)
  (hz : z / (x + y) = k)(hxy : x + y ≠ 0) :
  (x + y + z ≠ 0 → k = 1 / 2) ∧ (x + y + z = 0 → k = -1) := by

have eq1 : x = k * (y + z) := by
    rw [← hx]
    field_simp [hyz]
  have eq2 : y = k * (z + x) := by
    rw [← hy]
    field_simp [hzx]
  have eq3 : z = k * (x + y) := by
    rw [← hz]
    field_simp [hxy]

  have sum_eq : x + y + z = k * 2 * (x + y + z) := by
    have h1 : x + y + z = k * (y + z) + k * (z + x) + k * (x + y) := by
      linarith [eq1, eq2, eq3]
    have h2 : k * (y + z) + k * (z + x) + k * (x + y) = 2 * k * (x + y + z) := by
      ring
    linarith [h1, h2]

  constructor
  · intro hne

    have h₁ : k * 2 = 1 := by
      apply mul_left_cancel₀ hne
      linarith
    linarith

  · intro heq

    have h : x = -(y + z) := by linarith
    rw [h] at hx
    rw [← hx]
    field_simp

theorem number_theory_120642 (a : ℕ → ℤ) (ha : ∀ n, 0 < a n)
    (h1 : a 0 < a 1) (hn : ∀(n:ℕ), 1<n → a n = 3 * a (n-1) - 2 * a (n-2)) :
    2 ^ 99 < a 100 := by

let x := a 0
  let y := a 1 - a 0

  have (n:ℕ): a n = x + y * (2^n - 1) := by
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on
    case h n h_ind =>
      by_cases h: 1 < n
      case pos =>
        calc a n
            = 3 * a (n-1) - 2 * a (n-2) := by rw [hn]; assumption
          _ = a (n-1) + 2* (a (n-1) - a (n-2)) := by ring
          _ = x + y * (2^(n-1) - 1) + 2 * (x + y * (2^(n-1) - 1) - (x + y * (2^(n-2) - 1))) := by rw [h_ind, h_ind] <;> omega
          _ = x + y * (2^(n-1) - 1) + 2 * y * (2^(n-1) - 2^(n-2)) := by ring
          _ = x + y * (2^(n-1) - 1 + 2 * (2^(n-1) - 2^(n-2))) := by ring
          _ = x + y * (2^(n-1) + 2 * 2^(n-1) - 2 * 2^(n-2) - 1) := by ring
          _ = x + y * (2^(n-1) + 2^n - 2^(n-1) - 1) := by
            rw [← pow_succ', ← pow_succ']
            rw [← Nat.sub_add_comm (by linarith), ← Nat.sub_add_comm (by linarith)]
            simp
          _ = _ := by ring
      case neg =>
        interval_cases n
        case «0» => simp
        case «1» => unfold x y; simp

  have hx : 0 < x := by unfold x; apply ha
  have hy : 0 < y := by unfold y; linarith
  calc a 100 = x + y * (2^100 - 1) := by apply this
    _ ≥ 2^100 := by linarith
    _ > 2^99 := by norm_num

theorem algebra_1436 (hf : condf = fun (f : ℝ → ℝ) => f 4 = 7) (h1 : ∀ f, condf f → 2 * y = 3 * f (4 * x) + 5) : x + y = 14 := by

suffices x = 1 ∧ y = 13 by norm_num [this]
  have xeq1 : x = 1 := by
    by_contra!
    let f1 := fun (m : ℝ) => ite (m = (4 *x)) (0 : ℝ) 7
    let f2 := fun (m : ℝ) => ite (m = (4 *x)) (1 : ℝ) 7
    have condf1 : condf f1 := by norm_num [f1, hf, this]
    have condf2 : condf f2 := by norm_num [f2, hf, this]
    have h₁ := h1 f1 condf1
    have h₂ := h1 f2 condf2
    simp [f1] at h₁
    simp [f2] at h₂
    linarith
  let f3 := fun (_ : ℝ) => (7 : ℝ)
  have condf3 : condf f3 := by simp [f3, hf]
  have := h1 f3 condf3
  norm_num [f3] at this
  exact ⟨xeq1, by linarith⟩

theorem algebra_611491 (a : ℕ → ℝ) (apos : ∀ n, 0 < a n)
    (ha : ∀ n, a (n + 1) = √((1 + a n) / 2)) : (∃ i, a i = (√6 + √2) / 4) ↔
    a 0 = (√6 + √2) / 4 ∨ a 0 = √3 / 2 ∨ a 0 = 1 / 2 := by

have key : (√6 + √2) / 4 = cos (π / 12) := by
    rw [← pow_left_inj₀ _ _ (show 2≠0 by simp)]
    rw [cos_sq, show 2*(π/12) = π/6 by ring]
    rw [div_pow, add_sq, mul_assoc, ← sqrt_mul]
    norm_num; rw [show (12:ℝ) = 2^2*3 by ring]
    rw [sqrt_mul, sqrt_sq]; field_simp; ring
    any_goals norm_num
    positivity; apply cos_nonneg_of_neg_pi_div_two_le_of_le
    all_goals linarith only [pi_pos]
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨i, hi⟩

    have a0lt : a 0 < 1 := by
      by_contra!; have : ∀ n, 1 ≤ a n := by
        intro n; induction n with
        | zero => exact this
        | succ n ih =>
          rw [ha]; nth_rw 1 [show (1:ℝ) = √((1 + 1) / 2) by norm_num]
          gcongr
      specialize this i; rw [hi] at this
      rw [le_div_iff₀, one_mul] at this
      rw [← pow_le_pow_iff_left₀ _ _ (show 2≠0 by simp)] at this
      rw [add_sq] at this; norm_num at this
      rw [← sub_nonneg, mul_assoc, ← sqrt_mul] at this
      ring_nf at this; rw [neg_add_eq_sub, sub_nonneg] at this
      rw [← pow_le_pow_iff_left₀ _ _ (show 2≠0 by simp)] at this
      norm_num [mul_pow] at this; any_goals norm_num
      positivity

    let θ := arccos (a 0)
    have θpos : 0 < θ := by
      dsimp [θ]; rw [arccos_pos]; exact a0lt
    have θlt : θ < π / 2 := by
      dsimp [θ]; rw [arccos_lt_pi_div_two]
      exact apos 0

    have aux : ∀ n, a n = cos (θ / 2 ^ n) := by
      intro n; induction n with
      | zero =>
        simp [θ]; rw [cos_arccos]
        linarith only [apos 0]; linarith only [a0lt]
      | succ n ih =>
        rw [ha, ih, sqrt_eq_iff_eq_sq]
        rw [cos_sq]; ring_nf
        rw [← ih]; linarith only [apos n]
        apply cos_nonneg_of_neg_pi_div_two_le_of_le
        · calc
            _ ≤ (0 : ℝ) := by linarith only [pi_pos]
            _ ≤ _ := by
              apply div_nonneg; all_goals positivity
        calc
          _ ≤ π / 2 / 2 ^ (n + 1) := by gcongr
          _ ≤ π / 2 / 1 := by
            gcongr; norm_cast; apply Nat.one_le_pow'
          _ = _ := by simp

    rw [aux, key, cos_eq_cos_iff] at hi
    rcases hi with ⟨k, hk|hk⟩
    · rw [← sub_eq_iff_eq_add', eq_div_iff] at hk
      let kbd1 := θpos; let kbd2 := θlt
      rw [← hk] at kbd1 kbd2
      rw [mul_pos_iff_of_pos_right, sub_pos] at kbd1
      rw [lt_div_iff₀, mul_comm, ← mul_assoc] at kbd1
      rw [mul_lt_iff_lt_one_left, ← mul_assoc] at kbd1
      norm_num at θpos; norm_cast at kbd1
      replace kbd1 : k < 1 := by omega
      rw [← lt_div_iff₀, div_div, ← pow_succ'] at kbd2
      rw [sub_lt_iff_lt_add, ← sub_lt_iff_lt_add'] at kbd2
      rw [div_eq_mul_one_div] at kbd2
      nth_rw 2 [div_eq_mul_one_div] at kbd2
      rw [← mul_sub, mul_comm, mul_lt_mul_right] at kbd2
      replace kbd2 : -1 < k := by rify; calc
        _ < (1 : ℝ) / 2 * (1 / 12 - 1 / 2 ^ (0 + 1)) := by norm_num
        _ ≤ (1 : ℝ) / 2 * (1 / 12 - 1 / 2 ^ (i + 1)) := by
          gcongr; norm_num; simp
        _ < _ := by linarith only [kbd2]

      have : k = 0 := by omega
      simp [this] at hk; have ilt : i < 3 := by
        by_contra!; rw [← hk] at θlt
        suffices : π / 12 * 2 ^ 3 ≤ π / 12 * 2 ^ i
        · linarith only [this, θlt, pi_pos]
        gcongr; simp

      simp [aux]; interval_cases i
      · simp at hk; rw [← hk, key]; simp
      · rw [show π / 12 * 2 ^ 1 = π / 6 by ring] at hk
        simp [← hk]
      rw [show π / 12 * 2 ^ 2 = π / 3 by ring] at hk
      simp [← hk]; all_goals positivity

    rw [eq_sub_iff_add_eq, ← eq_sub_iff_add_eq'] at hk
    rw [div_eq_iff] at hk; rw [hk] at θpos θlt
    rw [mul_pos_iff_of_pos_right, sub_pos] at θpos
    rw [div_eq_mul_one_div, mul_comm, mul_lt_mul_right] at θpos
    replace θpos : 0 < k := by
      rify; linarith only [θpos]
    rw [← lt_div_iff₀, div_div, ← pow_succ'] at θlt
    rw [sub_lt_iff_lt_add] at θlt; rw [div_eq_mul_one_div] at θlt
    nth_rw 2 [div_eq_mul_one_div] at θlt
    rw [← mul_add, mul_comm, mul_lt_mul_left] at θlt

    replace θlt : k < 1 := by rify; calc
      _ < (1 : ℝ) / 2 * (1 / 2 ^ (i + 1) + 1 / 12) := by linarith only [θlt]
      _ ≤ (1 : ℝ) / 2 * (1 / 2 ^ (0 + 1) + 1 / 12) := by
        gcongr; all_goals simp
      _ < _ := by norm_num
    omega; all_goals positivity

  intro h; rcases h with h|h|h; use 0
  · use 1; rw [ha, h, sqrt_eq_iff_eq_sq]
    rw [div_pow, add_sq, mul_assoc, ← sqrt_mul]
    rw [show (6:ℝ)*2=2^2*3 by ring, sqrt_mul, sqrt_sq]
    norm_num; field_simp; ring
    all_goals positivity
  use 2; rw [ha, ha, h, sqrt_eq_iff_eq_sq]
  rw [div_pow, add_sq, mul_assoc, ← sqrt_mul]
  rw [show (6:ℝ)*2=2^2*3 by ring, sqrt_mul, sqrt_sq]
  norm_num [show √4 = 2 by rw [sqrt_eq_iff_eq_sq]; all_goals norm_num]
  field_simp; ring; all_goals positivity

theorem geometry_610568 : let S := {n : ℕ | ∃ A B C D E : ℂ, A = 0 ∧
    (∃ b : ℝ, 0 < b ∧ B = b) ∧ C = B + D ∧ (∃ d : ℝ, 0 < d ∧ D = d * I) ∧
    E = (B + D) / 2 ∧ dist A B + dist B E + dist E A = 10 * Real.pi ∧ dist A D + dist D E + dist A E = n}
    S.ncard = 47 := by

intro S; suffices : S = Ioo 15 63
  · rw [this, Set.ncard_coe_Finset]; rfl

  simp [Set.ext_iff, S]; intro n; constructor

  · rintro ⟨B, ⟨b, bpos, hB⟩, C, D, hC, ⟨d, dpos, hD⟩, peri1, peri2⟩
    simp [hB, hD, dist_eq] at peri1 peri2
    rw [abs_eq_self.mpr] at peri1 peri2
    simp [abs_eq_sqrt_sq_add_sq] at peri1 peri2
    ring_nf at peri1 peri2
    rw [← add_mul, Real.sqrt_mul, add_assoc] at peri1 peri2
    rw [show √(1/4) = 1/2 by rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_eq_sq]; all_goals norm_num] at peri1 peri2
    rw [← mul_two, mul_assoc] at peri1 peri2
    norm_num at peri1 peri2

    have aux1 : b < √(b ^ 2 + d ^ 2) := by
      rw [← pow_lt_pow_iff_left₀ _ _ (show 2≠0 by simp)]
      rw [Real.sq_sqrt, lt_add_iff_pos_right]
      all_goals positivity
    have aux2 : d < √(b ^ 2 + d ^ 2) := by
      rw [← pow_lt_pow_iff_left₀ _ _ (show 2≠0 by simp)]
      rw [Real.sq_sqrt, lt_add_iff_pos_left]
      all_goals positivity

    rify; rw [← peri2]; constructor
    · linarith [Real.pi_gt_d4]
    linarith [Real.pi_lt_d4]; all_goals positivity

  rintro ⟨hn1, hn2⟩; rw [Nat.lt_iff_add_one_le] at hn1
  rw [Nat.lt_iff_le_pred] at hn2; norm_num at hn1 hn2
  rify at hn1 hn2

  let f : ℝ → ℝ := fun b => √((10 * Real.pi - b) ^ 2 - b ^ 2) + (10 * Real.pi - b)
  have fcont : ContinuousOn f (Set.Icc 0 (5 * Real.pi)) := by
    apply Continuous.continuousOn; dsimp [f]; continuity

  have IVT := intermediate_value_Ioo' (show 0≤5*Real.pi by positivity) fcont
  have : f 0 = 20 * Real.pi := by
    simp [f]; rw [pow_two, Real.sqrt_mul_self]
    ring; positivity
  rw [this] at IVT; replace this : f (5 * Real.pi) = 5 * Real.pi := by
    simp [f]; ring_nf; norm_num
  rw [this] at IVT; simp [Set.subset_def, f] at IVT

  specialize IVT n (by linarith only [Real.pi_lt_d2, hn1]) ((by linarith only [Real.pi_gt_d2, hn2]))
  rcases IVT with ⟨b, ⟨bpos, blt⟩, hb⟩

  use b; split_ands; use b
  use b + (√((10 * Real.pi - b) ^ 2 - b ^ 2)) * I
  use (√((10 * Real.pi - b) ^ 2 - b ^ 2)) * I; split_ands; rfl
  · use √((10 * Real.pi - b) ^ 2 - b ^ 2); split_ands
    · rw [Real.sqrt_pos]
      rw [sub_pos, pow_lt_pow_iff_left₀]
      all_goals linarith only [blt, Real.pi_pos, bpos]
    rfl

  · simp [dist_eq]; simp [abs_eq_sqrt_sq_add_sq]
    ring_nf; rw [Real.sq_sqrt]; ring_nf
    replace this : -(b * Real.pi * 5) + b ^ 2 * (1 / 4) + Real.pi ^ 2 * 25 =
    ((10 * Real.pi - b) * 1 / 2) ^ 2 := by ring
    rw [this, pow_two, Real.sqrt_mul_self]
    replace this : -(b * Real.pi * 20) + b ^ 2 + Real.pi ^ 2 * 100 =
    ((10 * Real.pi - b)) ^ 2 := by ring
    rw [this, pow_two, Real.sqrt_mul_self, abs_eq_self.mpr]; ring
    any_goals linarith only [bpos, blt]
    rw [neg_add_eq_sub, sub_nonneg]
    rw [show Real.pi ^ 2 * 100 = 5 * Real.pi * (Real.pi * 20) by ring]
    rw [mul_assoc]; gcongr

  · simp [dist_eq]; simp [abs_eq_sqrt_sq_add_sq]
    ring_nf; rw [Real.sq_sqrt, ← hb, abs_eq_self.mpr]
    ring_nf; rw [add_assoc, add_comm, add_right_cancel_iff]
    replace this : -(Real.pi * b * 5)  + Real.pi ^ 2 * 25 + b ^ 2 * (1 / 4)=
    ((10 * Real.pi - b) * 1 / 2) ^ 2 := by ring
    rw [this, pow_two, Real.sqrt_mul_self]
    replace this : -(Real.pi * b * 20) + Real.pi ^ 2 * 100 + b ^ 2  =
    ((10 * Real.pi - b)) ^ 2 := by ring
    rw [this, pow_two, Real.sqrt_mul_self]; ring
    any_goals linarith only [bpos, blt]
    positivity
    rw [neg_add_eq_sub, sub_nonneg]; nth_rw 2 [mul_comm]
    rw [show Real.pi ^ 2 * 100 = 5 * Real.pi * (Real.pi * 20) by ring]
    rw [mul_assoc]; gcongr
  norm_num
