theorem calculus_142522 {a : ℝ} (ha : 0 < a) :
    Tendsto (λ x => (a ^ (x ^ 2 - a ^ 2) - 1) / tan (log (x / a))) (𝓝[≠] a) (𝓝 (2 * a ^ 2 * log a)) := by

have rpow_deriv {f f' : ℝ → ℝ} {x : ℝ} (h : HasDerivAt f (f' x) x) : HasDerivAt (fun x => a ^ f x) (a ^ f x * log a * f' x) x := by
    apply HasDerivAt.comp _ _ h
    apply HasStrictDerivAt.hasDerivAt
    apply hasStrictDerivAt_const_rpow ha

  set s := Set.Ioo (a / 2) (2 * a) \ {a}

  have hs : s ∈ 𝓝[≠] a := by
    unfold s
    rw [Set.diff_eq, Set.inter_comm]
    apply inter_mem_nhdsWithin
    apply Ioo_mem_nhds (by linarith) (by linarith)

  have hxs {x} (hx : x ∈ s) : 1 / 2 < x / a ∧ x / a < 2 := by
    simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_Ioo, Set.mem_singleton_iff, s] at hx
    constructor
    · rw [lt_div_iff₀ ha]
      linarith
    · rw [div_lt_iff₀ ha]
      linarith

  have hs_cos {x} (hx : x ∈ s) : 0 < cos (log (x / a)) := by
    have ⟨hx1, hx2⟩ := hxs hx
    apply cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
    simp only [Set.mem_Ioo]

    constructor
    · trans log (1 / 2)
      · simp
        linarith [log_two_lt_d9, pi_gt_d2]
      · apply strictMonoOn_log (by simp) (by simp; linarith) hx1
    · trans log 2
      · apply strictMonoOn_log (by simp; linarith) (by simp) hx2
      · linarith [log_two_lt_d9, pi_gt_d2]

  apply HasDerivAt.lhopital_zero_nhds' (f' := fun x => a ^ (x ^ 2 - a ^ 2) * log a * (2 * x)) (g' := fun x => 1 / cos (log (x / a)) ^ 2 * ((1 / a) / (x / a)))
  · rw [eventually_iff_exists_mem]

    use s, hs
    intro x hx
    apply HasDerivAt.sub_const
    apply rpow_deriv
    apply HasDerivAt.sub_const
    rw [show 2 * x = 2 * x ^ (2 - 1) by ring]
    apply hasDerivAt_pow
  · rw [eventually_iff_exists_mem]

    use s, hs
    intro x hx
    apply @HasDerivAt.comp (h₂ := tan) (h := fun x => log (x / a))
    · apply Real.hasDerivAt_tan
      apply ne_of_gt
      exact hs_cos hx
    · apply HasDerivAt.log _ (by linarith [hxs hx])
      apply HasDerivAt.div_const
      exact hasDerivAt_id' x

  · rw [eventually_iff_exists_mem]
    use s, hs
    intro x hx
    apply ne_of_gt
    apply mul_pos
    · have := hs_cos hx
      positivity
    · have := (hxs hx).1
      positivity

  · apply Tendsto.mono_left _ nhdsWithin_le_nhds
    rw [show (0 : ℝ) = a ^ (a ^ 2 - a ^ 2) - 1 by simp]
    apply ContinuousAt.tendsto
    apply ContinuousAt.sub _ (by fun_prop)
    apply ContinuousAt.rpow (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (by left; linarith)

  · apply Tendsto.mono_left _ nhdsWithin_le_nhds
    rw [show (0 : ℝ) = tan (log (a / a)) by simp [div_self (ne_of_gt ha)]]
    apply ContinuousAt.tendsto
    apply ContinuousAt.comp (g := tan)
    · simp [div_self (ne_of_gt ha), continuousAt_tan]
    · apply ContinuousAt.log (by fun_prop) (by positivity)

  apply Tendsto.mono_left _ nhdsWithin_le_nhds
  have ha1 : a / a = 1 := by simp [div_self (ne_of_gt ha)]
  have eq : 2 * a ^ 2 * log a = (a ^ (a^2 - a^2) * log a * (2 * a)) / (1 / cos (log (a / a)) ^ 2 * (1 / a / (a / a))) := by
    simp [ha1]
    ring
  rw [eq]

  apply ContinuousAt.tendsto
  apply ContinuousAt.div
  · apply ContinuousAt.mul _ (by fun_prop)
    apply ContinuousAt.mul _ (by fun_prop)
    apply ContinuousAt.rpow (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (by left; linarith)
  · apply ContinuousAt.mul _ (by fun_prop (disch := simp [ha1]))
    apply ContinuousAt.div (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop (disch := simp [ha1])) (by simp [ha1])
  · simp [ha1, ne_of_gt ha]

import Mathlib
theorem algebra_203384 (a b c d : ℝ) :
    a + b * c * d = b + a * c * d
  ∧ b + a * c * d = c + a * b * d
  ∧ c + a * b * d = d + a * b * c
  ↔
  (a, b, c, d) ∈
  {p | ∃ r : ℝ, p = (r, r, r, r)} ∪
  {p | ∃ (t r : ℝ), (t = 1 ∨ t = -1) ∧ p = (t, t, t, r)} ∪
  {p | ∃ (t r : ℝ), (t = 1 ∨ t = -1) ∧ p = (t, t, r, t)} ∪
  {p | ∃ (t r : ℝ), (t = 1 ∨ t = -1) ∧ p = (t, r, t, t)} ∪
  {p | ∃ (t r : ℝ), (t = 1 ∨ t = -1) ∧ p = (r, t, t, t)} ∪
  {p | ∃ r : ℝ, r ≠ 0 ∧ p = (r, r, 1/r, 1/r)} ∪
  {p | ∃ r : ℝ, r ≠ 0 ∧ p = (r, 1/r, r, 1/r)} ∪
  {p | ∃ r : ℝ, r ≠ 0 ∧ p = (r, 1/r, 1/r, r)}
   := by

let S1 := {p | ∃ r : ℝ, p = (r, r, r, r)}
  let T1 := {p | ∃ (t r : ℝ), (t = 1 ∨ t = -1) ∧ p = (t, t, t, r)}
  let T2 := {p | ∃ (t r : ℝ), (t = 1 ∨ t = -1) ∧ p = (t, t, r, t)}
  let T3 := {p | ∃ (t r : ℝ), (t = 1 ∨ t = -1) ∧ p = (t, r, t, t)}
  let T4 := {p | ∃ (t r : ℝ), (t = 1 ∨ t = -1) ∧ p = (r, t, t, t)}

  let U1 := {p | ∃ r : ℝ, r ≠ 0 ∧ p = (r, r, 1/r, 1/r)}
  let U2 := {p | ∃ r : ℝ, r ≠ 0 ∧ p = (r, 1/r, r, 1/r)}
  let U3 := {p | ∃ r : ℝ, r ≠ 0 ∧ p = (r, 1/r, 1/r, r)}

  refine Iff.intro ?_ $ by
    intro h
    rw [Set.mem_union] at h; rcases h with h | h
    . rw [Set.mem_union] at h; rcases h with h | h
      . rw [Set.mem_union] at h; rcases h with h | h
        . rw [Set.mem_union] at h; rcases h with h | h
          . rw [Set.mem_union] at h; rcases h with h | h
            . rw [Set.mem_union] at h; rcases h with h | h
              . rw [Set.mem_union] at h; rcases h with h | h
                . simp at h
                  have := h.1
                  have := h.2.1
                  have := h.2.2
                  subst b c d
                  simp
                . simp at h
                  rcases h with ⟨h1,h2,h3⟩|⟨h1,h2,h3⟩
                  all_goals subst a b c; simp; linarith
              . simp at h
                rcases h with ⟨h1,h2,h3⟩|⟨h1,h2,h3⟩
                all_goals subst a b d; simp; constructor
                all_goals linarith
            . simp at h
              rcases h with ⟨h1,h2,h3⟩|⟨h1,h2,h3⟩
              all_goals subst a c d; simp; constructor
              all_goals linarith
          . simp at h
            rcases h with ⟨h1,h2,h3⟩|⟨h1,h2,h3⟩
            all_goals subst b c d; simp; linarith
        . simp at h

          obtain ⟨r,⟨hr1,hr2,hr3,hr4,hr5⟩⟩ := h
          subst a b c d
          field_simp
          linarith
      . simp at h

        obtain ⟨r,⟨hr1,hr2,hr3,hr4,hr5⟩⟩ := h
        subst a b c d
        field_simp
        refine ⟨?_,?_,?_⟩
        all_goals linarith
    . simp at h

      obtain ⟨r,⟨hr1,hr2,hr3,hr4,hr5⟩⟩ := h
      subst a b c d
      field_simp
      refine ⟨?_,?_⟩
      all_goals linarith

  intro hx
  repeat rw [Set.mem_union]
  by_cases ha1: b = a ∧ c = a ∧ d = a
  . suffices (a, b, c, d) ∈ {p | ∃ r, p = (r, r, r, r)} by
      left; left; left; left; left; left; left; exact this
    simp
    exact ha1

  by_cases ht1: b = a ∧ c = a ∧ d ≠ a
  . have ⟨ h1, h2, h3 ⟩ := ht1
    have : (a,b,c,d) ∈ T1 := by
      subst b c
      ring_nf at hx
      simp at hx
      have : (a^2 - 1) * (d-a) = 0 := by linarith
      simp at this
      rcases this with h | h
      . have : (a-1)*(a+1)=0 := by linarith
        simp at this
        rcases this with h | h
        . have : a = 1 := by linarith
          subst a
          unfold T1
          simp
        . have : a = -1 := by linarith
          subst a
          unfold T1
          simp
      . have : d = a := by linarith
        contradiction

    unfold T1 at this
    left; left; left; left; left; left; right; exact this

  by_cases ht2: b = a ∧ d = a ∧ c ≠ a
  . have ⟨ h1, h2, h3 ⟩ := ht2
    have : (a,b,c,d) ∈ T2 := by
      subst b d
      ring_nf at hx
      simp at hx
      have : (a^2 - 1) * (c-a) = 0 := by linarith
      simp at this
      rcases this with h | h
      . have : (a-1)*(a+1)=0 := by linarith
        simp at this
        rcases this with h | h
        . have : a = 1 := by linarith
          subst a
          unfold T2
          simp
        . have : a = -1 := by linarith
          subst a
          unfold T2
          simp
      . have : c = a := by linarith
        contradiction

    unfold T2 at this
    left; left; left; left; left; right; exact this

  by_cases ht3: c = a ∧ d = a ∧ b ≠ a
  . have ⟨ h1, h2, h3 ⟩ := ht3
    have : (a,b,c,d) ∈ T3 := by
      subst c d
      ring_nf at hx
      simp at hx
      have : (a^2 - 1) * (b-a) = 0 := by linarith
      simp at this
      rcases this with h | h
      . have : (a-1)*(a+1)=0 := by linarith
        simp at this
        rcases this with h | h
        . have : a = 1 := by linarith
          subst a
          unfold T3
          simp
        . have : a = -1 := by linarith
          subst a
          unfold T3
          simp
      . have : b = a := by linarith
        contradiction
    unfold T3 at this
    left; left; left; left; right; exact this

  by_cases ht4: c = b ∧ d = b ∧ b ≠ a
  . have ⟨ h1, h2, h3 ⟩ := ht4
    have : (a,b,c,d) ∈ T4 := by
      subst c d
      ring_nf at hx
      simp at hx
      have : (b^2 - 1) * (a-b) = 0 := by linarith
      simp at this
      rcases this with h | h
      . have : (b-1)*(b+1)=0 := by linarith
        simp at this
        rcases this with h | h
        . have : b = 1 := by linarith
          subst b
          unfold T4
          simp
        . have : b = -1 := by linarith
          subst b
          unfold T4
          simp
      . have : b = a := by linarith
        contradiction

    unfold T4 at this
    left; left; left; right; exact this

  have ⟨ hx1, hx2, hx3 ⟩ := hx
  have h_solve_ab: b≠a → c*d=1 := by
    intro h
    have : (b-a) * (c*d - 1) = 0:= by linarith
    simp at this
    rcases this with h | h
    . have : b = a := by linarith
      contradiction
    . linarith

  have h_solve_bc: c≠b → a*d=1 := by
    intro h
    have : (c-b) * (a*d - 1) = 0:= by linarith
    simp at this
    rcases this with h | h
    . have : c = b := by linarith
      contradiction
    . linarith

  have h_solve_cd: d≠c → a*b=1 := by
    intro h
    have : (d-c) * (a*b - 1) = 0:= by linarith
    simp at this
    rcases this with h | h
    . have : d = c := by linarith
      contradiction
    . linarith

  have h_solve_ad: d≠a → b*c=1 := by
    intro h
    have : (d-a) * (b*c - 1) = 0:= by linarith
    simp at this
    rcases this with h | h
    . have : d = a := by linarith
      contradiction
    . linarith

  have h_solve_bd: d≠b → a*c=1 := by
    intro h
    have : (d-b) * (a*c - 1) = 0:= by linarith
    simp at this
    rcases this with h | h
    . have : d = b := by linarith
      contradiction
    . linarith

  have h_solve_ac: c≠a → b*d=1 := by
    intro h
    have : (c-a) * (b*d - 1) = 0:= by linarith
    simp at this
    rcases this with h | h
    . have : c = a := by linarith
      contradiction
    . linarith

  by_cases hu1: b = a ∧ d = c ∧ c ≠ b
  . have ⟨ h1, h2, h3 ⟩ := hu1
    have : (a,b,c,d) ∈ U1 := by
      have had_mul: a*d=1 := h_solve_bc h3
      have hbc_mul: b*c=1 := by rw [h1, ← h2]; exact had_mul
      have : a≠0 := by
        intro h
        rw [h] at had_mul
        norm_num at had_mul
      unfold U1
      simp
      use a
      refine ⟨?_,?_,?_,?_,?_⟩
      . intro h
        rw [h] at had_mul
        norm_num at had_mul
      . rfl
      . exact h1
      . field_simp
        rw [<- h1]
        linarith
      . field_simp
        linarith

    unfold U1 at this
    left; left; right; exact this

  by_cases hu2: c = a ∧ d = b ∧ b ≠ a
  . have ⟨ h1, h2, h3 ⟩ := hu2
    have : (a,b,c,d) ∈ U2 := by
      have hcd_mul: c*d=1 := h_solve_ab h3
      have hab_mul: a*b=1 := by rw [← h1, ← h2]; exact hcd_mul
      have : a≠0 := by
        intro h
        rw [h] at hab_mul
        norm_num at hab_mul
      unfold U2
      simp
      use a
      refine ⟨?_,?_,?_,?_,?_⟩
      . exact this
      . rfl
      . field_simp
        linarith
      . exact h1
      . field_simp
        rw [h2]
        linarith

    unfold U2 at this
    left; right; exact this

  by_cases hu3: d = a ∧ c = b ∧ b ≠ a
  . have ⟨ h1, h2, h3 ⟩ := hu3
    have : (a,b,c,d) ∈ U3 := by
      have hcd_mul: c*d=1 := h_solve_ab h3
      have hab_mul: a*b=1 := by rw [← h1, ← h2]; linarith
      have : a≠0 := by
        intro h
        rw [h] at hab_mul
        norm_num at hab_mul
      unfold U3
      simp
      use a
      refine ⟨?_,?_,?_,?_,?_⟩
      . exact this
      . rfl
      . field_simp
        linarith
      . field_simp
        rw [h2]
        linarith
      . exact h1

    unfold U3 at this
    right; exact this

  simp at ha1 ht1 ht2 ht3 ht4 hu1 hu2 hu3

  by_cases hab : b = a
  . have hac: c ≠ a := by
      intro h
      have := ha1 hab h
      have := ht1 hab h
      contradiction

    have hcd: d ≠ c := by
      intro h
      have := hu1 hab h
      have : c = a := by linarith
      contradiction

    have hab_mul: a*b=1 := h_solve_cd hcd
    have hbd_mul: b*d=1 := h_solve_ac hac
    have : b*(a-d)=0 := by linarith
    simp at this
    rcases this with h | h
    . rw [h] at hab_mul
      norm_num at hab_mul
    . have : d = a := by linarith
      have := ht2 hab this
      contradiction

  simp at hab
  have hcd_mul: c*d=1 := h_solve_ab hab

  by_cases hbc : c = b
  . have hbd: d ≠ b := by
      intro h
      have := ht4 hbc h
      contradiction

    have hac_mul: a*c=1 := h_solve_bd hbd
    have : (a-d)*c=0 := by linarith
    simp at this
    rcases this with h | h
    . have : d = a := by linarith
      have := hu3 this hbc
      contradiction
    . rw [h] at hcd_mul
      norm_num at hcd_mul

  simp at hbc
  have had_mul: a*d = 1 := h_solve_bc hbc

  have : (a-c)*d=0 := by linarith
  simp at this
  rcases this with h | h
  . have : c = a := by linarith
    by_cases hbd : d = b
    . have := hu2 this hbd
      contradiction
    . have hac_mul : a*c=1 := h_solve_bd hbd
      have : (a-d)*c=0 := by linarith
      simp at this
      rcases this with h | h
      . have : d = a := by linarith
        have := ht3 (by linarith) this
        contradiction
      . have : c = 0 := by linarith
        rw [h] at hcd_mul
        norm_num at hcd_mul

  . rw [h] at hcd_mul
    norm_num at hcd_mul

lemma algebra_1153 (x y : ℝ) (h1 : 2 = (10 : ℝ) / (100 : ℝ) * x) (h2 : 2 = (20 : ℝ) / (100 : ℝ) * y) : x - y = 10 := by
linarith

import Mathlib
lemma l1 (a b : ℕ) (apos: 0 < a): Nat.log 10 (10^b * a) = Nat.log 10 a + b := by sorry

lemma l2 (k:ℕ) : Nat.log 10 (3^k) = ⌊↑k * Real.logb 10 3⌋ := by sorry

theorem number_theory_638441 (k:ℕ) (kpos : 0 < k):
  (Nat.digits 10 (8^k * 5^(2*k)*15^k)).length = ⌊ k * Real.logb 10 3⌋ + 3*k + 1 := by

induction' b with b hb

  simp

  rw [pow_succ]
  have : (10 ^ b * 10 * a) = 10 ^ b * a * 10 := by ring
  rw [this]
  rw [Nat.log_mul_base]
  rw [hb]
  ring
  linarith
  positivity
lemma l2 (k:ℕ) : Nat.log 10 (3^k) = ⌊↑k * Real.logb 10 3⌋ := by

  have t1 : 0 ≤ ⌊↑k * Real.logb 10 3⌋ := by
    refine Int.floor_nonneg.mpr ?_
    refine Right.mul_nonneg ?_ ?_
    norm_cast
    exact Nat.zero_le k
    refine Real.logb_nonneg ?_ ?_
    norm_num
    norm_num

  have t2: ⌊↑k * Real.logb 10 3⌋.toNat = ⌊↑k * Real.logb 10 3⌋ := by
    refine Int.toNat_of_nonneg ?_
    exact t1

  have cla : (Nat.log 10 (3 ^ k)) = ⌊↑k * Real.logb 10 3⌋.toNat := by
    rw [Nat.log_eq_iff]
    rify at t2 ⊢

    constructor

    refine (Real.pow_le_iff_le_log ?_ ?_).mpr ?_
    linarith
    positivity
    rw [t2]
    have l1: ⌊↑k * Real.logb 10 3⌋ ≤ ↑k * Real.logb 10 3 := by exact Int.floor_le (↑k * Real.logb 10 3)
    have l2: ⌊↑k * Real.logb 10 3⌋ * Real.log 10 ≤ ↑k * Real.logb 10 3 * Real.log 10 := by
      refine mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right l1 ?_
      positivity
    have l3: ↑k * Real.logb 10 3 * Real.log 10 = Real.log (3 ^ k) := by
      simp
      rw [← Real.log_div_log]
      field_simp
    linarith

    refine Real.lt_pow_of_log_lt ?_ ?_
    norm_num
    push_cast
    rw [t2]
    norm_cast

    have l1 : ↑k * Real.logb 10 3 < @HAdd.hAdd ℤ ℤ ℤ instHAdd ⌊↑k * Real.logb 10 3⌋ 1 := by simp
    have l2 : ↑k * Real.logb 10 3 * Real.log 10 < ↑(⌊↑k * Real.logb 10 3⌋ + 1) * Real.log 10 := by
      refine mul_lt_mul_of_pos_of_nonneg' l1 ?_ ?_ ?_
      trivial
      positivity
      norm_cast
      linarith
    have l3 : Real.log ((3 ^ k)) = ↑k * Real.logb 10 3 * Real.log 10 := by
      simp
      rw [← Real.log_div_log]
      field_simp
    rify at l3
    simp at l3 ⊢
    norm_cast at l3 ⊢
    rw [l3]
    exact l2

    right
    norm_num

  zify at cla
  rw [cla]
  simp
  exact t1

theorem number_theory_638441 (k:ℕ) (kpos : 0 < k):
  (Nat.digits 10 (8^k * 5^(2*k)*15^k)).length = ⌊ k * Real.logb 10 3⌋ + 3*k + 1 := by

  have e1 : 8 ^ k * 5 ^ (2 * k) * 15 ^ k = 10 ^ (3 * k) * 3 ^ k := by
    rw [pow_mul]
    rw [pow_mul]
    norm_num
    rw [← mul_pow]
    rw [← mul_pow]
    rw [← mul_pow]
    norm_num

  rw [e1]

  rw [Nat.digits_len]
  field_simp
  rw [l1]
  push_cast
  rw [l2]
  positivity
  linarith
  simp

import Mathlib

theorem number_theory_168383 (x : ℤ)  (n p : ℕ) (hx : 0 < x) (hn : 0 < n) (hp : Nat.Prime p)
    (h : x^3 + 3 * x + 14 = 2 * p^n) :
    (x, n, p) = (1, 2, 3) ∨ (x, n, p) = (3, 2, 5) := by

have hpFact : Fact (Nat.Prime p) := ⟨hp⟩
      have h3Fact : Fact (Nat.Prime 3) := by decide
      have h5Fact : Fact (Nat.Prime 5) := by decide

      have : x^3 + 3 * x + 14 = (x + 2) * (x^2 - 2 * x + 7) := by
        ring_nf
      rw [this] at h

      by_cases hxeven : Even x
      · exfalso

        have : Even (x + 2) := by
          rw [Int.even_add]
          simp only [even_two, iff_true, hxeven]

        have : ∃ a : ℕ, (a ≤ n) ∧ x + 2 = 2 * p ^ a := by
          rw [even_iff_two_dvd] at this
          obtain ⟨k,hk⟩ := this
          suffices ∃ a : ℕ , (a ≤ n) ∧ k = p^a by
            obtain ⟨a,ha⟩ := this
            use a
            rw [hk, ← ha.2]
            simp only [and_true, ha.1]
          have knezero : k ≠ 0 := by
            intro h
            linarith
          rw [hk, mul_assoc] at h
          simp only [mul_eq_mul_left_iff, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, or_false] at h
          have : k ∣ p ^ n := by
            rw [dvd_def]
            use (x ^ 2 - 2 * x + 7)
            rw [← h]
          rw [dvd_prime_pow (Nat.prime_iff_prime_int.mp hp)] at this
          obtain ⟨a,h1,h2⟩ := this
          use a
          rw [Associated] at h2
          rcases h2 with ⟨u,h2⟩
          have u1 := Int.units_eq_one_or u
          have upos : u.val > 0 := by
            have mulpos : k * u.val > 0 := by
              rw [h2]
              apply pow_pos
              exact_mod_cast Nat.Prime.pos hp
            have : k > 0 := by linarith
            simp_rw [mul_pos_iff] at mulpos
            rcases mulpos with ⟨hkpos,hupos⟩
            · exact hupos
            · linarith
          have : u.val = 1 := by
            by_cases hu : u = 1
            · rw [hu]
              simp only [Units.val_one]
            · exfalso
              have : u.val = -1 := by
                rw [or_iff_not_imp_left] at u1
                have := u1 hu
                simp only [this, Units.val_neg, Units.val_one, Int.reduceNeg]
              linarith
          rw [this, mul_one] at h2
          exact ⟨h1,h2⟩
        obtain ⟨a,ha⟩ := this

        have apos : a > 0 := by
          by_contra hapos
          simp only [gt_iff_lt, not_lt, nonpos_iff_eq_zero] at hapos
          rw [hapos] at ha
          simp only [pow_zero, mul_one, add_left_eq_self] at ha
          linarith

        have hna : x ^ 2 - 2 * x + 7 = p ^ (n - a) := by
          rw [ha.2] at h
          have : 2 * p ^ a * p ^ (n - a) = 2 * p ^ n := by
            rw [mul_assoc, ← pow_add, (by omega : a + (n - a) = n)]
          rw_mod_cast [← this] at h

import Mathlib
theorem algebra_20627 {x y z : ℕ} (hx : 0 < x) (hy : 0 < y) (hz : 0 < z)
    (h : 6*x*y*z+30*x*y+21*x*z+2*y*z+105*x+10*y+7*z=812) : x+y+z=10 := by

have h1: (z+5)*(6*x*y+21*x+2*y+7) = 847 := by
    have: 847 = 812+35 := by norm_num
    rw [this, ← h]; ring

  have h2: 6*x*y+21*x+2*y+7 = (3*x+1)*(2*y+7) := by ring

  let A := z+5
  have A_def: A = z+5 := rfl
  let B := 3*x+1
  have B_def: B = 3*x+1 := rfl
  let C := 2*y+7
  have C_def: C = 2*y+7 := rfl
  have Agt3: A > 3 := by
    rw [A_def]; linarith [hz]
  have Bgt3: B > 3 := by
    rw [B_def]; linarith [hx]
  have Cgt3: C > 3 := by
    rw [C_def]; linarith [hy]
  have eqabc: A*B*C = 847 := by
    rw [← h1, h2, ← A_def, ← B_def, ← C_def]; ring
  have eq7or11{a b c: ℕ}(ha: a>3)(hb: b>3)(hc: c>3)(heq: a*b*c=847):
    (a=7 ∨ a=11) ∧ (b=7 ∨ b=11) ∧ (c=7 ∨ c=11) := by
    have p7: Nat.Prime 7 := by norm_num
    have p11: Nat.Prime 11 := by norm_num
    have fac847: 847 = 7 * (11*11) := by norm_num
    have adv: a ∣ 7 * (11*11) := by
      rw [← fac847, ← heq]
      apply Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.dvd_mul_right a b) (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ _)
    have advor: 7 ∣ a ∨ a ∣ 11*11 := by
      apply Prime.left_dvd_or_dvd_right_of_dvd_mul (Nat.prime_iff.mp p7) adv
    have bdv: b ∣ 7 * (11*11) := by
      rw [← fac847, ← heq]
      apply Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.dvd_mul_left b a) (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ _)
    have bdvor: 7 ∣ b ∨ b ∣ 11*11 := by
      apply Prime.left_dvd_or_dvd_right_of_dvd_mul (Nat.prime_iff.mp p7) bdv
    have cdv: c ∣ 7 * (11*11) := by
      rw [← fac847, ← heq]
      apply Nat.dvd_mul_left
    have cdvor: 7 ∣ c ∨ c ∣ 11*11 := by
      apply Prime.left_dvd_or_dvd_right_of_dvd_mul (Nat.prime_iff.mp p7) cdv

    have dv11(m:ℕ)(mgt3: m > 3): m ∣ 11*11 → m = 11 ∨ m = 11*11 := by
      intro mdv
      have := Prime.left_dvd_or_dvd_right_of_dvd_mul (Nat.prime_iff.mp p11) mdv
      by_cases m11: m = 11
      · rw [m11]; simp
      · push_neg at m11
        rcases this with hh1 | hh2 <;> right
        · rcases hh1 with ⟨k,hk⟩
          have tt1: k ∣ 11 := by
            rw [hk] at mdv
            have: 0 < 11 := by norm_num
            apply Nat.dvd_of_mul_dvd_mul_left this mdv
          have tt2: k = 1 ∨ k = 11 := by
            exact (Nat.dvd_prime p11).mp tt1
          rcases tt2 with hkk | hkk
          · rw [hk, hkk] at m11; simp at m11
          · rw [hk, hkk]
        · have: m = 1 ∨ m = 11 := by
            exact (Nat.dvd_prime p11).mp hh2
          rcases this with tt1 | tt2
          · rw [tt1] at mgt3; norm_num at mgt3
          · rw [tt2] at m11; simp at m11
    have abceq{a' b' c' : ℕ}(ha': a' > 3)(hb': b' > 3)(hc': c' > 3)
      (advor': 7 ∣ a' ∨ a' ∣ 11*11)(heq': a'*b'*c'=847): a' = 7 ∨ a' = 11 := by
      rcases advor' with ha7' | ha11'
      · rcases ha7' with ⟨k,hk⟩
        have: k = 1 := by
          rw [hk, fac847] at heq'
          have hh1: b'*(k*c') = 11*11 := by
            linarith [heq']
          have beq': b' = 11 ∨ b' = 11*11 := by
            apply dv11 b' hb'
            rw [← hh1]
            exact Nat.dvd_mul_right b' (k * c')
          rcases beq' with b11 | b1111
          · have: k*c' = 11 := by
              rw [b11] at hh1; linarith [hh1]
            have ceq': c' = 1 ∨ c' = 11 := by
              have cdv11': c' ∣ 11 := by
                rw [← this]; exact Nat.dvd_mul_left c' k
              exact (Nat.dvd_prime p11).mp cdv11'
            rcases ceq' with hc1 | hc11
            · rw [hc1] at hc'; norm_num at hc'
            · rw [hc11] at this; linarith [this]
          · rw [b1111] at hh1; simp at hh1
            exfalso; omega
        rw [this] at hk; rw [hk]; simp
      · have hha := dv11 a' ha' ha11'
        rcases hha with a11 | a1111
        · rw [a11]; simp
        · have hbc: b'*c' = 7 := by
            rw [a1111, fac847] at heq'
            linarith [heq']
          have bdv7: b' ∣ 7 := by
            rw [← hbc]; exact Nat.dvd_mul_right b' c'
          rcases ((Nat.dvd_prime p7).mp bdv7) with b1 | b7
          · rw [b1] at hb'; norm_num at hb'
          · rw [b7] at hbc; simp at hbc
            rw [hbc] at hc'; norm_num at hc'
    have aeq: a = 7 ∨ a = 11 := by
      apply abceq ha hb hc advor heq
    have beq: b = 7 ∨ b = 11 := by
      have heq': b*c*a = 847 := by
        rw [← heq]; ring
      apply abceq hb hc ha bdvor heq'
    have ceq: c = 7 ∨ c = 11 := by
      have heq': c*a*b = 847 := by
        rw [← heq]; ring
      apply abceq hc ha hb cdvor heq'
    exact ⟨aeq, beq, ceq⟩

  have heq := eq7or11 Agt3 Bgt3 Cgt3 eqabc

  have yeq: y = 2 := by
    have: 2*y+7 = 7 ∨ 2*y+7 = 11 := by
      rw [← C_def]; exact heq.right.right
    omega

  have xeq: x = 2 := by
    have: 3*x+1 = 7 ∨ 3*x+1 = 11 := by
      rw [← B_def]; exact heq.right.left
    omega

  have zeq: z = 6 := by
    have hc: C = 11 := by
      rw [C_def, yeq]
    have hb: B = 7 := by
      rw [B_def, xeq]
    have ha: A = 11 := by
      rw [hb, hc] at eqabc
      linarith [eqabc]
    rw [A_def] at ha; linarith [ha]

  rw [xeq, yeq, zeq]

import Mathlib

namespace inequalities_603033

lemma induction_downward (n : ℕ) {P : ℕ → Prop} :
  P n → (∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 0 (n - 1), P (k + 1) → P k) → ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 0 n, P k := by
  simp only [Finset.mem_Icc, zero_le, true_and]
  intro hn h k hk
  induction hk using Nat.decreasingInduction with
  | of_succ k h' ih =>
    exact h _ (Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt h') ih
  | self =>
    exact hn

lemma sum_Icc_weighted_second_differences (k : ℕ) (a : ℕ → ℝ) :
  ∑ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 k, i * (a (i - 1) - 2 * a i + a (i + 1)) =
    a 0 - (k + 1) * a k + k * a (k + 1) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => simp
  | succ k ih =>
    rw [Finset.sum_Icc_succ_top (by simp)]
    rw [ih]
    rw [show k + 1 - 1 = k by rfl]
    push_cast
    ring

end inequalities_603033

open inequalities_603033

theorem inequalities_603033 (n : ℕ) (a : ℕ → ℝ) (ha0 : a 0 = 0) (han : a n = 0)
    (h : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (n - 1), a (k - 1) - 2 * a k + a (k + 1) ≥ 0) :
    ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 0 n, a k ≤ 0 := by

simp only [Finset.mem_Icc, zero_le, true_and]
  intro hn h k hk
  induction hk using Nat.decreasingInduction with
  | of_succ k h' ih =>
    exact h _ (Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt h') ih
  | self =>
    exact hn

lemma sum_Icc_weighted_second_differences (k : ℕ) (a : ℕ → ℝ) :
  ∑ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 k, i * (a (i - 1) - 2 * a i + a (i + 1)) =
    a 0 - (k + 1) * a k + k * a (k + 1) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => simp
  | succ k ih =>
    rw [Finset.sum_Icc_succ_top (by simp)]
    rw [ih]
    rw [show k + 1 - 1 = k by rfl]
    push_cast
    ring

end inequalities_603033

open inequalities_603033

theorem inequalities_603033 (n : ℕ) (a : ℕ → ℝ) (ha0 : a 0 = 0) (han : a n = 0)
    (h : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (n - 1), a (k - 1) - 2 * a k + a (k + 1) ≥ 0) :
    ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 0 n, a k ≤ 0 := by

  have h1 : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (n - 1), a 0 - (k + 1) * a k + k * a (k + 1) ≥ 0 := by
    intro k hk
    have h2 : ∀ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 k, i * (a (i - 1) - 2 * a i + a (i + 1)) ≥ 0 := by
      intro i hi
      simp_all
      apply mul_nonneg
      · simp
      · apply h
        <;> nlinarith
    have h3 : ∑ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 k, i * (a (i - 1) - 2 * a i + a (i + 1)) ≥ 0 := by
      apply Finset.sum_nonneg
      intro i hi
      exact h2 i hi

    have h4 : ∑ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 k, i * (a (i - 1) - 2 * a i + a (i + 1)) =
      a 0 - (k + 1) * a k + k * a (k + 1) := sum_Icc_weighted_second_differences k a
    rw [h4] at h3
    exact h3

  rw [ha0] at h1

  apply induction_downward
  · rw [han]
  · intro k hk
    intro hak
    by_cases hk1 : k ≥ 1
    · simp_all only [Finset.mem_Icc, ge_iff_le, and_imp, zero_sub, le_neg_add_iff_add_le, add_zero,
      zero_le, true_and]

      have := h1 k hk1 hk
      nlinarith [this]
    · simp only [ge_iff_le, not_le, Nat.lt_one_iff] at hk1
      rw [hk1, ha0]

lemma count_one_digits_two_eq_sum (n : ℕ) :
    (Nat.digits 2 n).count 1 = (Nat.digits 2 n).sum := by sorry

lemma mersenne_succ (n : ℕ) : mersenne (n + 1) = 2 * mersenne n + 1 := by sorry

lemma sum_digits_add {b : ℕ} (hb : 1 < b) {x y : ℕ} (hxb : x < b) :
    (b.digits (x + b * y)).sum = x + (b.digits y).sum := by sorry

lemma sum_digits_add_base_pow_mul {b : ℕ} (hb : 1 < b) {x k y : ℕ} (hxb : x < b ^ k) :
    (b.digits (x + b ^ k * y)).sum = (b.digits x).sum + (b.digits y).sum := by sorry

theorem number_theory_291009 (n : ℕ) :
    (Nat.digits 2 (n * (2 ^ n - 1))).count 1 = n := by

have hl : ∀ x ∈ Nat.digits 2 n, x < 2 := fun x hx ↦ Nat.digits_lt_base' hx
  generalize Nat.digits 2 n = l at hl
  induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons x l IH =>
    rw [List.count_cons, List.sum_cons, add_comm]
    congr
    · have hx : x < 2 := by simpa using hl x
      interval_cases x <;> simp
    · exact IH fun i hi ↦ hl i (List.mem_cons_of_mem x hi)

lemma mersenne_succ (n : ℕ) : mersenne (n + 1) = 2 * mersenne n + 1 := by
  suffices mersenne (n + 1) + 1 = 2 * (mersenne n + 1) by
    simpa only [mul_add, mul_one, add_left_inj] using this
  simp only [succ_mersenne, pow_succ']

lemma sum_digits_add {b : ℕ} (hb : 1 < b) {x y : ℕ} (hxb : x < b) :
    (b.digits (x + b * y)).sum = x + (b.digits y).sum := by
  cases y with
  | zero =>
    cases x with
    | zero => simp
    | succ x => simp [hxb]
  | succ y => rw [Nat.digits_add b hb _ _ hxb] <;> simp

lemma sum_digits_add_base_pow_mul {b : ℕ} (hb : 1 < b) {x k y : ℕ} (hxb : x < b ^ k) :
    (b.digits (x + b ^ k * y)).sum = (b.digits x).sum + (b.digits y).sum := by
  cases y.eq_zero_or_pos with
  | inl hy => simp [hy]
  | inr hy =>
    calc _
    _ = (b.digits x ++ List.replicate (k - (b.digits x).length) 0 ++
        b.digits y).sum := by
      rw [Nat.digits_append_zeroes_append_digits hb hy]
      congr
      suffices (b.digits x).length ≤ k from (Nat.add_sub_of_le this).symm
      cases eq_or_ne x 0 with
      | inl hx => simp [hx]
      | inr hx =>
        rw [Nat.digits_len _ _ hb hx]
        exact Nat.log_lt_of_lt_pow hx hxb
    _ = _ := by simp

lemma sum_digits_of_add_eq_mersenne (n a b : ℕ) (hab : a + b = mersenne n) :
    (Nat.digits 2 a).sum + (Nat.digits 2 b).sum = n := by
  induction n generalizing a b with
  | zero =>
    obtain ⟨ha, hb⟩ : a = 0 ∧ b = 0 := by simpa using hab
    simp [ha, hb]
  | succ n IH =>

    have h_odd : Odd (a + b) := by simp [hab]

    wlog h : Even a ∧ Odd b generalizing a b
    · rw [add_comm]
      refine this b a ?_ ?_ ?_
      · exact add_comm a b ▸ hab
      · exact add_comm a b ▸ h_odd
      · -- It suffices to show that `a` is odd.
        suffices Odd a by simpa [← Nat.odd_add.mp h_odd]

        simpa [Nat.odd_add'.mp h_odd] using h

    rcases h with ⟨hu, hv⟩
    obtain ⟨u, rfl⟩ : ∃ u, a = 2 * u := hu.exists_two_nsmul
    obtain ⟨v, rfl⟩ : ∃ v, b = 2 * v + 1 := hv.exists_bit1
    calc _

    _ = (Nat.digits 2 (0 + 2 * u)).sum + (Nat.digits 2 (1 + 2 * v)).sum := by congr 3 <;> ring
    _ = (Nat.digits 2 u).sum + (Nat.digits 2 v).sum + 1 := by
      rw [sum_digits_add one_lt_two one_lt_two, sum_digits_add one_lt_two zero_lt_two]
      ring

    _ = _ := by
      congr
      refine IH u v ?_
      suffices 2 * (u + v) + 1 = mersenne (n + 1) by simpa [mersenne_succ]
      refine .trans ?_ hab
      ring

theorem number_theory_291009 (n : ℕ) :
    (Nat.digits 2 (n * (2 ^ n - 1))).count 1 = n := by

  wlog hn : 1 < n
  · rw [not_lt] at hn
    interval_cases n <;> simp

  let s := n - 1
  let t := 2 ^ n - n

  have hs_pos : 0 < s := by simpa [s] using hn
  have ht_pos : 0 < t := by simpa [t] using Nat.lt_two_pow_self

  have hs_int : (s : ℤ) = n - 1 := by simp [Nat.cast_sub hn.le]
  have ht_int : (t : ℤ) = 2 ^ n - n := by simp [Nat.cast_sub Nat.lt_two_pow_self.le]

  have h_eq : n * (2 ^ n - 1) = t + 2 ^ n * s := by
    suffices n * (2 ^ n - 1) = (t + 2 ^ n * s : ℤ) by
      rw [← @Nat.cast_inj ℤ]
      simpa
    rw [hs_int, ht_int]
    ring

  have h_add : t + s = 2 ^ n - 1 := by
    suffices (t + s : ℤ) = 2 ^ n - 1 by
      rw [← @Nat.cast_inj ℤ]
      simpa
    rw [hs_int, ht_int]
    ring

  rw [count_one_digits_two_eq_sum]

  rw [h_eq]

  rw [sum_digits_add_base_pow_mul one_lt_two (by simp [t, Nat.zero_lt_of_lt hn])]

  exact sum_digits_of_add_eq_mersenne n t s h_add

theorem algebra_16859 :
    IsLeast {z | ∃(x y : ℝ), 0 < x ∧ 0 < y ∧ 1 / (x + 2) + 1 / (y + 2) = 1 / 3 ∧ z = x + 2 * y} (3 + 6 * sqrt 2) := by

have zero_lt_sqrt_2 : 0 < √2 := by norm_num
  constructor
  · -- Equality occurs when $(x + 2)^2 = 2(y + 2)^2,$ or $x + 2 = (y + 2) \sqrt{2}.$  Substituting into $\frac{1}{x + 2} + \frac{1}{y + 2} = \frac{1}{3},$ we get

    use (1 + 3 * √2)
    use (2 + 3 * √2) / 2
    ring_nf
    use (by linarith)
    use (by linarith)
    field_simp
    ring_nf
    rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)]
    ring_nf
  · apply mem_lowerBounds.mpr
    simp
    intro z x hx y hy h hz
    rw [hz]
    have h : 1 / (x + 2) + 1 / (y + 2) = 1 / 3 := by
      simp
      exact h

    have ine₁: (x + 2 + 2 * (y + 2)) * (1 / (x + 2) + 1 / (y + 2)) ≥ (1 + sqrt 2) ^ 2 := by
      obtain ⟨S, hS⟩ := (by simp: ∃S : Finset ℕ, S = {0, 1})
      have : ∃a : ℕ → ℝ, a =
          fun n => match n with
          | 0 => √(x + 2)
          | 1 => √(2 * (y + 2))
          | _ => 0
        := by simp
      rcases this with ⟨a, ha⟩
      have : ∃b : ℕ → ℝ, b = fun n => match n with
          | 0 => √(1 / (x + 2))
          | 1 => √(1 / (y + 2))
          | _ => 0
        := by simp
      rcases this with ⟨b, hb⟩
      have : (∑ i ∈ S, a i * b i) = (1 + √2) := by
        simp [hS, ha, hb, add_assoc, ←one_div, mul_div]
        rw [div_self (sqrt_ne_zero'.mpr (by positivity)), ←mul_div]
        rw [div_self (sqrt_ne_zero'.mpr (by positivity)), mul_one]
      rw [this.symm]

      have : (x + 2 + 2 * (y + 2)) = (∑ i ∈ S, a i ^ 2) := by
        simp [hS, ha, hb, mul_pow]
        repeat rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by linarith)]
      rw [this]
      have : (1 / (x + 2) + 1 / (y + 2)) = (∑ i ∈ S, b i ^ 2) := by
        simp [hS, ha, hb]
        repeat rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by linarith)]
      rw [this]
      apply Finset.sum_mul_sq_le_sq_mul_sq

    have ine₂: x + 2 + 2 * y + 4 ≥ 9 + 6 * √2 := by
      simp
      have : 9 + 6 * √2 = 3 * (1 + √2) ^ 2 := by
        rw [add_pow_two, Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)]
        ring_nf
      rw [this]
      have : x + 2 + 2 * y + 4 = (x + 2 + 2 * (y + 2)) := by linarith
      rw [this, mul_comm]
      apply (le_mul_inv_iff₀ (by positivity)).mp
      rw [←one_div, h.symm]
      exact ine₁

    linarith

theorem number_theory_606271 :
    IsLeast {q : ℤ | 0 < q ∧ ∀ m ∈ Finset.Icc (1 : ℤ) 1006, ∃ n : ℤ, (m : ℚ) / 1007 * q < n ∧ n < (m + 1 : ℚ) / 1008 * q} 2015 := by

simp [IsLeast, lowerBounds]
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  . -- Show that q = 2015 works.
    intro m hm₁ hm₂

    refine ⟨2 * m + 1, ?_, ?_⟩
    . -- Show that m / 1007 * 2015 < 2 * m + 1.
      field_simp
      rw [div_lt_iff₀]
      ring_nf
      norm_cast
      omega
      norm_num
    . -- Show that 2 * m + 1 < (m + 1) / 1008 * 2015.
      field_simp
      rw [lt_div_iff₀]
      ring_nf
      norm_cast
      omega
      norm_num
  . -- Show that q ≥ 2015.
    intro q hq h

    by_contra! h₀

    obtain ⟨n, h₁, h₂⟩ := h 1006 (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
    clear h

    have h₃ : (n : ℚ) < q := by
      qify at hq
      calc
        (n : ℚ) < (1006 + 1) / 1008 * q := h₂
        _ < (q : ℚ) := by linarith only [hq]

    have h₄ : n ≤ q - 2 := by
      by_contra!
      norm_cast at h₃ this

      have h₄ : n = q - 1 := by omega

      have h₅ : q > 1007 := by
        rw [h₄] at h₁
        field_simp at h₁
        rw [div_lt_iff₀] at h₁
        norm_cast at h₁
        rw [<-h₄, show (1006 * q : ℚ) = (1006 * q : ℤ) by simp] at h₁
        norm_cast at h₁
        omega
        norm_num

      have h₆ : q < 1008 := by
        rw [h₄] at h₂
        field_simp at h₂
        rw [lt_div_iff₀] at h₂
        norm_num at h₂
        norm_cast at h₂
        linarith only [h₂]
        norm_num

      omega

    qify at h₄
    have h₅ := h₁.trans_le h₄
    field_simp at h₅
    rw [div_lt_iff₀] at h₅
    norm_cast at h₅
    replace h₅ : q > 2014 := by
      rw [show (q - 2 : ℚ) = (q - 2 : ℤ) by simp] at h₄
      rw [show (1006 * q : ℚ) = (1006 * q : ℤ) by simp, show ((q - 2) * 1007 : ℚ) = ((q - 2) * 1007 : ℤ) by simp] at h₅
      norm_cast at h₄ h₅
      linarith only [h₅]

    omega
    norm_num

theorem algebra_229830 {a b c : ℤ} (h₀ : b^2 = a * c) (h₁ : 2*(b+8) = a+c) (h₂ : (b + 8)^2 = a * (c+64)) :
    a = 4 ∧ b = 12 ∧ c = 36 := by

by_cases ha : a = 0
    · have h₀' := h₀; rw [ha] at h₀'; simp at h₀'; rw [ha, h₀'] at h₂; linarith

    let q':∃ q:ℝ, b = a*q ∧ c = a*q^2 := by
      use b/a; ring_nf; constructor
      · rw [mul_comm (a:ℝ), mul_assoc, mul_inv_cancel₀ (by simp; exact ha)]; simp
      · norm_cast
        rw [h₀]; ring_nf
        apply Eq.symm
        calc _
        _ = ↑(a ^ 2) * ↑c * (a:ℝ)⁻¹ ^ 2 := by rw [Int.cast_mul];
        _ = (a:ℝ) * (a:ℝ) * (c:ℝ) * (a:ℝ)⁻¹ * (a:ℝ)⁻¹ := by rw [Int.cast_pow]; ring_nf
        _ = ((a:ℝ) * (a:ℝ)⁻¹) * ((a:ℝ) * (a:ℝ)⁻¹) * (c:ℝ) := by ring_nf
        _ = (c:ℝ) := by rw [mul_inv_cancel₀ (by simp; exact ha), one_mul, one_mul]
    obtain ⟨q, ⟨qdefb, qdefc⟩⟩ := q'

    rify at h₁ h₂
    rw [qdefb, qdefc] at h₁ h₂

    apply congr_arg (fun x => -x + a + a*q^2 + 16) at h₁
    ring_nf at h₁
    conv_lhs at h₁ =>
      calc _
      _ = a* (1- 2*q + q ^ 2)  := by ring_nf
    apply congr_arg (fun x => (x - a * 64 - a ^ 2 * q ^ 2)/16 - 4) at h₂
    ring_nf at h₂
    conv_lhs at h₂ =>
      calc _
      _ = a * (q-4) := by ring_nf

    have h3: a * (1-2*q+q^2) / (a * (q-4)) = 16/(-4) := by
      norm_num
      rw [h₁ , h₂]; norm_num
    conv_lhs at h3=>
      calc _
      _ = ↑a * (1 - 2 * q + q ^ 2) * (1/ (↑a * (q - 4))) := by ring_nf
      _ = a * (1 - 2 * q + q ^ 2) * (1/a * 1 /(q - 4)) := by apply congr_arg (fun x=> a * (1 - 2 * q + q ^ 2) * x); field_simp
      _ = (a/a) * (1 - 2 * q + q ^ 2) * (1 /(q - 4)) := by ring_nf
      _ = (1 - 2 * q + q ^ 2) / (q-4) := by rw [div_self (by simp; assumption)]; ring_nf
    norm_num at h3

    by_cases hq4 : q - 4 = 0
    · have q4: q=4 := by linarith
      rw [q4] at h₁; norm_num at h₁

      norm_cast at h₁
      apply Dvd.intro_left at h₁
      norm_num at h₁
    apply congr_arg (fun x => x * (q - 4)) at h3
    conv_lhs at h3 =>
      calc _
      _ = (1 - 2 * q + q ^ 2) * ((q-4)/(q-4)) := by ring_nf
      _ = 1 - 2 * q + q ^ 2 := by rw [div_self (by simp; assumption), mul_one];
    apply congr_arg (fun x => x + 4 *(q-4)) at h3; ring_nf at h3

    have sol := (quadratic_eq_zero_iff (a:=(1:ℝ)) (b:=(2:ℝ)) (c:=(-15:ℝ)) (by norm_num) (s:=8) (by unfold discrim; norm_num) q).mp
    ring_nf at sol
    specialize sol h3

    cases' sol with sol' sol'
    · rw [sol'] at h₁; norm_num at h₁; have ha:(a:ℝ) =4 := by linarith
      norm_cast at ha
      exact ⟨ha, ⟨by rify; rw [qdefb, ha, sol']; norm_num, by rify; rw [qdefc, ha, sol']; norm_num⟩⟩
    · rw [sol'] at h₁; norm_num at h₁;

      norm_cast at h₁
      apply Dvd.intro_left at h₁
      norm_num at h₁

import Mathlib
open Real Set
open scoped BigOperators
theorem inequalities_606431 {n : ℕ} (a : ℕ → ℝ) :
  ∃ k ∈ Finset.Icc 0 n, ∀ x ∈ Icc 0 1, ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), a i * x ^ i ≤ ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (k + 1), a i := by

induction n generalizing a
    case zero => simp_all -- when n = 0 there is nothing to prove
    case succ n ih =>

      have lem {a b x : ℝ} (hx : x ∈ Icc 0 1) : a + b * x ≤ max a (a + b) := by
        have ⟨x_ge, x_le⟩ := hx

        by_cases h : b < 0
        · -- in case b < 0, we have a + b * x ≤ a
          have : a + b * x ≤ a := by
            have : b * x ≤ 0 := by
              apply mul_nonpos_iff.mpr
              right; constructor <;> linarith
            linarith
          exact le_max_of_le_left this
        · -- in case b ≥ 0, we have a + b * x ≤ a + b as x ≤ 1
          have : b * x ≤ b := by
            nth_rw 2 [show b = b * 1 by ring]
            apply mul_le_mul
            all_goals linarith
          have : a + b * x ≤ a + b := by
            apply add_le_add_left
            exact this
          trans a + b
          assumption
          exact le_max_right a (a + b)

      let a' : ℕ → ℝ := fun i ↦ a (i + 1)

      have ⟨k, ⟨k_mem, hk⟩⟩ := ih a'
      rw [Finset.mem_Icc] at k_mem

      have h_sum_succ (x : ℝ) : ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (n + 1 + 1), a i * x ^ i =
        a 0 + x * ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), a' i * x ^ i := by
          rw [Finset.range_eq_Ico]
          rw [Finset.sum_eq_sum_Ico_succ_bot] -- take out the first summand from lhs
          rw [show x ^ 0 = 1 by rfl, mul_one]
          congr
          rw [Finset.mul_sum] -- multiply x into the summation
          have : ∑ i ∈ Finset.Ico 0 (n + 1), x * (a (i + 1) * x ^ i) = ∑ i ∈ Finset.Ico 0 (n + 1), (a (i + 1) * x ^ (i + 1)) := by
            congr; ext; ring  -- and reform the formula inside the summation
          rw [this]

          rw [Finset.sum_Ico_add' (fun i ↦ a (i) * x ^ i) 0 (n + 1) 1]
          linarith

      have sum_a' : ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (k + 1), a' i = ∑ i ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (k + 2), a i := by
        unfold a'
        rw [Finset.range_eq_Ico]
        rw [show 1 = 0 + 1 by ring, show k + 2 = k + 1 + 1 by ring]
        rw [Finset.sum_Ico_add']

      by_cases h : a 0 ≤ ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (k + 2), a i
      · -- if ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (k + 2), a i is bigger, we use k + 1
        use k + 1
        constructor
        · -- clearly k + 1 ∈ [0, n + 1], as k ∈ [0, n]
          apply Finset.mem_Icc.mpr
          simp
          linarith

        intro x xmem

        have ih_x := hk x xmem

        rw [h_sum_succ x]

        trans max (a 0) (a 0 + ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), a' i * x ^ i)
        nth_rw 1 [mul_comm]
        apply lem xmem

        trans max (a 0) (a 0 + ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (k + 1), a' i)
        apply max_le_max_left
        exact (add_le_add_iff_left (a 0)).mpr ih_x

        rw [sum_a']
        rw [← Finset.sum_eq_sum_Ico_succ_bot]
        rw [← Finset.range_eq_Ico]
        rw [show k + 1 + 1 = k + 2 by ring]
        rw [max_eq_right h]
        linarith

      · -- if a 0 is bigger, we use k = 0
        use 0
        simp
        push_neg at h

        intro x x_ge x_le

        have ih_x := hk x ⟨x_ge, x_le⟩

        rw [h_sum_succ x]

        trans max (a 0) (a 0 + ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), a' i * x ^ i)
        nth_rw 1 [mul_comm]
        apply lem ⟨x_ge, x_le⟩

        trans max (a 0) (a 0 + ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (k + 1), a' i)
        apply max_le_max_left
        exact (add_le_add_iff_left (a 0)).mpr ih_x

        rw [sum_a']
        rw [← Finset.sum_eq_sum_Ico_succ_bot]
        rw [← Finset.range_eq_Ico]
        rw [max_eq_left (le_of_lt h)]
        linarith

import Mathlib
open Real
theorem algebra_97849 (x : ℝ)
    (h : sin x ^ 10 + cos x ^ 10 = 11 / 36) :
    ∀ m n : ℕ, m > 0 ∧ n > 0 ∧ Nat.Coprime m n ∧
      sin x ^ 12 + cos x ^ 12 = m / n → m + n = 67 := by

set y := sin x ^ 2
  set z := 1 / 2 - y

  have hsin k : sin x ^ (2 * k) = (1 / 2 - z) ^ k :=
    calc
      sin x ^ (2 * k) = y ^ k := by simp [y, ←pow_mul]
      _               = (1 / 2 - z) ^ k := by simp [z]

  have hcos k : cos x ^ (2 * k) = (1 / 2 + z) ^ k :=
    calc
      cos x ^ (2 * k) = (1 - y) ^ k := by simp [y, pow_mul, cos_sq']
      _               = (1 / 2 + z) ^ k := by ring

  have h1 : (80 * z ^ 4 + 40 * z ^ 2 + 1) / 16 = 11 / 36 := by
    rw [← h, hsin 5, hcos 5]; ring

  have h2 : (5 / 144) * (12 * z ^ 2 - 1) * (12 * z ^ 2 + 7) = 0 := by
    apply sub_eq_zero_of_eq at h1
    ring_nf at h1; ring_nf
    exact h1

  have hz2 : z ^ 2 = 1 / 12 := by
    rw [mul_eq_zero_iff_right (by positivity), mul_eq_zero_iff_left (by norm_num)] at h2
    set t := z ^ 2; linarith
  intro m n

  rw [hsin 6, hcos 6]
  rw [show (1 / 2 - z) ^ 6 + (1 / 2 + z) ^ 6 = 2 * (z ^ 2) ^ 3 + (15 / 2) * (z ^ 2) ^ 2 + (15 / 8) * z ^ 2 + 1 / 32 by ring]
  rw [hz2]; norm_num
  intro hm hn hmn heq

  have hrat : (m : ℤ) / (n : ℤ) = ((13 : ℤ) : ℚ) / (54 : ℤ) := by
    rify
    rw [← heq]

  apply Rat.div_int_inj at hrat <;> try simp
  · omega
  · cases n with
    | zero => contrapose heq; norm_num
    | succ n => exact Nat.zero_lt_succ n
  · assumption
  · norm_num

import Mathlib
open Real

theorem inequalities_600871 (a b c : ℝ) (h₀ : 0 ≤ c) (h₁ : c ≤ b) (h₂ : b ≤ a)
    (h₃ : a + b + c = 3) :
    a * b^2 + b * c^2 + c * a^2 ≤ 27 / 8 ∧
    (a * b^2 + b * c^2 + c * a^2 = 27 / 8 ↔ a = 3 / 2 ∧ b = 3 / 2 ∧ c = 0) := by

constructor
  · -- First, we prove the inequality $a * b^2 + b * c^2 + c * a^2 \leq 27/8$
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - 3 / 2), sq_nonneg (b - 3 / 2), sq_nonneg (c), sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c),
              h₃, mul_self_nonneg (a - 3 / 2), mul_self_nonneg (b - 3 / 2), mul_self_nonneg (c),
              sq_nonneg (a + b + c - 3), sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c)]
  · -- Now, we prove the equality condition
    constructor
    · -- Forward direction: if $a * b^2 + b * c^2 + c * a^2 = 27/8$, then $a = 3/2 \land b = 3/2 \land c = 0$
      intro h_eq
      have h4 : c = 0 := by
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - 3 / 2), sq_nonneg (b - 3 / 2), sq_nonneg (c), sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c),
                  h₃, h_eq]
      have h5 : a + b = 3 := by linarith
      have h6 : a = 3 / 2 := by
        have : (a - 3 / 2) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg (a - 3 / 2)
        have : (b - 3 / 2) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg (b - 3 / 2)
        nlinarith
      have h7 : b = 3 / 2 := by linarith
      exact ⟨h6, h7, h4⟩
    · -- Backward direction: if $a = 3/2 \land b = 3/2 \land c = 0$, then $a * b^2 + b * c^2 + c * a^2 = 27/8$
      rintro ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
      rw [ha, hb, hc]
      norm_num

import Mathlib
set_option maxHeartbeats 0
open Nat
theorem number_theory_8497 (p : ℕ) [hp : Fact (Nat.Prime p)]
(h : ∀ a : ℕ, 1 < a ∧ a ≤ p / 2 →
∃ b : ℕ, p / 2 < b ∧ b < p ∧ p ∣ a * b - 1) :
p < 80 := by

by_contra h'; push_neg at h'

  have h'p := hp.1
  have hp0 : p ≠ 0 := by linarith
  have hp1 : p ∣ (p - 1) * (p - 1) - 1 := by
    use p - 2; rw [Nat.sub_mul, Nat.mul_sub, Nat.mul_sub, Nat.mul_sub]; simp
    rw [Nat.sub_sub, Nat.sub_one_add_one, Nat.sub_sub, mul_two]; assumption
  have h'p0 : NeZero p := by rw [neZero_iff]; assumption
  have odp : Odd p := by
    apply Prime.odd_of_ne_two; assumption; linarith
  rcases odp with ⟨k, hk0⟩
  have hk1 : 40 ≤ k := by
    by_contra h'k1; push_neg at h'k1; linarith
  have pcpi: ∀ i, i ∈ Finset.Icc 2 k → Nat.Coprime i p := by
    intro i hi; simp at hi; rcases hi with ⟨hil, hir⟩
    rw [Nat.coprime_comm]; apply Nat.coprime_of_lt_prime; linarith
    rw [hk0]; linarith; assumption

  let f (a : ℕ) : ℕ := if ha : a ∈ Finset.Icc 2 k then (ZMod.unitOfCoprime a (pcpi a ha))⁻¹.val.val else 0

  have hf0 : ∀ x y, x ∈ Finset.Icc 2 k → 1 ≤ y ∧ y < p → ( f x = y ↔ p ∣ x * y - 1 ) := by
    intro x y hx hy; simp at hx
    have hx0 : (x : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
      intro hxne; rw [ZMod.natCast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd] at hxne
      apply le_of_dvd at hxne; linarith; linarith
    constructor
    · intro hxy; simp [f] at hxy; split_ifs at hxy
      · rw [← ZMod.natCast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd, Nat.cast_sub, sub_eq_zero]
        simp; rw [mul_comm, mul_eq_one_iff_eq_inv₀ hx0, ← hxy]; simp
        apply one_le_mul; linarith; by_contra hy; simp at hy
        rw [hy] at hxy; simp at hxy; contradiction
    intro h'xy; simp [f]; split_ifs
    · rw [← ZMod.val_cast_of_lt hy.right]; congr
      symm; rw [← mul_eq_one_iff_eq_inv₀ hx0, mul_comm]
      rw [← ZMod.natCast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd, Nat.cast_sub] at h'xy
      rw [sub_eq_zero] at h'xy; simp at h'xy; assumption
      apply one_le_mul; linarith; exact hy.left

  have hf1 : Set.InjOn f (Finset.Icc 2 k) := by
    rw [Set.InjOn]; intro x1 hx1 x2 hx2 h12; simp at hx1; simp at hx2
    simp [f] at h12; split_ifs at h12; apply ZMod.val_injective at h12
    simp at h12; rw [ZMod.natCast_eq_natCast_iff'] at h12
    have h'x1 : x1 % p = x1 := by apply Nat.mod_eq_of_lt; linarith
    have h'x2 : x2 % p = x2 := by apply Nat.mod_eq_of_lt; linarith
    rw [← h'x1, ← h'x2]; assumption

  have hf2a : f '' (Finset.Icc 2 k) ⊆ Finset.Icc (k+1) (p-2) := by
    intro y; simp; intro x hx0 hx1 hx2
    simp [f] at hx2; split_ifs at hx2
    · have h'x1 : 1 < x ∧ x ≤ p / 2 := by
        constructor
        · linarith
        rw [Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le]; rw [hk0]
        have : x * 2 ≤ k * 2 := by linarith
        linarith; norm_num
      rcases h x h'x1 with ⟨z, hz1, hz2, hz3⟩
      rw [← ZMod.natCast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd, Nat.cast_sub, sub_eq_zero] at hz3
      simp at hz3; rw [mul_comm, mul_eq_one_iff_eq_inv₀] at hz3
      rw [← hz3] at hx2; simp at hx2; rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt hz2] at hx2
      rw [← hx2]; constructor
      · rw [Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul, hk0, Nat.lt_iff_add_one_le] at hz1
        rw [mul_comm, add_assoc, show 1+1=1*2 by simp, ← add_mul] at hz1
        simp at hz1; assumption; norm_num
      rw [Nat.lt_iff_add_one_le, ← Nat.le_sub_iff_add_le, Nat.le_iff_lt_or_eq] at hz2
      rcases hz2 with hz2l | hz2r
      · rw [Nat.lt_iff_add_one_le, ← Nat.le_sub_iff_add_le, Nat.sub_sub] at hz2l
        simp at hz2l; assumption; rw [Nat.le_sub_iff_add_le]; simp; linarith
        linarith
      rw [← ZMod.natCast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd, Nat.cast_sub, sub_eq_zero] at hp1
      simp at hp1; rw [← hz2r, mul_eq_one_iff_eq_inv₀] at hp1
      rw [hp1] at hz3; simp at hz3; rw [hz2r, ZMod.natCast_eq_natCast_iff'] at hz3
      have : (p - 1) % p = p - 1 := by
        apply Nat.mod_eq_of_lt; simp; linarith
      rw [this] at hz3
      have : x % p = x := by apply Nat.mod_eq_of_lt; linarith
      rw [this] at hz3; rw [← hz3] at h'x1; linarith
      intro hnz; rw [hnz] at hp1; simp at hp1
      apply one_le_mul; rw [Nat.le_sub_iff_add_le]; simp; linarith; linarith
      rw [Nat.le_sub_iff_add_le]; simp; linarith; linarith; linarith
      intro hnx; rw [hnx] at hz3; simp at hz3
      apply one_le_mul; linarith; linarith
    have : 2 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ k := ⟨hx0, hx1⟩
    contradiction

  have hf2 : f '' (Finset.Icc 2 k) = Finset.Icc (k+1) (p-2) := by
    apply Set.eq_of_subset_of_ncard_le hf2a
    rw [Set.ncard_image_of_injOn, Set.ncard_coe_Finset, Set.ncard_coe_Finset]
    simp; rw [add_assoc, ← Nat.sub_add_comm, ← add_assoc, ← two_mul]
    rw [Nat.add_sub_assoc, show 2-1=1 by simp, hk0]; simp
    linarith; assumption

  rw [Set.ext_iff] at hf2; simp at hf2

  have hf3 : f 2 = k + 1 := by
    rw [hf0 2 (k+1), mul_add, mul_one]; simp; rw [← hk0]; simp
    linarith; constructor
    · linarith
    linarith

  have hf4 : f k = p - 2 := by
    rw [hf0 k (p-2), Nat.mul_sub, Nat.sub_sub]
    nth_rw 2 [mul_comm]; rw [← hk0]
    use k-1; rw [Nat.mul_sub, mul_comm]; simp
    simp; linarith; constructor
    · rw [Nat.le_sub_iff_add_le]; linarith; linarith
    simp; linarith

  have hf5 : ∀ x, f x ≠ x + 1 := by
    intro x hx0
    have h'x0 := hx0
    simp [f] at hx0; split_ifs at hx0; rename_i hx1
    have hx2 : k + 1 ≤ x + 1 ∧ x + 1 ≤ p - 2 := by apply (hf2 (x+1)).mp; use x
    simp at hx2
    have hx3 : x = k := by linarith
    rw [hx3, hf4, hk0] at h'x0; simp at h'x0
    rw [show 2=1+1 by simp, add_mul, one_mul] at h'x0; linarith

  have hf6 : ∀ x, f x ≠ x + 2 := by
    intro x hx0
    have h'x0 := hx0
    simp [f] at hx0; split_ifs at hx0; rename_i hx1
    have hx2 : k + 1 ≤ x + 2 ∧ x + 2 ≤ p - 2 := by apply (hf2 (x+2)).mp; use x
    rcases hx2 with ⟨hx2l, _⟩; simp at hx2l
    rcases hx1 with ⟨_, hx1r⟩; rw [Nat.le_iff_lt_or_eq] at hx1r
    rcases hx1r with hx1rr | hx1rl
    · rw [Nat.lt_iff_add_one_le] at hx1rr
      have h''x : x + 1 = k := by linarith
      symm at h''x; rw [← Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add] at h''x
      rw [← h''x, ← Nat.sub_add_comm, Nat.add_sub_assoc] at h'x0; simp at h'x0
      have : 2 = k - 1 := by
        apply hf1; simp; linarith; simp; rw [Nat.le_sub_iff_add_le]
        simp; linarith; linarith; linarith
      symm at this; linarith; linarith; linarith; linarith
    rw [hx1rl] at h'x0
    have : p - 2 = k + 2 := by linarith
    rw [hk0] at this; simp at this; linarith

  have two_ne_sq_modp : ¬ IsSquare (2 : ZMod p) := by
    intro sq2; rcases sq2 with ⟨a, h'a⟩; let ha := h'a
    let a' := a - 1
    have ha' : a = a' + 1 := by simp [a']
    rw [ha', mul_add, add_mul, mul_one, one_mul, add_assoc] at ha
    nth_rw 2 [← add_assoc] at ha; rw [← two_mul, ← add_assoc] at ha
    rw [← add_mul, mul_comm, ← sub_eq_iff_eq_add] at ha
    nth_rw 1 [← mul_one 2] at ha; rw [two_mul] at ha; simp at ha
    let A := a'.val
    have hA0 : A = a' := by simp [A]
    have hA1 : A < p := by simp [A]; apply ZMod.val_lt
    rw [← hA0, show (2:ZMod p) = (2:ℕ) by simp] at ha
    rw [← Nat.cast_add, ← Nat.cast_mul, show (1:ZMod p) = (1:ℕ) by simp] at ha
    rw [ZMod.natCast_eq_natCast_iff, Nat.modEq_iff_dvd'] at ha
    have hA2 : f A = A + 2 := by
      rw [hf0]; assumption; simp; constructor
      · by_contra h'A; push_neg at h'A; rw [Nat.lt_iff_le_pred] at h'A
        simp at h'A; rw [Nat.le_one_iff_eq_zero_or_eq_one] at h'A
        rcases h'A with h'Al | h'Ar
        · rw [h'Al] at hA0; rw [← hA0] at ha'; rw [ha'] at h'a
          simp at h'a; rw [← mul_one 2, two_mul] at h'a; simp at h'a
        rw [h'Ar] at ha; simp at ha; apply Nat.le_of_dvd at ha; linarith
        norm_num; norm_num
      by_contra hnA; push_neg at hnA; rcases le_or_gt A (p-2) with h'Al | h'Ar
      · have hA3 : ∃ x_1, (2 ≤ x_1 ∧ x_1 ≤ k) ∧ f x_1 = A := by
          rw [hf2]; constructor
          · linarith
          assumption
        rcases hA3 with ⟨x, hx0, hx1⟩;
        let h''x1 := hx1
        rw [hf0] at hx1
        by_cases hx2 : x ≤ k - 1
        · have hA4 : p ∣ A * (A + 2 - x) := by
            have : A * (A + 2 - x) = (A * (A + 2) - 1) - (x * A - 1) := by
              rw [Nat.sub_sub, Nat.add_sub_cancel']; nth_rw 3 [mul_comm]
              rw [Nat.mul_sub]; apply one_le_mul; linarith; linarith
            rw [this]; apply Nat.dvd_sub; apply Nat.sub_le_sub_right
            rw [mul_comm]; apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left; linarith
            assumption; assumption
          apply Prime.dvd_or_dvd at hA4; rcases hA4 with hA4l | hA4r
          · apply Nat.le_of_dvd at hA4l; linarith; linarith
          apply Nat.le_of_dvd at hA4r; rw [Nat.le_sub_iff_add_le] at hA4r
          linarith; linarith; rw [Nat.sub_pos_iff_lt]; linarith
          apply Nat.prime_iff.mp; assumption
        push_neg at hx2; rw [Nat.lt_iff_add_one_le, Nat.sub_one_add_one] at hx2
        have hx3 : x = k := by linarith
        rw [hx3, hf4] at h''x1; rw [← h''x1, Nat.sub_add_cancel, mul_comm] at ha
        have := Nat.dvd_sub (show p*(p-2)-1≤p*(p-2) by simp) (show p∣p*(p-2) by use p-2) ha
        rw [Nat.sub_sub_eq_min] at this; apply Nat.le_of_dvd at this
        rw [Nat.le_min] at this; linarith; rw [Nat.lt_min]; constructor
        · apply Nat.mul_pos; linarith; linarith
        norm_num; linarith; linarith; simp; assumption; constructor
        · linarith
        assumption
      rw [gt_iff_lt, Nat.lt_iff_add_one_le, show 2=1+1 by simp] at h'Ar
      rw [← Nat.sub_sub, Nat.sub_one_add_one] at h'Ar
      rw [Nat.lt_iff_add_one_le, ← Nat.le_sub_iff_add_le] at hA1
      have : A = p - 1 := by linarith
      rw [this, show 2=1+1 by simp, ← add_assoc, Nat.sub_one_add_one, mul_comm] at ha
      rw [← sq_sub_sq, Nat.sub_sub] at ha; simp at ha
      have := Nat.dvd_sub (show p^2-2≤p^2 by simp) (show p ∣ p^2 by use p; rw [pow_two]) ha
      rw [Nat.sub_sub_eq_min] at this; apply Nat.le_of_dvd at this
      rw [Nat.le_min] at this; linarith; rw [Nat.lt_min]; constructor
      · apply Nat.pow_pos; linarith

theorem inequalities_259385 (a b c : ℝ) (ha : 0 < c) (hc : c < b) (hb : b < a) :
    a^4 * b + b^4 * c + c^4 * a > a * b^4 + b * c^4 + c * a^4 := by

have h1 : a > b := hb
  have h2 : b > c := hc
  have h3 : a > c := by linarith

  have h4 : a^4 * b + b^4 * c + c^4 * a - (a * b^4 + b * c^4 + c * a^4) = (a - b) * (b - c) * (a - c) * (a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + a * b + b * c + c * a) := by
    ring

  have h5 : (a - b) * (b - c) * (a - c) * (a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + a * b + b * c + c * a) > 0 := by

    have h6 : a - b > 0 := by linarith
    have h7 : b - c > 0 := by linarith
    have h8 : a - c > 0 := by linarith
    have h9 : a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + a * b + b * c + c * a > 0 := by
      nlinarith [
        mul_pos ha (show 0 < a by nlinarith : a > 0),
        mul_pos ha (show 0 < b by nlinarith : b > 0),
        mul_pos ha (show 0 < c by nlinarith : c > 0)]
    apply mul_pos
    apply mul_pos
    apply mul_pos
    all_goals linarith

  linarith [h4, h5]

theorem algebra_9380 {z : ℂ} (hz : z + Complex.abs z * .I = 3 + 9 * .I) :
    z = 3 + 4 * .I := by

have hzre : z.re = 3 := by
    apply_fun Complex.re at hz
    simp_all

  apply Complex.ext

  . convert hzre
    simp

  apply_fun Complex.im at hz

  simp [Complex.abs_eq_sqrt_sq_add_sq, hzre] at hz
  set y := z.im
  have hy : √(3 ^ 2 + y ^ 2) = 9 - y := by linear_combination hz

  apply_fun (· ^ 2) at hy
  rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)] at hy

  have : 18 * y = 72 := by linear_combination hy

  have : y = 4 := by linarith

  simpa

open Real
theorem Combinatorics_608743
    (An : n = 2)
    (Ak : k = 1)
    (Ahk : hk = 2)
    (APH : PH = 1/2)
    (APT : PT = 1 - PH)
    (AC : (C : ℝ) = n.choose k)
    (AhC : (hC : ℝ) = n.choose hk)
    (AP : P = C * PH ^ k * PT ^ (n - k))
    (AP₁: P₁ = P * PH * P)
    (AP₂ : P₂ = P₃ + P₄)
    (AP₃ : P₃ = P₁)
    (AP₄ : P₄ = hC * PH ^ hk * PH * hC * PH ^ hk):
    P₁ / P₂ = (4 / 5 : ℝ) := by

norm_num [An, Ak, Ahk, APH, APT] at *

  rw [AC] at AP
  ring_nf at AP

  rw [AP] at AP₁
  ring_nf at AP₁

  rw [AhC] at AP₄
  ring_nf at AP₄

  rw [AP₁] at AP₃

  rw [AP₃,AP₄] at AP₂

  field_simp
  linarith

theorem algebra_308075 (f : ℤ[X]) (hf : ∀ k ∈ range 2004, f.eval ↑k ∈ Icc 0 2002) :
    ∀ i ∈ range 2004, f.eval ↑i = f.eval 0 := by

by_cases fconst : ∃ a, f = C a
  · rcases fconst with ⟨a, ha⟩
    simp [ha]

  simp at *; suffices : ∏ i ∈ range 2004, (X - C (i : ℤ)) ∣ f - C (f.eval 0)
  · intro i hi; rcases this with ⟨g, hg⟩
    apply_fun fun t => t.eval ↑i at hg
    simp at hg; rw [← sub_eq_zero]; convert hg
    symm; apply mul_eq_zero_of_left
    rw [eval_prod, prod_eq_zero_iff]
    simp; use i; omega

  have bd0 := hf 0 (by simp)
  have bd2003 := hf 2003 (by simp)
  have f2003 := sub_dvd_eval_sub 2003 0 f
  push_cast at bd0 bd2003
  replace f2003 : f.eval 2003 = f.eval 0 := by
    rw [← sub_eq_zero]; by_contra!
    norm_num [← Int.natAbs_dvd_natAbs] at f2003
    apply Nat.le_of_dvd at f2003; zify at f2003
    rw [le_abs] at f2003; omega
    exact Int.natAbs_pos.mpr this
  obtain ⟨g1, hg1⟩ : X - C 2003 ∣ f - C (f.eval 0) := by
    rw [← f2003]; apply X_sub_C_dvd_sub_C_eval
  have g10 : g1.eval 0 = 0 := by
    apply_fun fun t =>t.eval 0 at hg1
    simp [f2003] at hg1; omega

  obtain ⟨g2, hg2⟩ : X ∣ g1 := by
    rw [← sub_zero g1, ← sub_zero X, show (0:ℤ[X]) = C 0 by simp]
    nth_rw 2 [← g10]; exact X_sub_C_dvd_sub_C_eval
  have g2ne : g2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; simp [h] at hg2
    simp [hg2] at hg1
    rw [sub_eq_zero] at hg1
    specialize fconst (f.eval 0); contradiction

  rw [range_eq_Ico, prod_Ico_succ_top]
  rw [prod_eq_prod_Ico_succ_bot]; push_cast
  rw [hg1, mul_comm, mul_dvd_mul_iff_left]
  rw [C_0, sub_zero, hg2, mul_dvd_mul_iff_left]
  rw [prod_eq_prod_Ico_succ_bot, prod_Ico_succ_top]

  push_cast; have auxdvd : ∏ k ∈ Ico 2 2002, (X - C ((k : ℕ) : ℤ)) ∣ g2 := by
    apply dvd_trans _ (prod_multiset_X_sub_C_dvd g2)
    apply dvd_trans _ (Multiset.toFinset_prod_dvd_prod _)
    have : ∏ k ∈ Ico (2 : ℕ) 2002, (X - C (k : ℤ)) =
    ∏ x ∈ image (fun k : ℕ => X - C (k : ℤ)) (Ico 2 2002), x := by
      rw [prod_image]; intros; simp_all
    rw [this]; clear this; apply prod_dvd_prod_of_subset
    simp [subset_iff]; intro r i ige ilt hr
    use i; split_ands; exact g2ne

    · specialize hf i (by omega)
      rw [hg2, sub_eq_iff_eq_add] at hg1
      rw [hg1] at hf; simp [← mul_assoc] at hf
      rw [← neg_le_iff_add_nonneg', ← neg_mul, ← neg_mul] at hf
      rw [neg_sub] at hf; nth_rw 2 [← neg_le_neg_iff] at hf
      rw [neg_add', ← neg_mul, ← neg_mul, neg_sub] at hf
      rw [le_sub_iff_add_le] at hf
      rcases hf with ⟨hfl, hfr⟩
      replace hfl : ((2003 : ℤ) - i) * i * eval (↑i) g2 ≤ 2002 := by omega
      replace hfr : -2002 ≤ ((2003 : ℤ) - i) * i * eval (↑i) g2 := by omega
      by_contra!; rw [← Int.natAbs_pos] at this
      have : (((2003 : ℤ) - i) * i * eval (↑i) g2).natAbs ≤ 2002 := by
        zify; rw [abs_le]; exact ⟨hfr, hfl⟩
      rw [Int.natAbs_mul] at this; convert this
      simp; rw [← mul_one 2002]; apply Nat.mul_lt_mul_of_lt_of_le
      · zify; rw [abs_eq_self.mpr, sub_mul]
        rw [lt_sub_iff_add_lt, ← lt_sub_iff_add_lt']; calc
          _ = ((i:ℤ) + 1) * (i - 1) + 1 := by ring
          _ < (2003 : ℤ) * (i - 1) + 1 := by
            gcongr; all_goals omega
          _ = _ := by ring
        apply mul_nonneg; omega; simp
      all_goals omega
    push_cast; rw [hr]

  rcases auxdvd with ⟨g3, hg3⟩; rw [hg3, mul_comm]
  rw [mul_assoc, mul_dvd_mul_iff_left]
  suffices : g3.eval 1 = 0 ∧ g3.eval 2002 = 0

  · obtain ⟨g4, hg4⟩ : X - 1 ∣ g3 := by
      rw [← sub_zero g3, show (0:ℤ[X]) = C 0 by simp]
      rw [← this.left]; exact X_sub_C_dvd_sub_C_eval
    simp [hg4] at this
    obtain ⟨g5, hg5⟩ : X - 2002 ∣ g4 := by
      rw [← sub_zero g4, show (0:ℤ[X]) = C 0 by simp]
      rw [← this]; exact X_sub_C_dvd_sub_C_eval
    use g5; simp [hg4, hg5]; ring

  have bd1 := hf 1 (by simp)
  have bd2002 := hf 2002 (by simp)
  push_cast at bd1 bd2002
  rw [hg3] at hg2; rw [hg2, sub_eq_iff_eq_add] at hg1
  rw [hg1] at bd1 bd2002; simp [eval_prod] at bd1 bd2002
  replace bd1 : (2002 * ((∏ x ∈ Ico 2 2002, (1 - ((x : ℕ) : ℤ))) * eval 1 g3)).natAbs ≤ 2002 := by
    zify; rw [abs_le]; omega
  replace bd2002 : (2002 * ((∏ x ∈ Ico 2 2002, (2002 - ((x : ℕ) : ℤ))) * eval 2002 g3)).natAbs ≤ 2002 := by
    zify; rw [abs_le]; omega
  simp [Int.natAbs_mul, Nat.le_one_iff_eq_zero_or_eq_one, or_assoc] at bd1 bd2002
  have : 1 < (∏ x ∈ Ico 2 2002, (1 - ((x : ℕ) : ℤ))).natAbs := by
    zify; rw [abs_prod, show (1:ℤ) = ∏ x ∈ Ico 2 2002, 1 by simp]
    apply prod_lt_prod; any_goals simp
    intro i ige ilt; rw [le_abs]; omega
    use 3; norm_num
  have : 1 < (∏ x ∈ Ico 2 2002, (2002 - ((x : ℕ) : ℤ))).natAbs := by
    zify; rw [abs_prod, show (1:ℤ) = ∏ x ∈ Ico 2 2002, 1 by simp]
    apply prod_lt_prod; any_goals simp
    intro i ige ilt; rw [le_abs]; omega
    use 3; norm_num
  any_goals omega
  rw [prod_ne_zero_iff]; intros; apply X_sub_C_ne_zero
  exact X_ne_zero; apply X_sub_C_ne_zero

theorem number_theory_611165 :
    IsLeast {n : ℤ | ∃ p₁ q₁ p₂ q₂ p₃ q₃ : ℤ, p₁.gcd q₁ = 1 ∧ q₁ > 0 ∧ p₂.gcd q₂ = 1 ∧ q₂ > 0 ∧ q₁ = 60 ∧ q₂ = 70 ∧ q₃ > 0 ∧ (p₁ / q₁ + p₂ / q₂ : ℚ) = (p₃ / q₃ : ℚ) ∧ n = q₃} 84 := by

simp [IsLeast, lowerBounds]
  refine ⟨?_,?_⟩
  . -- Show that 84 is possible, because 1/60 + 3/70 = 5/84.
    use 1, 60, by norm_num, by norm_num, 3, 70
    norm_num
    use 5
    norm_num
  . -- Show that 84 is the least possible denominator.
    intro n p₁ q₁ h₀ h₁ p₂ q₂ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ h₆ p₃ h₇
    rw [h₄, h₅] at h₇

    rw [show p₁ / (60 : ℤ) + p₂ / (70 : ℤ) = (7 * p₁ + 6 * p₂ : ℚ) / 420 by field_simp; ring] at h₇
    rw [div_eq_div_iff (by norm_num) (by simp; omega)] at h₇
    norm_cast at h₇

    have h₈ : 2 ^ 2 ∣ n := by
      have h₈ : 2 ^ 2 ∣ p₃ * 420 := by
        calc
          2 ^ 2 ∣ 2 ^ 2 * (p₃ * 105) := by apply dvd_mul_right
          _ = p₃ * 420 := by ring
      rw [<-h₇] at h₈

      apply IsCoprime.dvd_of_dvd_mul_left _ h₈

      apply IsCoprime.pow_left

      rw [show 6 * p₂ = 2 * (3 * p₂) by ring]
      apply IsCoprime.add_mul_left_right
      apply IsCoprime.mul_right
      norm_num

      rw [Int.isCoprime_iff_gcd_eq_one]
      rw [Int.gcd_comm, h₄] at h₀
      suffices Int.gcd 2 p₁ ∣ Int.gcd 60 p₁ by
        rw [h₀] at this
        simp_all
      rw [show (60 : ℤ) = 30 * 2 by norm_num]
      apply Int.gcd_dvd_gcd_mul_left

    have h₉ : 3 ∣ n := by
      have h₉ : 3 ∣ p₃ * 420 := by
        calc
          3 ∣ 3 * (p₃ * 140) := by apply dvd_mul_right
          _ = p₃ * 420 := by ring
      rw [<-h₇] at h₉

      apply IsCoprime.dvd_of_dvd_mul_left _ h₉

      rw [show 6 * p₂ = 3 * (2 * p₂) by ring]
      apply IsCoprime.add_mul_left_right
      apply IsCoprime.mul_right
      norm_num

      rw [Int.isCoprime_iff_gcd_eq_one]
      rw [Int.gcd_comm, h₄] at h₀
      suffices Int.gcd 3 p₁ ∣ Int.gcd 60 p₁ by
        rw [h₀] at this
        simp_all
      rw [show (60 : ℤ) = 20 * 3 by norm_num]
      apply Int.gcd_dvd_gcd_mul_left

    have h₁₀ : 7 ∣ n := by
      have h₁₀ : 7 ∣ p₃ * 420 := by
        calc
          7 ∣ 7 * (p₃ * 60) := by apply dvd_mul_right
          _ = p₃ * 420 := by ring
      rw [<-h₇] at h₁₀

      apply IsCoprime.dvd_of_dvd_mul_left _ h₁₀

      rw [add_comm]
      apply IsCoprime.add_mul_left_right
      apply IsCoprime.mul_right
      norm_num

      rw [Int.isCoprime_iff_gcd_eq_one]
      rw [Int.gcd_comm, h₅] at h₂
      suffices Int.gcd 7 p₂ ∣ Int.gcd 70 p₂ by
        rw [h₂] at this
        simp_all
      rw [show (70 : ℤ) = 10 * 7 by norm_num]
      apply Int.gcd_dvd_gcd_mul_left

    have h₁₁ : 4 * 3 * 7 ∣ n := by
      iterate 2 apply IsCoprime.mul_dvd (by norm_num)
      all_goals
        simp_all
    simp at h₁₁
    apply Int.le_of_dvd h₆ h₁₁

theorem RecursionOther_4202
      (f : ℕ → ℚ) (hf_ne0 : ∀ n, f n ≠ 0)
      (hf_1 : f 1 = 1 / 2)
      (hf_other : ∀ n > 1, f n = f (n - 1) / (2 * n * f (n - 1) + 1))
      : ∑ i ∈ range 2018, f (i+1) = 2018 / 2019 := by

let g (n : ℕ) := 1 / f n

  have hg_1 : g 1 = 2 := by simp [g, hf_1]
  have hg_other {n : ℕ} (hn : n > 1) : g n = 2 * n + g (n - 1) := by
    simp [g]
    rw [hf_other n hn, inv_div (f (n - 1)) (2 * ↑n * f (n - 1) + 1)]
    rw [add_div (2 * (n:ℚ) * f (n - 1)) 1 (f (n - 1))]
    rw [mul_div_cancel_right₀ (2 * (n:ℚ)) (hf_ne0 (n - 1))]
    simp

  have g_term {n : ℕ} (hn : n > 0) : g n = n * (n + 1) := by
    induction n with
    | zero => linarith
    | succ n ih =>
    cases n with
      | zero => simp [hg_1]; norm_num
      | succ n =>
        rw [hg_other (by linarith), Nat.add_sub_cancel (n+1) 1, ih (by linarith)]
        simp [mul_add, add_mul]; ring
  let qp (n : ℕ) := - 1 / (n.succ : ℚ)

  have f_term {n : ℕ} (hn : n > 0) : f n = 1 / n - 1 / (n + 1) := by
    rw [show f n = 1 / g n by simp [g], g_term hn]
    field_simp

  have : ∑ i ∈ range 2018, f (i+1) = ∑ i ∈ range 2018, (qp (i+1) - qp i) := by
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intros x hx; rw [f_term (by linarith)]
    simp at hx; simp [qp]; ring_nf;

  rw [this]
  rw [Finset.sum_range_sub]
  simp [qp]
  norm_num

theorem algebra_21896 {f : ℝ → ℝ}
    (hf : ∀ x, x ≥ 3 → f x = 2 * x - 5)
    (hf' : ∀ x, x < 3 → f x = -x + 5) :
    {x | f (f x) = 3}.encard = 3 := by

suffices {x | f (f x) = 3} = {1, 7 / 2, 9 / 2} by
    rw [this, Set.encard_insert_of_not_mem, Set.encard_pair]
    all_goals norm_num
  ext x
  constructor
  swap

  . rintro (rfl | rfl | rfl)
    . simp
      norm_num [hf, hf']
    . simp
      norm_num [hf', hf]
    simp
    norm_num [hf', hf]
  intro hx
  simp at hx ⊢

  set y := f x with hy

  rcases le_or_lt 3 y with hy3 | hy3
  . -- If $2y - 5 = 3$, then $y = 4$.  Note that $4 \ge 3$, so $f(4) = 3$.
    rw [hf _ hy3] at hx
    replace hx : y = 4 := by linarith
    rw [hy] at hx

    rcases le_or_lt 3 x with hx3 | hx3
    . -- If $2x - 5 = 4$, then $x = 9/2$.  Note that $9/2 \ge 3$, so $f(9/2) = 3$.
      rw [hf _ hx3] at hx
      right; right
      linarith

    rw [hf' _ hx3] at hx
    left
    linarith

  rw [hf' _ hy3] at hx
  replace hx : y = 2 := by linear_combination -hx
  rw [hy] at hx

  rcases le_or_lt 3 x with hx3 | hx3
  . -- If $2x - 5 = 2$, then $x = 7/2$.  Note that $7/2 \ge 3$, so $f(7/2) = 2$.
    rw [hf _ hx3] at hx
    right; left
    linarith

  rw [hf' _ hx3] at hx
  linarith

theorem inequalities_198656 {n : ℕ} (hn : 0 < n) (hm : m ≥ 1) (a : Fin n → ℝ)
    (ε : Fin n → ℝ) (hε : ∀ i, |ε i| ≤ 10 ^ (-m : ℤ)) :
    |(∑ i : Fin n, a i / (1 + ε i)) - (∑ i : Fin n, a i)| ≤
    (1 / (10 ^ m - 1)) * ∑ i : Fin n, |a i| := by

have ε_small : ∀ i, |ε i| < 1 := by
    intro i
    have : _ := hε i
    have : (10 : ℝ) ^ (-m) < 1 := by simp; rw [inv_lt_one₀ (by positivity)]; simp; linarith
    linarith

  have denom_nonzero : ∀ i, 1 + ε i ≠ 0 := by
    intro i h
    rw [← neg_eq_iff_add_eq_zero] at h
    have : |ε i| = 1 := by rw [← h]; norm_num
    linarith [ε_small i]

  have res_bound : ∀ i, |1 - 1 / (1 + ε i)| ≤ 1 / (10 ^ m - 1) := by

    have sub_abs_le_abs_add (y : ℝ) : 1 - |y| ≤ |1 + y| := by
      have : y ≤ 0 ∨ 0 ≤ y := by exact LinearOrder.le_total y 0

      rcases this with neg | nonneg
      · rw [abs_eq_neg_self.mpr neg]
        simp
        exact le_abs_self (1 + y)
      rw [abs_eq_self.mpr nonneg]
      trans 1 + y
      · linarith
      exact le_abs_self (1 + y)
    intro i
    calc
      |1 - 1 / (1 + ε i)| = |(1 + ε i) / (1 + ε i) - 1 / (1 + ε i)| := by nth_rw 1 [← div_self (show 1 + ε i ≠ 0 by exact denom_nonzero i)]
      _ = |ε i / (1 + ε i)| := by rw [div_sub_div_same]; simp
      _ = |ε i| / |1 + ε i| := abs_div _ _
      _ ≤ |ε i| / (1 - |ε i|) := by refine div_le_div₀ (abs_nonneg _) (le_refl _) (by linarith [ε_small i]) (sub_abs_le_abs_add _)
      _ ≤ 10 ^ (-m) / (1 - |ε i|) := by rw [div_le_div_iff_of_pos_right (by linarith [ε_small i])]; exact hε i
      _ ≤ 10 ^ (-m) / (1 - 10 ^ (-m)) := by rw [div_le_div_iff_of_pos_left (by positivity) (by linarith [ε_small i]) (by simp; rw [inv_lt_one₀ (by positivity)]; simp; linarith)]; linarith [hε i]
      _ = (10 ^ (-m) * 10 ^ m) / ((1 - 10 ^ (-m)) * 10 ^ m) := (mul_div_mul_right (10 ^ (-m) : ℝ) (1 - 10 ^ (-m) : ℝ) (show (10 ^ m : ℝ) ≠ 0 by positivity)).symm
      _ = 1 / (10 ^ m - 1) := by rw [sub_mul, ← zpow_add₀]; simp; positivity

  have bound : ∀ i, |a i / (1 + ε i) - a i| ≤ |a i| * (1 / (10 ^ m - 1)) := by
    intro i
    calc
      |a i / (1 + ε i) - a i| = |a i * (1 / (1 + ε i) - 1)| := by simp [mul_sub, div_eq_mul_inv]
      _ = |a i| * |1 / (1 + ε i) - 1| := abs_mul _ _
      _ = |a i| * |1 - 1 / (1 + ε i)| := by simp; left; exact abs_sub_comm _ _
      _ ≤ |a i| * (1 / (10 ^ m - 1)) := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg' (le_refl _) (res_bound _) (abs_nonneg _) (abs_nonneg _)

  calc
    |(∑ i, a i / (1 + ε i)) - (∑ i, a i)| = |∑ i, (a i / (1 + ε i) - a i)| := by rw [sum_sub_distrib]
    _ ≤ ∑ i, |a i / (1 + ε i) - a i| := by exact abs_sum_le_sum_abs (fun i => a i / (1 + ε i) - a i) univ
    _ ≤ ∑ i, |a i| * (1 / (10 ^ m - 1)) := sum_le_sum fun i a => bound i
    _ = (1 / (10 ^ m - 1)) * ∑ i, |a i| := by rw [mul_comm]; exact Eq.symm (sum_mul univ (fun i => |a i|) (1 / (10 ^ m - 1)))

theorem algebra_159027 {x y : ℝ}
    (h₁ : 10 * x ^ 2 + 5 * y ^ 2 - 2 * x * y - 38 * x - 6 * y + 41 = 0)
    (h₂ : 3 * x ^ 2 - 2 * y ^ 2 + 5 * x * y - 17 * x - 6 * y + 20 = 0) :
    x = 2 ∧ y = 1 := by

have : 56 * x ^ 2 - 224 * x + 21 * y ^ 2 - 42 * y + 245 = 0 := by
    convert congrArg₂ (5 * · + 2 * ·) h₁ h₂ using 1
    · ring
    · simp

  replace : 8 * x ^ 2 - 32 * x + 3 * y ^ 2 - 6 * y + 35 = 0 := by
    convert congrArg (· / 7) this using 1
    · ring
    · simp

  replace : 8 * (x - 2) ^ 2 + 3 * (y - 1) ^ 2 = 0 := by
    convert this using 1
    ring
  suffices 8 * (x - 2) ^ 2 = 0 ∧ 3 * (y - 1) ^ 2 = 0 by
    simpa [sub_eq_zero] using this
  refine (add_eq_zero_iff_of_nonneg ?_ ?_).mp this
  · simpa using sq_nonneg (x - 2)
  · simpa using sq_nonneg (y - 1)
