theorem other_24672_1 {m a b c: ℝ} : let A := !![1,1,m;1,m,1;m,1,1];
(∃! v, Matrix.mulVec A v = ![a, b, c]) ↔ m ≠ 1 ∧ m ≠ -2 := by
  intro A; constructor
  .
    contrapose!; intro meq exuni; rcases exuni with ⟨v, ⟨hv1, hv2⟩⟩
    simp at hv1 hv2; by_cases h' : m ≠ 1
    .
      replace meq := sorry
      simp [A, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail, meq] at hv1
      have abcadd : c = - (a + b) := by sorry
      set y1 := ![2/3*a+b/3,a/3-b/3,0] with h1; set y2 := ![2/3*a+b/3+1,a/3-b/3+1,1] with h2
      have y1ney2 : y1 ≠ y2 := by sorry
      have Amul1eq : A.mulVec y1 = ![a, b, c] := by sorry
      have Amul2eq : A.mulVec y2 = ![a, b, c] := by sorry
      have := sorry
      have := sorry
    push_neg at h'; simp [A, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail, h'] at hv1
    have bceqa : b = a ∧ c = a := by sorry
    set y1 := ![0,0,a] with h1; set y2 := ![1,-1,a] with h2
    have yneq : y1 ≠ y2 := by sorry
    have Amul1eq : A.mulVec y1 = ![a, b, c] := by sorry
    have Amul2eq : A.mulVec y2 = ![a, b, c] := by sorry
    have := sorry
    have := sorry
  intro hm; apply exists_unique_of_exists_of_unique
  .
    set v := ![(b+a-(1+m)*c)/((2+m)*(1-m)),(a+c-(1+m)*b)/((2+m)*(1-m)),(b+c-(1+m)*a)/((2+m)*(1-m))] with hv
    use v; simp [A, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
    rw [hv]; norm_num
    have : (2 + m) * (1 - m) ≠ 0 := by sorry
    field_simp; rw [show b+a-(1+m)*c+(a+c-(1+m)*b+m*(b+c-(1+m)*a)) = a*((2+m)*(1-m)) by ring]
    rw [show b+a-(1+m)*c+(m*(a+c-(1+m)*b)+(b+c-(1+m)*a)) = b*((2+m)*(1-m)) by ring]
    rw [show m*(b+a-(1+m)*c)+(a+c-(1+m)*b+(b+c-(1+m)*a)) = c*((2+m)*(1-m)) by ring]
    field_simp
  have invA : Invertible A := by sorry
  suffices : Function.Injective A.mulVec
  .
    intro y1 y2 h1 h2; rw [← h2] at h1
    apply this at h1; assumption
  apply Matrix.mulVec_injective_of_invertible
theorem other_24672_2 {m a b c: ℝ} (hm : m ≠ 1 ∧ m ≠ -2) : let A := !![1,1,m;1,m,1;m,1,1];
Matrix.mulVec A v = ![a, b, c] → (v 0 + v 2 = 2 * v 1 ↔ a + c = 2 * b) := by

intro A; constructor

  · contrapose!; intro meq exuni; rcases exuni with ⟨v, ⟨hv1, hv2⟩⟩
    simp at hv1 hv2; by_cases h' : m ≠ 1
    · replace meq := meq h'
      simp [A, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail, meq] at hv1

      have abcadd : c = - (a + b) := by
        rw [← add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg]
        have : v 0 + (v 1 + -(2 * v 2)) = a := by
          apply_fun fun t => Function.eval 0 t at hv1
          simp at hv1; assumption
        rw [← this]
        have : v 0 + (-(2 * v 1) + v 2) = b := by
          apply_fun fun t => Function.eval 1 t at hv1
          simp at hv1; assumption
        rw [← this]
        have : -(2 * v 0) + (v 1 + v 2) = c := by
          apply_fun fun t => Function.eval 2 t at hv1
          simp at hv1; assumption
        rw [← this]; ring

      set y1 := ![2/3*a+b/3,a/3-b/3,0] with h1; set y2 := ![2/3*a+b/3+1,a/3-b/3+1,1] with h2
      have y1ney2 : y1 ≠ y2 := by
        intro h; apply_fun fun t => Function.eval 0 t at h
        simp [h1, h2] at h
      have Amul1eq : A.mulVec y1 = ![a, b, c] := by
        simp [A, meq, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
        rw [h1, abcadd]; norm_num; ring_nf
      have Amul2eq : A.mulVec y2 = ![a, b, c] := by
        simp [A, meq, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
        rw [h2, abcadd]; norm_num; ring_nf
      have := hv2 y1 Amul1eq; rw [this] at y1ney2
      have := hv2 y2 Amul2eq; rw [this] at y1ney2; contradiction
    push_neg at h'; simp [A, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail, h'] at hv1

    have bceqa : b = a ∧ c = a := by
      let aeq := hv1; let beq := hv1; let ceq := hv1
      apply_fun fun t => Function.eval 0 t at aeq
      apply_fun fun t => Function.eval 1 t at beq
      apply_fun fun t => Function.eval 2 t at ceq
      simp at aeq beq ceq; rw [← aeq, ← beq, ← ceq]; ring_nf
      simp

    set y1 := ![0,0,a] with h1; set y2 := ![1,-1,a] with h2
    have yneq : y1 ≠ y2 := by
      intro h; rw [h1, h2] at h
      apply_fun fun t => Function.eval 0 t at h; simp at h
    have Amul1eq : A.mulVec y1 = ![a, b, c] := by
      simp [A, h', Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
      rw [h1, bceqa.left, bceqa.right]; norm_num
    have Amul2eq : A.mulVec y2 = ![a, b, c] := by
      simp [A, h', Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
      rw [h2, bceqa.left, bceqa.right]; norm_num
    have := hv2 y1 Amul1eq; rw [this] at yneq
    have := hv2 y2 Amul2eq; rw [this] at yneq; contradiction

  intro hm; apply exists_unique_of_exists_of_unique

  · set v := ![(b+a-(1+m)*c)/((2+m)*(1-m)),(a+c-(1+m)*b)/((2+m)*(1-m)),(b+c-(1+m)*a)/((2+m)*(1-m))] with hv
    use v; simp [A, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
    rw [hv]; norm_num

    have : (2 + m) * (1 - m) ≠ 0 := by
      rcases hm; simp; push_neg; constructor
      · intro h; rw [add_eq_zero_iff_neg_eq] at h; symm at h; contradiction
      intro h; rw [sub_eq_zero] at h; symm at h; contradiction
    field_simp; rw [show b+a-(1+m)*c+(a+c-(1+m)*b+m*(b+c-(1+m)*a)) = a*((2+m)*(1-m)) by ring]
    rw [show b+a-(1+m)*c+(m*(a+c-(1+m)*b)+(b+c-(1+m)*a)) = b*((2+m)*(1-m)) by ring]
    rw [show m*(b+a-(1+m)*c)+(a+c-(1+m)*b+(b+c-(1+m)*a)) = c*((2+m)*(1-m)) by ring]
    field_simp

  have invA : Invertible A := by
    apply Matrix.invertibleOfIsUnitDet
    simp [A, Matrix.det_fin_three, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
    ring_nf; rw [show -2 + (m * 3 - m ^ 3) = -(m-1)^2*(m+2) by ring]; simp
    constructor; rw [sub_eq_zero]; push_neg; exact hm.left
    rw [add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg]; push_neg; exact hm.right

  suffices : Function.Injective A.mulVec
  · intro y1 y2 h1 h2; rw [← h2] at h1
    apply this at h1; assumption
  apply Matrix.mulVec_injective_of_invertible

theorem other_24672_2 {m a b c: ℝ} (hm : m ≠ 1 ∧ m ≠ -2) : let A := !![1,1,m;1,m,1;m,1,1];
Matrix.mulVec A v = ![a, b, c] → (v 0 + v 2 = 2 * v 1 ↔ a + c = 2 * b) := by

  intro A vsl

  set w := ![(b+a-(1+m)*c)/((2+m)*(1-m)),(a+c-(1+m)*b)/((2+m)*(1-m)),(b+c-(1+m)*a)/((2+m)*(1-m))] with hw

  have : (2 + m) * (1 - m) ≠ 0 := by
    rcases hm; simp; push_neg; constructor
    · intro h; rw [add_eq_zero_iff_neg_eq] at h; symm at h; contradiction
    intro h; rw [sub_eq_zero] at h; symm at h; contradiction

  have wsl : A.mulVec w = ![a, b, c] := by
    simp [A, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]; rw [hw]; norm_num
    field_simp; rw [show b+a-(1+m)*c+(a+c-(1+m)*b+m*(b+c-(1+m)*a)) = a*((2+m)*(1-m)) by ring]
    rw [show b+a-(1+m)*c+(m*(a+c-(1+m)*b)+(b+c-(1+m)*a)) = b*((2+m)*(1-m)) by ring]
    rw [show m*(b+a-(1+m)*c)+(a+c-(1+m)*b+(b+c-(1+m)*a)) = c*((2+m)*(1-m)) by ring]
    field_simp

  suffices : v = w
  · rw [this, hw]; field_simp; ring_nf; constructor
    · intro h; symm at h; apply_fun fun t => t + b * 2 + b * m * 2 + m * a + m * c at h
      ring_nf at h; rw [show m*a+m*c+a*2+c*2 = (m+2)*(a+c) by ring] at h
      rw [show  b*4+b*m*2 = (m+2)*(b*2) by ring, mul_eq_mul_left_iff] at h
      rcases h with h|h; assumption; rw [add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg] at h
      rw [h] at hm; simp at hm
    intro h; rw [show b*m*2 = b*2*m by ring, ← h]; ring

  obtain ⟨v', ⟨_, hv'2⟩⟩ := (@other_24672_1 m a b c).mpr hm
  simp [A, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail] at hv'2 vsl wsl
  have veq := hv'2 v vsl; have weq := hv'2 w wsl
  rw [← weq] at veq; simp [w] at veq; assumption

import Mathlib
open Real Finset BigOperators

set_option maxHeartbeats 500000

theorem imo_a3
    (n : ℕ)
    (a : ℕ → ℝ)
    (h_n : 3 ≤ n)
    (h_apos : ∀ i, a i > 0)
    (h_aprod : ∏ i ∈ Icc 2 n, a i = 1) :
    ∏ i ∈ Icc 2 n, (1 + a i) ^ i > n ^ n := by

have l_0 {a b c d: ℝ} (ha : a ≥ c) (hb : b ≥ d) (hc : c > 0) (hd : d > 0) (h : a * b = c * d) : a = c ∧ b = d := by
    by_contra! h_contra
    by_cases hs : a = c
    . simp_all
    . have : a > c := lt_of_le_of_ne ha fun t => hs t.symm
      have : a * b > c * d := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_of_nonneg' this hb hd (by linarith)
      linarith

  have l_1 (a b : ℝ) (ha : 0 < a) (hb : 0 < b) (hab : log a = log b) : a = b := by
    apply_fun exp at hab
    rw [exp_log ha, exp_log hb] at hab
    exact hab

  have l_geom_mean_arith_mean_weighted_eq_iff (s : Finset ℕ) (w z : ℕ → ℝ) (hw : ∀ i ∈ s, 0 < w i)
      (hw' : ∑ i ∈ s, w i = 1) (hz : ∀ i ∈ s, 0 ≤ z i) :
      ∏ i ∈ s, z i ^ w i = ∑ i ∈ s, w i * z i ↔ ∀ j ∈ s, z j = ∑ i ∈ s, w i * z i := by
    by_cases A : ∃ i ∈ s, z i = 0 ∧ w i ≠ 0
    · rcases A with ⟨i, his, hzi, hwi⟩
      rw [prod_eq_zero his]
      · constructor
        · intro h; rw [← h]; intro j hj
          apply eq_zero_of_ne_zero_of_mul_left_eq_zero (ne_of_lt (hw j hj)).symm
          apply (sum_eq_zero_iff_of_nonneg ?_).mp h.symm j hj
          exact fun i hi => (mul_nonneg_iff_of_pos_left (hw i hi)).mpr (hz i hi)
        · intro h
          convert h i his
          exact hzi.symm
      · rw [hzi]
        exact zero_rpow hwi
    · simp only [not_exists, not_and] at A
      have hz' := fun i h => lt_of_le_of_ne (hz i h) (fun a => (A i h a.symm) (ne_of_gt (hw i h)))
      have := strictConvexOn_exp.map_sum_eq_iff hw hw' fun i _ => Set.mem_univ <| log (z i)
      simp only [exp_sum, (· ∘ ·), smul_eq_mul, mul_comm (w _) (log _)] at this
      convert this using 1
      · apply Eq.congr <;> [apply prod_congr rfl; apply sum_congr rfl]
        <;> intro i hi <;> simp [exp_mul, exp_log (hz' i hi)]
      · constructor <;> intro h j hj
        · rw [← arith_mean_weighted_of_constant s w _ (log (z j)) hw' fun i _ => congrFun rfl]
          apply sum_congr rfl
          intro x hx
          simp only [mul_comm, h j hj, h x hx]
        · rw [← arith_mean_weighted_of_constant s w _ (z j) hw' fun i _ => congrFun rfl]
          apply sum_congr rfl
          intro x hx
          simp only [log_injOn_pos (hz' j hj) (hz' x hx), h j hj, h x hx]

  have r1 : ∀ k ∈ Icc 2 n, (1 + a k) ^ k ≥ k ^ k / (k - 1) ^ (k - 1) * a k := by
    intro k hk
    obtain ⟨hk1, _⟩ := mem_Icc.mp hk
    rify at hk1

    have tt1 : 0 < (k : ℝ) := by linarith
    have tt2 : 0 < (k : ℝ) - 1 := by linarith
    have tt3 : 0 < (k : ℝ) / (k - 1) := div_pos tt1 tt2

    have h_amgm : ((k : ℝ) / (k - 1)) ^ ((k - 1 : ℝ) / k) * ((k * a k)) ^ (1 / (k : ℝ)) ≤ ((k - 1 : ℝ) / k) * ((k : ℝ) / (k - 1)) + (1 / (k : ℝ)) * ((k * a k)) := by
      apply geom_mean_le_arith_mean2_weighted
      any_goals apply le_of_lt; apply div_pos; all_goals linarith
      . apply le_of_lt; apply mul_pos; all_goals linarith [h_apos k]
      . field_simp
    field_simp at h_amgm

    have : (((k : ℝ) / (k - 1)) ^ ((k - 1 : ℝ) / k) * ((k * a k)) ^ (1 / (k : ℝ))) ^ k ≤ (1 + a k) ^ k := by
      apply pow_le_pow_left ?_ h_amgm k
      apply le_of_lt
      apply mul_pos
      . apply rpow_pos_of_pos
        apply div_pos; all_goals linarith
      . apply rpow_pos_of_pos
        apply mul_pos; all_goals linarith [h_apos k]
    apply ge_iff_le.mpr
    convert this using 1
    apply l_1
    . apply mul_pos ?_ (h_apos k)
      apply div_pos; all_goals apply pow_pos; all_goals linarith
    . apply pow_pos
      . apply mul_pos
        . apply rpow_pos_of_pos
          apply div_pos; all_goals linarith
        . apply rpow_pos_of_pos
          apply mul_pos; all_goals linarith [h_apos k]
    rw [log_pow, log_mul _ (ne_of_gt (h_apos k)), log_div (ne_of_gt (pow_pos tt1 k)) (ne_of_gt (pow_pos tt2 _)), log_pow, log_pow, log_mul (ne_of_gt (rpow_pos_of_pos tt3 _)) (ne_of_gt (rpow_pos_of_pos (mul_pos tt1 (h_apos k)) _)), log_rpow tt3, log_rpow (mul_pos tt1 (h_apos k)), log_div (ne_of_gt tt1) (ne_of_gt tt2), log_mul (ne_of_gt tt1) (ne_of_gt (h_apos k)), Nat.cast_sub (by rify; linarith)]
    field_simp; ring_nf
    . apply ne_of_gt
      apply div_pos
      . exact pow_pos tt1 _
      . apply pow_pos tt2 _

  have l_2 : ∀ d ≤ (n - 2), ∏ k ∈ Icc 2 (d + 2), (1 + a k) ^ k ≥ (d + 2) ^ (d + 2) * ∏ k ∈ Icc 2 (d + 2), a k := by
    intro d
    induction d with
    | zero =>
      specialize r1 2 (left_mem_Icc.mpr (by linarith))
      norm_num at r1
      norm_num
      exact r1
    | succ d ih =>
      intro hd'
      have hd : d ≤ n - 3 := Nat.sub_le_sub_right hd' 1
      rw [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, show d + 1 + 2 = d + 2 + 1 by ring_nf, prod_Icc_succ_top (by linarith)]
      specialize r1 (d + 2 + 1) (by simp; omega)
      rw [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_two] at r1
      specialize ih (by linarith)
      have := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg ih r1 ?_ ?_
      rw [Nat.add_sub_cancel, show (d : ℝ) + 2 + 1 - 1 = d + 2 by linarith, add_right_comm _ (2:ℝ) 1,
          mul_assoc, mul_comm, mul_assoc, mul_right_comm, div_mul_cancel₀, mul_comm] at this
      apply ge_iff_le.mpr
      convert this using 1
      . rw [mul_assoc, mul_comm (a _), ← prod_Icc_succ_top (by linarith)]
      . apply pow_ne_zero
        linarith
      . apply le_of_lt
        apply mul_pos
        . apply pow_pos
          linarith
        . exact prod_pos fun i _ => h_apos i
      . apply pow_nonneg
        linarith [h_apos (d + 2 + 1)]

  have r2 : ∏ k ∈ Icc 2 n, (1 + a k) ^ k ≥ n ^ n := by
    specialize l_2 (n - 2) (Nat.le_refl (n - 2))
    rw [Nat.cast_sub (by linarith), Nat.cast_two, Nat.sub_add_cancel (by linarith), sub_add_cancel, h_aprod, mul_one] at l_2
    exact l_2

  have r3 : ∀ k ∈ Icc 2 n, (1 + a k) ^ k = k ^ k / (k - 1) ^ (k - 1) * a k → a k = (1:ℝ) / (k - 1) := by
    intro k hk h

    obtain ⟨hk1, hk2⟩ := mem_Icc.mp hk

    set w : ℕ → ℝ := fun x => match x with
    | 0 => (k - 1 : ℝ) / k
    | 1 => (1 : ℝ) / k
    | _ => 0

    set z : ℕ → ℝ := fun x => match x with
    | 0 => (k : ℝ) / (k - 1)
    | 1 => k * a k
    | _ => 0

    have t_sum {f : ℕ → ℝ} : ∑ k ∈ Finset.range 2, f k = f 0 + f 1 := by
      simp [show Finset.range 2 = {0, 1} by rfl]

    have t1 : (k : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by norm_cast; linarith
    have t2 : ((k : ℝ) - 1) ≠ 0 := by rify at hk1; linarith

    have hw : ∀ i ∈ range 2, 0 < w i := by
      intro i hi
      rw [mem_range] at hi
      rify at hk1 hk2
      interval_cases i <;> dsimp [w] <;> apply div_pos <;> linarith

    have hw' : ∑ i ∈ range 2, w i = 1 := by
      simp only [t_sum, w, ← add_div, sub_add_cancel, div_self t1]

    have hz : ∀ i ∈ range 2, 0 ≤ z i := by
      intro i hi
      rw [mem_range] at hi
      rify at hk1 hk2
      apply le_of_lt
      interval_cases i
      . dsimp [z]; apply div_pos <;> linarith
      . dsimp [z]; apply mul_pos <;> linarith [h_apos k]

    have heq : ∏ i ∈ range 2, z i ^ w i = ∑ i ∈ range 2, w i * z i := by
      rify at hk1 hk2
      simp [show Finset.range 2 = {0, 1} by rfl, z, w]
      field_simp
      have tt1 : 0 < (k : ℝ) := by linarith
      have tt2 : 0 < (k : ℝ) - 1 := by linarith
      have tt3 : 0 < (k : ℝ) / (k - 1) := div_pos tt1 tt2
      have tt4 : 0 < (k : ℝ) ^ k := pow_pos tt1 k
      have : log (((k : ℝ) / (k - 1)) ^ (((k : ℝ) - 1) / k) * (k * a k) ^ (1 / (k : ℝ))) = log (1 + a k) := by
        apply_fun fun t : ℝ => log t at h
        rw [log_pow, log_mul _ (ne_of_gt (h_apos k)), log_div (ne_of_gt tt4) (ne_of_gt (pow_pos tt2 _)), log_pow, log_pow, Nat.cast_sub, Nat.cast_one, sub_one_mul] at h
        have : Function.Injective fun t : ℝ => t * k := mul_left_injective₀ t1
        apply_fun fun t : ℝ => t * k
        dsimp
        rw [log_mul, log_rpow tt3, log_div t1 t2, log_rpow, log_mul t1 (ne_of_gt (h_apos k)), add_mul, mul_comm, ← mul_assoc, mul_div, mul_div_cancel_left₀ ((k:ℝ) - 1) t1, mul_right_comm, div_mul_cancel₀ 1 t1, one_mul, sub_one_mul, mul_sub]
        rw [mul_comm _ (k : ℝ), h]
        linarith
        . exact mul_pos tt1 (h_apos k)
        . exact ne_of_gt (rpow_pos_of_pos (div_pos tt1 tt2) _)
        . exact ne_of_gt (rpow_pos_of_pos (mul_pos tt1 (h_apos k)) _)
        . exact Nat.one_le_of_lt (mem_Icc.mp hk).left
        . exact ne_of_gt (div_pos tt4 (pow_pos tt2 _))

      apply l_1 _ _ ?_ ?_ this
      . apply mul_pos ?_ ?_
        . exact rpow_pos_of_pos (div_pos tt1 tt2) _
        . exact rpow_pos_of_pos (mul_pos tt1 (h_apos k)) _
      . trans 1
        . exact Real.zero_lt_one
        . exact lt_add_of_pos_right 1 (h_apos k)

    have h_eqiff := (l_geom_mean_arith_mean_weighted_eq_iff (Finset.range 2) w z hw hw' hz).mp heq
    specialize h_eqiff 1 (self_mem_range_succ 1)
    simp only [t_sum, z, w] at h_eqiff
    apply_fun fun t : ℝ => t / k at h_eqiff
    field_simp at h_eqiff
    field_simp
    linarith

  have r4: ∀ d ≤ n - 2, ∏ k ∈ Icc 2 (d + 2), (1 + a k) ^ k = (d + 2) ^ (d + 2) * ∏ k ∈ Icc 2 (d + 2), a k → ∀ k ∈ Icc 2 (d + 2), a k = (1 : ℝ) / (k - 1) := by
    intro d hd
    induction d with
    | zero =>
      specialize r3 2 (left_mem_Icc.mpr (by linarith))
      norm_num at r3
      norm_num
      exact r3
    | succ d ih =>
      specialize ih (by linarith)
      intro heq
      have hge_n := r1 (d + 2 + 1) (by simp; omega)
      have heqcond_n := r3 (d + 2 + 1) (by simp; omega)
      have hge_prod := l_2 d (by linarith)

      have t0 : 0 < ((d : ℝ) + 2) ^ (d + 2) := by
        apply pow_pos (by linarith)
      have t1 : 0 < ((d : ℝ) + 2 + 1) ^ (d + 2 + 1) := by
        apply pow_pos (by linarith)

      have hge := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg hge_prod hge_n ?_ ?_
      apply ge_iff_le.mpr at hge
      have ⟨req_prod, req_n⟩ := l_0 hge_prod hge_n ?_ ?_ ?_

      apply heqcond_n at req_n
      apply ih at req_prod
      intro k hk
      rcases eq_or_ne k (d + 2 + 1) with hkv | hkv
      . simp only [hkv, req_n]
      . have : k ∈ Icc 2 (d + 2) := by
          have : 2 ≤ k ∧ k ≤ (d + 2 + 1) := by
            exact (LocallyFiniteOrder.finset_mem_Icc 2 (d + 2 + 1) k).mp hk
          apply mem_Icc.mpr
          constructor
          . linarith
          . obtain ⟨_, th2⟩ := this
            linarith [Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne th2 hkv]
        exact req_prod k this
      any_goals simp only [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_two, Nat.add_sub_cancel, show (d : ℝ) + 2 + 1 - 1 = (d : ℝ) + 2 by linarith]

      . exact mul_pos t0 (prod_pos (fun i _ => h_apos i))
      . exact mul_pos (div_pos t1 t0) (by apply h_apos)
      . simp only [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one] at heq
        rw [← prod_Icc_succ_top (by linarith),
            mul_assoc, mul_comm, mul_assoc, mul_right_comm, div_mul_cancel₀ _ (ne_of_lt t0).symm,
            mul_comm, mul_assoc, mul_comm (a _), ← prod_Icc_succ_top (by linarith),
            show (d : ℝ) + 2 + 1 = d + 1 + 2 by apply add_right_comm]
        exact heq
      . exact le_of_lt (mul_pos t0 (prod_pos (fun i _ => h_apos i)))
      . apply le_of_lt
        apply pow_pos
        linarith [h_apos (d + 2 + 1)]

  have r5 : ∏ k ∈ Icc 2 n, (1 + a k) ^ k ≠ n ^ n := by
    by_contra! h_contra
    specialize r4 (n - 2) (Nat.le_refl (n - 2))
    rw [Nat.cast_sub (by linarith), Nat.cast_two, Nat.sub_add_cancel (by linarith), sub_add_cancel, h_aprod, mul_one] at r4
    apply r4 at h_contra
    have : ∏ i ∈ Icc 2 n, a i ≠ 1 := by
      calc ∏ i ∈ Icc 2 n, a i
        _ = ∏ i ∈ Ico 2 (n + 1), (1 : ℝ) / (i - 1) := by
          exact prod_congr rfl h_contra
        _ = ∏ i ∈ Icc 3 n, (1 : ℝ) / (i - 1):= by
          rw [prod_eq_prod_Ico_succ_bot (by linarith)]
          norm_num
          rfl
        _ ≠ 1 := by
          apply ne_of_lt
          have : ∏ i ∈ Icc 3 n, (1 : ℝ) / (i - 1) < ∏ _ ∈ Icc 3 n, (1 : ℝ) := by
            apply prod_lt_prod ?_ ?_ ?_
            . intro i hi
              rw [mem_Icc] at hi
              rify at hi
              apply div_pos <;> linarith
            . intro i hi
              rw [mem_Icc] at hi
              rify at hi
              rw [← inv_eq_one_div]
              apply inv_le_one_iff.mpr
              right
              linarith
            . use 3
              constructor
              . simp only [mem_Icc, le_refl, true_and, h_n]
              . norm_num
          convert this
          exact prod_const_one.symm
    contradiction

  exact lt_of_le_of_ne r2 r5.symm

import Mathlib

theorem algebra_127660 :
  IsLeast {x| ∃ (a b c d :ℝ), 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∧ 0 < c ∧ 0 < d ∧ a+2*b = 1 ∧ c + 2*d = 1 ∧ x = 1/a + 1/(b*c*d)} 25 := by

constructor

  . use 1/5, 2/5, 1/2, 1/4
    norm_num

  . rintro x ⟨a, b, c, d, ha, hb, hc, hd, hab, hcd, hx⟩

    have aux {p q : ℝ} (hp : 0 < p) (hq: 0 < q) : 4*p*q ≤ (p + q)^2 := by
      ring_nf
      have : 0 ≤ p^2 - p*q*2 + q^2 := by calc
        0 ≤ (p-q)^2 := by positivity
        _ = _ := by ring
      linarith

    have : c*d ≤ 1/8 := by
      have := aux hc (by linarith : 0 < 2 * d)
      rw [hcd] at this
      linarith
    have : 1 / (c * d) ≥ 8 := by
      have := (inv_le_inv₀ (by norm_num: (1:ℝ)/8 > 0) (by positivity: c*d > 0)).mpr this
      simp; simp at this
      assumption

    have h₁ : 1/a + 8/b ≤ 1/a + 1/(b*c*d) := by calc
      1/a + 8/b ≤ 1/a + (1/(c*d))/b := by gcongr
      _ = 1/a + 1/(b*c*d) := by field_simp; ring

    have h₂ : 25 ≤ 1/a + 8/b := by
      have : 0 ≤ (b - 2*a) ^2 := by positivity
      ring_nf at this
      have : 25 * a * b ≤ 8*a^2 + 17*a*b + 2*b^2 := by linarith
      calc
        25 = 25 * a * b / (a*b) := by field_simp; ring
        _ ≤ (8*a^2 + 17*a*b + 2*b^2)/(a*b)  := by gcongr
        _ = (8*a + b) * (a + 2*b) / (a*b) := by congr; ring_nf
        _ = 1/a + 8/b := by rw [hab]; field_simp; ring
    linarith

import Mathlib
open Real

theorem algebra_95315 {r1 r2 h1 h2 : ℝ} (hr1 : r1 > 0) (hr2 : r2 > 0)
(hvol : π * r1^2 * h1 = π * r2^2 * h2) (hrr : r2 = 1.1 * r1) :
h1 = 121 / 100 * h2 := by

rw [pow_two,
      pow_two,
      hrr,
      mul_assoc,
      mul_assoc,
      mul_assoc,
      mul_assoc,
      mul_comm 1.1 _,
      mul_assoc,
      mul_assoc,
      ← mul_assoc 1.1 _,
      mul_comm 1.1 _,
      mul_assoc,
      ] at hvol
  simp [Real.pi_pos,Real.pi_ne_zero,hr1,((by linarith):r1≠0)] at hvol
  rw [← mul_assoc] at hvol
  rw [((by ring):121 / 100 = (1.1:ℝ) * 1.1)]
  exact hvol

theorem alg_1208
  (can room : ℕ)
  (three_cans_eq_five_rooms : (3 : ℚ) * can = 5 * room) :
  (15 : ℚ) * can = 25 * room := by

have h : 5 * ((3 : ℚ) * can) = 5 * (5 * room) := by rw [three_cans_eq_five_rooms]

    rw [← mul_assoc, ← mul_assoc] at h
    norm_num at h
    exact h

import Mathlib
open Nat
theorem minimal_x₁ ( x : ℕ → ℕ → ℕ)(hx0:∀a,x a 0=a)(hx1:∀ a,x a 1=a^2)(hx3:∀n a,x a (n+2)=(x a (n+1)*((x a (n+1))+1)))(P₁:ℕ)(hp1:P₁=5)(P₂:ℕ)(hp2:P₂=7):
  (P₁ * P₂) ∣ x 2 4 ∧ ∀ a, 0 < a ∧ a < 2 → ¬ ((P₁ * P₂) ∣ x a 4) := by

have : x 2 4 = (x 2 3) * (x 2 3 + 1) :=by let r:=(hx3 2 2);simp at r;exact r

  have h₀ : x 2 0 = 2 :=by exact (hx0 2)
  have h₁ : x 2 1 = 4 := by exact (hx1 2)
  have h₂ : x 2 2 = 20 := by let r:=hx3 0 2;simp[h₁] at r;exact r
  have h₃ : x 2 3 = 420 := by let r:=hx3 1 2;simp[h₂] at r;exact r
  have h₄ : x 2 4 = 420 * 421 := by let r:=hx3 2 2;simp[h₃] at r;exact r
  have hx35 : (5 * 7) ∣ (420 : ℕ) := by

    show 35 ∣ 420
    norm_num            -- 420 is clearly divisible by 35

  have part1 : (P₁ * P₂) ∣ x 2 4 := by
    rw [hp1, hp2];
    rw [h₄];
    trivial

  have h1 : x 1 0 = 1 := by exact (hx0 1)
  have h1' : x 1 1 = 1 :=by exact (hx1 1)
  have h1'' : x 1 2 = 2 := by let r:=hx3 0 1;simp[h1'] at r;exact r
  have h1₃ : x 1 3 = 6 :=  by let r:=hx3 1 1;simp[h1''] at r;exact r
  have h1₄ : x 1 4 = 42 :=  by let r:=hx3 2 1;simp[h1₃] at r;exact r
  have n35_1 : ¬ 35 ∣ 42 := by

    norm_num

  have part2 : ∀ a, 0 < a ∧ a < 2 → ¬ ((P₁ * P₂) ∣ x a 4) := by
    intro a ⟨hpos, hlt⟩

    interval_cases a
    rw[h1₄,hp1,hp2]
    trivial

  exact ⟨part1, part2⟩

theorem algebra_277342 (a b c:ℝ):
(∀x:ℝ, ∀y:ℝ, ∀z:ℝ, |a*x+b*y+c*z| + |b*x+c*y+a*z| + |c*x+a*y+b*z| = |x|+|y|+|z|)
↔
((a=1∧b=0∧c=0)∨(a=-1∧b=0∧c=0)∨(a=0∧b=1∧c=0)∨(a=0∧b=-1∧c=0)∨(a=0∧b=0∧c=1)∨(a=0∧b=0∧c=-1)) := by

constructor

    ring_nf at h

    simp at h
    ring_nf at h ⊢
    exact h

  have t1: 2 = |a+ (-b)| + |b + (-c)| + |c + (-a)| := by ring_nf at mabs ⊢; exact mabs.symm
  have amb: |a - b| ≤ |a|+|b| := by exact abs_sub a b
  have : a - b = a + (-b) := by linarith
  rw [this] at amb
  have : |b| = |-b| := by simp
  rw [this] at amb
  have bmc: |b - c| ≤ |b|+|c| := by exact abs_sub b c
  have : b - c = b + (-c) := by linarith
  rw [this] at bmc
  have : |c| = |-c| := by simp
  rw [this] at bmc
  have cma: |c - a| ≤ |c|+|a| := by exact abs_sub c a

  rw [this] at cma
  have : |a| = |-a| := by simp
  rw [this] at cma
  have : (|a|+|-b|) + (|b|+|-c|) + (|c|+|-a|) = 2 := by simp; linarith

  have sab: |a + (-b)| = |a| + |-b| := by linarith
  rw [abs_add_eq_add_abs_iff] at sab
  have sbc: |b + (-c)| = |b| + |-c| := by linarith
  rw [abs_add_eq_add_abs_iff] at sbc
  have sca: |c + (-a)| = |c| + |-a| := by linarith
  rw [abs_add_eq_add_abs_iff] at sca

  have ae: a = 0 := by linarith
  have be: b = 0 := by linarith

  rw [abs_add_eq_add_abs_iff] at this
  rcases this with h | h

  have : a = 1 ∨ a=-1 := by exact eq_or_eq_neg_of_abs_eq abcabs
  tauto
  have : a = 0:= by linarith

  have ce : c = 0 := by linarith

  have : a = 0 := by linarith

  have : |a+b| = |a|+|b| := by linarith

theorem number_theory_638495 (a b c d: ℕ) (l1: a < b) (l2: b < c) (l3: c < d) (l4: d ≤ 10) (h: a * b * c * d = 5040):
  a + b + c + d = 34 := by

have ld: 9 < d := by
      by_contra! l
      have s1: a ≤ 6 := by
        omega
      have s2: b ≤ 7 := by
        omega
      have s3: c ≤ 8 := by
        omega
      have s4: a * b ≤ 42 := by
        nlinarith
      have s5: a * b * c ≤ 336 := by
        nlinarith
      have s6: a * b * c * d ≤ 336 * 9 := by
        nlinarith
      simp [h] at s6

    have vd: d = 10 := by omega
    simp [vd] at *
    replace h: a * b * c = 504 := by omega

    have lc: 8 < c := by
      by_contra! l
      have s1: a ≤ 6 := by
        omega
      have s2: b ≤ 7 := by
        omega
      have s3: c ≤ 8 := by
        omega
      have s4: a * b ≤ 42 := by
        nlinarith
      have s5: a * b * c ≤ 336 := by
        nlinarith
      simp [h] at s5

    have vc: c = 9 := by omega
    simp [vc] at *
    replace h: a * b = 56 := by omega

    have lb: 7 < b := by
      by_contra! l
      have s1: a ≤ 6 := by
        omega
      have s3: a * b ≤ 42 := by
        nlinarith
      simp [h] at s3

    have vb: b = 8 := by omega
    simp [vb] at *
    omega

theorem number_theory_605929 :
    {n : ℕ | 0 < n ∧ ∃ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p ∧ ∃ a : ℕ, 0 < a ∧ p ^ n - (p - 1) ^ n = 3 ^ a} = {2} := by

ext n
  simp
  apply Iff.intro
  . -- First show that the condition implies that n = 2.
    rintro ⟨h₀, p, h₁, a, h₂, h₃⟩

    have h₄ (m : ℕ) (hm : 3 ∣ 2 ^ m - 1) : 2 ∣ m := by
      rw [<-Nat.modEq_iff_dvd' (by apply Nat.one_le_pow _ _ (by norm_num))] at hm
      symm at hm
      rw [<-ZMod.eq_iff_modEq_nat] at hm
      zify at hm
      rw [pow_eq_one_iff_modEq] at hm
      suffices orderOf (2 : ZMod 3) = 2 by
        simp [this] at hm
        symm at hm
        rw [Nat.modEq_iff_dvd' (by simp)] at hm
        simp_all

      apply orderOf_eq_of_pow_and_pow_div_prime (by norm_num) (by norm_cast)

      intro p hp hp'
      rw [Nat.prime_dvd_prime_iff_eq hp (Nat.prime_two)] at hp'
      simp [hp']
      norm_cast
    by_cases h₅ : p = 2
    . -- Consider the case p = 2. We have 2 ^ n - 1 = 3 ^ a.
      simp [h₅] at h₃

      have hn : 2 ∣ n := by
        apply h₄
        rw [h₃]
        apply dvd_pow_self _ h₂.ne'

      rw [dvd_iff_exists_eq_mul_left] at hn
      obtain ⟨s, rfl⟩ := hn

      rw [pow_mul, show 1 = 1 ^ 2 by norm_num, Nat.sq_sub_sq] at h₃

      have h₆ : ¬(3 ∣ 2 ^ s + 1 ∧ 3 ∣ 2 ^ s - 1) := by
        by_contra!
        obtain ⟨h₆, h₇⟩ := this

        have : 2 ^ s ≥ 1 := by
          apply Nat.one_le_pow _ _ (by simp)
        rw [show 2 ^ s + 1 = 2 ^ s - 1 + 2 by omega] at h₆
        rw [<-Nat.dvd_add_iff_right h₇] at h₆
        norm_num at h₆
      rw [Classical.not_and_iff_or_not_not] at h₆

      cases h₆ with
      | inl h₆ =>

        have h₇ := @Prime.pow_dvd_of_dvd_mul_left _ _ _ (2 ^ s + 1) (2 ^ s - 1) (Nat.prime_iff.mp Nat.prime_three) a h₆ (by rw [h₃])

        have : 2 ^ s - 1 > 0 := by
          by_contra!
          simp_all
          linarith [show 0 < 3 ^ a by positivity]
        have : 2 ^ s + 1 ≤ 2 ^ s - 1 := by
          apply Nat.le_of_dvd this
          calc
            _ ∣ 3 ^ a := by
              rw [<-h₃]
              apply Nat.dvd_mul_right
            _ ∣ 2 ^ s - 1 := h₇

        omega
      | inr h₆ =>

        have h₇ := @Prime.pow_dvd_of_dvd_mul_right _ _ _ (2 ^ s + 1) (2 ^ s - 1) (Nat.prime_iff.mp Nat.prime_three) a h₆ (by rw [h₃])

        replace h₇ : 3 ^ a = 2 ^ s + 1 := by
          apply Nat.dvd_antisymm h₇
          rw [<-h₃]
          apply Nat.dvd_mul_right
        simp [<-h₇] at h₃

        replace h₃ : 2 ^ s = 2 ^ 1 := by
          omega
        apply Nat.pow_right_injective (by norm_num) at h₃
        simp [h₃]
    . by_cases h₆ : p = 3
      . -- Consider the case p = 3, where 3 ^ n - 2 ^ n = 3 ^ a.
        simp [h₆] at h₃

        replace h₃ : 3 ∣ 3 ^ n - 2 ^ n := by
          rw [h₃]
          apply dvd_pow_self _ h₂.ne'

        replace h₃ : 3 ∣ 2 ^ n := by
          rw [Nat.dvd_add_iff_right h₃, Nat.sub_add_cancel]
          apply dvd_pow_self _ h₀.ne'
          rw [Nat.pow_le_pow_iff_left h₀.ne']
          norm_num

        apply Nat.Prime.dvd_of_dvd_pow Nat.prime_three at h₃
        norm_num at h₃
      . -- Suppose now that p ≥ 5.

        have h₇ : p % 3 = 2 := by
          by_contra!

          replace this : 3 ∣ p ∨ 3 ∣ p - 1 := by
            omega
          cases this with
          | inl this =>

            rw [Nat.prime_dvd_prime_iff_eq Nat.prime_three h₁] at this
            tauto
          | inr this =>

            replace h₃ : 3 ∣ p ^ n - (p - 1) ^ n := by
              rw [h₃]
              apply dvd_pow_self _ h₂.ne'
            replace this : 3 ∣ (p - 1) ^ n := by
              calc
                3 ∣ p - 1 := this
                _ ∣ (p - 1) ^ n := by
                  apply dvd_pow_self _ (by omega)
            have : 3 ∣ p ^ n := by
              rw [Nat.dvd_add_iff_left this, Nat.sub_add_cancel] at h₃
              tauto
              rw [Nat.pow_le_pow_iff_left h₀.ne']
              omega
            apply Nat.Prime.dvd_of_dvd_pow Nat.prime_three at this
            rw [Nat.prime_dvd_prime_iff_eq Nat.prime_three h₁] at this
            tauto

        have h₈ : 2 ∣ n := by

          apply Nat.eq_add_of_sub_eq (by rw [Nat.pow_le_pow_iff_left h₀.ne']; omega) at h₃
          replace h₃ := congr_arg (· % 3) h₃
          have h₇' : (p - 1) % 3 = 1 := by
            omega
          simp [Nat.add_mod, Nat.pow_mod, h₇, h₇'] at h₃
          norm_num [Nat.zero_pow h₂] at h₃

          apply h₄
          omega

        rw [dvd_iff_exists_eq_mul_right] at h₈
        obtain ⟨k, h₈⟩ := h₈

        rw [h₈, mul_comm 2, pow_mul, pow_mul, Nat.sq_sub_sq] at h₃

        have h₉ : ¬(3 ∣ p ^ k + (p - 1) ^ k ∧ 3 ∣ p ^ k - (p - 1) ^ k) := by
          by_contra!
          obtain ⟨h₉, h₁₀⟩ := this

          have : (p - 1) ^ k ≤ p ^ k := by
            rw [Nat.pow_le_pow_iff_left (by omega)]
            omega
          rw [show p ^ k + (p - 1) ^ k = p ^ k - (p - 1) ^ k + 2 * (p - 1) ^ k by omega] at h₉
          rw [<-Nat.dvd_add_iff_right h₁₀, Nat.Prime.dvd_mul (Nat.prime_three)] at h₉
          norm_num at h₉
          apply Nat.Prime.dvd_of_dvd_pow Nat.prime_three at h₉
          omega

        rw [Classical.not_and_iff_or_not_not] at h₉
        cases h₉ with
        | inl h₉ =>

          have h₁₁ := @Prime.pow_dvd_of_dvd_mul_left _ _ _ (p ^ k + (p - 1) ^ k) (p ^ k - (p - 1) ^ k) (Nat.prime_iff.mp Nat.prime_three) a h₉ (by rw [h₃])

          have : p ^ k + (p - 1) ^ k ≤ p ^ k - (p - 1) ^ k := by
            have : p ^ k - (p - 1) ^ k > 0 := by
              by_contra!
              simp_all
              linarith [show 0 < 3 ^ a by positivity]
            apply Nat.le_of_dvd this
            calc
              _ ∣ 3 ^ a := by
                rw [<-h₃]
                apply Nat.dvd_mul_right
              _ ∣ p ^ k - (p - 1) ^ k := h₁₁

          have : 1 ≤ (p - 1) ^ k := by
            apply Nat.one_le_pow _ _ (by omega)
          omega
        | inr h₉ =>

          have h₁₁ := @Prime.pow_dvd_of_dvd_mul_right _ _ _ (p ^ k + (p - 1) ^ k) (p ^ k - (p - 1) ^ k) (Nat.prime_iff.mp Nat.prime_three) a h₉ (by rw [h₃])

          replace h₁₁ : 3 ^ a = p ^ k + (p - 1) ^ k := by
            apply Nat.dvd_antisymm h₁₁
            rw [<-h₃]
            apply Nat.dvd_mul_right
          simp [<-h₁₁] at h₃
          by_cases hk : k = 1
          . -- Suppose k = 1, then n = 2, which is the solution we want.
            omega
          . -- Suppose k ≠ 1, then k ≥ 2.
            replace hk : k ≥ 2 := by
              omega

            suffices p ^ k - (p - 1) ^ k > 1 by
              linarith only [this, h₃]
            calc
              _ ≥ p ^ 2 - (p - 1) ^ 2 := by

                suffices p ^ 2 * (p ^ (k - 2) - 1) ≥ (p - 1) ^ 2 * ((p - 1) ^ (k - 2) - 1) by
                  iterate 2 rw [Nat.mul_sub, <-Nat.pow_add, mul_one, show 2 + (k - 2) = k by omega] at this
                  zify at this ⊢
                  iterate 2 rw [Int.natCast_sub] at this ⊢
                  linarith
                  all_goals
                    first | rw [Nat.pow_le_pow_iff_left (by omega)] | rw [Nat.pow_le_pow_iff_right (by omega)]
                    omega
                apply Nat.mul_le_mul
                . rw [Nat.pow_le_pow_iff_left (by omega)]
                  omega
                . rw [Nat.sub_le_sub_iff_right (by apply Nat.one_le_pow _ _ (by omega))]
                  apply Nat.pow_le_pow_left
                  omega
              _ = 2 * p - 1 := by
                rw [Nat.sq_sub_sq, Nat.sub_sub_self]
                omega
                exact Nat.Prime.one_le h₁
              _ > 1 := by
                omega
  . -- Now we verify again that n = 2 is possible. Either take p = 2 or 5.
    rintro hn
    simp [hn]
    use 2, Nat.prime_two, 1
    norm_num

theorem algebra_21458 (n : ℕ) (h₀ : Even n) (h₁ : ∑ i ∈ Finset.range 3, (n + 2 * i)^2 = 12296) :

lemma rpow_quarter_sq_eq_sqrt_two : (2 ^ ((1 : ℝ) / 4) : ℝ) ^ 2 = √2 := by
  rw [← Real.rpow_natCast]
  rw [← Real.rpow_mul (by norm_num)]
  rw [Real.sqrt_eq_rpow]
  norm_num
lemma solve_equation {x : ℂ} (hx : x ^ 2 + 2 * x = I) :
    x = - 1 + exp (π / 8 * I) * (2 ^ ((1 : ℝ)/ 4) : ℝ) ∨
    x = - 1 - exp (π / 8 * I) * (2 ^ ((1 : ℝ)/ 4) : ℝ) := by
  replace hx : (x + 1) ^ 2 = (exp (π / 8 * I) * (2 ^ ((1 : ℝ)/ 4) : ℝ)) ^ 2 :=
    sorry
  rw [sq_eq_sq_iff_eq_or_eq_neg] at hx
  rw [← sub_eq_iff_eq_add']
  nth_rw 2 [sub_eq_neg_add]
  rw [← sub_eq_iff_eq_add]
  simpa only [sub_neg_eq_add, one_div] using hx
lemma eq_prod_of_mem_pair_of_ne {x y a b : ℂ}
    (hx : x = a ∨ x = b) (hy : y = a ∨ y = b) (hxy : x ≠ y) :
    (x = a ∧ y = b) ∨ (x = b ∧ y = a) := by
    simp_all only [ne_eq]
    cases hx with
    | inl h =>
      cases hy with
      | inl h_1 =>
        subst h_1 h
        simp_all only [not_true_eq_false]
      | inr h_2 =>
        subst h_2 h
        simp_all only [and_self, false_and, or_false]
    | inr h_1 =>
      cases hy with
      | inl h =>
        subst h h_1
        simp_all only [false_and, and_self, or_true]
      | inr h_2 =>
        subst h_1 h_2
        simp_all only [not_true_eq_false]
theorem real_part_product (x y : ℂ)
    (h : x = - 1 + exp (π / 8 * I) * (2 ^ ((1 : ℝ)/ 4) : ℝ)
    ∧ y = -1 -exp (π / 8 * I) * (2 ^ ((1 : ℝ)/ 4) : ℝ)) :
    x.re * y.re = (1 - √2) / 2 := by
  rcases h with ⟨hx, hy⟩
  replace hx : x.re = -1 + (2 ^ ((1 : ℝ)/ 4) : ℝ) * Real.cos (π / 8) := by sorry
  replace hy : y.re = -1 - (2 ^ ((1 : ℝ)/ 4) : ℝ) * Real.cos (π / 8) := by sorry
  rw [hx, hy]
  calc
    _ = 1 - (Real.cos (π / 8)) ^ 2 * √2 := by ring_nf ; rw [rpow_quarter_sq_eq_sqrt_two, mul_comm]
    _ = 1 - (1 / 2 + ((Real.cos (π / 4)) / 2)) * √2 := by rw [Real.cos_sq] ; ring_nf
    _ = _ := by
      rw [Real.cos_pi_div_four]
      field_simp
      ring_nf
      rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)]
      ring

    (hy : y ^ 2 + 2 * y = I) : (x.re * y.re) = (1 - √2) / 2 := by

lemma solve_equation {x : ℂ} (hx : x ^ 2 + 2 * x = I) :

    x = - 1 - exp (π / 8 * I) * (2 ^ ((1 : ℝ)/ 4) : ℝ) := by

  replace hx : (x + 1) ^ 2 = (exp (π / 8 * I) * (2 ^ ((1 : ℝ)/ 4) : ℝ)) ^ 2 :=
    calc
      _ = x ^ 2 + 2 * x + 1 := by ring -- Complete the square by adding 1 to each side.
      _ = I + 1 := by rw [hx]
      _ = _ := by
        rw [mul_pow]
        rw [← Complex.exp_nat_mul]
        ring_nf
        norm_cast
        rw [rpow_quarter_sq_eq_sqrt_two]
        rw [show (I * π * (1 / 4)) = ((π / 4) : ℝ) * I by simp ; ring ]
        rw [Complex.exp_mul_I, ← Complex.ofReal_cos, ← Complex.ofReal_sin]
        simp only [Real.cos_pi_div_four, ofReal_div, ofReal_ofNat, Real.sin_pi_div_four]
        ring_nf
        rw [show (√2 : ℂ) ^ 2 = 2 by norm_cast ; rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)]]
        ring

  rw [sq_eq_sq_iff_eq_or_eq_neg] at hx
  rw [← sub_eq_iff_eq_add']
  nth_rw 2 [sub_eq_neg_add]
  rw [← sub_eq_iff_eq_add]
  simpa only [sub_neg_eq_add, one_div] using hx

lemma eq_prod_of_mem_pair_of_ne {x y a b : ℂ}
    (hx : x = a ∨ x = b) (hy : y = a ∨ y = b) (hxy : x ≠ y) :
    (x = a ∧ y = b) ∨ (x = b ∧ y = a) := by
    simp_all only [ne_eq]
    cases hx with
    | inl h =>
      cases hy with
      | inl h_1 =>
        subst h_1 h
        simp_all only [not_true_eq_false]
      | inr h_2 =>
        subst h_2 h
        simp_all only [and_self, false_and, or_false]
    | inr h_1 =>
      cases hy with
      | inl h =>
        subst h h_1
        simp_all only [false_and, and_self, or_true]
      | inr h_2 =>
        subst h_1 h_2
        simp_all only [not_true_eq_false]

theorem real_part_product (x y : ℂ)
    (h : x = - 1 + exp (π / 8 * I) * (2 ^ ((1 : ℝ)/ 4) : ℝ)
    ∧ y = -1 -exp (π / 8 * I) * (2 ^ ((1 : ℝ)/ 4) : ℝ)) :
    x.re * y.re = (1 - √2) / 2 := by
  rcases h with ⟨hx, hy⟩
  replace hx : x.re = -1 + (2 ^ ((1 : ℝ)/ 4) : ℝ) * Real.cos (π / 8) := by
    simp only [hx, one_div, add_re, neg_re, one_re, mul_re, ofReal_re, ofReal_im, mul_zero,
      sub_zero, add_right_inj]
    norm_cast
    rw [Complex.exp_ofReal_mul_I_re, mul_comm]
  replace hy : y.re = -1 - (2 ^ ((1 : ℝ)/ 4) : ℝ) * Real.cos (π / 8) := by
    simp only [hy, one_div, sub_re, neg_re, one_re, mul_re, ofReal_re, ofReal_im, mul_zero,
      sub_zero, sub_right_inj]
    norm_cast
    rw [Complex.exp_ofReal_mul_I_re, mul_comm]
  rw [hx, hy]

  calc
    _ = 1 - (Real.cos (π / 8)) ^ 2 * √2 := by ring_nf ; rw [rpow_quarter_sq_eq_sqrt_two, mul_comm]

    _ = 1 - (1 / 2 + ((Real.cos (π / 4)) / 2)) * √2 := by rw [Real.cos_sq] ; ring_nf

    _ = _ := by

      rw [Real.cos_pi_div_four]
      field_simp
      ring_nf
      rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)]
      ring

end algebra_608189

open algebra_608189

theorem algebra_608189 {x y : ℂ} (hxy : x ≠ y) (hx : x ^ 2 + 2 * x = I)
    (hy : y ^ 2 + 2 * y = I) : (x.re * y.re) = (1 - √2) / 2 := by
  replace hx := solve_equation hx
  replace hy := solve_equation hy
  have := eq_prod_of_mem_pair_of_ne hx hy hxy

  rcases this with h | h
  · exact real_part_product x y h
  · rw [mul_comm]
    exact real_part_product y x h.symm

theorem algebra_311022 (a b c : ℝ) (x : ℕ → ℝ) (x1 : x 1 = a) (x2 : x 2 = b)
    (xsucc : ∀ n ≥ 1, x (n + 2) = (x n + x (n + 1)) / 2 + c) :
  (∀ n, x (n + 3) = 1 / 3 * (c / 3 + a / 2 - b / 2) * ((-(1 / 2)) ^ n - 1)
  + 2 / 3 * c * n + (a + b) / 2 + c) ∧ ((∃ l, Tendsto x atTop (nhds l)) ↔ c = 0) ∧
  ∀ l, Tendsto x atTop (nhds l) → l = (a + 2 * b) / 3 := by

have key : ∀ n, x (n + 3) = 1 / 3 * (c / 3 + a / 2 - b / 2) * ((-(1 / 2)) ^ n - 1)
  + 2 / 3 * c * n + (a + b) / 2 + c := by
    intro n; induction n using Nat.twoStepInduction with
    | zero => simp [xsucc, x1, x2]
    | one => simp [xsucc, x1, x2]; ring
    | more n ihn1 ihn2 =>
      rw [xsucc, ihn1, ihn2, pow_succ, pow_add]; push_cast
      ring; simp
  have cneglim : c < 0 → Tendsto x atTop atBot := by
    intro cneg; rw [tendsto_atTop_atBot]; intro M
    let B := 2 / 3 * |c / 3 + a / 2 - b / 2|
    have leB : ∀ n, 1 / 3 * (c / 3 + a / 2 - b / 2) * ((-(1 / 2)) ^ n - 1)
    ≤ B := by intro n; calc
        _ ≤ _ := le_abs_self (1 / 3 * (c / 3 + a / 2 - b / 2) * ((-(1 / 2)) ^ n - 1))
        _ ≤ 1 / 3 * |c / 3 + a / 2 - b / 2| * (1 + 1) := by
          rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_eq_self.mpr]; gcongr
          rw [sub_eq_add_neg]; calc
            _ ≤ _ := abs_add ((-(1 / 2)) ^ n) (-1 : ℝ)
            _ ≤ _ := by
              apply add_le_add
              · by_cases h : n = 0
                · simp [h]
                rw [abs_pow, abs_neg, pow_le_one_iff_of_nonneg]
                rw [abs_eq_self.mpr]; any_goals norm_num
                exact h
              rw [abs_neg, abs_one]
          norm_num
        _ = _ := by ring
    use ⌊3 / (2 * c) * (M - (a + b) / 2 - c - B)⌋₊ + 4
    intro n nge; rw [show n = n-3+3 by omega, key, Nat.cast_sub]; push_cast
    have : 2 / 3 * c * (n - 3) ≤ M - B - (a + b) / 2 - c := by
      rify at nge; rw [show (4:ℝ) = 1+3 by ring, ← add_assoc] at nge
      rw [← le_sub_iff_add_le] at nge
      apply lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_floor_add_one _) at nge
      rw [← div_lt_iff_of_neg'] at nge; linarith only [nge]
      apply div_neg_of_pos_of_neg; norm_num
      linarith only [cneg]
    linarith only [leB (n - 3), this]; omega
  have cposlim : 0 < c → Tendsto x atTop atTop := by
    intro cpos; rw [tendsto_atTop_atTop]; intro M
    let B := -(2 / 3 * |c / 3 + a / 2 - b / 2|)
    have geB : ∀ n, B ≤ 1 / 3 * (c / 3 + a / 2 - b / 2) * ((-(1 / 2)) ^ n - 1)
    := by
      intro n; dsimp [B]; rw [neg_le]; calc
        _ = (1 - (-(1 / 2)) ^ n) / 3 * (c / 3 + a / 2 - b / 2) := by ring
        _ ≤ _ := by
          rw [mul_comm]; nth_rw 2 [mul_comm]
          apply mul_le_mul; apply le_abs_self
          · rw [div_le_div_iff_of_pos_right]; calc
              _ ≤ _ := le_abs_self ((1 : ℝ) - (-(1 / 2)) ^ n)
              _ ≤ |1| + |_| := by rw [sub_eq_add_neg]; apply abs_add
            simp [← le_sub_iff_add_le']; norm_num
            by_cases h : n = 0
            · simp [h]
            rw [abs_eq_self.mpr, pow_le_one_iff_of_nonneg]
            any_goals norm_num
            exact h
          apply div_nonneg
          · rw [sub_nonneg]; calc
              _ ≤ _ := le_abs_self ((-((1 : ℝ)/ 2)) ^ n)
              _ ≤ _ := by
                simp; by_cases h : n = 0
                · simp [h]
                rw [abs_eq_self.mpr, pow_le_one_iff_of_nonneg]
                any_goals norm_num
                exact h
          norm_num; positivity
    use ⌊3 / (2 * c) * (M - (a + b) / 2 - c - B)⌋₊ + 4
    intro n nge; rw [show n = n-3+3 by omega, key, Nat.cast_sub]; push_cast
    have : M - B - (a + b) / 2 - c ≤ 2 / 3 * c * (↑n - 3) := by
      rify at nge; rw [show (4:ℝ) = 1+3 by ring, ← add_assoc] at nge
      rw [← le_sub_iff_add_le] at nge
      apply lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_floor_add_one _) at nge
      rw [← lt_div_iff₀'] at nge; linarith only [nge]
      apply div_pos; norm_num
      linarith only [cpos]
    linarith only [geB (n - 3), this]; omega
  have c0lim : c = 0 → Tendsto x atTop (nhds ((a + 2 * b) / 3)) := by
    intro ceq; rw [Metric.tendsto_atTop]; intro ε εpos
    simp [Real.dist_eq]; by_cases h : a = b
    · use 3; intro n nge; rw [show n = n-3+3 by omega]
      rw [key, h, ceq]; ring_nf; simp; exact εpos
    use ⌊-Real.logb 2 ((6 * ε) / |a - b|)⌋₊ + 4
    intro n nge; rw [show n = n-3+3 by omega, key, ceq]
    ring_nf; calc
      _ = |(a - b) / 6 * (-1 / 2) ^ (n - 3)| := by ring_nf
      _ < _ := by
        rw [neg_div, abs_mul, abs_div]; simp
        rw [← lt_div_iff₀', abs_eq_self.mpr, div_div_eq_mul_div, mul_comm]
        rw [Real.pow_lt_iff_lt_log, ← div_lt_iff_of_neg, Nat.cast_sub]
        push_cast; rw [Real.log_inv, div_neg_eq_neg_div]
        rify at nge; rw [Real.logb, show (4:ℝ) = 1+3 by norm_num] at nge
        rw [← add_assoc, ← le_sub_iff_add_le] at nge
        apply lt_of_lt_of_le _ nge; apply Nat.lt_floor_add_one
        omega; simp [Real.log_inv]; any_goals positivity
        apply div_pos; positivity; rw [abs_sub_pos]; exact h
        apply div_pos; rw [abs_sub_pos]; exact h; norm_num
  split_ands; exact key
  · constructor
    · rintro ⟨l, hl⟩; by_contra!; rw [ne_iff_lt_or_gt] at this
      rcases this with cneg|cpos
      · suffices : Tendsto x atTop atBot
        · replace hl := hl.not_tendsto (disjoint_nhds_atBot l)
          contradiction
        exact cneglim cneg
      suffices : Tendsto x atTop atTop
      · replace hl := hl.not_tendsto (disjoint_nhds_atTop l)
        contradiction
      exact cposlim cpos
    intro ceq; use (a + 2 * b) / 3; exact c0lim ceq
  intro l hl; by_cases ceq : c = 0
  · apply tendsto_nhds_unique hl
    exact c0lim ceq
  rw [← ne_eq, ne_iff_lt_or_gt] at ceq; rcases ceq with cneg|cpos
  · suffices : Tendsto x atTop atBot
    · replace hl := hl.not_tendsto (disjoint_nhds_atBot l)
      contradiction
    exact cneglim cneg
  suffices : Tendsto x atTop atTop
  · replace hl := hl.not_tendsto (disjoint_nhds_atTop l)
    contradiction
  exact cposlim cpos

lemma mulclr (a : ℕ → ℂ) (ha : ∀ i < 1996, ({x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a i * a j} : Set ℂ) = {x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a j}) (x : ℕ) (hx : x < 1996) : ∃ i < 1996, ∃ j < 1996, a x = a i * a j := by

    exact h₂

lemma crl (a : ℕ → ℂ) (ha : ∀ i < 1996, {x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a i * a j} = {x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a j}) (h₁ : ∀ k < 1996, a k ≠ 0) (k : ℕ) :
  k < 1996 → Complex.abs (a k) ≤ 1 := by
  intro hk
  have h_main : Complex.abs (a k) ≤ 1 := by
    have h₂ : ∃ (m : ℕ), m < 1996 ∧ ∀ (n : ℕ), n < 1996 → Complex.abs (a n) ≤ Complex.abs (a m) := by
      classical

      have h₃ : ∃ (m : ℕ), m < 1996 ∧ ∀ (n : ℕ), n < 1996 → Complex.abs (a n) ≤ Complex.abs (a m) := by
        have h_main : ∃ m < 1996, ∀ n < 1996, Complex.abs (a n) ≤ Complex.abs (a m) := by
          classical

          have h₂ : (Finset.range 1996 : Finset ℕ).Nonempty := by
            norm_num
            <;>
            use 0
            <;>
            norm_num

          obtain ⟨m, hm, hmax⟩ := Finset.exists_max_image (Finset.range 1996) (fun n => Complex.abs (a n)) h₂

          have hm' : m < 1996 := by
            simp only [Finset.mem_range] at hm
            exact hm
          refine' ⟨m, hm', _⟩
          intro n hn
          have hn' : n ∈ Finset.range 1996 := by
            simp only [Finset.mem_range]
            exact hn
          have h := hmax n hn'
          simpa using h
        exact h_main
      exact h₃
    obtain ⟨m, hm₁, hm₂⟩ := h₂
    have h₃ : a k ∈ {x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a j} := by
      refine' ⟨k, hk, _⟩
      <;> simp [hk]
    have h₄ : a k * a m ∈ {x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a j} := by
      have h₅ : a k * a m ∈ {x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a k * a j} := by
        refine' ⟨m, hm₁, _⟩
        <;> simp
      have h₆ : {x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a k * a j} = {x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a j} := by
        apply ha k hk
      rw [h₆] at h₅
      exact h₅
    obtain ⟨j, hj₁, hj₂⟩ := h₄
    have h₅ : Complex.abs (a k * a m) = Complex.abs (a k) * Complex.abs (a m) := by
      simp [Complex.abs.map_mul]
    have h₆ : Complex.abs (a k * a m) = Complex.abs (a j) := by
      rw [hj₂]
    have h₇ : Complex.abs (a k) * Complex.abs (a m) = Complex.abs (a j) := by
      linarith
    have h₈ : Complex.abs (a j) ≤ Complex.abs (a m) := by
      apply hm₂
      exact hj₁
    have h₉ : Complex.abs (a k) * Complex.abs (a m) ≤ Complex.abs (a m) := by
      linarith
    have h₁₀ : Complex.abs (a m) > 0 := by
      have h₁₁ : a m ≠ 0 := h₁ m hm₁
      have h₁₂ : Complex.abs (a m) ≠ 0 := by
        simp [Complex.abs.ne_zero, h₁₁]
      have h₁₃ : Complex.abs (a m) > 0 := by
        apply Complex.abs.pos
        exact h₁₁
      exact h₁₃
    have h₁₁ : Complex.abs (a k) ≤ 1 := by
      apply le_of_sub_nonneg
      have h₁₂ : 0 ≤ 1 - Complex.abs (a k) := by
        by_contra h
        have h₁₃ : 1 - Complex.abs (a k) < 0 := by linarith
        have h₁₄ : Complex.abs (a k) > 1 := by linarith
        have h₁₅ : Complex.abs (a k) * Complex.abs (a m) > Complex.abs (a m) := by
          nlinarith
        have h₁₆ : Complex.abs (a k) * Complex.abs (a m) ≤ Complex.abs (a m) := h₉
        linarith
      nlinarith
    exact h₁₁
  exact h_main

lemma diap (a : ℕ → ℂ) (ha : ∀ i < 1996, {x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a i * a j} = {x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a j}) (h₁ : ∀ k < 1996, a k ≠ 0) (k : ℕ) :
  k < 1996 → 1 ≤ Complex.abs (a k) := by
  obtain ⟨m, hm, hmax⟩ := Finset.exists_min_image (Finset.range 1996) (fun n => Complex.abs (a n)) (by simp)
  simp at hm hmax
  obtain ⟨cc, vm, xk⟩ := mulcl a ha m m hm hm
  by_contra xx
  push_neg at xx
  have h₂ : Complex.abs (a m) ≤ Complex.abs (a k) := by
    apply hmax
    <;> linarith

  have h₃ : Complex.abs (a m) < 1 := by
    have h₃₁ : Complex.abs (a m) ≤ Complex.abs (a k) := h₂
    have h₃₂ : Complex.abs (a k) < 1 := xx.2
    linarith

  have h₄ : Complex.abs (a m) ≤ Complex.abs (a cc) := by
    apply hmax
    <;> assumption

  have h₅ : Complex.abs (a cc) = Complex.abs (a m) ^ 2 := by
    have h₅₁ : a cc = a m * a m := xk
    calc
      Complex.abs (a cc) = Complex.abs (a m * a m) := by rw [h₅₁]
      _ = Complex.abs (a m) * Complex.abs (a m) := by
        simp [Complex.abs.map_mul]
      _ = Complex.abs (a m) ^ 2 := by
        ring
        <;> simp [Complex.abs.map_mul]
        <;> ring
        <;> simp [Complex.abs.map_mul]
        <;> ring

  have h₆ : Complex.abs (a m) ≤ Complex.abs (a m) ^ 2 := by
    calc
      Complex.abs (a m) ≤ Complex.abs (a cc) := h₄
      _ = Complex.abs (a m) ^ 2 := h₅
      _ = Complex.abs (a m) ^ 2 := by rfl

  have h₇ : Complex.abs (a m) > 0 := by
    have h₇₁ : a m ≠ 0 := h₁ m hm
    exact Complex.abs.pos h₇₁

  have h₈ : 1 ≤ Complex.abs (a m) := by
    have h₈₁ : Complex.abs (a m) > 0 := h₇
    have h₈₂ : Complex.abs (a m) ≤ Complex.abs (a m) ^ 2 := h₆

    have h₈₃ : 1 ≤ Complex.abs (a m) := by
      by_contra h

      have h₈₄ : Complex.abs (a m) < 1 := by
        linarith
      have h₈₅ : Complex.abs (a m) > 0 := h₇
      have h₈₆ : Complex.abs (a m) ≤ Complex.abs (a m) ^ 2 := h₆
      have h₈₇ : Complex.abs (a m) ^ 2 < Complex.abs (a m) := by
        nlinarith
      nlinarith
    exact h₈₃

  have h₉ : False := by
    have h₉₁ : Complex.abs (a m) < 1 := h₃
    have h₉₂ : 1 ≤ Complex.abs (a m) := h₈
    linarith

  exact h₉

lemma nznz (a : ℕ → ℂ) (hd : ∀ (i j : ℕ), i < 1996 → j < 1996 → a i = a j → i = j)
  (ha : ∀ i < 1996, {x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a i * a j} = {x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a j}) (k : ℕ) : k < 1996 → a k ≠ 0 := by
  have h₀ : 1996 > 1 := by
    norm_num
  intro hk
  by_contra h

  have h₂ : a k = 0 := by simpa using h

  have h₃ : ({x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a k * a j} : Set ℂ) = {x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a j} := ha k hk
  have h₄ : (0 : ℂ) ∈ ({x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a k * a j} : Set ℂ) := by
    use k
    <;> simp [h₂, hk, Complex.ext_iff]
    <;> aesop
  have h₅ : (0 : ℂ) ∈ ({x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a j} : Set ℂ) := by
    rw [h₃] at h₄
    exact h₄
  obtain ⟨j, hj, hj'⟩ := h₅
  have h₆ : a j = 0 := by simpa [hj'] using hj'

  have h₇ : ∀ (n : ℕ), n < 1996 → a n = 0 := by
    intro n hn
    have h₈ : (a n : ℂ) ∈ ({x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a j} : Set ℂ) := by
      exact ⟨n, hn, by simp⟩
    have h₉ : (a n : ℂ) ∈ ({x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a k * a j} : Set ℂ) := by
      rw [h₃] at *
      exact h₈
    obtain ⟨j₁, hj₁, hj₁'⟩ := h₉
    have h₁₀ : a n = a k * a j₁ := by simpa [hj₁'] using hj₁'
    rw [h₂] at h₁₀
    have h₁₁ : a n = 0 := by
      simp [h₁₀, Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, pow_three] at *
      <;>
      (try simp_all) <;>
      (try ring_nf at *) <;>
      (try simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, pow_three]) <;>
      (try norm_num at *) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try aesop)
    exact h₁₁
  have h₈ := h₇ 0 (by norm_num)
  have h₉ := h₇ 1 (by norm_num)
  have h₁₀ := hd 0 1 (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
  have h₁₁ : a 0 = a 1 := by simp [h₈, h₉]
  have h₁₂ : (0 : ℕ) = 1 := by
    apply h₁₀
    simpa [h₈, h₉] using h₁₁
  norm_num at h₁₂
  <;> aesop

theorem algebra_218038_1 (a : ℕ → ℂ) (hd : ∀ i j, i < 1996 → j < 1996 → a i = a j → i = j) (ha : ∀ i < 1996, ({x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a i * a j} : Set ℂ) = {x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a j}) i (hi : i < 1996) : Complex.abs (a i) = 1 := by
  have h₁ : ∀ (k : ℕ), k < 1996 → a k ≠ 0 := by
    clear i hi
    apply nznz <;> assumption
  have eit : ∀ (k : ℕ), k < 1996 → 1 ≤ Complex.abs (a k) := by
    apply diap <;> assumption
  have slx : ∀ (k : ℕ), k < 1996 → Complex.abs (a k) ≤ 1 := by
    apply crl <;> assumption

  have := eit _ hi
  have x := slx _ hi
  linarith

lemma vnx (z : ℂ) (hel : z ≠ 0) (dkx : ∃ x y, ¬x = y ∧ z ^ x = z ^ y) : ∃ x ≥ 1, z ^ x = 1 := by
  have h_main : z ≠ 0 → ∃ x ≥ 1, z ^ x = 1 := by
    intro hz
    obtain ⟨x, y, hxy, hxy'⟩ := dkx

    have hxy'' : x ≠ y := hxy

    have h₁ : x < y ∨ y < x := by
      cases' lt_or_gt_of_ne hxy'' with h h
      · exact Or.inl h
      · exact Or.inr h
    cases h₁ with
    | inl h₁ =>

      have h₂ : ∃ k : ℕ, k ≥ 1 ∧ y = x + k := by
        use y - x
        have h₃ : x < y := h₁
        have h₄ : y - x ≥ 1 := Nat.sub_pos_of_lt h₃
        have h₅ : y = x + (y - x) := by
          have h₅₁ : x ≤ y := Nat.le_of_lt h₃
          have h₅₂ : y = x + (y - x) := by
            rw [Nat.add_comm]
            <;> omega
          exact h₅₂
        exact ⟨h₄, h₅⟩
      obtain ⟨k, hk₁, hk₂⟩ := h₂
      have h₃ : z ^ y = z ^ (x + k) := by
        rw [hk₂]
        <;> simp [Complex.ext_iff, pow_add, pow_mul, pow_one, mul_assoc]
        <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_add, pow_mul, pow_one, mul_assoc]
        <;> ring_nf at *
        <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_add, pow_mul, pow_one, mul_assoc]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> linarith
      have h₄ : z ^ (x + k) = z ^ x * z ^ k := by
        rw [pow_add]
      have h₅ : z ^ y = z ^ x := by
        rw [hxy']
      have h₆ : z ^ x * z ^ k = z ^ x := by
        calc
          z ^ x * z ^ k = z ^ (x + k) := by rw [pow_add]
          _ = z ^ y := by rw [h₃]
          _ = z ^ x := by rw [h₅]
      have h₇ : z ^ k = 1 := by
        apply mul_left_cancel₀ (show (z ^ x : ℂ) ≠ 0 by
          apply pow_ne_zero _
          exact hz)
        rw [← sub_eq_zero]
        have h₈ : z ^ x * z ^ k - z ^ x = 0 := by
          rw [h₆]
          ring
        simpa using h₈
      exact ⟨k, hk₁, h₇⟩
    | inr h₁ =>

      have h₂ : ∃ k : ℕ, k ≥ 1 ∧ x = y + k := by
        use x - y
        have h₃ : y < x := h₁
        have h₄ : x - y ≥ 1 := Nat.sub_pos_of_lt h₃
        have h₅ : x = y + (x - y) := by
          have h₅₁ : y ≤ x := Nat.le_of_lt h₃
          have h₅₂ : x = y + (x - y) := by
            rw [Nat.add_comm]
            <;> omega
          exact h₅₂
        exact ⟨h₄, h₅⟩
      obtain ⟨k, hk₁, hk₂⟩ := h₂
      have h₃ : z ^ x = z ^ (y + k) := by
        rw [hk₂]
        <;> simp [Complex.ext_iff, pow_add, pow_mul, pow_one, mul_assoc]
        <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_add, pow_mul, pow_one, mul_assoc]
        <;> ring_nf at *
        <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_add, pow_mul, pow_one, mul_assoc]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> linarith
      have h₄ : z ^ (y + k) = z ^ y * z ^ k := by
        rw [pow_add]
      have h₅ : z ^ x = z ^ y := by
        rw [hxy']
      have h₆ : z ^ y * z ^ k = z ^ y := by
        calc
          z ^ y * z ^ k = z ^ (y + k) := by rw [pow_add]
          _ = z ^ x := by rw [h₃]
          _ = z ^ y := by rw [h₅]
      have h₇ : z ^ k = 1 := by
        apply mul_left_cancel₀ (show (z ^ y : ℂ) ≠ 0 by
          apply pow_ne_zero _
          exact hz)
        rw [← sub_eq_zero]
        have h₈ : z ^ y * z ^ k - z ^ y = 0 := by
          rw [h₆]
          ring
        simpa using h₈
      exact ⟨k, hk₁, h₇⟩

  have h₂ : ∃ x ≥ 1, z ^ x = 1 := by
    apply h_main
    exact hel
  exact h₂

lemma iiiiiiiiii (a : ℕ → ℂ) (hd : ∀ (i j : ℕ), i < 1996 → j < 1996 → a i = a j → i = j)
  (ha : ∀ i < 1996, {x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a i * a j} = {x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a j}) (z : ℂ) (hz : ∃ i < 1996, a i = z)
  (kxv : ∀ (k : ℕ), 1 ≤ k → ∃ i < 1996, a i = z ^ k) (vnx : ∃ x ≥ 1, z ^ x = 1) :
  ∃ j < 1996, a j = ↑z.re - ↑z.im * Complex.I := by
  have h_main : ∃ j < 1996, a j = ↑z.re - ↑z.im * Complex.I := by
    have h₁ : ∃ m : ℕ, 1 ≤ m ∧ z ^ m = 1 := by
      obtain ⟨x, hx, hx'⟩ := vnx
      refine' ⟨x, _⟩
      exact ⟨hx, by simpa using hx'⟩

    have h₂ : ∃ (m : ℕ), 1 ≤ m ∧ z ^ m = 1 ∧ ∀ (k : ℕ), 1 ≤ k → k < m → z ^ k ≠ 1 := by
      classical

      use Nat.find h₁
      have h₂ := Nat.find_spec h₁
      constructor
      · -- Prove 1 ≤ m
        exact h₂.1
      constructor
      · -- Prove z ^ m = 1
        exact h₂.2
      · -- Prove for all k < m, z ^ k ≠ 1
        intro k hk₁ hk₂
        have h₃ : z ^ k ≠ 1 := by
          intro h
          have h₄ : k ≥ 1 := by linarith
          have h₅ : k < Nat.find h₁ := by assumption
          have h₆ : ¬(1 ≤ k ∧ z ^ k = 1) := by
            exact Nat.find_min h₁ h₅
          exact h₆ ⟨h₄, h⟩
        exact h₃

    have h₃ : ∃ j < 1996, a j = ↑z.re - ↑z.im * Complex.I := by
      obtain ⟨m, hm₁, hm₂, hm₃⟩ := h₂
      have vdsav := algebra_218038_1 a hd ha
      have h₄ : z.re - z.im * Complex.I = (z⁻¹ : ℂ) := by

        have h₅ : z ≠ 0 := by
          by_contra h
          have h₆ : z = 0 := by simpa using h
          have h₇ : z ^ m = 1 := hm₂
          rw [h₆] at h₇
          obtain _ | m := m
          · norm_num at hm₁
          · norm_num at h₇

        obtain ⟨jjskx, jakdlsf⟩ := hz
        have nh := vdsav _ jakdlsf.1
        rw [jakdlsf.2] at nh
        field_simp [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.normSq, pow_two, h₅]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.normSq, pow_two]
        <;> norm_num
        simp [Complex.abs, Complex.normSq] at nh
        exact nh

      by_cases hm₄ : m = 1
      · -- Case m = 1
        have h₅ : z = 1 := by
          have h₅₁ : z ^ m = 1 := hm₂
          rw [hm₄] at h₅₁
          simpa using h₅₁
        obtain ⟨i, hi₁, hi₂⟩ := hz
        refine' ⟨i, hi₁, _⟩
        have h₅₂ : a i = z := hi₂
        rw [h₅₂, h₅]
        simp [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.I_mul_I]
        <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.I_mul_I]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> aesop
      · -- Case m ≥ 2
        have h₅ : m ≥ 2 := by
          by_contra h
          have h₅₁ : m < 2 := by linarith
          have h₅₂ : m ≥ 1 := hm₁
          interval_cases m <;> simp_all (config := {decide := true})
          <;> aesop
        have h₅₁ : 1 ≤ m - 1 := by omega
        have h₅₂ : z ^ (m - 1) = z⁻¹ := by
          have h₅₃ : z ^ m = 1 := hm₂
          have h₅₄ : z ≠ 0 := by
            by_contra h
            have h₅₅ : z = 0 := by simpa using h
            rw [h₅₅] at h₅₃
            obtain _ | m := m
            · norm_num at h₅
            · norm_num at h₅₃
          have h₅₅ : z ^ (m - 1) = z⁻¹ := by
            have h₅₆ : z ^ m = 1 := hm₂
            have h₅₇ : z ^ (m - 1) = z⁻¹ := by
              rw [← mul_right_inj' h₅₄]
              have h₅₈ : m - 1 + 1 = m := by omega
              rw [← h₅₈]
              simp [h₅₆, h₅₄]
              obtain _ | _ | m := m
              · norm_num at h₅
              · norm_num at h₅
              simp_all
              ring_nf
              ring_nf at h₅₆
              exact h₅₆
            exact h₅₇
          exact h₅₅
        have h₅₃ : ∃ i < 1996, a i = z ^ (m - 1) := by
          by_cases h₅₄ : m - 1 = 0
          · -- Case m - 1 = 0
            have h₅₅ : m = 1 := by omega
            simp_all
            <;> aesop
          · -- Case m - 1 > 0
            have h₅₅ : 1 ≤ m - 1 := by omega
            have h₅₆ : ∃ i < 1996, a i = z ^ (m - 1) := by
              have h₅₇ : ∃ i < 1996, a i = z ^ (m - 1) := by
                exact kxv (m - 1) (by omega)
              exact h₅₇
            exact h₅₆
        obtain ⟨i, hi₁, hi₂⟩ := h₅₃
        refine' ⟨i, hi₁, _⟩
        rw [hi₂, h₅₂, h₄]
        <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.I_mul_I]
        <;> aesop

    exact h₃

  exact h_main

theorem algebra_218038_2 (a : ℕ → ℂ) (hd : ∀ i j, i < 1996 → j < 1996 → a i = a j → i = j) (ha : ∀ i < 1996, ({x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a i * a j} : Set ℂ) = {x | ∃ j < 1996, x = a j}) z (hz : ∃ i < 1996, a i = z) : ∃ j < 1996, a j = z.re - z.im * Complex.I := by
  have kxv : ∀ (k : ℕ), 1 ≤ k → ∃ i < 1996, a i = z^k := by
    have dk := mulcl a
    intro vk
    induction' vk with k vk
    · simp
    · intro vjk
      by_cases vxx : k = 0
      · subst k
        simp; clear * - hz
        obtain ⟨ii, jj, kk⟩ := hz
        exists ii
      obtain ⟨o, oo⟩ := vk (by clear * - vjk vxx; omega)
      rw [pow_succ, ← oo.2]
      obtain ⟨zt, zz, zzz⟩ := hz
      have hh := dk ha o zt oo.1 zz
      rw [zzz] at hh
      exact hh

  have vnx : ∃ x ≥ 1, z^x = 1 := by
    have dkx := Set.Infinite.exists_ne_map_eq_of_mapsTo (s := (Set.univ : Set ℕ)) (t := { x : ℂ | ∃ k, x = z^k }) (f := fun x => z^x) Set.infinite_univ (by simp) (by {
      have vv : {x | ∃ (k : ℕ), x = z ^ k} = {1} ∪ {x | ∃ k, 1 ≤ k ∧ x = z ^ k} := by
        ext kx
        simp
        constructor
        · intro vv
          obtain ⟨v, vv⟩ := vv
          cases' v with v v
          · simp at vv; simp [vv]
          · right; exists (v + 1)
            simp [vv]
        · tauto

      have ss : {x | ∃ k, 1 ≤ k ∧ x = z ^ k} ⊆ {z | ∃ i < 1996, a i = z} := by
        simp
        intro zx x hx y
        rw [y]
        apply kxv
        exact hx
      have ggg := Set.Finite.image (s := Set.Ico 0 1996) (f := fun x => a x) (by apply Set.finite_Ico)
      simp [Set.Ico, Set.image] at ggg
      have fnn := Set.Finite.subset ggg ss
      simp at vv
      have := Set.Finite.insert 1 fnn
      rw [← vv] at this
      exact this
    })
    simp at dkx
    apply vnx <;> try assumption
    obtain ⟨iii, jjj⟩ := hz
    have := nznz a hd ha iii jjj.1
    rw [jjj.2] at this
    exact this
  apply iiiiiiiiii
  all_goals assumption

import Mathlib
theorem algebra_241777 {f : ℝ → ℝ} (hf : Monotone f)
    (hinv : ∀ x, f (f x) = x) : ∀ x, f x = x := by

intro x
  rcases lt_trichotomy (f x) x with (h | h | h)

  . exfalso
    have : x < x := by
      refine lt_of_le_of_lt ?_ h
      nth_rw 1 [← hinv x]
      exact hf (le_of_lt h)
    exact lt_irrefl _ this

  . exact h

  . exfalso
    have : x < x := by
      refine lt_of_lt_of_le h ?_
      nth_rw 2 [← hinv x]
      exact hf (le_of_lt h)
    exact lt_irrefl _ this

import Mathlib

lemma pow_two_mod_zero_of_even {a : ℤ} (ha : Even a) : a^2 % 4 = 0 := by

  rcases ha with ⟨n, han⟩
  rw [han,(show (n + n)^2 = n^2 * 4 by ring)]
  simp_all

lemma number_theory_4669_aux : ∀ (a b : ℤ), (a^2 + b^2) % 4 ≠ 3 := by

  intro a b
  cases Int.even_or_odd a with
  | inl ha =>
    cases Int.even_or_odd b with
    | inl hb =>

      have h1 : a^2 % 4 = 0 := pow_two_mod_zero_of_even ha
      have h2 : b^2 % 4 = 0 := pow_two_mod_zero_of_even hb

      have : (a^2 + b^2) % 4 = 0 := by
        rw [Int.add_emod,h1,h2]
        rfl

      linarith
    | inr hb =>

      have h1 : a^2 % 4 = 0 := pow_two_mod_zero_of_even ha
      have h2 : b^2 % 4 = 1 := Int.sq_mod_four_eq_one_of_odd hb

      have : (a^2 + b^2) % 4 = 1 := by
        rw [Int.add_emod,h1,h2]
        rfl

      linarith
  | inr ha =>
    cases Int.even_or_odd b with
    | inl hb =>

      have h1 : a^2 % 4 = 1 := Int.sq_mod_four_eq_one_of_odd ha
      have h2 : b^2 % 4 = 0 := pow_two_mod_zero_of_even hb

      have : (a^2 + b^2) % 4 = 1 := by
        rw [Int.add_emod,h1,h2]
        rfl

      linarith
    | inr hb =>

      have h1 : a^2 % 4 = 1 := Int.sq_mod_four_eq_one_of_odd ha
      have h2 : b^2 % 4 = 1 := Int.sq_mod_four_eq_one_of_odd hb

      have : (a^2 + b^2) % 4 = 2 := by
        rw [Int.add_emod,h1,h2]
        rfl

      linarith

theorem number_theory_4669 {n : ℤ} : n ≡ 3 [ZMOD 4] → ¬∃ (a b : ℤ), n = a^2 + b^2 := by

rcases ha with ⟨n, han⟩
  rw [han,(show (n + n)^2 = n^2 * 4 by ring)]
  simp_all

lemma number_theory_4669_aux : ∀ (a b : ℤ), (a^2 + b^2) % 4 ≠ 3 := by

  intro a b
  cases Int.even_or_odd a with
  | inl ha =>
    cases Int.even_or_odd b with
    | inl hb =>

      have h1 : a^2 % 4 = 0 := pow_two_mod_zero_of_even ha
      have h2 : b^2 % 4 = 0 := pow_two_mod_zero_of_even hb

      have : (a^2 + b^2) % 4 = 0 := by
        rw [Int.add_emod,h1,h2]
        rfl

      linarith
    | inr hb =>

      have h1 : a^2 % 4 = 0 := pow_two_mod_zero_of_even ha
      have h2 : b^2 % 4 = 1 := Int.sq_mod_four_eq_one_of_odd hb

      have : (a^2 + b^2) % 4 = 1 := by
        rw [Int.add_emod,h1,h2]
        rfl

      linarith
  | inr ha =>
    cases Int.even_or_odd b with
    | inl hb =>

      have h1 : a^2 % 4 = 1 := Int.sq_mod_four_eq_one_of_odd ha
      have h2 : b^2 % 4 = 0 := pow_two_mod_zero_of_even hb

      have : (a^2 + b^2) % 4 = 1 := by
        rw [Int.add_emod,h1,h2]
        rfl

      linarith
    | inr hb =>

      have h1 : a^2 % 4 = 1 := Int.sq_mod_four_eq_one_of_odd ha
      have h2 : b^2 % 4 = 1 := Int.sq_mod_four_eq_one_of_odd hb

      have : (a^2 + b^2) % 4 = 2 := by
        rw [Int.add_emod,h1,h2]
        rfl

      linarith

theorem number_theory_4669 {n : ℤ} : n ≡ 3 [ZMOD 4] → ¬∃ (a b : ℤ), n = a^2 + b^2 := by

  intro ⟨a, b, hnab⟩
  subst hnab
  exact number_theory_4669_aux a b hn

theorem algebra_325686 : {(p, q) : ℤ × ℤ | p > 0 ∧ q > 0 ∧ ∃ x : ℝ, 0 < x ∧ x < 3 ∧ x ^ 2 - p * x - q = 0}.ncard = 7 := by

have h1 : {(p, q) : ℤ × ℤ | p > 0 ∧ q > 0 ∧ ∃ x : ℝ, 0 < x ∧ x < 3 ∧ x ^ 2 - p * x - q = 0} = {(1, 1), (1, 2), (1, 3), (1, 4), (1, 5), (2, 1), (2, 2)}:= by
    ext ⟨p, q⟩
    constructor

    .
      intro h
      simp at h
      rcases h with ⟨hp, hq, x, hx1, hx2, h⟩

      replace h : (x - p / 2) ^ 2 = (p ^ 2 + 4 * q) / 4:= by linarith

      have g1 : ((p : ℝ) ^ 2 + 4 * q) / 4 > 0:= by
        rify at hp hq
        positivity

      set t:= (p : ℝ) ^ 2 + 4 * q with ht
      clear_value t
      replace g1 : t > 0:= by linarith

      replace h : (x - (p - √t) / 2) * (x - (p + √t) / 2) = 0:= by
        ring_nf
        field_simp
        subst t
        linarith
      simp at h

      have g2 : t > p ^ 2:= by
        subst t
        rify at hq
        linarith
      replace g2 : √t > p:= by
        replace g2 : √t > √(p ^ 2):= by exact (Real.sqrt_lt_sqrt_iff_of_pos g1).mpr g2
        rify at hp
        field_simp at g2
        exact g2
      rcases h with h | h

      .
        linarith

      .
        replace h : x = (p + √t) / 2:= by linarith
        subst x
        clear hx1

        have hx1 : p < 3:= by
          rify
          linarith

        replace hx1 : p = 1 ∨ p = 2:= by omega
        rcases hx1 with hx1 | hx1

        .
          subst p
          simp at hx2 ht

          replace hx2 : √t < 5:= by linarith
          rw [show √t = |√t| by exact Eq.symm (abs_of_nonneg (by positivity))] at hx2
          rw [show (5 : ℝ) = |5| by norm_num] at hx2
          replace hx2 : √t ^ 2 < 5 ^ 2:= by exact sq_lt_sq.mpr hx2
          field_simp at hx2

          replace hx2 : q < 6:= by
            rify
            linarith
          replace hx2 : q = 1 ∨ q = 2 ∨ q = 3 ∨ q = 4 ∨ q = 5:= by omega
          rcases hx2 with hx2 | hx2 | hx2 | hx2 | hx2
          all_goals
            subst q
            simp

        .
          subst p
          simp at hx2 ht

          replace hx2 : √t < 4:= by linarith
          rw [show √t = |√t| by exact Eq.symm (abs_of_nonneg (by positivity))] at hx2
          rw [show (4 : ℝ) = |4| by norm_num] at hx2
          replace hx2 : √t ^ 2 < 4 ^ 2:= by exact sq_lt_sq.mpr hx2
          field_simp at hx2

          replace hx2 : q < 3:= by
            rify
            linarith
          replace hx2 : q = 1 ∨ q = 2:= by omega
          rcases hx2 with hx2 | hx2
          all_goals
            subst q
            simp

    .
      intro h
      simp at h
      rcases h with h | h | h | h | h | h | h
      all_goals
        rcases h with ⟨hp, hq⟩
        subst p q
        simp

      .
        use (1 + √5) / 2
        norm_num
        refine ⟨by positivity, ?_⟩
        suffices √5 < 5 by linarith
        have g1 : (5 : ℝ) ≤ 3 ^ 2:= by norm_num
        replace g1 : √5 ≤ √(3 ^ 2):= by exact Real.sqrt_le_sqrt g1
        field_simp at g1
        linarith

      .
        use 2
        norm_num

      .
        use (1 + √13) / 2
        norm_num
        ring_nf
        norm_num
        refine ⟨by positivity, ?_⟩
        suffices √13 < 5 by linarith
        have g1 : (13 : ℝ) ≤ 4 ^ 2:= by norm_num
        replace g1 : √13 ≤ √(4 ^ 2):= by exact Real.sqrt_le_sqrt g1
        field_simp at g1
        linarith

      .
        use (1 + √17) / 2
        norm_num
        ring_nf
        norm_num
        refine ⟨by positivity, ?_⟩
        suffices √17 < 5 by linarith
        have g1 : (17 : ℝ) ≤ (9 / 2) ^ 2:= by norm_num
        replace g1 : √17 ≤ √((9 / 2) ^ 2):= by exact Real.sqrt_le_sqrt g1
        field_simp at g1
        linarith

      .
        use (1 + √21) / 2
        norm_num
        ring_nf
        norm_num
        refine ⟨by positivity, ?_⟩
        suffices √21 < 5 by linarith
        have g1 : (21 : ℝ) ≤ (19 / 4) ^ 2:= by norm_num
        replace g1 : √21 ≤ √((19 / 4) ^ 2):= by exact Real.sqrt_le_sqrt g1
        field_simp at g1
        linarith

      .
        use (1 + √2)
        ring_nf
        norm_num
        refine ⟨by positivity, ?_⟩
        suffices √2 < 2 by linarith
        have g1 : (2 : ℝ) ≤ (3 / 2) ^ 2:= by norm_num
        replace g1 : √2 ≤ √((3 / 2) ^ 2):= by exact Real.sqrt_le_sqrt g1
        field_simp at g1
        linarith

      .
        use (1 + √3)
        ring_nf
        norm_num
        refine ⟨by positivity, ?_⟩
        suffices √3 < 2 by linarith
        have g1 : (3 : ℝ) ≤ (7 / 4) ^ 2:= by norm_num
        replace g1 : √3 ≤ √((7 / 4) ^ 2):= by exact Real.sqrt_le_sqrt g1
        field_simp at g1
        linarith

  rw [h1]
  clear h1

  rw [show ({(1, 1), (1, 2), (1, 3), (1, 4), (1, 5), (2, 1), (2, 2)} : Set (ℤ × ℤ)) = ({(1, 1), (1, 2), (1, 3), (1, 4), (1, 5), (2, 1), (2, 2)} : Finset (ℤ × ℤ)) by simp]
  rw [Set.ncard_coe_Finset]

  repeat rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
  simp

  all_goals
    by_contra H
    simp at H
  rcases H with H | H | H | H | H | H

  .
    replace H : (1 : ℤ × ℤ).2 = (1, 2).2:= by rw [H]
    simp at H
  .
    replace H : (1 : ℤ × ℤ).2 = (1, 3).2:= by rw [H]
    simp at H
  .
    replace H : (1 : ℤ × ℤ).2 = (1, 4).2:= by rw [H]
    simp at H
  .
    replace H : (1 : ℤ × ℤ).2 = (1, 5).2:= by rw [H]
    simp at H

  .
    replace H : (1 : ℤ × ℤ).1 = (2, 1).1:= by rw [H]
    simp at H

  .
    replace H : (1 : ℤ × ℤ).2 = (2, 2).2:= by rw [H]
    simp at H

theorem algebra_205783 (a b c : ℝ) (h : ∀ x : ℝ, |x| ≤ 1 → |a * x ^ 2 + b * x + c| ≤ 1) :
    ∀ x : ℝ, |x| ≤ 1 → |c * x ^ 2 + b * x + a| ≤ 2 := by

rintro x hx

  let f (x : ℝ) := a * x^2 + b * x + c
  let g (x : ℝ) := c * x^2 + b * x + a

  have hg : 2 * g x = (1 + x) * f 1 + (1 - x) * f (-1) + 2 * f 0  * (x^2 - 1) := by
    simp [f, g]
    ring

  suffices |2 * g x| ≤ 4 by
    simp [g] at this
    rw [abs_mul] at this
    simp at this
    linarith
  calc

    _ = |(1 + x) * f 1 + (1 - x) * f (-1) + 2 * f 0  * (x^2 - 1)| := by rw [hg]

    _ ≤ |1 + x| * |f 1| + |1 - x| * |f (-1)| + 2 * |f 0|  * |x^2 - 1| := by
      nth_rw 2 [show 2 = |(2 : ℝ)| by norm_num]
      rw [← abs_mul, ← abs_mul, ← abs_mul, ← abs_mul]
      trans |(1 + x) * f 1 + (1 - x) * f (-1)| + |2 * f 0  * (x^2 - 1)|
      . apply abs_add_le
      . gcongr
        apply abs_add_le

    _ ≤ |1 + x| * 1 + |1 - x| * 1 + 2 * 1  * |x^2 - 1| := by
      gcongr <;> (apply h; norm_num)

    _ = 1 + x + 1 - x + 2 * (1 - x ^ 2) := by
      have hx' := abs_le.mp hx
      rw [abs_eq_self.mpr (by linarith), abs_eq_self.mpr (by linarith), abs_eq_neg_self.mpr]
      ring
      . suffices x^2 ≤ 1 by linarith
        simpa

    _ ≤ 4 := by
      suffices 0 ≤ x^2 by linarith
      positivity

constructor

    rcases h with h | h

theorem theorem_algebra_316155 (m : ℕ) :
    IsEmpty {(x, y) : ℤ × ℤ |
      (2 * x + 9 * y) ^ 2006 + (4 * x - y) ^ 2006 = 7777 ^ m} := by

have parity_cases (x y:ℤ):
    (Even (2*x+9*y) ∧ Even (4*x-y)) ∨
    (Odd (2*x+9*y) ∧ Odd (4*x-y)) := by
    have h1: Even (2*x) := even_two_mul x
    have h2: Even (4*x) := by
      refine Even.mul_right ?_ x
      exact Int.even_iff.mpr rfl
    by_cases hy: Odd y
    · right
      have h3: Odd (9*y) := by
        clear * - hy
        refine Odd.mul ?_ hy
        exact Int.odd_iff.mpr rfl
      exact ⟨h1.add_odd h3, h2.sub_odd hy⟩
    · left
      rw [Int.not_odd_iff_even] at hy
      have h3: Even (9*y) := hy.mul_left _
      exact ⟨h1.add h3, h2.sub hy⟩

  have not_eq {x y: ℤ} {n:ℕ} (hn: n ≠ 0):
    ¬ (2*x+9*y)^n + (4*x-y)^n = 7777^m := by
    have h1: Odd (7777:ℤ) := Int.odd_iff.mpr rfl
    replace h1: Odd (7777^m: ℤ) := h1.pow
    rintro heq
    rw [← heq] at h1
    absurd h1
    rw [Int.not_odd_iff_even]
    obtain (⟨h2, h3⟩ | ⟨h2,h3⟩) := parity_cases x y
    · replace h2: Even ((2*x+9*y)^n) := by
        rw [Int.even_pow]
        exact ⟨h2, hn⟩
      replace h3: Even ((4*x-y)^n) := by
        rw [Int.even_pow]
        exact ⟨h3, hn⟩
      apply h2.add h3
    · replace h2: Odd ((2*x+9*y)^n) := h2.pow
      replace h3: Odd ((4*x-y)^n) := h3.pow
      apply h2.add_odd h3

  by_contra!
  rw [not_isEmpty_iff] at this
  rcases this with ⟨⟨x,y⟩, h⟩
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h
  absurd h
  apply not_eq (by norm_num)

theorem number_theory_4818 {n a : ℕ} (hn : n = 91) (ha : a = 3) :
    a^(n-1) ≡ 1 [MOD n] := by

have : Fact (Nat.Prime 7) := ⟨by norm_num⟩
  have : Fact (Nat.Prime 13) := ⟨by norm_num⟩
  simp [hn]
  rw [show 91 = 7*13 by norm_num]
  rw [← Nat.modEq_and_modEq_iff_modEq_mul (by norm_num)]
  constructor

  . have : (a : ZMod 7) ≠ 0 := by
      rw [ha]
      exact Ne.symm (ne_of_beq_false rfl)
    have := ZMod.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one this
    simp at this
    rw [← ZMod.eq_iff_modEq_nat, show 90 = 6*15 by norm_num, pow_mul]
    push_cast
    rw [this, one_pow]

  have : (a : ZMod 13) ^ 3 = 1 := by rw [ha]; rfl
  rw [← ZMod.eq_iff_modEq_nat, show 90 = 3 * 30 by norm_num, pow_mul]
  push_cast
  rw [this, one_pow]

theorem algebra_20965 :
    IsGreatest {x | ∃ a b c : ℤ, 100 * a + 10 * b + c = x ∧ 1 ≤ a ∧ a ≤ 9 ∧ 0 ≤ b ∧ b ≤ 9 ∧ 0 ≤ c ∧ c ≤ 9 ∧ ∃ r : ℚ, a = 4 * r ∧ b = a * r ∧ ∃ d, c = b + d ∧ 5 = c + d} 697 := by

simp [IsGreatest, upperBounds]
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  . -- Prove that the maximum could be attained.
    use 6, 9, 7
    norm_num
    use 3 / 2
    norm_num
    use -2
    norm_num
  . -- Prove that every number satisfying the condition is less than or equal to 697.
    intro x a b c hx ha₀ _ hb₀ hb₁ hc₀ hc₁ r h₀ h₁ d h₂ h₃
    rw [h₂] at h₃
    rw [h₀] at h₁

    replace ha₁ : a ≤ 6 := by
      qify at hb₁ ⊢
      rw [h₁, show 4 * r * r = (2 * r) ^ 2 by ring_nf, show (9 : ℚ) = 3 ^ 2 by norm_num] at hb₁
      simp [sq_le_sq, abs] at hb₁
      linarith only [hb₁.1, h₀]
    by_cases hc₀ : c ≤ 7
    . -- If c ≤ 7, we are done.
      omega
    . -- If c > 7, then the resulting three-digit number x must be smaller than 697.
      simp at hc₀
      interval_cases c
      all_goals
        omega -- Obtain a contradiction from h₃, h₂ and hb₁.

theorem number_theory_211102 (n : ℕ) (hn : Odd n ∧ n > 1) :
    ∃ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (n - 1), n ∣ (2 ^ i - 1) := by

obtain ⟨hn1,hn2⟩ := hn

  exists n.totient
  constructor
  · rw[Finset.mem_Icc]
    · constructor

      · exact Nat.totient_pos.mpr (by linarith)

      · exact Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt $ Nat.totient_lt _ hn2

  · have := Nat.ModEq.pow_totient (x := 2) (n := n) (Odd.coprime_two_left hn1)
    symm at this
    have le : 1 ≤ 2 ^ n.totient := Nat.two_pow_pos _
    rwa[Nat.modEq_iff_dvd' le] at this

theorem number_theory_4515 (a b : ℤ) {c : ℤ} (hc : c ∣ a * b) : c ∣ (a.gcd c) * (b.gcd c) := by

theorem algebra_608607 {b : ℤ}:
  (∃ (f : Polynomial ℤ), (f.eval 2 = 2010 ∧ f.eval b = 8) )↔ (b - 2) ∣ -2002 := by

constructor

  · intro h

    rw [show -2002 = (8 : ℤ) - 2010 by norm_num]
    rw [← h1, ← h2]

  · intro h

    simp

      have dvd_aux : b - 2 ∣ 2002 := by exact Int.dvd_neg.mp h
      exact Int.ediv_mul_cancel dvd_aux
    rw [eq_aux]
    norm_num

theorem calculus_608391 : ∫ x in (0 : ℝ)..2, |x ^ 2 - x| = 1 := by

    apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable; continuity
  have II2 : IntervalIntegrable (fun x => |x ^ 2 - x|) MeasureTheory.volume 1 2 := by
    apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable; continuity

  have EQ1 : Set.EqOn (fun (x : ℝ) => |x ^ 2 - x|) (fun x => x - x ^ 2) (Set.uIcc 0 1) := by
    intro x hx; simp at hx; simp; rw [abs_eq_neg_self.mpr]; ring
    rw [sub_nonpos, ← sub_nonneg, pow_two, ← mul_one_sub]; apply mul_nonneg

    intro x hx; simp at hx; simp
    rw [← sub_nonneg, pow_two, ← mul_sub_one]; apply mul_nonneg
    all_goals linarith

  rw [← integral_add_adjacent_intervals II1 II2, integral_congr EQ1]
  rw [integral_congr EQ2]; simp; norm_num

theorem algebra_604918 : (∀ a b k : ℝ, a > 0 → b > 0 → a < b → k > 0 → a / b < (a + k) / (b + k)) ∧ (∑ i in Finset.range (50), (1 + 3 * (↑i : ℝ)) / (100 + ↑i) > 25):= by

have h1 : ∀ a b k : ℝ, a > 0 → b > 0 → a < b → k > 0 → a / b < (a + k) / (b + k):= by
        intro a b k _ hb hab hk

        have g1 : b * (b + k) > 0:= by positivity

        suffices (a / b) * (b * (b + k)) < ((a + k) / (b + k)) * (b * (b + k)) by exact (mul_lt_mul_iff_of_pos_right g1).mp this

        rw [show (a / b) * (b * (b + k)) = a * (b + k) by field_simp ; linarith]

        rw [show ((a + k) / (b + k)) * (b * (b + k)) = (a + k) * b by field_simp ; linarith]

        replace hab : b - a > 0:= by linarith

        replace hab : (b - a) * k > 0:= by positivity
        linarith
    constructor
    .
        exact h1
    .

        replace h1 : ∀ m : ℕ, m ≤ 48 → ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (m + 2), (1 + 3 * (↑i : ℝ)) / (100 + ↑i) > ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (m + 2), (1 + 2 * (↑i : ℝ)) / 100:= by
            intro m
            induction m with

            | zero =>
                simp [Finset.sum_range_succ]
                norm_num

            | succ m ih =>
                intro hm
                rw [show m + 1 + 2 = m + 2 + 1 by ring_nf]
                set n:= m + 2 with hn
                clear_value n
                replace ih:= ih (by omega)
                simp [Finset.sum_range_succ]

                have hn1 : n ≥ 2:= by omega
                replace hn : n ≤ 49:= by omega
                rify at hn hn1

                specialize h1 (1 + 2 * (↑n : ℝ)) 100 (↑n : ℝ) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith)
                rw [show 1 + 2 * (↑n : ℝ) + ↑n = 1 + 3 * (↑n : ℝ) by ring_nf] at h1
                linarith

        specialize h1 48 (by omega)
        rw [show 48 + 2 = 50 by ring_nf] at h1

        have h2 : ∑ i ∈ Finset.range 50, (1 + 2 * (↑i : ℝ)) / 100 = 25:= by ring_nf
        linarith
