theorem algebra_242086 {F : ℂ → ℂ} (hF : ∀ z, z ≠ .I → F z = (z - .I) / (z + .I))
    (z : ℕ → ℂ) (h₀ : z 0 = 2016 + .I) (h : ∀ n, z (n + 1) = F (z n)) :
    z 2016 = 2016 + .I := by

have h₁ (n : ℕ) : z (3 * n) = z 0 := by
    induction' n with n hn
    . simp
    . have g₀ : z (3 * n) ≠ .I := by
        simp [hn, h₀]
      have g₁ : z (3 * n) + .I ≠ 0 := by
        simp [hn, h₀, Complex.ext_iff]
      have g₂ : z (3 * n + 1) ≠ .I := by
        rw [h, hF _ g₀]
        field_simp [hn, h₀, Complex.ext_iff]
      have g₃ : z (3 * n + 1) + .I ≠ 0 := by
        rw [h, hF _ g₀]
        field_simp [hn, h₀, Complex.ext_iff]
      have g₄ : z (3 * n + 2) ≠ .I := by
        rw [h, hF _ g₂]
        field_simp
        rw [h, hF _ g₀]
        field_simp [hn, h₀, Complex.ext_iff]
        norm_num
      have g₅ : z (3 * n + 2) + .I ≠ 0 := by
        rw [h, hF _ g₂]
        field_simp
        rw [h, hF _ g₀]
        field_simp [hn, h₀, Complex.ext_iff]
      rw [mul_add_one, h, hF _ g₄]
      field_simp
      rw [h, hF _ g₂]
      field_simp
      rw [h, hF _ g₀]
      field_simp
      rw [hn, h₀]
      ring_nf
      rw [show 3 = 2 + 1 by norm_num, pow_add]
      field_simp
      ring
  rw [h₁ 672, h₀]

theorem algebra_87029 (a : ℕ → ℝ) (ha1 : a 1 = 1) (han : ∀ n ≥ 1, (a (n + 1)) ^ 3 = 99 * (a n) ^ 3) :
    a 100 = 99^33 := by

have pos : ∀ m : ℕ, 0 ≤ a (m+1) := by
      intro m
      induction' m with m hm
      simp [ha1]
      by_contra oth; push_neg at oth
      have eq : (a (m+1 + 1)) ^ 3 = 99 * (a (m+1)) ^ 3 := by apply han (m+1); linarith
      have : (a (m+1+1))^3 < 0 := by refine Odd.pow_neg ?_ oth; exact Nat.odd_iff.mpr rfl
      have : 0 ≤ 99 * a (m + 1) ^ 3 := by positivity
      linarith

    have lem : ∀ m : ℕ , (a (m+1))^3 = 99^(m) := by
      intro m
      induction' m with m hm
      ring_nf
      simp [ha1]
      have : (a (m+1+1))^3 = 99 * (a (m+1))^3 := by rw [han (m+1) (by linarith)];
      rw [this]; rw [hm]; ring_nf

    have :(a 100)^3 = 99^99 := by rw [lem 99];
    have :(a 100)^(3:ℝ) = 99 ^ (99:ℝ) := by
      rify at this; norm_cast; rw [this]; norm_cast
    have a100pos: 0 ≤ a 100  := by
      have : 0 ≤ a (99+1) := pos 99
      ring_nf at this; assumption
    have t1: ((a 100)^(3:ℝ))^(1/(3:ℝ)) = (99^(99:ℝ))^(1/(3:ℝ)) := by rw [this]
    have t2: (a 100) = ((a 100)^(3:ℝ))^(1/(3:ℝ)) := by
      rw [←Real.rpow_mul a100pos 3 (1/(3:ℝ))]
      ring_nf; field_simp
    rw [t2]; rw [t1];
    have : 0 ≤ (99:ℝ) := by linarith
    rw [←Real.rpow_mul this 99 (1/(3:ℝ))]
    ring_nf

theorem algebra_24019 (f : ℝ → ℝ) (h : ∀ x y, f (x + y) ≤ y * f x + f (f x)) :
    ∀ x ≤ 0, f x = 0 := by

have h1 x t : f t ≤ t * f x - x * f x + f (f x) := by
    specialize h x (t - x)
    ring_nf at h ⊢
    simpa

  have h2 a b : 2 * f a * f b ≥ a * f a + b * f b := by

    have c1 : f (f a) - f (f b) ≤ f a * f b - b * f b := by
      specialize h1 b (f a)
      linarith
    have c2 : f (f b) - f (f a) ≤ f a * f b - a * f a := by
      specialize h1 a (f b)
      linarith

    linarith

  have h3 a : a * f a ≤ 0 := by
    specialize h2 a (2 * f a)
    linarith

  replace h3 a (ha : a < 0) : f a ≥ 0 := by
    specialize h3 a
    nlinarith

  have h4 : ∀ x, f x ≤ 0 := by

    by_contra h4
    push_neg at h4
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h4

    have c1 t (ht : t < (x * f x - f (f x)) / f x) : f t < 0 := by
      specialize h1 x t
      replace ht := (mul_lt_mul_iff_of_pos_right hx).mpr ht
      field_simp at ht
      linarith

    let y := (x * f x - f (f x)) / f x
    let z := min (y - 1) (-1)
    have hz : z ≤ -1 := by apply min_le_right
    have hz2 : z ≤ y - 1 := by apply min_le_left
    specialize h3 z (by linarith)
    specialize c1 z (by linarith)
    linarith

  have h5 : ∀ x < 0, f x = 0 := by
    intro x hx
    specialize h3 x hx
    specialize h4 x
    linarith

  have h6 : f 0 ≥ 0 := by
    specialize h1 (-1) (-1)
    specialize h5 (-1) (by norm_num)
    simpa [h5] using h1

  have h7 : f 0 = 0 := by
    specialize h4 0
    linarith
  intro x hx
  rcases (show x < 0 ∨ x = 0 from lt_or_eq_of_le hx) with hx | hx
  . exact h5 x hx
  . subst hx
    exact h7

let a := A * 100 + B * 10 + C
  let b := D * 100 + E * 10 + F

  have al: 100 ≤ a := by omega
  have au: a ≤ 999 := by omega
  have bu: b ≤ 999 := by omega

  have cla : 1000 * a + b = A * 100000 + B * 10000 + C * 1000 + D * 100 + E * 10 + F := by ring_nf

  have eq: a * b = (1000*a + b) / (7:ℚ) := by
    qify at cla
    rw [cla]
    simp [a,b]
    assumption

  have eq2: 7*(a*b) = 1000*a+b := by qify; nlinarith

  have eq3: (7*(a:ℤ)-1)*(7*b-1000) = 1000 := by nlinarith

  have a7p: 0 < (7*(a:ℤ)-1) := by linarith
  have b7p: 0 < (7*(b:ℤ)-1000) := by nlinarith

  have eq4: (7*a-1)*(7*b-1000) = 1000 := by
    zify
    have : @Nat.cast ℤ AddMonoidWithOne.toNatCast (7 * a - 1) = @HSub.hSub ℤ ℤ ℤ instHSub (7 * ↑a) 1 := by omega
    rw [this]
    have : @Nat.cast ℤ AddMonoidWithOne.toNatCast (7 * b - 1000)  = @HSub.hSub ℤ ℤ ℤ instHSub (7 * ↑b) 1000 := by omega
    rw [this]
    exact eq3

  have ae: a = 143 := by
    have d7a: 7*a-1 ∣ 1000 := by use 7*b-1000; symm; exact eq4
    obtain ⟨k,hk⟩ := d7a
    have ke: k = 1 := by
      have a7m1699: 699≤ 7*a-1 := by omega
      have knn0 : k ≠ 0:= by
        by_contra ke0
        rw [ke0] at hk
        norm_num at hk
      by_contra nke1
      have : 2 ≤ k := by omega
      have : 699*2 ≤ (7 * a - 1) * k := by gcongr
      have : 1000 < 699*2 := by omega
      linarith
    rw [ke] at hk
    field_simp at hk
    omega

  have be: b = 143 := by rw [ae] at eq2; omega

  rw [← cla]
  linarith

import Mathlib
inductive GameSuit : Type
| diamond | heart | club | spade
deriving Repr, Fintype, DecidableEq
def deck_suits : Multiset GameSuit :=
  Multiset.replicate 13 GameSuit.diamond +
  Multiset.replicate 13 GameSuit.heart +
  Multiset.replicate 13 GameSuit.club +
  Multiset.replicate 13 GameSuit.spade
lemma deck_suits_card_eq_52 : deck_suits.card = 52 := by sorry

lemma deck_suits_count_spade_eq_13 : Multiset.count GameSuit.spade deck_suits = 13 := by sorry

lemma p_spade_value : p_spade = (1:ℝ)/4 := by sorry

lemma p_not_spade_value : p_not_spade = (3:ℝ)/4 := by sorry

theorem combinatorics_608154 :
    p_Jill_wins_round / p_game_ends_in_round = (12:ℝ) / 37 := by

simp [deck_suits] -- Unfold definition

lemma deck_suits_count_spade_eq_13 : Multiset.count GameSuit.spade deck_suits = 13 := by
  simp [deck_suits, Multiset.count_add, Multiset.count_replicate]

noncomputable def p_spade : ℝ := (Multiset.count GameSuit.spade deck_suits : Rat) / (deck_suits.card : ℝ)

noncomputable def p_not_spade : ℝ := 1 - p_spade

lemma p_spade_value : p_spade = (1:ℝ)/4 := by
  simp [p_spade, deck_suits_card_eq_52, deck_suits_count_spade_eq_13] -- Substitute known counts
  norm_num -- Calculate 13/52 = 1/4

lemma p_not_spade_value : p_not_spade = (3:ℝ)/4 := by
  simp [p_not_spade, p_spade_value] -- Substitute value of p_spade
  norm_num -- Calculate 1 - 1/4 = 3/4

noncomputable def p_Jack_wins_round : ℝ := p_spade
noncomputable def p_Jill_wins_round : ℝ := p_not_spade * p_spade
noncomputable def p_John_wins_round : ℝ := p_not_spade * p_not_spade * p_spade

noncomputable def p_game_ends_in_round : ℝ :=
  p_Jack_wins_round +
  p_Jill_wins_round +
  p_John_wins_round

theorem combinatorics_608154 :
    p_Jill_wins_round / p_game_ends_in_round = (12:ℝ) / 37 := by

  unfold p_game_ends_in_round p_Jack_wins_round p_John_wins_round p_Jill_wins_round

  rw [p_spade_value, p_not_spade_value]

  norm_num

theorem number_theory_143259 :
    IsLeast {x | ∃ m n : ℕ, m > 0 ∧ n > 0 ∧ m < n ∧ (1978 ^ m) % 1000 = (1978 ^ n) % 1000 ∧ x = m + n} (3 + 103) := by

simp only [IsLeast, gt_iff_lt, Nat.reduceAdd, Set.mem_setOf_eq, lowerBounds,
    forall_exists_index, and_imp]
  constructor

  · use 3, 103
    norm_num

  intro s m n hm0 hn0 hmn heq hsmn

  have ineq : 1978 ^ m ≤ 1978 ^ n := Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num) (le_of_lt hmn)

  rw [← Nat.ModEq.eq_1, Nat.modEq_iff_dvd' ineq] at heq

  set d := n - m

  have eq : 1978 ^ n - 1978 ^ m = 1978 ^ m * (1978 ^ d - 1) := by
    rw [Nat.mul_sub, ← Nat.pow_add, show m + d = n by omega, mul_one]

  suffices 3 ≤ m ∧ 100 ≤ d by omega
  constructor

  · have h : 8 ∣ 1978 ^ m := by

      have hp : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ 3) (1978 ^ d - 1) := by

        apply Nat.Coprime.pow_left
        apply IsCoprime.nat_coprime
        dsimp [IsCoprime]
        push_cast [show 1 ≤ 1978 ^ d by exact Nat.one_le_pow' d 1977]

        use 2 ^ (d - 1) * 989 ^ d, -1
        rw [Int.mul_right_comm, ← Int.pow_succ, show d - 1 + 1 = d by omega, ← mul_pow]
        ring

      apply hp.dvd_of_dvd_mul_left
      trans 1000
      norm_num
      rwa [mul_comm, ← eq]

    rcases show m = 1 ∨ m = 2 ∨ 3 ≤ m by omega with hm | hm | hm

    · rw [hm] at h; norm_num at h

    · rw [hm] at h; norm_num at h

    · exact hm

  have h : 125 ∣ 1978 ^ d - 1 := by

    have hp : Nat.Coprime 125 (1978 ^ m) := by
      apply Nat.Coprime.pow_right
      norm_num

    apply hp.dvd_of_dvd_mul_left
    trans 1000
    norm_num
    rwa [← eq]

  rw [← ZMod.natCast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd] at h
  push_cast [show 1 ≤ 1978 ^ d from Nat.one_le_pow' _ _] at h

  have hp : Nat.Coprime 1978 125 := by norm_num
  have hu := (ZMod.isUnit_iff_coprime 1978 125).mpr hp

  have hd : orderOf hu.unit ∣ d := by
    simp [← orderOf_units]
    apply orderOf_dvd_of_pow_eq_one
    linear_combination h

  have hd100 : orderOf hu.unit ∣ 100 := by

    rw [← show (125).totient = 100 by decide]

    apply orderOf_dvd_of_pow_eq_one
    exact ZMod.pow_totient _
  simp [← orderOf_units] at hd100 hd

  have hpow := pow_orderOf_eq_one (1978 : ZMod 125)

  set k := orderOf (1978 : ZMod 125)

  suffices 100 ≤ k by
    apply Nat.le_of_dvd (by omega) at hd
    linarith

  have hk : k ∈ ({1, 2, 4, 5, 10, 20, 25, 50, 100} : Finset ℕ) := by
    rw [← show (100).divisors = {1, 2, 4, 5, 10, 20, 25, 50, 100} from rfl]
    simp only [Nat.mem_divisors, ne_eq, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true, and_true, hd100]
  simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hk

  replace hpow : 1978 ^ k % 125 = 1 := by
    rw [show 1 = ((1 : ℕ) : ZMod 125) by rfl] at hpow
    rw [show 1978 ^ k = ((1978 ^ k : ℕ) : ZMod 125) by simp] at hpow
    rw [ZMod.natCast_eq_natCast_iff'] at hpow
    simp [hpow]

  rcases hk with hk | hk | hk | hk | hk | hk | hk | hk | hk <;> rw [hk] at hpow <;> norm_num at hpow
  rw [hk]

theorem algebra_609445 (x y z : ℤ) (h₁: (x + y: ℝ) / 2 + z = 42)
    (h₂ : (y + z: ℝ) / 2 + x = 13) (h₃ : (x + z: ℝ) / 2 + y = 37) :
    x = -20 ∧ y = 28 ∧ z = 38 := by

have hsum : (x + y + z : ℝ) = 46 := by linarith [h₁, h₂, h₃]

  have : (x + y: ℝ) / 2 + z = (x + y + z: ℝ) / 2 + (z: ℝ) / 2 := by ring
  rw [this, hsum] at h₁
  have hz : z = (38: ℝ) := by linarith [h₁]

  have : (y + z: ℝ) / 2 + x = (x + y + z: ℝ) / 2 + (x: ℝ) / 2 := by ring
  rw [this, hsum] at h₂
  have hx : x = (-20: ℝ) := by linarith [h₂]
  have : (x + z: ℝ) / 2 + y = (x + y + z: ℝ) / 2 + (y: ℝ) / 2 := by ring
  rw [this, hsum] at h₃
  have hy : y = (28: ℝ) := by linarith [h₃]
  exact ⟨by norm_cast at hx, by norm_cast at hy, by norm_cast at hz⟩

theorem number_theory_611059 : {a ∈ Finset.range ((2002 ^ 2 - 1) / 2001 + 1) | (2002 ^ 2 - 1).Coprime a}.card = 1233:= by

set A:= {a ∈ Finset.range ((2002 ^ 2 - 1) / 2001 + 1) | (2002 ^ 2 - 1).Coprime a} with hA

  set B:= {a ∈ Finset.range 2001 | Nat.Coprime 2001 a} with hB

  clear_value A B

  have h : (2002 : ℕ) ∉ B:= by
    by_contra H
    subst B
    simp at H

  have h1 : A = Finset.cons 2002 B h:= by
    ext a
    constructor

    .
      subst A B
      intro h1
      simp at h1
      simp
      rcases h1 with ⟨h1, h2⟩
      rw [show 4008003 = 2001 * 2003 by simp] at h2

      have h3 : a ≠ 2003:= by
        by_contra H
        subst a
        norm_num at h2

      have h4 : a ≠ 2001:= by
        by_contra H
        subst a
        norm_num at h2

      by_cases h5 : a = 2002
      .
        simp [h5]
      .
        right
        replace h1 : a < 2001:= by omega
        refine ⟨h1, ?_⟩
        clear h3 h4 h5
        exact Nat.Coprime.coprime_mul_right h2

    .
      subst A B
      intro h1
      simp at h1
      simp
      rcases h1 with h1 | h1

      .
        subst a
        simp
        norm_num

      .
        rcases h1 with ⟨h1, h2⟩

        have hpos : a > 0:= by
          by_contra H
          simp at H
          subst a
          simp at h2
        refine ⟨(by linarith), ?_⟩

        have h3 : Nat.Coprime 2003 a:= by
          have g1 : Nat.Prime 2003:= by norm_num
          replace h1 : a < 2003:= by omega
          set p:= 2003 with hp
          clear_value p
          refine Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one.mpr ?_
          have h4 : p.gcd a ∣ p:= by exact Nat.gcd_dvd_left p a
          replace h4:= (Nat.dvd_prime g1).mp h4
          rcases h4 with h4 | h4
          .
            exact h4
          .
            have h5 : p.gcd a ∣ a:= by exact Nat.gcd_dvd_right p a
            apply Nat.le_of_dvd hpos at h5
            linarith

        rw [show 4008003 = 2001 * 2003 by norm_num]
        exact Nat.Coprime.mul h2 h3

  rw [h1]

  rw [Finset.card_cons h]
  subst B

  rw [←Nat.totient_eq_card_coprime 2001]

  native_decide

theorem inequalities_171051 (x : ℝ) (hx : x ≠ -4) (hx1 : logb 6 ((x ^ 2 + x) / (x + 4)) > 0) (hx2 : (x ^ 2 + x) / (x + 4) > 0) : logb 0.3 (logb 6 ((x^2 + x) / (x + 4))) < 0 ↔
x ∈ Set.Ioo (-4) (-3) ∪ Set.Ioi 8:= by

constructor

  .
    intro h

    rw [←Real.log_div_log] at h
    norm_num at h

    have h1 : log (3 / 10) < 0:= by
      have h1 : 0 < (3 : ℝ) / 10:= by linarith
      have h2 : (3 : ℝ) / 10 < 1:= by norm_num
      exact log_neg h1 h2

    rw [show log (logb 6 ((x ^ 2 + x) / (x + 4))) / log (3 / 10) = log (logb 6 ((x ^ 2 + x) / (x + 4))) * (1 / log (3 / 10)) by field_simp] at h

    replace h1 : 1 / log (3 / 10) < 0:= by exact one_div_neg.mpr h1
    replace h : log (logb 6 ((x ^ 2 + x) / (x + 4))) > 0:= by exact (pos_iff_neg_of_mul_neg h).mpr h1

    replace h : logb 6 ((x ^ 2 + x) / (x + 4)) > 1:= by exact (Real.log_pos_iff hx1).1 h

    rw [←Real.log_div_log] at h

    replace h1 : log 6 > 0:= by
      have h2 : (6 : ℝ) > 1:= by norm_num
      exact log_pos h2

    replace h : log ((x ^ 2 + x) / (x + 4)) > log 6:= by exact (one_lt_div h1).mp h

    replace h : (x ^ 2 + x) / (x + 4) > 6:= by
      have h2 : (6 : ℝ) > 0:= by norm_num
      exact (log_lt_log_iff h2 hx2).mp h

    replace h : (x ^ 2 + x) / (x + 4) - 6 > 0:= by linarith

    have gx : x + 4 ≠ 0:= by
      by_contra H
      replace H : x = -4:= by linarith
      trivial

    rw [show (x ^ 2 + x) / (x + 4) - 6 = ((x + 3) * (x - 8)) / (x + 4) by field_simp ; linarith] at h
    clear gx hx1 hx2

    replace hx : x < -4 ∨ x > -4:= by exact lt_or_gt_of_ne hx
    rcases hx with hx | hx

    .
      have g1 : x + 4 < 0:= by linarith
      have g2 : x + 3 < 0:= by linarith
      have g3 : x - 8 < 0:= by linarith
      replace g2 : (x + 3) * (x - 8) > 0:= by exact mul_pos_of_neg_of_neg g2 g3
      replace g2 : (x + 3) * (x - 8) / (x + 4) < 0:= by exact div_neg_of_pos_of_neg g2 g1
      linarith

    .

      by_cases hx1 : x < -3
      .
        simp
        left
        exact ⟨hx, hx1⟩

      .
        simp at hx1

        by_cases hx2 : x > 8
        .
          simp
          right
          exact hx2

        .
          simp at hx2
          clear hx
          have g1 : x - 8 ≤ 0:= by linarith
          have g2 : x + 3 ≥ 0:= by linarith
          have g3 : x + 4 > 0:= by linarith
          replace g2 : (x + 3) * (x - 8) ≤ 0:= by exact mul_nonpos_of_nonneg_of_nonpos g2 g1

          replace g2 : (x + 3) * (x - 8) / (x + 4) ≤ 0:= by
            rw [show (x + 3) * (x - 8) / (x + 4) = (x + 3) * (x - 8) * (1 / (x + 4)) by field_simp]
            replace g3 : 1 / (x + 4) ≥ 0:= by positivity
            exact mul_nonpos_of_nonpos_of_nonneg g2 g3
          linarith

  .
    intro h
    simp at h
    rcases h with h | h

    .
      rcases h with ⟨h1, h2⟩
      replace h1 : x + 4 > 0:= by linarith
      replace h2 : x + 3 < 0:= by linarith

      have h3 : (x ^ 2 + x) / (x + 4) > 6:= by
        suffices x ^ 2 + x > 6 * (x + 4) by exact (lt_div_iff₀ h1).mpr this
        suffices (x + 3) * (x - 8) > 0 by linarith
        have h3 : x - 8 < 0:= by linarith
        exact mul_pos_of_neg_of_neg h2 h3

      replace h3 : logb 6 ((x ^ 2 + x) / (x + 4)) > 1:= by
        have h4:= Real.logb_lt_logb (show 1 < 6 by norm_num) (show 0 < 6 by norm_num) h3
        rw [show logb 6 6 = 1 by norm_num] at h4
        exact h4
      set t:= logb 6 ((x ^ 2 + x) / (x + 4))
      clear_value t

      rw [←Real.log_div_log]
      norm_num

      have h4 : log (3 / 10) < 0:= by
        have h1 : 0 < (3 : ℝ) / 10:= by linarith
        have h2 : (3 : ℝ) / 10 < 1:= by norm_num
        exact log_neg h1 h2

      have h5 : log t > 0:= by exact (log_pos_iff hx1).mpr h3

      exact div_neg_of_pos_of_neg h5 h4

    .
      have h1 : x + 4 > 0:= by linarith

      have h3 : (x ^ 2 + x) / (x + 4) > 6:= by
        suffices x ^ 2 + x > 6 * (x + 4) by exact (lt_div_iff₀ h1).mpr this
        suffices (x + 3) * (x - 8) > 0 by linarith
        have h3 : x - 8 > 0:= by linarith
        positivity

      replace h3 : logb 6 ((x ^ 2 + x) / (x + 4)) > 1:= by
        have h4:= Real.logb_lt_logb (show 1 < 6 by norm_num) (show 0 < 6 by norm_num) h3
        rw [show logb 6 6 = 1 by norm_num] at h4
        exact h4
      set t:= logb 6 ((x ^ 2 + x) / (x + 4))
      clear_value t

      rw [←Real.log_div_log]
      norm_num

      have h4 : log (3 / 10) < 0:= by
        have h1 : 0 < (3 : ℝ) / 10:= by linarith
        have h2 : (3 : ℝ) / 10 < 1:= by norm_num
        exact log_neg h1 h2

      have h5 : log t > 0:= by exact (log_pos_iff hx1).mpr h3

      exact div_neg_of_pos_of_neg h5 h4

theorem algebra_10344 : IsLeast {t : ℝ | t ≥ 0 ∧ -16 * t ^ 2 + 80 * t = 36} 0.5 := by

have H (t : ℝ) : -16 * t ^ 2 + 80 * t = 36 ↔ t = 0.5 ∨ t = 4.5 := by

    constructor <;> intro h
    . -- Solve it by contradiction
      contrapose! h
      rw [show (0.5 : ℝ) = 1 / 2 by norm_num, show (4.5 : ℝ) = 9 / 2 by norm_num] at h

      nlinarith (config := {splitNe := true})
    . -- Plug in the values
      obtain rfl | rfl := h
      all_goals
        norm_num

  constructor
  . -- 0.5 is a solution
    refine ⟨by norm_num, ?_⟩
    rw [H]
    simp
  . -- No other solution is less than 0.5
    rintro t ⟨ht, h⟩
    rw [H] at h

    obtain rfl | rfl := h
    all_goals
      norm_num

lemma aux_4067 (k : ℕ) :  (2 * (k + 1))! / (k + 1)! = 2 * (2 * k + 1) * (2 * k) ! / k ! := by sorry

theorem number_theory_4067 (k : ℕ) : 2 ^ k ∣ (2 * k) ! / k ! ∧ ¬2 ^ (k + 1) ∣ (2 * k) ! / k ! := by

have h2 : k + 1 ∣ (2 * k + 2) * (2 * k + 1) := by
        apply dvd_mul_of_dvd_left
        rw [show (2 * k + 2 = 2 * (k + 1)) by linarith]
        exact dvd_mul_of_dvd_right (Nat.dvd_refl (k + 1)) 2
  calc
    _ = (2 * k + 2)! / (k + 1)! := by ring_nf
    _ = (2 * k + 2) * (2 * k + 1) * (2 * k)! / ((k + 1) * (k)!) := by
      rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.factorial_succ]
      congr 1; ring
    _ = (2 * k + 2) * (2 * k + 1) / (k + 1) * (2 * k)! / (k)! := by
      have h1 : k ! ∣ (2 * k)! := factorial_dvd_factorial (by linarith)
      rw [Nat.mul_div_mul_comm h2 h1, ←Nat.mul_div_assoc _ h1]
  congr
  rw [show (2 * k + 2 = 2 * (k + 1)) by linarith]
  have h3 : 0 < k + 1 := by simp
  have h1 : k + 1 ∣ 2 * (k + 1) * (2 * k + 1) := by
    convert h2 using 1
  have := Nat.div_eq_iff_eq_mul_left h3 h1 (c := 2 * (2 * k + 1))
  rw [Nat.div_eq_iff_eq_mul_left h3 h1 (c := 2 * (2 * k + 1)) ]
  ring

theorem number_theory_4067 (k : ℕ) : 2 ^ k ∣ (2 * k) ! / k ! ∧ ¬2 ^ (k + 1) ∣ (2 * k) ! / k ! := by

  induction' k with k hk
  · -- when $k=1$, this is easy to prove.
    simp
  · -- assume the statement is true for some $k=n$.
    rw [aux_4067 k]
    constructor
    · rw [Nat.pow_add_one, mul_comm, Nat.mul_div_assoc _ (factorial_dvd_factorial (by linarith))]
      refine Nat.mul_dvd_mul (by simp) hk.1
    · rw [Nat.pow_add_one, mul_comm]
      intro h
      rw [mul_assoc, Nat.mul_div_assoc] at h
      have h1 := (Nat.dvd_of_mul_dvd_mul_left (by simp) h)
      have : 2 ^ (k + 1) ∣ (2 * k)! / k ! := by
        have : ¬ 2 ∣ (2 * k + 1) := by simp
        rw [ Nat.mul_div_assoc] at h1
        exact Prime.pow_dvd_of_dvd_mul_left (Nat.prime_iff.1 Nat.prime_two) (k + 1) this h1
        exact (factorial_dvd_factorial (by linarith))
      exact hk.2 this
      exact dvd_mul_of_dvd_right (factorial_dvd_factorial (by linarith)) (2 * k + 1)

theorem inequalities_89372 (x y : ℝ) (hx : 0 < x) (hy : 0 < y) (hxy : x + y = 1) :
    ((x + 1) / x) ^ 2 + ((y + 1) / y) ^ 2 ≥ 18 := by

have h1 : ((x + 1) / x) ^ 2 + ((y + 1) / y) ^ 2 = (1 + 1 / x) ^ 2 + (1 + 1 / y) ^ 2 := by
    field_simp
  rw [h1]

  have h2 : (1 + 1 / x) ^ 2 + (1 + 1 / y) ^ 2 = 2 + 2 * (1 / x + 1 / y) + (1 / x ^ 2 + 1 / y ^ 2) := by
    field_simp
    ring
  rw [h2]

  have h3 : 1 / x + 1 / y ≥ 4 := by

    have h4 : 1 / x + 1 / y - 4 = (x + y - 4 * x * y) / (x * y) := by
      field_simp
      nlinarith

    have h5 : x + y - 4 * x * y ≥ 0 := by
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (x + y - 1)]

    have h6 : (x + y - 4 * x * y) / (x * y) ≥ 0 := by
      apply div_nonneg
      · linarith
      · nlinarith [mul_pos hx hy]
    linarith

  have h4 : 1 / x ^ 2 + 1 / y ^ 2 ≥ 8 := by

    have h6 : (1 / x + 1 / y) ^ 2 - 2 * (1 / x) * (1 / y) - 8 ≥ 0 := by
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (1 / x - 1 / y), h3]
    linarith

  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (x + y - 1), h3, h4]

theorem algebra_609144 (f : ℝ → ℝ) : (∀ x y : ℝ, (x - y) * (f x - f y) = f (x - f y) * f (f x - y)) ↔ ((∀ x : ℝ, f x = 0) ∨ (∀ x : ℝ, f x = x)) := by

constructor
  .
    intro h

    have h1 : f 0 = 0:= by
      by_contra H
      have g1:= h 0 0
      simp at g1
      rcases g1 with g1 | g1
      .
        have g2:= h 0 (-f 0)
        simp at g2
        rw [g1] at g2
        simp at g2
        simp [H] at g2
        ring_nf at g2
        have g3:= h 0 (f 0 * 2)
        have g4:= h (f 0 * 2) 0
        rw [show (0 - f 0 * 2) * (f 0 - f (f 0 * 2)) = (f 0 * 2 - 0) * (f (f 0 * 2) - f 0) by linarith] at g3
        rw [g4] at g3
        clear g4
        ring_nf at g3
        rw [g1] at g3
        rw [←g2] at g3
        simp at g3
        have g4:= h (f 0) 0
        ring_nf at g4
        rw [g3] at g4
        simp at g4
        replace g4 : f 0 ^ 2 = 0:= by linarith
        simp at g4
        trivial
      .
        have g2:= h (f 0) 0
        ring_nf at g2
        rw [g1] at g2
        simp at g2
        replace g2 : f 0 ^ 2 = 0:= by linarith
        simp at g2
        trivial

    have h2 : ∀ x : ℝ, x * f x = f x * (f (f x)):= by
      intro x
      specialize h x 0
      rw [h1] at h
      ring_nf at h
      exact h

    have h3 : ∀ x : ℝ, f x = 0 ∨ f x = x:= by
      intro x
      have g1:= h x (f x)
      rw [show f x - f x = 0 by linarith] at g1
      rw [h1] at g1
      simp at g1
      replace g1 : f x = f (f x):= by
        rcases g1 with g1 | g1
        .
          replace g1 : f x = x:= by linarith
          rw [g1]
          linarith
        .
          linarith
      specialize h2 x
      rw [←g1] at h2
      replace h2 : f x * (f x - x) = 0:= by linarith
      simp at h2
      rcases h2 with h2 | h2
      .
        left
        exact h2
      .
        right
        linarith

    by_cases h4 : ∀ x : ℝ, f x = 0
    .
      simp [h4]
    .
      simp at h4
      rcases h4 with ⟨a, ha⟩
      have hane0 : a ≠ 0:= by
        by_contra H
        subst a
        trivial
      replace ha : f a = a:= by
        specialize h3 a
        simp [ha] at h3
        exact h3

      have h4 : ∀ y : ℝ, a - y ≠ 0 → f (a - y) = a - y:= by
        intro y hay
        by_cases hy : f y ≠ 0
        .
          replace hy : f y = y:= by
            specialize h3 y
            simp [hy] at h3
            exact h3
          specialize h a y
          rw [ha, hy] at h
          replace h : (f (a - y) - (a - y)) * (f (a - y) + (a - y)) = 0:= by linarith
          simp at h
          rcases h with h | h
          .
            linarith
          .
            have h4 : f (a - y) ≠ 0:= by
              by_contra H
              rw [H] at h
              simp at h
              trivial
            replace h4 : f (a - y) = a - y:= by
              specialize h3 (a - y)
              simp [h4] at h3
              exact h3
            rw [h4] at h
            simp at h
            trivial
        .
          simp at hy
          specialize h a y
          rw [ha, hy] at h
          simp at h
          rw [ha] at h
          replace h : a * (f (a - y) - (a - y)) = 0:= by linarith
          simp [hane0] at h
          linarith

      right
      intro x
      by_cases hx : x = 0
      .
        subst x
        rw [h1]
      .
        specialize h4 (a - x) (by ring_nf; exact hx)
        ring_nf at h4
        exact h4
  .
    intro h
    rcases h with h | h
    all_goals
      simp [h]

theorem algebra_67882 : logb 3 (27 * 9 ^ ((1 : ℝ) / 4) * 9 ^ ((1 : ℝ) / 3)) = 4 + 1/6 := by

have h2 : logb 3 (27 * 9 ^ ((1 : ℝ) / 4) * 9 ^ ((1 : ℝ) / 3)) = 3 + 1 / 2 + 2 / 3 := by
    have h21 : (27 : ℝ) = 3 ^ (3 : ℝ) := by norm_num
    have h22 : (9 : ℝ) ^ ((1 : ℝ) / 4) = 3 ^ (1 / 2 : ℝ) := by
      rw [show (9 : ℝ) = 3 ^ (2 : ℝ) by norm_num]
      rw [← Real.rpow_mul]
      norm_num
      all_goals norm_num
    have h23 : (9 : ℝ) ^ ((1 : ℝ) / 3) = 3 ^ (2 / 3 : ℝ) := by
      rw [show (9 : ℝ) = 3 ^ (2 : ℝ) by norm_num]
      rw [← Real.rpow_mul]
      norm_num
      all_goals norm_num
    rw [h21, h22, h23]
    rw [← Real.rpow_add, ← Real.rpow_add]
    rw [logb_rpow]
    all_goals norm_num
  rw [h2]
  norm_num

have h1' : (-a + b + c) ^ 3 = 1 := by calc
    _ = -(a^3 + 3 * a * b^2 + 3 * a * c^2 - 6 * a * b * c) + (b^3 + 3 * b * a^2 + 3 * b * c^2 - 6 * a * b * c) +
    (c^3 + 3 * c * a^2 + 3 * c * b^2 - 6 * a * b * c) := by ring
    _ = _ := by rw [h1, h2, h3]; norm_num
  rw [show (1:ℝ) = 1^3 by norm_num, pow_left_inj₀] at h1'

  have h2' : (a - b + c) ^ 3 = 1 := by calc
    _ = (a^3 + 3 * a * b^2 + 3 * a * c^2 - 6 * a * b * c) - (b^3 + 3 * b * a^2 + 3 * b * c^2 - 6 * a * b * c) +
    (c^3 + 3 * c * a^2 + 3 * c * b^2 - 6 * a * b * c) := by ring
    _ = _ := by rw [h1, h2, h3]; norm_num
  rw [show (1:ℝ) = 1^3 by norm_num, pow_left_inj₀] at h2'

  have h3' : (a + b - c) ^ 3 = 1 := by calc
    _ = (a^3 + 3 * a * b^2 + 3 * a * c^2 - 6 * a * b * c) + (b^3 + 3 * b * a^2 + 3 * b * c^2 - 6 * a * b * c) -
    (c^3 + 3 * c * a^2 + 3 * c * b^2 - 6 * a * b * c) := by ring
    _ = _ := by rw [h1, h2, h3]; norm_num
  rw [show (1:ℝ) = 1^3 by norm_num, pow_left_inj₀] at h3'

  simp; split_ands; any_goals linarith
  all_goals by_contra!; apply Odd.pow_neg (show Odd 3 by use 1; simp) at this; linarith

import Mathlib
set_option linter.unusedVariables false
theorem number_theory_639330 (M : ℕ) (hM : M > 1) :
  {n : ℕ | 1 ≤ n ∧ n < M ∧ ∃ (s : ℕ) (hs : s ≥ 1), ∃ (k : ℕ → ℕ),
  (∀ j < s, k j ≥ 1) ∧ ∃ P : ℕ → ℕ, P 0 = n ∧ (∀ i < s, P (i + 1) = P i + k i * (n - 1)) ∧ (∀ j < s, k j ≤ P j) ∧ P s = M}
  = {n : ℕ | ∃ d : ℕ, d > 0 ∧ d ∣ (M - 1) ∧ d < (M - 1) ∧ n = d + 1} := by

let SP := {n : ℕ | 1 ≤ n ∧ n < M ∧ ∃ (s : ℕ) (hs : s ≥ 1), ∃ (k : ℕ → ℕ),
    (∀ j < s, k j ≥ 1) ∧ ∃ P : ℕ → ℕ, P 0 = n ∧ (∀ i < s, P (i + 1) = P i + k i * (n - 1)) ∧ (∀ j < s, k j ≤ P j) ∧ P s = M}

  let SD := {n : ℕ | ∃ d : ℕ, d > 0 ∧ d ∣ (M - 1) ∧ d < (M - 1) ∧ n = d + 1}

  have h_subset : SP ⊆ SD := by
    intro n hn
    rcases hn with ⟨hn1, hnM, s, hs, k, hk1, P, hP0, hP_rec, hP_le, hPs⟩
    let K := ∑ i ∈ Finset.range s, k i
    have hK_ge1 : K ≥ 1 := by
      apply Finset.sum_pos (fun i hi => Nat.lt_of_succ_le (hk1 i (Finset.mem_range.mp hi)))
      exact Finset.nonempty_range_iff.mpr (Nat.not_eq_zero_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_succ_le hs))
    have hP : ∀ i ≤ s, P i = n + (∑ j ∈ Finset.range i, k j) * (n - 1) := by
      intro i hi
      induction' i with i ih
      · simp [hP0]
      · rw [hP_rec i (Nat.lt_of_succ_le hi)]
        rw [ih (Nat.le_of_succ_le hi)]
        rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
        ring

    have hM_eq : M = n + K * (n - 1) := by
      rw [← hPs]
      rw [hP s le_rfl]
    have hn_gt1 : n > 1 := by
      by_contra h_not
      have h_n1 : n = 1 := by linarith
      rw [h_n1] at hM_eq
      simp at hM_eq
      linarith
    let d := n - 1
    have hd_ge1 : d ≥ 1 := by omega

    have hM_d : M - 1 = d * (K + 1) := by
      unfold d
      rw [hM_eq]
      ring_nf
      omega
    have h_dvd : d ∣ (M - 1) := by
      rw [hM_d]
      exact dvd_mul_right d (K + 1)
    have hd_lt : d < M - 1 := by
      have hK_plus : K + 1 ≥ 2 := by linarith
      have h_div : d = (M - 1) / (K + 1) := by
        rw [hM_d]
        field_simp
      rw [h_div]
      nlinarith
    have hn_d : n = d + 1 := by simp [d];omega
    exact ⟨d, hd_ge1, h_dvd, hd_lt, hn_d⟩

  have h_superset : SD ⊆ SP := by
    intro n hn
    rcases hn with ⟨d, hd_ge1, h_dvd, hd_lt, hn_d⟩
    have hn1 : 1 ≤ n := by linarith
    have hnM : n < M := by omega
    have hJ_ge2 : ∃ J ≥ 2, M - 1 = J * d := by
      let J := (M - 1) / d
      have hJ_dvd : M - 1 = J * d := by
        unfold J
        exact (Nat.div_mul_cancel h_dvd).symm
      have hJ_ge2 : J ≥ 2 := by nlinarith
      exact ⟨J, hJ_ge2, hJ_dvd⟩
    rcases hJ_ge2 with ⟨J, hJ_ge2, hJ_dvd⟩
    let Ktot := J - 1
    have hKtot_ge1 : Ktot ≥ 1 := by omega
    let s := Ktot
    have hs_ge1 : s ≥ 1 := hKtot_ge1
    let k : ℕ → ℕ := fun _ => 1
    have hk1 : ∀ j < s, k j ≥ 1 := by intro j _; tauto
    let P : ℕ → ℕ := fun i => n + i * (n - 1)
    have hP0 : P 0 = n := by simp [P]
    have hP_rec : ∀ i < s, P (i + 1) = P i + k i * (n - 1) := by
      intro i _
      ring
    have hP_le : ∀ j < s, k j ≤ P j := by
      intro j hj
      simp [k, P]
      have hn_ge2 : n ≥ 2 := by linarith
      have hj_ge0 : j ≥ 0 := Nat.zero_le j
      nlinarith

    have hPs : P s = M := by
      simp [P]
      have hJ_dvd': M = J * d + 1 := by omega
      rw [hn_d, hJ_dvd']
      have h_s : s = J - 1 := rfl
      rw [h_s]
      norm_num
      rw [Nat.sub_mul, one_mul, ← Nat.add_sub_assoc (by nlinarith)]
      omega
    exact ⟨hn1, hnM, s, hs_ge1, k, hk1, P, hP0, hP_rec, hP_le, hPs⟩

  exact Set.eq_of_subset_of_subset h_subset h_superset

open Polynomial

theorem algebra_10570 {a c : ℝ} (ha : a ≠ 0)
  (h : (C a * X^2 + C 20 * X + C c).roots = {x1, x1})
  (h1 : a + c = 29) (h2 : a < c) : (a, c) = (4, 25) := by

have hquadratic_factor {a b c x1 x2 : ℝ} (hroots : (C a * X ^ 2 + C b * X + C c).roots = {x1, x2}) :
    C a * X ^ 2 + C b * X + C c = C a * (X - C x1) * (X - C x2) := by
      letI p : ℝ[X] := C a * X ^ 2 + C b * X + C c
      have hp_natDegree_eq_two : p.natDegree = 2 := by
        apply le_antisymm
        . exact natDegree_quadratic_le
        convert Polynomial.card_roots' p
        rw [hroots, Multiset.card_pair]
      have hp_natDegree_eq_roots_card : Multiset.card p.roots = p.natDegree := by
        rw [hroots, Multiset.card_pair, hp_natDegree_eq_two]
      haveI := C_leadingCoeff_mul_prod_multiset_X_sub_C hp_natDegree_eq_roots_card
      convert this.symm using 1
      rw [leadingCoeff, hp_natDegree_eq_two]
      simpa [p, hroots] using by ac_rfl

    have hquadratic_vieta {a b c x1 x2 : ℝ} (hroots : (C a * X ^ 2 + C b * X + C c).roots = {x1, x2}) :
        -a * (x1 + x2) = b ∧ a * x1 * x2 = c := by
        letI p : ℝ[X] := C a * X ^ 2 + C b * X + C c
        have hp_factor := hquadratic_factor hroots
        have hp_expand : C a * (X - C x1) * (X - C x2) = C a * X ^ 2 + C (-a * (x1 + x2)) * X + C (a * x1 * x2) := by
          simp only [C_neg, C_add, C_mul]
          ring
        constructor
        . apply_fun (·.coeff 1) at hp_factor
          convert hp_factor.symm
          simp [hp_expand]
          simp
        apply_fun (·.coeff 0) at hp_factor
        convert hp_factor.symm
        simp
        simp

    have ⟨c1, c2⟩ := hquadratic_vieta h
    replace c1 : a * x1 = -10 := by linarith
    have x1ne0 : x1 ≠ 0 := by
      intro x10; simp [x10] at c1
    rw [c1] at c2
    replace c1 : a = -10 / x1 := (eq_div_iff_mul_eq x1ne0).2 c1
    rw [c1, ←c2] at h1

    have c3 : 10 * x1^2 + 29 * x1 + 10 = 0 := by
      apply_fun (· * x1) at h1
      simp [add_mul, x1ne0] at h1
      nlinarith
    replace c3 : 10 * (x1 + 10/4) * (x1 + 4/10) = 0 := by nlinarith
    simp at c3

    rcases c3 with c3 | c3
    · -- Case1 : x1 = - 10 / 4 : Substitute x1 by -10/4 we get $a = 4$ and $c = 25$.
      have : x1 = - 10 / 4 := by linarith
      simp [this] at c1 c2
      ring_nf at c1 c2
      ext <;> simp [c1, c2]
    · -- Case2 : x1 = - 4 / 10 : Substitute x1 by -4/10 we get $a = 25$ and $c = 4$, which

      have : x1 = - 4 / 10 := by linarith
      simp [this] at c1 c2
      ring_nf at c1 c2
      simp [c1, ←c2] at h2
      norm_num at h2

theorem algebra_191362 (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : f = fun x => 2*x^6 - 3*x^5 + 3*x^4 + x^3 - 3*x^2 + 3*x - 1) :
    ∑ᶠ x ∈ {x | f x = 0}, x = -1/2 := by

have : {x | f x = 0} = ({1/2, -1} : Finset ℝ) := by
    ext x
    constructor <;> simp [hf] <;> rintro h

    . replace h : (x^2 - x + 1) ^ 2 * (2 * x^2 + x - 1) = 0 := by linear_combination h

      have : 0 < (x ^ 2 - x + 1) ^ 2 := by
        apply sq_pos_of_pos
        convert_to 0 < (x - 1/2)^2 + 3 / 4
        . ring
        positivity

      have : (x ^ 2 - x + 1) ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by linarith
      simp [this] at h

      replace h : (x - 1 / 2) * (x + 1) = 0 := by linear_combination h / 2
      simp at h
      rw [sub_eq_zero, ← eq_neg_iff_add_eq_zero] at h
      assumption

    . obtain rfl | rfl := h <;> norm_num

  rw [this]
  rw_mod_cast [finsum_mem_finset_eq_sum]
  rw [Finset.sum_pair]
  . push_cast
    norm_num
  . push_cast
    norm_num

theorem number_theory_95900 :
    Set.ncard {r : ℚ | 0 < r ∧ r < 1 ∧ r.num + r.den = 1000} = 200 := by

let f1 : ℚ → ℤ × ℕ := fun r => (r.num, r.den)
  have f1_inj : Function.Injective f1 := by
    intro r1 r2
    simp [f1]
    exact Rat.ext
  have f1_image : f1 '' {r : ℚ | 0 < r ∧ r < 1 ∧ r.num + r.den = 1000} = {(x, y) : ℤ × ℕ | 0 < x ∧ x < y ∧ x + y = 1000 ∧ Nat.Coprime (Int.natAbs x) y} := by
    ext ⟨n, d⟩
    simp
    constructor
    . rintro ⟨r, ⟨h1, h2, h3⟩, h4⟩
      simp [f1] at h4
      obtain ⟨hr1, hr2⟩ := h4
      rw [← hr1, ← hr2]
      and_intros
      any_goals simpa
      . qify
        rw [← div_lt_one (by simp [Rat.den_pos])]
        simpa [Rat.num_div_den r]
      . exact Rat.reduced r
    . rintro ⟨h1, h2, h3, h4⟩
      use Rat.mk' n d (by linarith) h4
      simp [f1, h3]
      and_intros
      . rw [← Rat.num_pos]
        simpa
      . rw [Rat.mk_eq_mkRat, Rat.mkRat_eq_div, div_lt_one (by norm_cast; linarith)]
        norm_cast
  rw [← Set.ncard_image_of_injective _ f1_inj, f1_image]

  let f2 : ℕ → ℤ × ℕ := fun x => (x, 1000 - x)
  have f2_inj : Function.Injective f2 := by
    rintro x1 x2
    simp [f2]
    intro h _
    exact h
  have f2_image : f2 '' ↑{x ∈ Finset.Ioo 0 500 | Nat.Coprime x 1000} = {(x, y) : ℤ × ℕ | 0 < x ∧ x < y ∧ x + y = 1000 ∧ Nat.Coprime (Int.natAbs x) y} := by
    ext ⟨x, y⟩
    simp [f2]
    constructor
    . rintro ⟨x', ⟨⟨⟨h1, h2⟩, h3⟩, h4, h5⟩⟩
      rw [← h4, ← h5, Int.ofNat_sub (show x' ≤ 1000 by linarith)]
      simp
      zify at h1 h2
      and_intros
      . linarith
      . rw [lt_tsub_iff_right]
        linarith
      . rw [Nat.Coprime, Nat.gcd_sub_self_right (show x' ≤ 1000 by linarith), h3]
    . rintro ⟨h1, h2, h3, h4⟩
      have : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
      use Int.natAbs x
      and_intros
      all_goals zify
      . rw [abs_of_pos h1]
        exact h1
      . rw [abs_of_pos h1]
        linarith
      . rw [show 1000 = Int.natAbs x + y by zify; rw [abs_of_pos h1, h3]]
        simpa
      . exact abs_of_pos h1
      . rw [Int.ofNat_sub (show (Int.natAbs x) ≤ 1000 by zify; rw [abs_of_pos h1]; linarith)]
        simp
        rw [abs_of_pos h1]
        linarith
  rw [← f2_image, Set.ncard_image_of_injective _ f2_inj, Set.ncard_coe_Finset]

  have reflect_range : {x ∈ Finset.Ioo 0 500 | Nat.Coprime x 1000}.card = {x ∈ Finset.Ioo 500 1000 | Nat.Coprime x 1000}.card := by
    let f : ℕ → ℕ := fun x => 1000 - x
    have f_inj : Set.InjOn f {x ∈ Finset.Ioo 0 500 | Nat.Coprime x 1000} := by
      simp [f]
      intro x1 ⟨⟨_, _⟩, _⟩ x2 ⟨⟨_, _⟩, _⟩
      zify
      rw [Int.ofNat_sub (show x1 ≤ 1000 by linarith)]
      rw [Int.ofNat_sub (show x2 ≤ 1000 by linarith)]
      simp
    have f_image : f '' {x ∈ Finset.Ioo 0 500 | Nat.Coprime x 1000} = {x ∈ Finset.Ioo 500 1000 | Nat.Coprime x 1000} := by
      ext x
      simp [f]
      constructor
      . rintro ⟨x', ⟨⟨_, _⟩, h⟩, hx⟩
        and_intros
        . omega
        . omega
        . rw [← hx, Nat.Coprime, Nat.gcd_self_sub_left (show x' ≤ 1000 by linarith), h]
      . rintro ⟨⟨_, _⟩, h⟩
        use 1000 - x
        and_intros
        . omega
        . omega
        . rw [Nat.Coprime, Nat.gcd_self_sub_left (show x ≤ 1000 by linarith), h]
        . omega
    rw [← Set.ncard_coe_Finset, ← Set.ncard_coe_Finset, ← f_image, Set.ncard_image_of_injOn f_inj]
    simp

  suffices : {x ∈ Finset.range 1000 | Nat.Coprime x 1000}.card = 400
  . have eq : {x ∈ Finset.range 1000 | Nat.Coprime x 1000}.card = {x ∈ Finset.Ioo 0 500 | Nat.Coprime x 1000}.card * 2 := by
      rw [Finset.range_eq_Ico, ← Finset.Ico_union_Ico_eq_Ico (show 0 ≤ 500 by norm_num) (show 500 ≤ 1000 by norm_num),
        Finset.filter_union, Finset.card_union_of_disjoint (Finset.disjoint_filter_filter (Finset.Ico_disjoint_Ico_consecutive _ _ _)),
        ← Finset.Ioo_insert_left (show 0 < 500 by norm_num), ← Finset.Ioo_insert_left (show 500 < 1000 by norm_num),
        Finset.filter_insert, Finset.filter_insert]
      simp [show ¬(Nat.Coprime 0 1000) by norm_num, show ¬(Nat.Coprime 500 1000) by norm_num]
      rw [reflect_range, mul_two]
    rw [this] at eq
    linarith
  rw [Finset.filter_congr (fun x _ => Nat.coprime_comm), ← Nat.totient_eq_card_coprime]

  rw [show 1000 = 2^3 * 5^3 by norm_num, Nat.totient_mul (show Nat.Coprime (2 ^ 3) (5 ^ 3) by norm_num),
    Nat.totient_prime_pow (show Nat.Prime 2 by norm_num) (show 0 < 3 by norm_num),
    Nat.totient_prime_pow (show Nat.Prime 5 by norm_num) (show 0 < 3 by norm_num)]
  simp

open Finset
def allTuples : List (List ℕ) :=
  List.range 5 >>= fun a1 =>
  List.range 5 >>= fun a2 =>
  List.range 5 >>= fun a3 =>
  List.range 5 >>= fun a4 =>
  List.range 5 >>= fun a5 =>
    [ [a1 + 1, a2 + 1, a3 + 1, a4 + 1, a5 + 1] ]
def isAP (a b c : ℕ) : Bool :=
  a + c = 2 * b ∨ b + c = 2 * a ∨ a + b = 2 * c
def isPerfect (t : List ℕ) : Bool :=
  (t.enum.sublistsLen 3).all (λ l =>
    match l with
    | [(_, a), (_, b), (_, c)] => !isAP a b c
    | _ => true)
theorem combinatorics_609295: (allTuples.filter isPerfect).length = 780 := by
native_decide

rw [h₂] at h₀ h₁

theorem number_theory_162753 (a : ℕ → ℝ) (hpos : ∀ k : ℕ, a k > 0) (h : ∀ k : ℕ, a (k + 1) ≥ (k + 1) * a k / (a k ^ 2 + k)) : ∀ n : ℕ, ∑ i in Finset.range (n + 2), a i ≥ n + 2 := by

intro n
  induction n with

  | zero =>
    simp [Finset.sum_range_succ]
    specialize h 0
    simp at h
    have g1:= hpos 0

    rw [show a 0 / a 0 ^ 2 = 1 / a 0 by field_simp ; ring_nf] at h

    suffices a 0 + 1 / a 0 - 2 ≥ 0 by linarith

    rw [show a 0 + 1 / a 0 - 2 = (a 0 - 1) ^ 2 / a 0 by field_simp ; ring_nf]
    positivity

  | succ n ih =>

    have h1 : ∀ k : ℕ, ∑ i in Finset.range k, a i ≥ k / a k:= by
      intro k
      induction k with

      | zero =>
        simp

      | succ k ih =>
        rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
        simp at ih ⊢
        specialize h k
        have g1:= hpos k

        have g3 : a k ^ 2 + ↑k > 0:= by positivity

        replace h : a (k + 1) * (a k ^ 2 + ↑k) ≥ (↑k + 1) * a k:= by exact (mul_inv_le_iff₀ g3).mp h
        replace h : a k ^ 2 + ↑k ≥ (↑k + 1) * a k / a (k + 1):= by exact (div_le_iff₀' (hpos (k + 1))).mpr h
        rw [show (↑k + 1) * a k / a (k + 1) = (↑k + 1) / a (k + 1) * a k by ring] at h
        replace h : (a k ^ 2 + k) / a k ≥ (↑k + 1) / a (k + 1):= by exact (le_div_iff₀ (hpos k)).mpr h

        rw [show (a k ^ 2 + k) / a k = a k + k / a k by field_simp ; ring_nf] at h
        linarith
    simp

    rw [show n + 1 + 2 = n + 2 + 1 by ring]
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
    simp at ih

    specialize h1 (n + 2)

    set x:= ∑ i in Finset.range (n + 2), a i with hx
    clear_value x
    simp at h1

    replace h1 : n + 2 ≤ x * a (n + 2):= by exact (mul_inv_le_iff₀ (hpos (n + 2))).mp h1
    have g1 : x > 0:= by linarith
    replace h1 : a (n + 2) ≥ (n + 2) / x:= by exact (div_le_iff₀' g1).mpr h1

    suffices x + (n + 2) / x - (n + 3) ≥ 0 by linarith
    rw [show x + (n + 2) / x - (n + 3) = (x - 1) * (x - (n + 2)) / x by field_simp ; ring_nf]

    replace ih : x - (n + 2) ≥ 0:= by linarith
    have g2 : x - 1 > 0:= by linarith
    positivity

theorem number_theory_8793_1 :
  ¬ ∃ a : ℕ → ℕ, ∀ i j, i < j → Nat.gcd (a i + j) (a j + i) = 1 := by
    intro ⟨a, ha⟩
    have aux1 : ∀ a b : ℕ, Even a → a.gcd b = 1 → Odd b := by sorry
    have aux2 : ∀ a b : ℕ, Even b → a.gcd b = 1 → Odd a := by sorry
    rcases Nat.even_or_odd (a 1) with evena1 | odda1
    ·
      have h1 : ∀ j, j ≠ 0 → Even j → Even (a j) := by sorry
      obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := h1 2 (by omega) (by decide)
      obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := h1 4 (by omega) (by decide)
      have c1 := sorry
      have h2 : 2 ∣ a 2 + 4 := sorry
      have h4 : 2 ∣ a 4 + 2 := sorry
      have := sorry
      tauto
    ·
      have even3 : Even (a 3) := by sorry
      have even2 : Even (a 2) := by sorry
      have even4 : Even (a 4) := by sorry
      have h := sorry
      have := sorry
      have odda4 : Odd (a 4) := sorry
      exact Nat.not_odd_iff_even.2 even4 odda4
theorem number_theory_8793_2 {p : ℕ} (hp : Odd p) (hp1 : Nat.Prime p) :
  ∃ a : ℕ → ℕ, ∀ i j, 0 < i → i < j → ¬ p ∣ Nat.gcd (a i + j) (a j + i) := by

intro ⟨a, ha⟩
    have aux1 : ∀ a b : ℕ, Even a → a.gcd b = 1 → Odd b := by
      intro a b evena hab
      by_contra! evenb
      simp at evenb
      have := hab ▸ Nat.dvd_gcd (even_iff_two_dvd.mp evena) (even_iff_two_dvd.mp evenb)
      tauto
    have aux2 : ∀ a b : ℕ, Even b → a.gcd b = 1 → Odd a := by
      intro a b evenb hab
      rw [Nat.gcd_comm] at hab
      exact aux1 b a evenb hab

    rcases Nat.even_or_odd (a 1) with evena1 | odda1
    · -- an Auxiliary lemma : if $a_1$  is even, for any postive even number $j$,

      have h1 : ∀ j, j ≠ 0 → Even j → Even (a j) := by
        intro j jpos evenj
        have h1 : 1 < j := by
          have : 1 ≠ j := fun h => ((show ¬ Even 1 by decide) <| h ▸ evenj)
          omega
        have h2 := ha 1 j h1
        have h3 : Odd (a j + 1) := by
          have h3 : Even (a 1 + j) := by exact Even.add evena1 evenj
          exact aux1 (a 1 + j) (a j + 1) h3 h2
        exact (Nat.even_sub' (show 1 ≤ a j + 1 by omega)).2 (by simp [h3])

      obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := h1 2 (by omega) (by decide)
      obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := h1 4 (by omega) (by decide)
      have c1 := ha 2 4 (by decide)

      have h2 : 2 ∣ a 2 + 4 := ⟨m + 2, by omega⟩
      have h4 : 2 ∣ a 4 + 2 := ⟨n + 1, by omega⟩
      have := c1 ▸ Nat.dvd_gcd h2 h4
      tauto

    · -- $a_1$  is odd then  $gcd(a_1+3,a_{3}+1)=1$, so  $a_{3}$ is even.
      have even3 : Even (a 3) := by
        have := ha 1 3 (by omega)
        have : Odd (a 3 + 1) := by
          have h1 : Even (a 1 + 3) := Nat.even_add'.mpr (by simp [odda1]; decide)
          exact aux1 (a 1 + 3) (a 3 + 1) h1 this
        obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := this
        exact ⟨k, by omega⟩

      have even2 : Even (a 2) := by
        have := ha 2 3 (by omega)
        have h1 : Even (a 3 + 2) := by refine Nat.even_add.mpr (by simpa)
        have h2 := aux2 (a 2 + 3) (a 3 + 2) h1 this
        exact (Nat.even_sub' (show 3 ≤ a 2 + 3 by omega)).2 (by simp [h2]; decide)

      have even4 : Even (a 4) := by
        have := ha 3 4 (by omega)
        have h1 : Even (a 3 + 4) := Nat.even_add.2 (by simp [even3]; decide)
        have h2 := aux1 (a 3 + 4) (a 4 + 3) h1 this
        exact (Nat.even_sub' (show 3 ≤ a 4 + 3 by omega)).2 (by simp [h2]; decide)

      have h := ha 2 4 (by omega)
      have := aux1 (a 2 + 4) (a 4 + 2) (Nat.even_add.2 (by simp [even2]; decide)) h
      have odda4 : Odd (a 4) := (Nat.odd_sub (show 2 ≤ a 4 + 2 by omega)).2 (by simp [this])
      exact Nat.not_odd_iff_even.2 even4 odda4

theorem number_theory_8793_2 {p : ℕ} (hp : Odd p) (hp1 : Nat.Prime p) :
  ∃ a : ℕ → ℕ, ∀ i j, 0 < i → i < j → ¬ p ∣ Nat.gcd (a i + j) (a j + i) := by

    use (fun i => i * p + 1 - i)

    intro i j ipos hij h

    have h1 := Nat.dvd_gcd_iff.1 h

    have h2 : i - j ≡ 1 [ZMOD p] := by
      apply Int.modEq_of_dvd
      rw [←sub_add]
      zify at h1
      rw [Nat.cast_sub] at h1
      simp at h1
      convert Int.dvd_sub h1.1 (show (p : ℤ) ∣ i * p from Int.dvd_mul_left ↑i ↑p) using 1
      ring
      exact le_of_lt (( (Nat.lt_mul_iff_one_lt_right (by omega)).mpr (
        Nat.Prime.one_lt hp1)).trans (by omega))

    have h3 : i - j ≡ -1 [ZMOD p] := by
      apply Int.modEq_of_dvd
      rw [←Int.dvd_neg]
      simp
      zify at h1
      nth_rw 2 [Nat.cast_sub] at h1
      simp at h1
      convert Int.dvd_sub h1.2 (show (p : ℤ) ∣ j * p from Int.dvd_mul_left j p) using 1
      ring
      exact le_of_lt (( (Nat.lt_mul_iff_one_lt_right (by omega)).mpr (
        Nat.Prime.one_lt hp1)).trans (by omega))

    have := h3.symm.trans h2
    have := Int.ModEq.dvd this
    simp at this
    norm_cast at this
    have := Nat.le_of_dvd (by omega) this
    have : 2 ≤ p := by exact Nat.Prime.two_le hp1
    have : p ≠ 2 := fun h => (by have := h ▸ hp; tauto)
    omega

import Mathlib

theorem inequalities_602070 (a b c : ℝ) (ha : 0 ≤ a) (hb : 0 ≤ b) (hc : 0 ≤ c)
    (hsum : a + b + c = 3) :
    3 ≤ (a + b) / (1 + b) + (b + c) / (1 + c) + (c + a) / (1 + a) := by

have h1 : 1 + a > 0 := by linarith
  have h2 : 1 + b > 0 := by linarith
  have h3 : 1 + c > 0 := by linarith

  have h : (a + b) / (1 + b) + (b + c) / (1 + c) + (c + a) / (1 + a) - 3 ≥ 0 := by

    have h4 : (a + b) / (1 + b) + (b + c) / (1 + c) + (c + a) / (1 + a) - 3 =
        ((a + b) * (1 + c) * (1 + a) + (b + c) * (1 + a) * (1 + b) + (c + a) * (1 + b) * (1 + c) - 3 * (1 + a) * (1 + b) * (1 + c)) /
        ((1 + a) * (1 + b) * (1 + c)) := by

      field_simp
      ring

    rw [h4]

    apply div_nonneg

    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a), sq_nonneg (a - 1), sq_nonneg (b - 1), sq_nonneg (c - 1),
      hsum, mul_nonneg ha hb, mul_nonneg hb hc, mul_nonneg ha hc]

    positivity

  linarith

open Real List
lemma l1 (n:ℕ): 3 ∣ 10^(n+1) - 1 := by sorry

lemma l2 (n : ℕ):
  @Nat.ofDigits ℝ Ring.toSemiring 10 (replicate (n) 1) = ((10^n-1)/9) := by sorry

lemma l3 (n : ℕ):
  @Nat.ofDigits ℝ semiring 10 (replicate n 7) = ((10^n-1)/(9:ℝ)) * 7 := by sorry

theorem number_theory_24605
(a : ℕ → ℝ)
(
ha: ∀ n, a n =
(
Nat.ofDigits (10) ((replicate (n+2) 1) ++ [8] ++ (replicate (n+1) 7) ++ [0] ++ (replicate (n+1) 1))
)
/ (3 : ℝ)
):
  ∀ n, ∃ m:ℕ, a n = m^3 := by

induction' n with n hn

  simp
  use 3

  obtain ⟨d,hd⟩ := hn
  use (10*d+3)
  rw [pow_succ]

  have : 1 ≤ 10^(n+1) := by exact Nat.one_le_pow' (n + 1) 9
  have : 10 ^ (n + 1) = 3*d + 1 := by omega
  rw [this]
  omega

lemma l2 (n : ℕ):
  @Nat.ofDigits ℝ Ring.toSemiring 10 (replicate (n) 1) = ((10^n-1)/9) := by

  induction' n with n hn
  simp
  norm_cast

  have : replicate (n + 1) 1 = 1 :: replicate n 1 := by
    exact rfl
  rw [this]
  norm_cast
  rw [Nat.ofDigits_cons]
  norm_cast at hn
  simp
  rw [hn]
  rify
  ring_nf

lemma l3 (n : ℕ):
  @Nat.ofDigits ℝ semiring 10 (replicate n 7) = ((10^n-1)/(9:ℝ)) * 7 := by

  induction' n with n hn
  simp
  norm_cast

  have : replicate (n + 1) 7 = 7 :: replicate n 7 := by
    exact rfl
  rw [this]
  norm_cast
  rw [Nat.ofDigits_cons]
  norm_cast at hn
  simp
  rw [hn]
  rify
  ring_nf

theorem number_theory_24605
(a : ℕ → ℝ)
(
ha: ∀ n, a n =
(
Nat.ofDigits (10) ((replicate (n+2) 1) ++ [8] ++ (replicate (n+1) 7) ++ [0] ++ (replicate (n+1) 1))
)
/ (3 : ℝ)
):
  ∀ n, ∃ m:ℕ, a n = m^3 := by

  intro n
  specialize ha n

  have eq : Nat.ofDigits (10) ((replicate (n+2) 1) ++ [8] ++ (replicate (n+1) 7) ++ [0] ++ (replicate (n+1) 1)) =
  (10^(3*(n+1)+3) - 10^(2*(n+1)+3)) / (9:ℝ) + 7 * ( (10^(2*(n+1)+2) - 10^(n+1+1)) / (9:ℝ)) +  (10^(n+1+2)-1)/ (9:ℝ):= by
    norm_cast
    rw [Nat.ofDigits_append]
    rw [Nat.ofDigits_append]
    rw [Nat.ofDigits_append]
    rw [Nat.ofDigits_append]
    simp
    rify

    have t1: Nat.ofDigits 10 (replicate (n + 2) 1) = (10^(n + 2)-1) / (9:ℝ) := by apply l2 (n+2)
    have t2: @Nat.ofDigits ℝ semiring 10 (replicate (n + 1) 7) = (10^(n + 1)-1) / (9:ℝ) * 7 := by apply l3 (n+1)
    have t3: Nat.ofDigits 10 (replicate (n + 1) 1) = (10^(n + 1)-1) / (9:ℝ) := by apply l2 (n+1)
    rw [t1,t2,t3]
    field_simp
    ring_nf

  rw [eq] at ha

  have eq2: a n = (10^(3*(n+1)+3) - 3*10^(2*(n+1)+2) + 3*10^(n+1+1) -1) / (27:ℝ) := by
    rw [ha]
    field_simp
    ring_nf
  have eq3: a n = ((10^(n+1+1) - 1) / (3:ℝ))^3 := by
    rw [eq2]
    ring_nf

  have dd : (3:ℕ) ∣ (10^(n+1+1) - 1) := by
    apply l1

  obtain ⟨m,hm⟩ := dd
  use m
  have eq4: @Nat.cast ℝ instNatCast m = (10^(n+1+1) - 1) / (3:ℝ) := by
    rify at hm
    field_simp at hm ⊢
    rw [hm]
    ring

  rw [eq4]
  exact eq3

import Mathlib
lemma le_three_mul_of_sub_dvd_add {a b : ℕ} (ha : a ≠ 0) (hab : a < b)
    (h_dvd : b - a ∣ b + a) : b ≤ 3 * a := by sorry

theorem number_theory_184865 (a b c : ℕ) (hab : a < b) (hbc : b < c)
    (hab_dvd : b - a ∣ b + a) (hbc_dvd : c - b ∣ c + b)
    (ha_digits : (Nat.digits 10 a).length = 2011)
    (hb_digits : (Nat.digits 10 (b - 2012)).length = 2012) :
    (Nat.digits 10 c).length = 2012 := by

replace ha : 0 < a := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero ha
  suffices b - a ≤ 2 * a by
    convert Nat.sub_le_iff_le_add.mp this using 1
    ring
  calc _
  _ ≤ (b + a) - (b - a) := by
    have : b - a ∣ (b + a) - (b - a) := Nat.dvd_sub' h_dvd (Nat.dvd_refl (b - a))
    refine Nat.le_of_dvd ?_ this
    refine Nat.sub_pos_iff_lt.mpr ?_
    refine Nat.lt_add_right a ?_
    exact Nat.sub_lt_self ha hab.le
  _ = _ := by rw [two_mul, Nat.add_sub_sub_cancel hab.le]

theorem number_theory_184865 (a b c : ℕ) (hab : a < b) (hbc : b < c)
    (hab_dvd : b - a ∣ b + a) (hbc_dvd : c - b ∣ c + b)
    (ha_digits : (Nat.digits 10 a).length = 2011)
    (hb_digits : (Nat.digits 10 (b - 2012)).length = 2012) :
    (Nat.digits 10 c).length = 2012 := by

  revert ha_digits hb_digits
  suffices ∀ k ≠ 0, (Nat.digits 10 a).length = k → (Nat.digits 10 (b - (k + 1))).length = k + 1 →
      (Nat.digits 10 c).length = k + 1 from this 2011 (by norm_num)
  intro k hk ha_digits hb_digits

  have ha : a ≠ 0 := by
    refine mt (fun ha ↦ ?_) hk
    simpa [ha] using ha_digits.symm
  have ha_pos : 0 < a := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero ha
  have hb_pos : 0 < b := ha_pos.trans hab
  have hc_pos : 0 < c := hb_pos.trans hbc

  rw [Nat.digits_len 10 _ (by norm_num) (Nat.not_eq_zero_of_lt hbc), Nat.add_left_inj]
  rw [Nat.log_eq_iff (.inl hk)]

  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩

  · suffices k ≤ Nat.log 10 b from le_trans (Nat.pow_le_of_le_log hb_pos.ne' this) hbc.le

    have hb' : b - (k + 1) ≠ 0 := fun hb ↦ by simp [hb] at hb_digits
    rw [Nat.digits_len 10 _ (by norm_num) hb', add_left_inj] at hb_digits
    rw [← hb_digits]
    refine Nat.log_monotone ?_
    simp

  · rw [Nat.digits_len 10 _ (by norm_num) ha_pos.ne'] at ha_digits
    calc _

    _ ≤ 3 * b := le_three_mul_of_sub_dvd_add hb_pos.ne' hbc hbc_dvd
    _ ≤ 3 * (3 * a) := by
      gcongr
      exact le_three_mul_of_sub_dvd_add ha_pos.ne' hab hab_dvd
    _ = 9 * a := by ring
    _ < 10 * a := by
      gcongr
      norm_num

    _ < 10 * 10 ^ k := by
      suffices a < 10 ^ k by gcongr
      exact Nat.lt_pow_of_log_lt (by norm_num) ha_digits.le
    _ = 10 ^ (k + 1) := by ring

open Real

theorem algebra_21059 {f : ℝ → ℝ} (hf : f = fun x => 1 / (x - 3)) :
    IsGreatest {x | x = 3 ∨ f x = 3} (10 / 3) := by

constructor

  right
  rw [hf]
  ring

  intro x xin
  simp only [hf, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at xin
  if hx : x = 3 then
    rw [hx]
    norm_num
  else
    simp only [hx, false_or] at xin
    have neq : x - 3 ≠ 0 := by
      by_contra contra
      apply eq_of_sub_eq_zero at contra
      contradiction
    field_simp at xin
    linarith

set_option maxRecDepth 4000

open Finset Classical

theorem number_theory_611345 : #{n ∈ Ico 1 2005 | ∃ x : ℝ, 0 < x ∧ n = ⌊x * ⌊x⌋₊⌋₊} = 990 := by

let f : ℕ × ℕ → ℕ := fun (x, y) => x ^ 2 + y

  have fimg : image f ({P ∈ Icc 1 44 ×ˢ range 45 | P.2 < P.1}) =
  {n ∈ Ico 1 2005 | ∃ x : ℝ, 0 < x ∧ n = ⌊x * ⌊x⌋₊⌋₊} := by

    simp [Finset.ext_iff, f, and_assoc]; intro n; constructor

    · rintro ⟨a, age, ale, b, _, blt, hab⟩; split_ands
      · suffices : 1 ^ 2 ≤ a ^ 2; omega
        gcongr
      · rw [← hab]; calc
          _ ≤ 44 ^ 2 + a := by gcongr
          _ ≤ 44 ^ 2 + 44 := by gcongr
          _ < _ := by norm_num

      use b / a + a; constructor
      · positivity
      rw [Nat.floor_add_nat]; nth_rw 2 [Nat.floor_eq_zero.mpr]
      field_simp; norm_cast
      rw [Nat.floor_natCast, ← hab]; ring
      rw [div_lt_iff₀, one_mul]; norm_cast
      all_goals positivity

    rintro ⟨nge, nltm, ⟨x, xpos, hx⟩⟩
    nth_rw 1 [← Int.floor_add_fract x] at hx
    rw [add_mul] at hx; have : ⌊x⌋ = ⌊x⌋₊ := by
      rw [← Int.floor_toNat, Int.toNat_of_nonneg]
      rw [Int.le_floor]; simp; positivity
    rw [this] at hx; norm_cast at hx
    rw [add_comm, Nat.floor_add_nat, ← pow_two] at hx
    have flle : ⌊x⌋₊ ≤ 44 := by
      rw [← Nat.lt_add_one_iff]; norm_num
      rw [← Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_left (show 2≠0 by simp)]
      omega

    use ⌊x⌋₊; split_ands
    · by_contra!; rw [Nat.lt_one_iff] at this
      simp [this] at hx; omega
    · exact flle
    use ⌊Int.fract x * ↑⌊x⌋₊⌋₊; split_ands
    · calc
        _ ≤ ⌊(1 : ℝ) * ⌊x⌋₊⌋₊ := by
          apply Nat.floor_le_floor; gcongr
          linarith only [Int.fract_lt_one x]
        _ < _ := by rw [one_mul, Nat.floor_natCast]; omega
    · rw [Nat.floor_lt, mul_lt_iff_lt_one_left]
      exact Int.fract_lt_one x
      · by_contra!; norm_cast at this
        rw [Nat.le_zero] at this; simp [this] at hx
        omega
      apply mul_nonneg; apply Int.fract_nonneg
      positivity
    · rw [hx]; ring
    apply mul_nonneg; apply Int.fract_nonneg
    positivity

  have finj : Set.InjOn f (filter (fun P => P.2 < P.1) (Icc 1 44 ×ˢ range 45)) := by
    rintro ⟨x, y⟩; simp [f]; intro xge xle _ ylt
    intro x' y' x'ge x'le _ y'lt heq
    by_contra!; by_cases h : x = x'
    · rw [h, add_left_cancel_iff] at heq
      specialize this h; contradiction
    rw [← ne_eq, ne_iff_lt_or_gt] at h
    rcases h with h|h
    · have : x ^ 2 < x' ^ 2 := by gcongr
      symm at heq; rw [← Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add'] at heq
      rw [Nat.sub_add_comm, Nat.sq_sub_sq] at heq
      suffices : y < (x' + x) * (x' - x) + y'; omega
      calc
        _ = (0 + y) * 1 + 0 := by simp
        _ ≤ (0 + y) * (x' - x) + y' := by gcongr; all_goals omega
        _ < _ := by gcongr; all_goals omega
      all_goals omega
    have : x' ^ 2 < x ^ 2 := by gcongr
    rw [← Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add'] at heq
    rw [Nat.sub_add_comm, Nat.sq_sub_sq] at heq
    suffices : y' < (x + x') * (x - x') + y; omega
    calc
      _ = (y' + 0) * 1 + 0 := by simp
      _ ≤ (y' + 0) * (x - x') + y := by gcongr; all_goals omega
      _ < _ := by gcongr; all_goals omega
    all_goals omega

  rw [← fimg, card_image_of_injOn finj]; decide

import Mathlib
import Mathlib.Analysis.SpecificLimits.Normed
open Real
open Nat
theorem AIME_Algebra_720
  (s1 s2 : ℕ → ℝ)
  (hs1 : Summable s1)
  (hs2 : Summable s2)
  (hs1D : ∃ a r, s1 = fun n => a * (r ^ n))
  (hs2D : ∃ a r, s2 = fun n => a * (r ^ n))
  (hs1Eq : ∑' n, s1 n = 1)
  (hs2Eq : ∑' n, s2 n = 1)
  (hs1_2 : s1 2 = 1 / 8)
  (hEq : s1 1 = s2 1)
  (m n p : ℕ)
  (hm : m ≠ 1)
  (hp : p ≠ 0)
  (hvm : ∀ v, v.Prime → ¬ (v^2 ∣ m))
  (hmnp : (s1 1 = (√(m : ℝ) - n) / p))
  : 100 * m + 10 * n + p = 518 := by

set x := s1 1
  have hx : x = s1 1 := rfl
  let ⟨a1, r1, h1⟩ := hs1D
  let ⟨a2, r2, h2⟩ := hs2D

  have a1_ne_0 : a1 ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra ha
    conv at hs1Eq =>
      arg 1
      arg 1
      rw [((Set.eqOn_univ (fun n ↦ s1 n) (fun n ↦ 0)).mp (fun x hx =>
        (by
          whnf
          rw [h1, ha]
          simp only [zero_mul]
          : s1 x = 0)))]
    rw [tsum_zero] at hs1Eq
    exact zero_ne_one hs1Eq
  have a2_ne_0 : a2 ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra ha
    conv at hs2Eq =>
      arg 1
      arg 1
      rw [((Set.eqOn_univ (fun n ↦ s2 n) (fun n ↦ 0)).mp (fun x hx =>
        (by
          whnf
          rw [h2, ha]
          simp only [zero_mul]
          : s2 x = 0)))]
    rw [tsum_zero] at hs2Eq
    exact zero_ne_one hs2Eq

  have hP1 n : s1 (n + 1) = (s1 n) * r1 := by
    rw [h1]
    simp only
    rw [pow_add, pow_one, mul_assoc]

  have hQ1 n (hn : s1 n ≠ 0) : r1 = (s1 (n + 1)) / s1 n := by
    rw [hP1]
    exact Eq.symm (mul_div_cancel_left₀ r1 hn)

  have hP2 n : s2 (n + 1) = (s2 n) * r2 := by
    rw [h2]
    simp only
    rw [pow_add, pow_one, mul_assoc]

  have hQ2 n (hn : s2 n ≠ 0) : r2 = (s2 (n + 1)) / s2 n := by
    rw [hP2]
    exact Eq.symm (mul_div_cancel_left₀ r2 hn)

  have r1_ne_0 : r1 ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra hr1
    rw [h1, hr1] at hs1_2
    simp only [ne_eq, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true, zero_pow, mul_zero, one_div,
      zero_eq_inv, OfNat.zero_ne_ofNat] at hs1_2

  have s1_ne_0 n : s1 n ≠ 0 := by
    rw [h1]
    have : r1 ^ n ≠ 0 := by exact pow_ne_zero n r1_ne_0
    exact mul_ne_zero a1_ne_0 this

  have s10_eq_a1 : s1 0 = a1 := by
    rw [h1]
    simp only
    simp only [pow_zero, mul_one]

  have hr1 : r1 = 1 / (8 * x) := by
    rw [hQ1 1 (s1_ne_0 1)]
    have : 1 + 1 = 2 := by exact rfl
    rw [this, hs1_2, div_div]

  have ha1 : a1 = 8 * x * x := by
    suffices h : s1 2 = 1 / 8 from by
      have : 2 = 0 + 1 + 1 := by rfl
      rw [this, hP1, hP1, h1] at h
      simp only [pow_zero, mul_one, one_div] at h
      rw [hr1] at h
      apply_fun (·* (8 * x)) at h
      rw [mul_assoc _ _ (8 * x)] at h
      have  : (1 / (8 * x)) * (8 * x) = 1 := by
        refine one_div_mul_cancel ?_
        simp only [ne_eq, mul_eq_zero, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, false_or]
        have : x ≠ 0 := by rw [hx]; exact s1_ne_0 1
        simp only [ne_eq, _root_.mul_eq_zero, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, false_or]
        exact this
      rw [this, mul_one] at h
      apply_fun (·* (8 * x)) at h
      rw [mul_assoc, this, mul_one] at h
      simp only [isUnit_iff_ne_zero, ne_eq, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true,
        IsUnit.inv_mul_cancel_left] at h
      rw [mul_comm] at h
      exact h
    exact hs1_2
  rw [h1] at hs1

  let s := fun n => r1 ^ n
  have hSS : Summable s := (summable_mul_left_iff a1_ne_0).mp hs1
  have r1_norm : ‖r1‖ < 1 := summable_geometric_iff_norm_lt_one.mp hSS

  have e1: 8 * x * x * (1 - 1 / (8 * x))⁻¹ = 1 := by
    rw [h1] at hs1Eq
    rw [tsum_mul_left, tsum_geometric_of_norm_lt_one] at hs1Eq
    rw [hr1, ha1] at hs1Eq
    exact hs1Eq
    exact r1_norm

  have x_ne_0: x ≠ 0 := by unfold x; exact s1_ne_0 1

  have : (4 * x - 1) * (16 * x * x + 4 * x - 1) = 0 := by
    apply_fun (· * (1 - 1 / (8 * x))) at e1
    rw [mul_assoc] at e1
    have : ((1 - 1 / (8 * x))⁻¹ * (1 - 1 / (8 * x))) = 1 := by
      refine IsUnit.inv_mul_cancel ?_
      have x8_ne_1: 8 * x ≠ 1 := by
        by_contra h
        apply_fun ((1/8) *·) at h
        rw [← mul_assoc] at h
        ring_nf at h
        rw [h] at hr1
        ring_nf at hr1
        rw [hr1] at r1_norm
        rw [norm_one, lt_self_iff_false] at r1_norm
        exact r1_norm

      have : (1 - 1 / (8 * x)) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        apply_fun (· + (1 / (8 * x))) at h
        rw [sub_add] at h
        rw [sub_self, sub_zero, zero_add] at h
        apply_fun (· * (8 * x)) at h
        have : 8 * x ≠ 0 := by
          unfold x;
          by_contra h;
          apply_fun ((1/8) *·) at h
          rw [← mul_assoc] at h
          ring_nf at h
          exact s1_ne_0 1 h
        rw [one_div_mul_cancel this, one_mul] at h
        exact x8_ne_1 h
      exact Ne.isUnit this
    rw [this] at e1
    apply_fun (x * ·) at e1
    ring_nf at e1
    have : x * x⁻¹ = 1 := by
      exact mul_inv_cancel₀ (s1_ne_0 1)
    rw [this] at e1
    apply_fun (. - (x + 1 * (-1 / 8))) at e1
    ring_nf at e1
    apply_fun (. * 8) at e1
    group at e1
    have : 1 - x * 8 + x ^ 3 * 64 = (4 * x - 1) * (16 * x * x + 4 * x - 1) := by linarith
    rw [← this]
    exact e1

  have : (4 * x - 1) = 0 ∨ (16 * x * x + 4 * x - 1) = 0 := by
    exact mul_eq_zero.mp this

  cases' this with h h

  . have : x = 1/4 := by linarith
    rw [this] at hmnp
    have (m n p : ℕ) (hmN1 : m ≠ 1) (hP : p ≠ 0) (hmp : ∀ v, v.Prime → ¬ (v^2 ∣ m))
      (h : 1 / 4 = (√(m : ℝ) - n) / p) : False := by
      apply_fun (· * 4) at h
      rw [div_mul, div_self, one_div_one] at h
      apply_fun (· * ↑p) at h
      rw [one_mul, mul_assoc, mul_comm 4, ← mul_assoc, div_mul, div_self, div_one] at h
      have hIm: Irrational √m := by
        refine irrational_sqrt_natCast_iff.mpr ?_
        by_contra hm
        contrapose hmp
        push_neg
        obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ := hm
        have : s ≠ 1 := by
          by_contra h
          rw [h, one_mul] at hs
          exact hmN1 hs
        obtain ⟨p, ⟨hp, hd⟩⟩ := Nat.exists_prime_and_dvd this
        use p
        constructor
        . exact hp
        . rw [hs, ← pow_two]
          exact pow_dvd_pow_of_dvd hd 2
      have : Irrational ((√↑m - ↑n) * 4) := by
        have i1: (√↑m - ↑n) * 4 = (√↑m - ↑n) * (4 : ℚ) := rfl
        have i2: (√↑m - ↑n) = √↑m  - ((↑n : ℚ): ℝ) := rfl
        rw [i1, irrational_mul_rat_iff, i2, irrational_sub_rat_iff]
        constructor
        . simp only [ne_eq, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true]
        . exact hIm
      rw [← h] at this
      exact (not_irrational p) this
      exact cast_ne_zero.mpr hP
      exact Ne.symm (NeZero.ne' 4)

    exact (this m n p hm hp hvm hmnp).elim

  . have : 16 * x * x + 4 * x - 1 = 16 * (x * x) + 4 * x + (- 1) := by linarith
    rw [this] at h
    let s := √(discrim (16 : ℝ) 4 (-1))
    have hs : s = √(discrim 16 4 (-1)) := rfl
    have hd : discrim (16 : ℝ) 4 (-1) = 80 := by unfold discrim; linarith
    have hsv : s = √80 := by unfold s;rw [hd];
    have hds : discrim (16 : ℝ) 4 (-1) = s * s := by rw [hd, hsv, mul_self_sqrt];simp only [ofNat_nonneg]
    rw [quadratic_eq_zero_iff _ hds x] at h

    cases' h with hx hx
    . rw [hsv] at hx
      rw [(by
          rw [(by
            rw [(by rfl: (16 * 5) = (((16 : ℕ) : ℝ) * ((5 : ℕ) : ℝ)))]
            rw [(by rfl: (80) = ((80 : ℕ) : ℝ))]
            rw [← cast_mul]
            : (80:ℝ) = 16 * 5)]
          rw [Real.sqrt_mul]
          simp only [mul_eq_mul_right_iff, ofNat_nonneg, Real.sqrt_eq_zero, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, or_false]
          refine Real.sqrt_eq_cases.mpr ?_
          left
          constructor
          . linarith
          . linarith
          . linarith
        : (√80 : ℝ) = (4 * √5))] at hx
      rw [(by
        linarith
        : (-4 + 4 * √5) / (2 * 16) = (√5 - 1) / 8)] at hx

      have (m n p : ℕ) (hp : p ≠ 0) (hm : ∀ v, v.Prime → ¬ (v^2 ∣ m))
        (hEq : (√5 - 1) / 8 = (√(m : ℝ) - n) / p) : m = 5 ∧ n = 1 ∧ p = 8 := by

        have e: √5  * p - 8 * √m = p - n * 8 := by
          apply_fun (·*(8 :ℝ) * p) at hEq
          have : (√↑m - ↑n) / ↑p * 8 * ↑p = (8 * (√↑m - ↑n)) / ↑p * ↑p := by group
          rw [this] at hEq
          have : (8 * (√↑m - ↑n)) / ↑p * ↑p = 8 * (√↑m - ↑n) := by
            refine IsUnit.div_mul_cancel ?_ (8 * (√↑m - ↑n))
            rw [isUnit_iff_ne_zero]
            exact cast_ne_zero.mpr hp
          rw [this] at hEq
          linarith
        by_cases h : √5  * p - 8 * √m = 0

        . have : p = 8 * √m / √5 := by
            apply_fun (· + 8 * √m) at h
            simp only [sub_add_cancel, zero_add] at h
            apply_fun (· / √5) at h
            simp only [ne_eq, ofNat_nonneg, Real.sqrt_eq_zero, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true,
              mul_div_cancel_left₀] at h
            exact h
          clear e

          have e: p = 8 * √(m / 5) := by
            rw [Real.sqrt_div, ← mul_div_assoc]
            exact this
            exact cast_nonneg' m
          have : p = √(64 * m / 5) := by
            rw [mul_div_assoc, Real.sqrt_mul]
            have : √64 = 8 := by
              have : (64 : ℝ) = 8 * 8 := by linarith
              rw [this]
              simp only [ofNat_nonneg, Real.sqrt_mul_self]
            rw [this]
            exact e
            simp only [ofNat_nonneg]
          clear e
          have e: (p : ℝ) * p = 64 * m / 5 := by
            rw [this]
            rw [Real.mul_self_sqrt]
            apply mul_nonneg
            . apply mul_nonneg
              . simp only [ofNat_nonneg]
              . exact cast_nonneg' m
            . simp only [inv_nonneg, ofNat_nonneg]
          clear this
          apply_fun (· * 5) at e
          rw [mul_div_assoc, mul_assoc 64] at e
          clear this
          have : ((m : ℝ) / (5 : ℝ) * 5) = m := by simp only [isUnit_iff_ne_zero, ne_eq,
            OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true, IsUnit.div_mul_cancel]
          rw [this] at e
          clear this
          rw [(by rfl: 5 = ((5 : ℕ) : ℝ)), (by rfl: 64 = ((64 : ℕ) : ℝ))] at e
          rw [← cast_mul, ← cast_mul, ← cast_mul] at e
          rw [Nat.cast_inj] at e
          rw [mul_comm, mul_comm 64] at e
          have t: 5 ∣ (m * 64) := by
            use (p * p)
            exact e.symm

          have : 5 ∣ m := by
            contrapose t
            refine Nat.Prime.not_dvd_mul ?_ t ?_
            . exact prime_five
            . exact of_decide_eq_false rfl
          clear t
          obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := this
          rw [hk] at e
          rw [mul_assoc] at e
          rw [mul_eq_mul_left_iff] at e
          simp only [OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, or_false] at e
          apply_fun (√·) at e
          rw [(by
            push_cast
            refine Real.sqrt_mul_self ?_
            exact cast_nonneg' p
            : √(((p * p) : ℕ) : ℝ) = (p : ℝ))] at e
          rw [(by push_cast; exact rfl : (((k * 64 : ℕ) : ℝ) = (k : ℝ) * (64 : ℝ)))] at e
          rw [Real.sqrt_mul] at e
          rw [(by
            refine Real.sqrt_eq_cases.mpr ?_
            simp only [ofNat_nonneg, and_true, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, and_false, or_false]
            linarith
            : √64 = 8)] at e

          have : IsSquare k := by
            have : ¬ Irrational (p : ℝ) := by
              exact not_irrational p
            rw [e] at this
            rw [(by
              exact rfl
             : √(k : ℝ) * (8 : ℝ) = √(k : ℝ) * ((8 : ℚ)))] at this
            rw [(by
              exact rfl
             : √(k : ℝ) = √(k : ℚ))] at this
            rw [irrational_mul_rat_iff] at this
            push_neg at this
            replace this := this (by exact Ne.symm (OfNat.zero_ne_ofNat 8))
            rw [(irrational_sqrt_ratCast_iff_of_nonneg _).not] at this
            push_neg at this
            exact Rat.isSquare_natCast_iff.mp this
            exact cast_nonneg' k
          obtain ⟨sq, hsq⟩ := this

          have : sq = 1 := by
            by_contra h
            have : ∃ (min : ℕ) (h : min.Prime), min ∣ sq := by
              use sq.minFac
              refine exists_prop.mpr ?_
              constructor
              . exact Nat.minFac_prime h
              . exact minFac_dvd sq
            contrapose hm
            push_neg
            use sq.minFac
            constructor
            . exact Nat.minFac_prime h
            . rw [hk, hsq, ← pow_two]
              apply Dvd.dvd.mul_left
              refine (Nat.pow_dvd_pow_iff ?_).mpr ?_
              . simp only [ne_eq, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true]
              . exact minFac_dvd sq

          rw [hsq, this, mul_one, mul_one] at hk
          rw [hsq, this, mul_one] at e
          simp only [cast_one, Real.sqrt_one, one_mul] at e
          rw [e, hk] at hEq
          apply_fun (· * 8) at hEq
          simp only [isUnit_iff_ne_zero, ne_eq, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true,
            IsUnit.div_mul_cancel, cast_ofNat, sub_right_inj] at hEq
          rw [(by rfl : (8 : ℝ) = ((8 : ℕ) : ℝ)), Nat.cast_inj] at e
          rw [(by exact Eq.symm cast_one : (1 : ℝ) = ((1 : ℕ) : ℝ)), Nat.cast_inj] at hEq
          exact ⟨hk, ⟨hEq.symm, e⟩⟩
          simp only [cast_nonneg]

        . have e1: (5 : ℝ) * ((p: ℝ) * p) - 64 * (m : ℝ)
            = (√5 * (p : ℝ) - 8 * √(m : ℝ)) * (√5 * (p : ℝ) + 8 * √(m : ℝ)) := by
            group
            rw [(by
              rw [zpow_two]
              refine Real.mul_self_sqrt ?_
              simp only [ofNat_nonneg]
              : √5 ^ (2 : ℤ) = 5)]
            rw [zpow_two √↑m]
            congr
            refine Eq.symm (Real.mul_self_sqrt ?_)
            simp only [cast_nonneg]
          apply_fun ((√5 * ↑p - 8 * √↑m)⁻¹*·) at e1
          conv at e1 =>
            right
            rw [← mul_assoc, inv_mul_cancel₀ h, one_mul]
          have hNI : ¬Irrational (√5 * ↑p) := by
            rw [(by
              group
              : √5 * ↑p = ((√5 * ↑p + 8 * √↑m) + (√5 * ↑p - 8 * √↑m)) / 2)]
            rw [←e1, e, inv_mul_eq_div]
            unfold Irrational
            push_neg
            use (((5 * (↑p * ↑p) - 64 * ↑m) / (↑p - ↑n * 8) + (↑p - ↑n * 8)) / 2 : ℚ)
            simp only [Rat.cast_add, Rat.cast_div, Rat.cast_sub, Rat.cast_mul, Rat.cast_ofNat,
              Rat.cast_natCast]
          have hI : Irrational (√5 * ↑p) := by
            rw [(by
              simp only [Rat.cast_natCast]
              : √5 * ↑p = √5 * ((↑p : ℚ) : ℝ)
            )]
            refine Irrational.mul_rat ?_ ?_
            apply Nat.Prime.irrational_sqrt
            exact prime_five
            exact cast_ne_zero.mpr hp
          exact (hNI hI).elim
      rw [hx] at hmnp
      have := this m n p hp hvm hmnp

      rw [this.1, this.2.1, this.2.2]

    . rw [hsv] at hx
      rw [(by
          rw [(by
            rw [(by rfl: (16 * 5) = (((16 : ℕ) : ℝ) * ((5 : ℕ) : ℝ)))]
            rw [(by rfl: (80) = ((80 : ℕ) : ℝ))]
            rw [← cast_mul]
            : (80:ℝ) = 16 * 5)]
          rw [Real.sqrt_mul]
          simp only [mul_eq_mul_right_iff, ofNat_nonneg, Real.sqrt_eq_zero, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, or_false]
          refine Real.sqrt_eq_cases.mpr ?_
          left
          constructor
          . linarith
          . linarith
          . linarith
        : (√80 : ℝ) = (4 * √5))] at hx
      rw [(by
        linarith
        : (-4 - 4 * √5) / (2 * 16) = (-√5 - 1) / 8)] at hx

      have (m n p : ℕ) (hp : p ≠ 0) (hEq : (-√5 - 1) / 8 = (√(m : ℝ) - n) / p) : False := by
        have e: √5  * p + 8 * √m = n * 8 - p := by
          apply_fun (·*(8 :ℝ) * p) at hEq
          have : (√↑m - ↑n) / ↑p * 8 * ↑p = (8 * (√↑m - ↑n)) / ↑p * ↑p := by group
          rw [this] at hEq
          have : (8 * (√↑m - ↑n)) / ↑p * ↑p = 8 * (√↑m - ↑n) := by
            refine IsUnit.div_mul_cancel ?_ (8 * (√↑m - ↑n))
            rw [isUnit_iff_ne_zero]
            exact cast_ne_zero.mpr hp
          rw [this] at hEq
          linarith
        by_cases h : √5  * p + 8 * √m = 0

        . have : p = -8 * √m / √5 := by
            apply_fun (· - 8 * √m) at h
            rw [add_sub_assoc, sub_self, add_zero, zero_sub] at h
            apply_fun (· / √5) at h
            simp only [ne_eq, ofNat_nonneg, Real.sqrt_eq_zero, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true,
              mul_div_cancel_left₀] at h
            rw [neg_mul]
            exact h
          clear e
          have e: p = -8 * √(m / 5) := by
            rw [Real.sqrt_div, ← mul_div_assoc]
            exact this
            exact cast_nonneg' m
          have : (p : ℝ) ≤ 0 := by
            rw [e, mul_comm]
            apply mul_nonpos_of_nonneg_of_nonpos
            exact Real.sqrt_nonneg (↑m / 5)
            linarith
          contrapose this
          push_neg
          exact (lt_of_le_of_ne (cast_nonneg' p) (Ne.symm (cast_ne_zero.mpr hp)))

        . have e1: (5 : ℝ) * ((p: ℝ) * p) - 64 * (m : ℝ)
            = (√5 * (p : ℝ) - 8 * √(m : ℝ)) * (√5 * (p : ℝ) + 8 * √(m : ℝ)) := by
            group
            rw [(by
              rw [zpow_two]
              refine Real.mul_self_sqrt ?_
              simp only [ofNat_nonneg]
              : √5 ^ (2 : ℤ) = 5)]
            rw [zpow_two √↑m]
            congr
            refine Eq.symm (Real.mul_self_sqrt ?_)
            simp only [cast_nonneg]
          apply_fun (· * (√5 * ↑p + 8 * √↑m)⁻¹) at e1
          conv at e1 =>
            right
            rw [mul_assoc, mul_inv_cancel₀ h, mul_one]
          have hNI : ¬Irrational (√5 * ↑p) := by
            rw [(by
              group
              : √5 * ↑p = ((√5 * ↑p + 8 * √↑m) + (√5 * ↑p - 8 * √↑m)) / 2)]
            rw [←e1, e, ←division_def]
            unfold Irrational
            push_neg
            use ((↑n * 8 - ↑p + (5 * (↑p * ↑p) - 64 * ↑m) / (↑n * 8 - ↑p)) / 2  : ℚ)
            simp only [Rat.cast_add, Rat.cast_div, Rat.cast_sub, Rat.cast_mul, Rat.cast_ofNat,
              Rat.cast_natCast]
          have hI : Irrational (√5 * ↑p) := by
            rw [(by
              simp only [Rat.cast_natCast]
              : √5 * ↑p = √5 * ((↑p : ℚ) : ℝ)
            )]
            refine Irrational.mul_rat ?_ ?_
            apply Nat.Prime.irrational_sqrt
            exact prime_five
            exact cast_ne_zero.mpr hp
          exact (hNI hI).elim
      rw [hx] at hmnp
      exact (this m n p hp hmnp).elim
    . simp only [ne_eq, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true]

import Mathlib

theorem algebra_13529 {A B : ℝ} (hB : B ≠ 0) (f g : ℝ → ℝ)
    (hf : f = fun x => A * x - 2 * B ^ 2) (hg : g = fun x => B * x)
    (hfg : f (g 1) = 0) : A = 2 * B := by

simp [hf, hg] at hfg
  apply mul_right_cancel₀ hB
  linarith

import Mathlib

theorem number_theory_605132 :
    {(m, n) : ℕ × ℕ | 1 ≤ m ∧ 1 ≤ n ∧ ∃ k : ℤ, k ^ 2 = (5 ^ m + 2 ^ (n + 1) : ℚ) / (5 ^ m - 2 ^ (n + 1) : ℚ)} = {(1, 1)} := by

ext ⟨m, n⟩
  simp
  apply Iff.intro
  . -- First show that if (m, n) satisfies the condition, then (m, n) = (1, 1).
    rintro ⟨hm, hn, k', h₁⟩

    let k := |k'|
    rw [show (k' ^ 2 : ℚ) = k ^ 2 by simp [k]] at h₁

    have h₂ : (5 ^ m - 2 ^ (n + 1) : ℤ) ≠ 0 := by
      by_contra!
      apply eq_of_sub_eq_zero at this
      norm_cast at this
      apply Nat.exists_eq_add_of_le' at hm
      obtain ⟨m', hm⟩ := hm
      rw [hm] at this
      apply Nat.Prime.pow_inj (Nat.prime_five) (Nat.prime_two) at this
      tauto
    qify at h₂
    field_simp at h₁

    have h₃ : (5 ^ m - 2 ^ (n + 1) : ℤ) ∣ 2 ^ (n + 2) := by
      rw [show (2 ^ (n + 2) : ℤ) = (5 ^ m + 2 ^ (n + 1)) - (5 ^ m - 2 ^ (n + 1)) by ring]
      apply Int.dvd_sub
      . -- Use the above result that k²(5 ^ m - 2 ^ (n + 1)) = (5 ^ m + 2 ^ (n + 1)).
        rw [dvd_iff_exists_eq_mul_left]
        use k ^ 2
        qify
        exact h₁.symm
      . rfl

    let c := (5 ^ m - 2 ^ (n + 1) : ℤ).natAbs
    have h₄ : c = (5 ^ m - 2 ^ (n + 1) : ℤ) := by
      simp [c]
      rw [<-Int.sub_nonneg]
      by_contra!

      qify at this
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (k : ℚ), show 0 < (5 ^ m + 2 ^ (n + 1) : ℚ) by positivity]

    rw [<-h₄] at h₃
    norm_cast at h₃
    rw [Nat.dvd_prime_pow (Nat.prime_two)] at h₃
    obtain ⟨n', h₃, h₅⟩ := h₃

    have h₆ : n' = 0 := by
      by_contra! h₆
      replace h₆ : 1 ≤ n' := by
        omega
      apply Nat.exists_eq_add_of_le' at h₆
      obtain ⟨n'', h₆⟩ := h₆
      zify at h₅
      rw [h₆, h₄] at h₅
      apply eq_add_of_sub_eq at h₅
      norm_cast at h₅

      have : Odd (5 ^ m) := by
        apply Odd.pow (by use 2; rfl)
      rw [h₅] at this
      absurd this
      simp [pow_add]
      rw [<-add_mul]
      simp

    simp [h₅, h₆] at h₄
    qify at h₄
    simp [<-h₄] at h₁
    symm at h₄
    apply eq_add_of_sub_eq at h₄
    rw [h₄] at h₁

    replace h₁ : (k - 1) * (k + 1) = 2 ^ (n + 2) := by
      qify
      ring_nf at h₁ ⊢
      linarith

    have h₇ : k - 1 ∣ 2 ^ (n + 2) := by
      rw [<-h₁]
      apply Int.dvd_mul_right
    have h₈ : k + 1 ∣ 2 ^ (n + 2) := by
      rw [<-h₁]
      apply Int.dvd_mul_left

    rw [dvd_prime_pow (Int.prime_two)] at h₇ h₈
    simp [Associated] at h₇ h₈
    obtain ⟨c, h₇, c', h₉⟩ := h₇
    obtain ⟨d, h₈, d', h₁₀⟩ := h₈
    replace h₉ := congr_arg (·.natAbs) h₉
    replace h₁₀ := congr_arg (·.natAbs) h₁₀
    simp [Int.natAbs_mul, Int.units_natAbs] at h₉ h₁₀
    zify at h₉ h₁₀

    have h₁₁ : k > 0 := by
      apply lt_of_le_of_ne
      . simp [k]
      . by_contra!
        simp [<-this] at h₁
        linarith only [h₁, show 0 < 2 ^ (n + 2) by positivity]

    rw [abs_of_nonneg (show 0 ≤ k - 1 by omega), abs_of_nonneg (show 0 ≤ (2 ^ c : ℤ) by positivity)] at h₉
    rw [abs_of_nonneg (show 0 ≤ k + 1 by positivity), abs_of_nonneg (show 0 ≤ (2 ^ d : ℤ) by positivity)] at h₁₀

    have h₁₂ : 2 ^ c < 2 ^ d := by
      zify
      rw [<-h₉, <-h₁₀]
      omega
    rw [Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_right (by norm_num)] at h₁₂

    have h₁₃ : 2 ^ c * (2 ^ (d - c) - 1 : ℤ) = 2 := by
      rw [mul_sub, <-pow_add, Nat.add_sub_cancel', <-h₉, <-h₁₀]
      omega
      exact le_of_lt h₁₂

    have h₁₄ : 2 ^ c ≤ 2 ^ 1 := by
      apply Nat.le_of_dvd (by norm_num)
      zify
      simp
      nth_rw 3 [<-h₁₃]
      apply Int.dvd_mul_right
    rw [Nat.pow_le_pow_iff_right (by norm_num)] at h₁₄
    interval_cases c
    . -- Suppose c = 0, then 2 ^ d - 1 = 2, no solution.
      simp at h₁₃
      apply eq_add_of_sub_eq at h₁₃

      have h₁₅ : 2 ^ 1 < 2 ^ d ∧ 2 ^ d < 2 ^ 2 := by
        zify
        rw [h₁₃]
        norm_num
      iterate 2 rw [Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_right (by norm_num)] at h₁₅
      omega
    . -- Suppose c = 1, then 2 ^ (d - 1) - 1 = 1.
      simp at h₁₃
      replace h₁₃ : 2 ^ (d - 1) = 2 ^ 1 := by
        linarith
      apply Nat.pow_right_injective (by norm_num) at h₁₃

      rw [h₉, h₁₀, show d = 2 by omega] at h₁

      replace h₁ : 2 ^ (n + 2) = 2 ^ 3 := by
        linarith
      apply Nat.pow_right_injective (by norm_num) at h₁
      replace h₁ : n = 1 := by
        omega

      norm_num [h₁] at h₄
      norm_cast at h₄
      rw [Nat.pow_eq_self_iff (by norm_num)] at h₄
      tauto
  . -- Verify that m = n = 1 satisfies the condition
    rintro ⟨hm, hn⟩
    norm_num [hm, hn]
    use 3
    norm_num
