open Real

theorem algebra_27 : sqrt ((1 - sqrt 2)^2) + (Real.pi - 3.14)^0 - 3 * sqrt (1 / 2) = -sqrt 2 / 2 := by

have h1 : sqrt ((1 - sqrt 2) ^ 2) = sqrt 2 - 1 := by
    have h1 : sqrt ((1 - sqrt 2) ^ 2) = |1 - sqrt 2| := by
      rw [Real.sqrt_sq_eq_abs]
    have h2 : 1 < sqrt 2 := Real.lt_sqrt_of_sq_lt (by norm_num)
    rw [h1, abs_of_neg (sub_neg_of_lt h2)]
    ring
  have h3 : (Real.pi - 3.14 : ℝ) ^ 0 = 1 := by
    simp
  have h4 : 3 * sqrt (1 / 2) = 3 / 2 * sqrt 2 := by
    calc
      3 * sqrt (1 / 2)
          = 3 * (sqrt 1 / sqrt 2) := by
            rw [show (1 / 2 : ℝ) = (1 : ℝ) / (2 : ℝ) by norm_num]
            field_simp [show (2 : ℝ) ≠ 0 by norm_num]
      _ = 3 * (1 / sqrt 2) := by simp
      _ = 3 / 2 * sqrt 2 := by
        field_simp [show (sqrt 2 : ℝ) ≠ 0 by
          have : 0 < sqrt 2 := Real.sqrt_pos.2 (show (0:ℝ)<2 by norm_num)
          linarith
        ]
        ring_nf
        norm_num
  rw [h1, h3, h4]
  ring_nf

import Mathlib
open Polynomial
theorem algebra_18912 (K L M : ℝ) (a b c d : ℝ)(hf : (f : Polynomial ℝ) = (C (1 : ℝ)) * X ^ 4 + (C (-K)) * X ^ 3 + (C K) * X ^ 2 + (C L) * X  + (C M))(h : f.roots =
    {a , b , c , d}) : K = 1 → IsLeast {e |  e = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2} (-1 : ℝ) := by

have hd : Polynomial.natDegree f = 4 := by
      rw [hf]
      compute_degree!

    have hc4 : f.coeff 4 = 1 := by simp [hf]
    have hc3 : f.coeff 3 = (-K) := by simp [hf]
    have hc2 : f.coeff 2 =  K := by simp [hf]

    have hp : Polynomial.coeff f 3 = Polynomial.leadingCoeff f * (-1) ^ (Polynomial.natDegree f - 3) * Multiset.esymm (Polynomial.roots f) (Polynomial.natDegree f - 3) := by
      apply Polynomial.coeff_eq_esymm_roots_of_card
      rw[h]; rw [hd]; simp
      rw [hd]; simp
    rw [hd,h] at hp
    simp [Multiset.esymm] at hp; rw [Multiset.powersetCard_one,Polynomial.leadingCoeff,hd,hc3,hc4] at hp; simp at hp
    have e:= congrArg (fun (t) => (t) * -1) hp; simp at e;rw [show d + c + b + a = a + b + c + d by ring_nf] at e

    have hp2 : Polynomial.coeff f 2 = Polynomial.leadingCoeff f * (-1) ^ (Polynomial.natDegree f - 2) * Multiset.esymm (Polynomial.roots f) (Polynomial.natDegree f - 2) := by
      apply Polynomial.coeff_eq_esymm_roots_of_card
      rw[h]; rw [hd]; simp
      rw [hd]; linarith
    rw [hd] at hp2;rw [h]  at hp2; simp at hp2; rw [Polynomial.leadingCoeff] at hp2; rw [hd] at hp2; rw [hc2] at hp2; rw [hc4] at hp2
    simp [Multiset.esymm] at hp2;  rw [Multiset.powersetCard_one] at hp2; simp at hp2; ring_nf at hp2

    have hk : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2 = (K - 1 ) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      have heq : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2 = (a + b + c + d) ^2 - 2 *(c * d + c * b + c * a + d * b + d * a + b * a) := by  ring_nf
      rw [heq]; rw [← e] ; rw [← hp2]
      ring_nf

    intro hk2
    simp_rw [hk,hk2]
    rw [IsLeast]; norm_num

import Mathlib
theorem number_theory_94369 {n : ℕ} (hn : n > 0)
    (h1 : ∃ a b : ℤ, a > 0 ∧ b > 0 ∧ n = a * b ∧ |a - b| = 20)
    (h2 : ∃ c d : ℤ, c > 0 ∧ d > 0 ∧ n = c * d ∧ |c - d| = 23) :
    (Nat.digits 10 n).sum = 15 := by

rcases h1 with ⟨a, b, ha, hb, hnab, hab⟩

  wlog hab2 : a < b generalizing a b
  · apply this b a hb ha
    · rw [hnab, mul_comm]
    · rw [abs_sub_comm, hab]
    · suffices a ≠ b by omega
      rintro rfl
      simp at hab

  have hba : b = a + 20 := by
    suffices b - a = 20 by linarith
    calc _ = |b - a| := by symm; rw [abs_eq_self]; linarith
         _ = |a - b| := by rw [abs_sub_comm]
         _ = 20 := by assumption

  rcases h2 with ⟨c, d, hc, hd, hncd, hcd⟩

  wlog hca : c < a generalizing c d
  · apply this d c hd hc
    · rw [hncd, mul_comm]
    · rw [abs_sub_comm, hcd]
    · simp at hca
      by_contra! had

      by_cases hcd' : c < d
      · have : d = c + 23 := by
          suffices d - c = 23 by linarith
          calc _ = |d - c| := by symm; rw [abs_eq_self]; linarith
               _ = |c - d| := by rw [abs_sub_comm]
               _ = 23 := by assumption

        nlinarith

      · simp at hcd'
        have : c = d + 23 := by
          suffices c - d = 23 by linarith
          calc _ = |c - d| := by symm; rw [abs_eq_self]; linarith
               _ = 23 := by assumption
        nlinarith

  let k := a - c
  have hkpos : k > 0 := by omega
  have hack : a = c + k := by omega

  have : b < d := by nlinarith

  have hcd2 : d = c + 23 := by
    suffices d - c = 23 by linarith
    calc _ = |d - c| := by symm; rw [abs_eq_self]; linarith
         _ = |c - d| := by rw [abs_sub_comm]
         _ = 23 := by assumption

  have : k < 3 := by linarith

  have : k = 1 ∨ k = 2 := by omega

  rcases this with (hk | hk); swap

  · -- We have $n = c d = c (c + 23)$ and $n = a b = (c + 2) (c + 22)$
    have hnc1 : n = c * (c + 23) := by rw [hncd, hcd2]
    have hnc2 : n = (c + 2) * (c + 22) := by rw [hnab, hba, hack, hk]; ring

    ring_nf at hnc1 hnc2

    have hc : c = -44 := by linarith

    linarith

  · -- We have $n = c d = c (c + 23)$ and $n = a b = (c + 1) (c + 21)$
    have hnc1 : n = c * (c + 23) := by rw [hncd, hcd2]
    have hnc2 : n = (c + 1) * (c + 21) := by rw [hnab, hba, hack, hk]; ring

    ring_nf at hnc1 hnc2

    have hc : c = 21 := by linarith

    have hn : n = 924 := by
      zify
      rw [hnc1, hc]
      norm_num

    simp [hn]

import Mathlib

open Real Set

theorem algebra_98656 (A : Real) (hA : A ∈ Ioo 0 (π / 2)) (h : tan A = 2 * cos A) :
    {n : ℕ | 0 < n ∧ n ≤ 1000 ∧ ∃ k : ℕ, (1 / cos A)^n + (tan A)^n = 10 * k + 9}.ncard = 167 := by

have hcos0 : 0 < cos A := by
    apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
    apply Set.mem_of_subset_of_mem _ hA
    apply Ioo_subset_Ioo_left
    linarith [Real.pi_pos]

  have ineq : 0 < √17 - 1 := by
    suffices 1 < √17 by linarith
    rw [← Real.sqrt_one]
    apply Real.sqrt_lt_sqrt zero_le_one (by norm_num)

  have hcos2 : cos A ^ 2 = (√17 - 1) / 8 := by

    field_simp [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos] at h

    replace h : 2 * (sin A * sin A) + 1 * sin A + (-2) = 0 := by
      rw [mul_assoc, ← pow_two, Real.cos_sq'] at h
      linear_combination h

    have hd : discrim (2 : ℝ) 1 (-2) = √17 * √17 := by simp [discrim]; norm_num
    rw [quadratic_eq_zero_iff (by norm_num) hd] at h

    cases' h with h h

    · rw [Real.cos_sq', h]
      ring_nf
      simp only [one_div, Nat.ofNat_nonneg, sq_sqrt]
      ring

    · have h0 : 0 < sin A := by
        apply Real.sin_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        apply Set.mem_of_subset_of_mem _ hA
        apply Ioo_subset_Ioo_right
        linarith [Real.pi_pos]
      contrapose! h0
      rw [h]
      linarith

  have hcos : cos A = √((√17 - 1) / 8) := by
    symm
    rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_eq_sq (by linarith) (le_of_lt hcos0), hcos2]

  set a := √((√17 - 1) / 2)

  set b := √((√17 + 1) / 2)
  have h2 : √4 = 2 := by rw [show (4 : ℝ) = 2 ^ 2 by norm_num, sqrt_sq zero_le_two]

  have hab : a * b = 2 := by
    dsimp [a, b]
    rw [←Real.sqrt_mul (by linarith)]
    ring_nf
    norm_num [h2]

  have htan : tan A = a := by
    simp_rw [a, h, hcos]
    nth_rw 1 [← h2, ← sqrt_mul (by norm_num)]
    ring_nf

  have hsec : 1 / cos A = b := by
    simp_rw [b, hcos]
    field_simp
    rw [← sqrt_mul (by norm_num), ← sqrt_mul (by positivity)]
    ring_nf
    rw [sq_sqrt (by norm_num), show -1 + 17 = (16 : ℝ) by norm_num]

  set s : ℕ → ℝ := fun n => a ^ n + b ^ n

  have hsk {n k : ℕ} (hk : 2 * k ≤ n) : s n = s (n - k) * s k - 2 ^ k * s (n - 2 * k) := by

    nth_rw 1 [← hab]
    ring_nf
    simp_rw [←pow_add, show n - k + k = n by omega, mul_assoc, ← pow_add]
    rw [show k + (n - k * 2) = n - k by omega]
    ring

  have hs2 n : s n ^ 2 = s (2 * n) + 2 ^ (n + 1) := by
    ring_nf
    rw [← mul_pow, hab]
    ring

  have s0 : s 0 = 2 := by simp [s]; norm_num

  have s2 : s 2 = √17 := by
    dsimp [s, a, b]
    rw [sq_sqrt (by positivity), sq_sqrt (by positivity)]
    ring

  have s4 : s 4 = 9 := by
    have := hs2 2
    rw [s2, sq_sqrt (by norm_num)] at this
    norm_num at this
    linarith

  have hs_int n : ∃ k : ℤ, s (4 * n) = k := by

    induction' n using Nat.strongRec with n ih

    rcases show n = 0 ∨ n = 1 ∨ 2 ≤ n by omega with hn | hn | hn

    · use 2; simp [hn, s0]

    · use 9; simp [hn, s4]

    have eq := s4 ▸ hsk (show 2 * 4 ≤ 4 * n by omega)
    rw [eq]

    have ⟨k1, hk1⟩ := ih (n - 1) (by omega)
    have ⟨k2, hk2⟩ := ih (n - 2) (by omega)

    use k1 * 9 - 2 ^ 4 * k2
    rw [show 4 * n - 4 = 4 * (n - 1) by omega, show 4 * n - 2 * 4 = 4 * (n - 2) by omega] at eq ⊢
    rw [hk1, hk2] at eq ⊢
    push_cast
    ring

  have ⟨r, hrs, hr0, hr1, hr⟩ : ∃ r : ℕ → ℤ, (∀ n, s (4 * n) = r n) ∧ r 0 = 2 ∧ r 1 = 9 ∧ (∀ n, r (n + 2) = 9 * r (n + 1) - 16 * r n) := by

    set r := fun n => Classical.choose (hs_int n)
    have hr : ∀ n, r n = s (4 * n) := by
      have := fun n => @Classical.choose_spec _ _ (hs_int n)
      intro n
      simp only [← this, r]
    use r
    rify
    simp [hr, s0, s4]
    intro n
    rw [hsk (show 2 * 4 ≤ 4 * (n + 2) by omega), s4]
    rw [show 4 * (n + 2) - 4 = 4 * (n + 1) by omega, show 4 * (n + 2) - 2 * 4 = 4 * n by omega]
    ring

  have hs_irr2 n : Irrational (s (2 * (2 * n + 1))) := by
    clear * - hs_int s2 hsk

    suffices eq : ∃ (k : ℤ), s (2 * (2 * n + 1)) = k * √17 by
      have ⟨k, hk⟩ := eq
      rw [hk]

      have hk0 : k ≠ 0 := by
        contrapose! hk
        simp [hk]
        apply ne_of_gt
        positivity

      apply Irrational.int_mul _ hk0
      rw [show (17 : ℝ) = (17 : ℕ) by simp]

      apply Nat.Prime.irrational_sqrt
      norm_num
    rw [show 2 * (2 * n + 1) = 4 * n + 2 by linarith]

    induction n with

    | zero => use 1; simp [s2]
    | succ n ih =>

      have ⟨k1, hk1⟩ := hs_int (n + 1)

      have ⟨k2, hk2⟩ := ih

      use k1 - 4 * k2

      simp [hsk (show 2 * 2 ≤ 4 * (n + 1) + 2 by linarith)]
      rw [hk1, s2, show 4 * (n + 1) - 2 = 4 * n + 2 by omega, hk2]
      ring

  have hs_irr1 n : Irrational (s (2 * n + 1)) := by

    apply Irrational.of_mul_self

    rw [← pow_two, hs2, show (2 : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1 + 1) = (2 ^ (2 * n + 1 + 1) : ℕ) by simp]

    apply Irrational.add_nat
    exact hs_irr2 n

  have r10 n : r (3 * n) % 10 = (if n = 0 then 2 else 7) ∧ r (3 * n + 1) % 10 = 9 ∧ r (3 * n + 2) % 10 = 9 := by

    induction n with

    | zero => simp [hr0, hr1, hr]
    | succ n ih =>

      simp [hr]

      have h1 : r (3 * (n + 1)) % 10 = 7 := by

        rw [show 3 * (n + 1) = 3 * n + 3 by omega, hr, Int.sub_emod]
        rw [Int.mul_emod, ih.2.2]
        norm_num
        rw [Int.mul_emod, ih.2.1]
        norm_num

      have h2 : r (3 * (n + 1) + 1) % 10 = 9 := by

        rw [show 3 * (n + 1) + 1 = 3 * n + 4 by omega, hr, Int.sub_emod]
        rw [Int.mul_emod, show 3 * n + 2 + 1 = 3 * (n + 1) by omega, h1]
        norm_num
        rw [Int.mul_emod, ih.2.2]
        norm_num

      simp only [h1, h2, Int.sub_emod, Int.mul_emod, Int.reduceMod, dvd_refl, Int.emod_emod_of_dvd,
        Int.reduceMul, true_and]
      norm_num

  suffices eq : {n : ℕ | 0 < n ∧ n ≤ 1000 ∧ ∃ k : ℕ, (1 / cos A)^n + (tan A)^n = 10 * k + 9}
      = (4 * ·) '' (Finset.Ioc 0 250 \ (Finset.filter (fun n => 3 ∣ n) (Finset.Ioc 0 250))) by
    have hinj : (4 * ·).Injective := by intro x y; simp
    rw [eq, Set.ncard_image_of_injective _ hinj, Set.ncard_diff (by apply Finset.filter_subset)]

    simp_rw [ncard_coe_Finset, Nat.card_Ioc]

    have : (Finset.filter (fun n => 3 ∣ n) (Finset.Ioc 0 250)).card = ({n ∈ Finset.Ioc 0 250 | n ≡ 0 [MOD 3]}).card := by
      congr; ext n
      rw [Nat.modEq_zero_iff_dvd]
    zify at this

    rw [Nat.Ioc_filter_modEq_card _ _ (by norm_num)] at this
    norm_num at this

    norm_cast at this
  ext n
  simp only [inv_pow, mem_setOf_eq, Finset.coe_Ioc, Finset.coe_filter, Finset.mem_Ioc,
    mem_image, mem_diff, mem_Ioc, not_and, and_imp, hsec, htan]
  rw [show b ^ n + a ^ n = s n by ring]
  constructor

  · intro ⟨hn1, hn2, k, hk⟩

    by_cases hn4 : 4 ∣ n
    · have ⟨m, hmn⟩ := hn4

      use m
      simp [show 0 < m ∧ m ≤ 250 by omega, hmn]

      contrapose! r10
      have ⟨t, ht⟩ := r10
      subst m n
      rw [hrs] at hk
      norm_cast at hk
      use t
      rw [hk]
      simp [Int.add_emod]
      split_ifs <;> norm_num

    suffices Irrational (s n) by
      apply_fun Irrational at hk
      rw [show 10 * (k : ℝ) + 9 = (10 * k + 9 : ℕ) by simp] at hk
      simp only [Nat.not_irrational, this] at hk
      contradiction

    cases' show n % 2 = 1 ∨ n % 4 = 2 by omega with hn hn
    · have := Nat.mod_add_div n 2

      rw [← this, hn, add_comm]

      exact hs_irr1 _
    · have := Nat.mod_add_div n 4

      rw [← this, hn, add_comm, show 4 * (n / 4) + 2 = 2 * (2 * (n / 4) + 1) by omega]

      exact hs_irr2 _

  · intro ⟨k, ⟨hk, hk3⟩, hkn⟩
    specialize hk3 hk.1 hk.2
    refine ⟨by omega, by omega, ?_⟩
    rw [← hkn, hrs]

    have hr : r k % 10 = 9 := by
      have hk_eq := add_comm (k % 3) _ ▸ (Nat.mod_add_div k 3).symm
      cases' show k % 3 = 1 ∨ k % 3 = 2 by omega with hk hk <;> rw [hk] at hk_eq
      · rw [hk_eq, (r10 (k / 3)).2.1]
      · rw [hk_eq, (r10 (k / 3)).2.2]

    have ⟨m, hm⟩ : ∃ m : ℕ, r k = m := by
      use (r k).natAbs
      rw [Int.natAbs_of_nonneg]
      rify
      rw [← hrs]
      positivity

    replace hr : m % 10 = 9 := by zify; simp [← hm, hr]

    have hm1 := add_comm (m % 10) _ ▸ (Nat.mod_add_div m 10).symm
    use m / 10
    norm_cast
    nth_rw 1 [hm, hm1, hr]
    rfl

  n ∈ Finset.Icc 1000 9999 ∧ (n / 100) * (n % 100) ∣ n
theorem number_theory_69704 :
  {n | isGuanaco n} = {1352, 1734} := by

ext n
  unfold isGuanaco
  simp
  constructor
  . intro ⟨⟨h1, h2⟩, h3⟩
    contrapose h3
    interval_cases n
    all_goals try decide
    all_goals simp at h3

  . rintro (rfl | rfl)
    all_goals simp; decide

theorem number_theory_4740 {d b j k : ℕ} {a : ℕ → ℕ} (hdb : d ∣ b) (hjk : j < k) :
    d^j ∣ ∑ i ∈ range (k+1), (a i * b ^ i) ↔ d^j ∣ ∑ i ∈ range j, a i * b ^ i := by

have hdjbj : d^j ∣ b^j := pow_dvd_pow_of_dvd hdb j

  have hajk : ∑ i ∈ range (k+1), (a i * b ^ i) = ∑ i ∈ range j, (a i * b ^ i) +
      ∑ i ∈ Ico j (k+1), (a i * b ^ i) :=
    Eq.symm <| sum_range_add_sum_Ico (fun k => a k * b ^ k) (by linarith)
  have hdjajk : d^j ∣ ∑ i ∈ Ico j (k+1), (a i * b ^ i) := by
      refine dvd_sum fun i hi => dvd_mul_of_dvd_right (hdjbj.trans ?_) _
      apply Nat.pow_dvd_pow; simp at hi; exact hi.1
  rw [hajk, Iff.comm]
  exact Nat.dvd_add_iff_left hdjajk

import Mathlib
open Finset
theorem number_theory_640720 {p n : ℕ} (ppr : p.Prime) (npos : 0 < n) :
    #{d ∈ (p * n ^ 2).divisors | IsSquare (n ^ 2 + d)} ≤ 1 := by

have := ppr.two_le
  suffices : {d ∈ (p * n ^ 2).divisors | IsSquare (n ^ 2 + d)}
  ⊆ {p * (2 * n / (p - 1)) ^ 2}
  · apply card_le_card at this
    simp at this; exact this

  simp [subset_iff]; intro d hdvd h1 h2 hd
  clear h1 h2; have dne : d ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; simp [h] at hdvd
    omega

  rcases hd with ⟨r, hr⟩; rw [← pow_two] at hr
  have : n ≤ r := by
    rw [← Nat.pow_le_pow_iff_left (show 2≠0 by simp)]
    omega
  set k := r - n with hk; clear_value k
  rw [show r = n + k by omega] at hr
  clear hk this r; rw [add_sq'] at hr
  simp [add_assoc] at hr

  obtain ⟨x, y, copr, hx, hy⟩ := Nat.exists_coprime k (2*n)
  set g := k.gcd (2 * n) with hg; clear_value g

  have xne : x ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; simp [h] at hx
    simp [hx] at hr; omega
  have yne : y ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; simp [h] at hy
    omega

  have gne : g ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; simp [h] at hy
    omega

  rw [hx, hy, show (x*g)^2+y*g*(x*g) = g^2*x*(x+y) by ring] at hr
  replace hdvd : 4 * d ∣ p * (2 * n) ^ 2 := by
    rw [show p * (2 * n) ^ 2 = 4 * (p * n ^ 2) by ring]
    rw [mul_dvd_mul_iff_left]; exact hdvd
    simp
  rw [hy, hr, show 4*(g^2*x*(x+y)) = 4*x*(x+y)*g^2 by ring] at hdvd
  rw [mul_pow, ← mul_assoc, mul_dvd_mul_iff_right] at hdvd

  have xeq : x ∣ p := by
    have : x.Coprime (y ^ 2) := by
      rw [Nat.coprime_pow_right_iff]
      exact copr; simp
    rw [← Nat.Coprime.dvd_mul_right this]
    apply dvd_trans _ hdvd
    rw [mul_comm, ← mul_assoc]; simp

  have yeq : x + y ∣ p := by
    have : (x + y).Coprime (y ^ 2) := by
      rw [Nat.coprime_pow_right_iff]
      rw [Nat.coprime_add_self_left]
      exact copr; simp
    rw [← this.dvd_mul_right]
    apply dvd_trans _ hdvd
    simp
  rw [Nat.dvd_prime ppr] at xeq yeq

  rcases xeq with xeq|xeq <;> rcases yeq with yeq|yeq
  any_goals omega
  · rw [yeq, xeq] at hr
    simp [xeq] at *; rw [show y = p - 1 by omega] at hy
    rw [hy, Nat.mul_div_cancel_left]
    rw [hr, mul_comm]; omega
  simp; exact gne

theorem number_theory_611248 :
    IsLeast {n : ℕ | √(n + 99) - √n < 1} 2402 := by

suffices H : ∀ n : ℕ, √(n + 99) - √n < 1 ↔ 2401 < n by
    simp [H]
    exact isLeast_Ici
  intro n
  calc √(n + 99) - √n < 1

    _ ↔ √(n + 99) < √n + 1 := sub_lt_iff_lt_add'

    _ ↔ n + 99 < (√n + 1) ^ 2 := Real.sqrt_lt' (by positivity)

    _ ↔ n + 99 < n + 2 * √n + 1 := by
      simp [← sub_pos]
      ring_nf
      simp

    _ ↔ 99 < 2 * √n + 1 := by rw [add_assoc]; simp

    _ ↔ 49 < √n := by constructor <;> intro h <;> linarith

    _ ↔ 49 ^ 2 < (n : ℝ) := Real.lt_sqrt (by simp)

    _ ↔ 2401 < n := by norm_num

theorem algebra_93450 {toC toF : ℝ → ℝ} (h_toC : ∀ x, toC x = 5 / 9 * (x - 32))
    (h_toF : ∀ x, toF x = 9 / 5 * x + 32) :
    {x : ℤ | 32 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1000 ∧ round (toF (round (toC x))) = x}.ncard = 539 := by

have h_round_toC_add (x : ℤ) : round (toC (x + 9)) = round (toC x) + 5 := by
    simp only [h_toC]
    calc _
    _ = round (5 / 9 * (x - 32) + 5 : ℝ) := by congr; ring
    _ = _ := round_add_ofNat _ 5
  have h_round_toF_add (x : ℤ) : round (toF (x + 5)) = round (toF x) + 9 := by
    simp only [h_toF]
    calc _
    _ = round (9 / 5 * x + 32 + 9 : ℝ) := by congr 1; ring
    _ = _ := round_add_ofNat _ 9

  have h_periodic_sub : Function.Periodic (fun x : ℤ ↦ round (toF (round (toC x))) - x) 9 := by
    intro f
    simp only [Int.cast_add, Int.cast_ofNat]
    rw [h_round_toC_add]
    simp only [Int.cast_add, Int.cast_ofNat, sub_add_eq_sub_sub, round_sub_ofNat, round_sub_int]
    rw [h_round_toF_add]
    ring

  have h_periodic_eq : Function.Periodic (fun x : ℤ ↦ round (toF (round (toC x))) = x) 9 := by
    intro f
    refine eq_iff_iff.mpr ?_
    refine (iff_congr sub_eq_zero sub_eq_zero).mp ?_
    exact Eq.congr_left (h_periodic_sub f)

  have h_count_period :
      Nat.count (fun x : ℕ ↦ round (toF (round (toC (32 + x)))) = 32 + x) 9 = 5 := by
    simp only [round_eq, h_toC, h_toF, Nat.count_succ]
    norm_num

  have h_count_rest :
      Nat.count (fun x : ℕ ↦ round (toF (round (toC (32 + x)))) = 32 + x) 6 = 4 := by
    simp only [round_eq, h_toC, h_toF, Nat.count_succ]
    norm_num

  have h_sum_range_mul {α : Type} [AddCommMonoid α] {f : ℕ → α} {c : ℕ} (hf : f.Periodic c)
      (m : ℕ) : ∑ i in .range (m * c), f i = m • ∑ i in .range c, f i := by
    induction m with
    | zero => simp
    | succ m IH =>
      rw [add_mul, Finset.sum_range_add, IH, add_smul]
      simp only [one_mul, one_smul]
      congr 1
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun i hi ↦ ?_
      calc _
      _ = f ((m * c + i) % c) := by rw [hf.map_mod_nat _]
      _ = _ := by rw [Nat.mul_add_mod_of_lt (by simpa using hi)]

  have h_sum_range_mul_add {α : Type} [AddCommMonoid α] {f : ℕ → α} {c : ℕ} (hf : f.Periodic c)
      (m k : ℕ) :
      ∑ i in .map (addLeftEmbedding (m * c)) (.range k), f i = ∑ i in .range k, f i := by
    rw [Finset.sum_map]
    congr
    ext i
    calc _
    _ = f ((m * c + i) % c) := (hf.map_mod_nat _).symm
    _ = f (i % c) := congrArg f (Nat.mul_add_mod' m c i)
    _ = _ := hf.map_mod_nat i

  have h_card_filter_range_mul {p : ℕ → Prop} [DecidablePred p] {c : ℕ} (hp : p.Periodic c)
      (m : ℕ) : #(.filter p (.range (m * c))) = m * #(.filter p (.range c)) := by
    simpa only [Finset.card_filter] using h_sum_range_mul (fun x ↦ by simp only [hp x]) _
  have h_card_filter_range_mul_add {p : ℕ → Prop} [DecidablePred p] {c : ℕ} (hp : p.Periodic c)
      (m k : ℕ) :
      #(.filter p (.map (addLeftEmbedding (m * c)) (.range k))) = #(.filter p (.range k)) := by
    simpa only [Finset.card_filter] using h_sum_range_mul_add (fun x ↦ by simp only [hp x]) _ _

  calc _

  _ = #(.filter (fun x : ℤ ↦ round (toF (round (toC x))) = x) (.Icc 32 1000)) := by
    rw [← Set.ncard_coe_Finset]
    simp [and_assoc]

  _ = #(.filter (fun x : ℤ ↦ round (toF (round (toC x))) = x) (.Ico 32 1001)) := rfl
  _ = #(.filter (fun x : ℤ ↦ round (toF (round (toC x))) = x)
      (.map Nat.castEmbedding (.Ico 32 1001))) := by
    refine congrArg _ (congrArg _ ?_)
    suffices ∀ a b : ℕ, Finset.Ico (a : ℤ) b = Finset.map Nat.castEmbedding (Finset.Ico a b) from
      this 32 1001
    intro a b
    ext i
    simp only [Finset.mem_Ico, Finset.mem_map, Nat.castEmbedding_apply]
    refine ⟨fun h ↦ ?_, fun h ↦ ?_⟩
    · have hi : i.toNat = i := Int.toNat_of_nonneg <| (Int.ofNat_zero_le a).trans h.1
      rw [← hi] at h
      refine ⟨i.toNat, ?_, hi⟩
      simpa only [Nat.cast_le, Nat.cast_lt] using h
    · rcases h with ⟨x, hx, hi⟩
      rw [← hi]
      simpa using hx
  _ = #(.filter ((fun x : ℤ ↦ round (toF (round (toC x))) = x) ∘ Nat.castEmbedding)
      (.Ico 32 1001)) := by
    rw [Finset.filter_map, Finset.card_map]
  _ = #(.filter (fun x : ℕ ↦ round (toF (round (toC x))) = x) (.Ico 32 1001)) := rfl

  _ = #(.filter (fun x : ℕ ↦ round (toF (round (toC (32 + x)))) = 32 + x)
      (.range (1001 - 32))) := by
    rw [Finset.card_filter, Finset.sum_Ico_eq_sum_range]
    simp

  _ = 107 * 5 + 4 := by
    have hq : 1001 - 32 = 107 * 9 + 6 := by norm_num
    rw [hq, Finset.range_add, Finset.filter_union]
    rw [Finset.card_union_of_disjoint]
    swap
    · refine .mono (Finset.filter_subset _ _) (Finset.filter_subset _ _) ?_
      exact Finset.disjoint_range_addLeftEmbedding _ _
    have : Function.Periodic (fun x : ℕ ↦ round (toF (round (toC (32 + x)))) = 32 + x) 9 :=
      fun x ↦ by simpa [add_assoc] using h_periodic_eq (32 + x)
    refine congrArg₂ _ ?_ ?_
    · rw [h_card_filter_range_mul this]
      rw [← Nat.count_eq_card_filter_range, h_count_period]
    · rw [h_card_filter_range_mul_add this]

  _ = _ := by norm_num

lemma conc (A B C : Real) (hA : A ∈ Ioo 0 π) (hB : B ∈ Ioo 0 π) (hC : C ∈ Ioo 0 π) : sin ((A + B + C) / 3) ≥ (sin A + sin B + sin C) / 3 := by sorry

theorem inequalities_261080 (A B C : Real) (hA : A ∈ Ioo 0 π) (hB : B ∈ Ioo 0 π) (hC : C ∈ Ioo 0 π) (hABC : A + B + C = π) : sin A + sin B + sin C ≤ 3 * sqrt 3 / 2 := by

have conc := strictConcaveOn_sin_Icc

  apply StrictConcaveOn.concaveOn at conc
  rw [concaveOn_iff_forall_pos] at conc
  obtain ⟨convset,concave⟩ := conc

  have hA' : A ∈ Icc 0 π := by
    simp only [mem_Icc]
    simp only [mem_Ioo] at hA
    obtain ⟨hA1, hA2⟩ := hA
    exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
  have concave2 := concave
  have hBC : (B + C) / 2 ∈ Icc 0 π := by
    simp only [mem_Icc]
    simp only [mem_Ioo] at hB hC
    obtain ⟨hB1, hB2⟩ := hB
    obtain ⟨hC1, hC2⟩ := hC
    exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
  set a := (1 : ℝ) / 3 with ha
  set b := (2 : ℝ) / 3 with hb
  have hapos : 0 < a := by norm_num
  have hbpos : 0 < b := by norm_num
  have hab : a + b = 1 := by norm_num
  specialize concave hA' hBC hapos hbpos hab
  rw [ha, hb, smul_eq_mul, smul_eq_mul, smul_eq_mul, smul_eq_mul] at concave
  ring_nf at concave

  have hB' : B ∈ Icc 0 π := by
    simp only [mem_Icc]
    simp only [mem_Ioo] at hB
    obtain ⟨hB1, hB2⟩ := hB
    exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
  have hC' : C ∈ Icc 0 π := by
    simp only [mem_Icc]
    simp only [mem_Ioo] at hC
    obtain ⟨hC1, hC2⟩ := hC
    exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
  set a2 := (1 : ℝ) / 2 with ha2
  set b2 := (1 : ℝ) / 2 with hb2
  rw [ha2, hb2] at concave
  have hapos2 : 0 < a2 := by norm_num
  have hbpos2 : 0 < b2 := by norm_num
  have hab2 : a2 + b2 = 1 := by norm_num
  specialize concave2 hB' hC' hapos2 hbpos2 hab2
  rw [ha2, hb2, smul_eq_mul, smul_eq_mul, smul_eq_mul, smul_eq_mul] at concave2

  have : sin A * (1 / 3) + sin (B * (1 / 2) + C * (1 / 2)) * (2 / 3) ≥ sin A * (1 / 3) + (1 / 2 * sin B + 1 / 2 * sin C) * (2 / 3) := by
    gcongr
    rw [mul_comm B, mul_comm C]
    exact concave2
  ring_nf at this
  ring_nf
  apply le_trans this
  rw [add_comm _ (A * (1 / 3)), ← add_assoc] at concave
  exact concave

theorem inequalities_261080 (A B C : Real) (hA : A ∈ Ioo 0 π) (hB : B ∈ Ioo 0 π) (hC : C ∈ Ioo 0 π) (hABC : A + B + C = π) : sin A + sin B + sin C ≤ 3 * sqrt 3 / 2 := by

  have conc := conc A B C hA hB hC

  rw [hABC] at conc
  have : sin (π / 3) = sqrt 3 / 2 := by
    rw [sin_pi_div_three]
  rw [this] at conc

  linarith

theorem number_theory_240895 :
    {n : ℕ | 0 < n ∧ ∃ m : ℕ, m ^ 3 = n ∧ n / 1000 = m} = {32768} := by

ext n
  apply Iff.intro
  . -- First show that the condition implies that n = 32768.
    rintro ⟨h₁, m, h₂, h₃⟩

    have h₄ : 1000 * m ≤ m ^ 2 * m := by
      calc
        _ ≤ n := by
          rw [<-h₃]
          apply Nat.mul_div_le
        _ = m ^ 2 * m := by
          rw [<-h₂]
          ring
    rw [mul_le_mul_right (by nlinarith)] at h₄

    replace h₄ : m ≥ 32 := by
      nlinarith

    have h₅ : m ^ 2 * m < 1000 * (m + 1) := by
      calc
        _ = n := h₂
        _ < 1000 * (n / 1000 + 1) := by
          apply Nat.lt_mul_div_succ _ (by norm_num)
        _ = 1000 * (m + 1) := by
          rw [h₃]

    qify at h₅
    rw [<-lt_div_iff₀ (by simp; nlinarith)] at h₅
    replace h₅ : m ^ 2 < 33 ^ 2 := by
      qify
      calc
        m ^ 2 < 1000 * (m + 1 : ℚ) / m := h₅
        _ = 1000 * (1 + 1 / m) := by
          field_simp
        _ ≤ 1000 * (1 + 1 / 32) := by
          rw [mul_le_mul_left (by norm_num)]
          apply add_le_add_left
          rw [div_le_div_iff₀ (by simp; nlinarith)]
          norm_num
          exact h₄
          norm_num
        _ < 33 ^ 2 := by
          norm_num

    replace h₅ : m = 32 := by
      nlinarith
    simp [<-h₂, h₅]
  . -- Show that n = 32768 satisfies the condition.
    simp
    intro hn
    norm_num [hn]

theorem algebra_190032 {a : ℕ → ℝ} {d : ℝ} (h : ∀ n, a n = a 0 + d * n) (hpos : ∀ n, 8 * ∑ i ∈ Finset.range n, a i + 2 * n ≥ 0)
    (hd : d > 0) (hs : ∀ n, Real.sqrt (8 * ∑ i ∈ Finset.range n, a i + 2 * n) = d * n) :
    ∀ n, a n = 4 * n + 7 / 4 := by

have h₁ : ∀ n, 8 * a n + 2 = 2 * √(8 * ∑ i ∈ Finset.range n, a i + 2 * ↑n) * d + d ^ 2
  · intro n
    have := hs (n + 1)
    rw [Nat.cast_add, mul_add d, ←hs n, Nat.cast_one, mul_one,
        Real.sqrt_eq_iff_eq_sq, add_sq, Real.sq_sqrt (hpos n), Finset.sum_range_succ, mul_add] at this
    linarith [this]
    exact_mod_cast hpos (n + 1)
    positivity

  conv at h₁ =>
    intro n
    congr
    · rw [h n]
    · rw [hs n]

  have d_val : d = 4
  · have hd := h₁ 0
    have hd' := h₁ 1
    simp at hd hd'
    nlinarith [hd, hd']

  have a0_val : a 0 = 7 / 4
  · have := h₁ 1
    rw [d_val] at this
    linarith [this]

  intro n
  rw [h, d_val, a0_val, add_comm]

theorem algebra_21287 : ∑ i ∈ Finset.range 259, (Complex.I : ℂ) ^ (i + 1) = -1 := by

have eq4 : ∑ i ∈ Finset.range 4, (Complex.I) ^ (i + 1) = 0 := by
    simp [Finset.sum]
    ring_nf
    calc
      Complex.I + Complex.I ^ 3 = Complex.I + Complex.I ^ 2 * Complex.I := by ring_nf
      _ = Complex.I + (-1) * Complex.I := by simp
      _ = 0 := by ring_nf

  have eqmn (m n : ℕ) (hmn : 4 * n ≤ m) : ∑ i ∈ Finset.range m, Complex.I ^ (i + 1) = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (m - 4 * n), Complex.I ^ (i + 1 + 4 * n) := by

    induction n with

    | zero =>
      congr

    | succ n hn =>
      replace hn : ∑ i ∈ Finset.range m, Complex.I ^ (i + 1) = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (m - 4 * n), Complex.I ^ (i + 1 + 4 * n) := by
        apply hn
        linarith only [hmn]

      calc
        ∑ i ∈ Finset.range m, Complex.I ^ (i + 1) = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (m - 4 * n), Complex.I ^ (i + 1 + 4 * n) := by rw [hn]
        _ = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (4 + (m - 4 * (n + 1))), Complex.I ^ (i + 1 + 4 * n) := by congr; ring_nf; rw [<-Nat.add_sub_assoc, Nat.add_sub_add_left]; linarith only [hmn]
        _ = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range 4, Complex.I ^ (i + 1 + 4 * n) + ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (m - 4 * (n + 1)), Complex.I ^ (4 + i + 1 + 4 * n) := by apply Finset.sum_range_add
        _ = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range 4, Complex.I ^ (i + 1) * (Complex.I) ^ (4 * n) + ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (m - 4 * (n + 1)), Complex.I ^ (4 + i + 1 + 4 * n) := by congr; ring_nf; symm; ring_nf
        _ = (∑ i ∈ Finset.range 4, Complex.I ^ (i + 1)) * (Complex.I) ^ (4 * n) + ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (m - 4 * (n + 1)), Complex.I ^ (4 + i + 1 + 4 * n) := by rw [Finset.sum_mul]
        _ = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (m - 4 * (n + 1)), Complex.I ^ (i + 1 + 4 * (n + 1)) := by rw [eq4]; norm_num; congr; ring_nf; symm; ring_nf

  rw [eqmn 259 64 (show 4 * 64 ≤ 259 by norm_num)]
  norm_num
  simp [Finset.sum]

  calc
    Complex.I ^ 259 + (Complex.I ^ 258 + Complex.I ^ 257) = (Complex.I ^ 2) ^ 129 * Complex.I + ((Complex.I ^ 2) ^ 129 + (Complex.I ^ 2) ^ 128 * Complex.I) := by ring_nf
    _ = (-1) ^ 129 * Complex.I + ((-1) ^ 129 + (-1) ^ 128 * Complex.I) := by norm_num
    _ = (-1) * Complex.I + (-1 + Complex.I) := by norm_num
    _ = -1 := by norm_num

def linearInequality (x : ℝ) : Prop := 2 * x - 6 < 0

def solutionSet : Set ℝ := {x | x < 3}

theorem algebra_9220 :
  {x : ℝ | linearInequality x} = solutionSet := by

have inequality_equivalence (x : ℝ) :
  linearInequality x ↔ x < 3 := by
    unfold linearInequality
    constructor
    · intro h

      have h1 : 2 * x < 6 := by linarith
      have h2 : x < 3 := by
        have :2 * x - 6 =2 * x -2*3:=by norm_num
        rw [this] at h
        apply lt_of_sub_neg at h
        simp at h
        exact h
      exact h2
    · intro h

      have h1 : 2 * x < 2 * 3 := by
        simp only [Nat.ofNat_pos, mul_lt_mul_left]
        exact h
      have h2 :(2 : ℝ)* 3 = 6 := by ring
      have h3 : 2 * x < 6 := by
        apply lt_of_lt_of_eq h1 h2
      linarith
  ext x
  exact inequality_equivalence x

open Nat
theorem number_theory_636481 (p d m : ℕ) (hp : Nat.Prime p)
  (pne2 : p ≠ 2) (pne3 : p ≠ 3) (hd : d = orderOf (3 : ZMod p))
  (hm : 0 < m) (a : ℕ → ℤ)
  (ha0 : a 0 = 0) (hak : ∀ k, a (k + 1) = 3 * a k + 1) :
  (p : ℤ) ∣ a (m * d)  := by

have h1 : ∀ n, a n = (3 ^ n - 1) / 2 := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      simp [ha0]
    | succ k ih =>
      rw [hak, ih]
      have dvd1 : (2 : ℤ) ∣ 3 ^ k - 1 := by
        have heven : Even ((3 : ℤ) ^ k - 1) := by
          refine Int.even_sub'.mpr ?_
          constructor
          intro h1
          simp
          intro h1
          refine Odd.pow ?_
          use 1
          simp
        exact even_iff_two_dvd.mp heven
      obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := dvd1
      have eq1 : (3 : ℤ) ^ k = 2 * m + 1 := by linarith
      rw [pow_add, eq1]
      simp
      omega
  rw [h1]

  have modeq1 : 3 ^ d = (1 : ZMod p) := by
    rw [hd]
    exact pow_orderOf_eq_one 3
  have modeq2 : 3 ^ (m * d) = (1 : ZMod p) := by
    rw [← mul_comm, pow_mul, modeq1]
    simp
  have pdvd1 : (p : ℤ) ∣ 3 ^ (m * d) - 1 := by
    refine (ZMod.intCast_eq_intCast_iff_dvd_sub 1 (3 ^ (m * d)) p).mp ?_
    norm_num
    exact Eq.symm modeq2

  refine Int.dvd_div_of_mul_dvd ?_
  have dvd2 : (2 : ℤ) ∣ 3 ^ (m * d) - 1 := by
    have heven : Even ((3 : ℤ) ^ (m * d) - 1) := by
      refine Int.even_sub'.mpr ?_
      constructor
      intro h1
      simp
      intro h1
      refine Odd.pow ?_
      use 1
      simp
    exact even_iff_two_dvd.mp heven
  have cast1 : (3 : ℤ) ^ (m * d) - 1 = (3 ^ (m * d) - 1 : ℕ) := by
    rw [Nat.cast_sub]
    norm_cast
    exact one_le_pow' (m * d) 2
  rw [cast1] at pdvd1 dvd2 ⊢
  rw [show (2 : ℤ) = ↑(2 : ℕ) by norm_cast] at dvd2 ⊢
  norm_cast at pdvd1 ⊢
  norm_cast at dvd2
  refine Coprime.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd ?_ dvd2 pdvd1
  refine coprime_two_left.mpr ?_
  exact Prime.odd_of_ne_two hp pne2

theorem number_theory_241506 {j m : ℤ} (ineq : j > m) (hjm : m = 10 * (j % 10) + (j / 10)) (hj: 0 ≤ j) (hm: 0 ≤ m) (hj2: j ≤ 99) (hm2: m ≤ 99)
    (hdiff : ∃ k, k^2 = j^2 - m^2) :
    j = 65 ∧ m = 56 := by

let b:= j % 10
    let a:= j / 10
    have eqj: j = 10 * a + b := by
        simp [a,b]
        omega
    have eqm: m = 10 * b + a := by
        simp [a,b]
        omega
    have ineq_ab: a > b := by
        by_contra! ab
        have contra: j ≤ m := by
            rw [eqj, eqm]
            omega
        omega
    have ineqa: a ≤ 9 := by
        omega
    have ineqb: b ≤ 9 := by
        omega
    clear_value a b
    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := hdiff
    simp [eqj, eqm] at hk
    have id: (10 * a + b) ^ 2 - (10 * b + a) ^ 2 = 9 * 11 * (a + b) * (a - b) := by
        ring_nf
    rw [id] at hk
    have dvd11_k: 11 ∣ k ^ 2 := by
        rw [hk]
        rw [ show 9 * 11 * (a + b) * (a - b) = 11 * (9 * (a + b) * (a - b)) by ring]
        apply Int.dvd_mul_right
    replace dvd11_k: 11 ∣ k := by
         have prime_11: Nat.Prime 11 := by norm_num
         apply Prime.dvd_of_dvd_pow at dvd11_k
         exact dvd11_k
         simp [prime_11]
    have dvd121: 11 * 11 ∣ k ^ 2 := by
        rw [show k ^ 2 = k * k by ring]
        have o: 11 * 11 ∣ 11 * k := by
            apply Int.mul_dvd_mul_left 11 at dvd11_k
            exact dvd11_k
        have v: 11 * k ∣ k * k := by
            apply Int.mul_dvd_mul_right k at dvd11_k
            exact dvd11_k
        apply Int.dvd_trans o v
    rw [hk] at dvd121
    rw [show 9 * 11 * (a + b) * (a - b) = 11 * (9 * (a + b) * (a - b)) by ring] at dvd121
    apply Int.dvd_of_mul_dvd_mul_left at dvd121
    rw [show 9 * (a + b) * (a - b)= 9 * ((a + b) * (a - b)) by ring] at dvd121

theorem number_theory_638898 (k A B C: ℤ) (h1: 3 < k) (h2: 0 < A) (h3: 0 < B)
 (h7: C < k) (h11: A * k + B + C = C * k) (h12: A * k + B + B * k + A = C * k + C)
 : 100 * A + 10 * B + C = 101 * k - 191 := by

suffices A = k - 2 ∧ B = 1 ∧ C = k - 1 by
      simp [this]

   simp [vb] at *
   have lc: k - 2 < C := by

         clear *- h11

   have vc: C = k - 1 := by

theorem algebra_607355 {x y : ℝ} : x * (x - 2 * y) + y * (2 * y - 4) + 4 = 0 ↔ x = 2 ∧ y = 2 := by

constructor
    . -- Forward direction: proving that the equation implies x = 2 and y = 2
        intro h

        replace h : (x - y) ^ 2 + (y - 2) ^ 2 = 0:= by linarith

        have h1 : (x - y) ^ 2 ≥ 0:= by positivity
        have h2 : (y - 2) ^ 2 ≥ 0:= by positivity

        replace h1 : (x - y) ^ 2 = 0:= by linarith
        replace h2 : (y - 2) ^ 2 = 0:= by linarith

        replace h1 : x - y = 0:= by exact pow_eq_zero h1
        replace h2 : y - 2 = 0:= by exact pow_eq_zero h2
        constructor
        all_goals

        linarith
    . -- Backward direction: proving that x = 2 and y = 2 satisfies the equation
        intro h
        rcases h with ⟨h1, h2⟩

        subst x y

        linarith

theorem geometry_248074 {A B C P : ℂ} (hne : P ≠ A ∧ A ≠ B ∧ B ≠ C ∧ C ≠ A)
  (hP : dist P B ^ 2 + dist P C ^ 2 < dist P A ^ 2) :
  dist B C ^ 2 < dist A C ^ 2 + dist B A ^ 2 := by

have PT := mul_dist_le_mul_dist_add_mul_dist P B A C
  nth_rw 3 [mul_comm] at PT

  let x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2) := ![dist P B, dist P C]
  let y : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2) := ![dist A C, dist B A]
  have CS := real_inner_le_norm x y

  simp [x, y, norm] at CS; replace CS := le_trans PT CS
  rw [← pow_le_pow_iff_left₀ _ _ (show 2≠0 by simp)] at CS
  nth_rw 2 [← Real.rpow_natCast] at CS
  rw [Real.mul_rpow, ← Real.rpow_mul, ← Real.rpow_mul] at CS
  norm_num at CS; rw [mul_pow] at CS
  rw [← mul_lt_mul_iff_of_pos_right] at hP
  replace CS := lt_of_le_of_lt CS hP

  rw [mul_lt_mul_iff_of_pos_left] at CS; exact CS

  · rw [sq_pos_iff]; simp; exact hne.left
  · apply add_pos
    · rw [sq_pos_iff]; simp; intro h; simp [h] at hne
    rw [sq_pos_iff]; simp; intro h; simp [h] at hne
  all_goals positivity

theorem algebra_11391
    (s : Set ℝ)
    (hs : s = {x : ℝ | (x + 2) / (2 * x + 2) = (4 * x + 3) / (7 * x + 3)}) :
    s.Finite ∧ ((fin : s.Finite) → fin.toFinset.prod id = 0) := by

have : ∀ x : ℝ, (x + 2) / (2 * x + 2) = (4 * x + 3) / (7 * x + 3) ↔ x = 0 ∨ x = 3 := by
    intro x
    constructor
    . intro h
      have t1 : 2 * x + 2 ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra! h_contra
        simp [h_contra] at h
        rcases div_eq_zero_iff.mp h.symm <;> linarith
      have t2 : 7 * x + 3 ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra! h_contra
        simp [h_contra] at h
        rcases h <;> linarith

      apply_fun fun t => t * (2 * x + 2) * (7 * x + 3) at h
      field_simp at h

      have : x ^ 2 = 3 * x := by linarith

      simp only [pow_two, mul_eq_mul_right_iff] at this
      rw [or_comm] at this
      exact this

    . intro h
      rcases h with h | h
      <;> rw [h] <;> norm_num

  simp only [this, show {x : ℝ | x = 0 ∨ x = 3} = {0, 3} by rfl] at hs
  simp_all
simp

constructor
  . intro n h
    subst n
    decide
  . ext n
    simp
    constructor
    . intro ⟨h1, h2⟩
      by_cases hn1 : n < 10
      . interval_cases n
        all_goals simp
        simp at h1
      . have ⟨k, hk⟩ := h2
        rw [← pow_two] at hk
        have : 100 * k^2 ≤ n^2 := by omega
        have : n^2 ≤ 100 * k^2 + 99 := by omega
        have : 10*k ≤ n := by nlinarith
        have : 10*k + 1 ≤ n := by omega
        have : 20*k + 1 ≤ 99 := by nlinarith
        have : k ≤ 4 := by omega
        have : n ≤ 41 := by nlinarith
        interval_cases n
        all_goals simp
        all_goals contrapose h1; try native_decide
        all_goals contrapose h2; native_decide

    . rintro (rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl)
      all_goals simp
      all_goals native_decide

theorem algebra_283209 (ω : ℝ) (hω : ω > 0) (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (hf : ∀ x, f x = Real.sin (ω * x) + Real.cos (ω * x))
    (hinc : ∀ x ∈ Set.Ioo (-ω) ω, deriv f x ≥ 0)
    (hsymm : ∀ x, f (ω - x) = f (ω + x)) :
    ω = Real.sqrt Real.pi / 2 := by

have heq x : f x = √2 * sin (ω * x + π / 4) := by
    rw [sin_add, cos_pi_div_four, sin_pi_div_four, hf]
    ring_nf
    simp

  have ⟨k, hk⟩ : ∃ k : ℕ, ω ^ 2 = k * π + π / 4 := by

    simp [heq, sin_eq_sin_iff] at hsymm
    simp [← sub_eq_zero] at hsymm
    ring_nf at hsymm

    suffices h : ∃ k : ℤ, ω ^ 2 * 2 + (π * (-1 / 2) - π * ↑k * 2) = 0 by
      have ⟨k, hk⟩ := h

      have hk0 : 0 ≤ k := by
        contrapose! hk
        replace hk : k ≤ -1 := by linarith
        rify at hk
        nlinarith [pi_pos]
      lift k to ℕ using hk0
      use k
      linear_combination hk / 2

    have ⟨k, hk⟩ := hsymm π

    have ⟨k', hk'⟩ := hsymm 1
    cases' hk with hk hk <;> [skip; use k]
    cases' hk' with hk' hk' <;> [skip; use k']
    replace hk : ω = k := by nlinarith [pi_pos]
    replace hk' : ω = π * k' := by linarith

    rw [hk'] at hk

    apply_fun Irrational at hk

    simp at hk
    simp [hk] at hk'
    linarith

  have hω2 : ω ≤ π / 2 := by

    contrapose! hinc

    use (π / 2) / ω
    simp only [Set.mem_Ioo]
    constructorm* _ ∧ _

    · rw [← sub_pos]
      simp
      positivity

    · suffices π / 2 / ω < 1 by linarith [pi_gt_d2]
      rwa [div_lt_one hω]

    rw [show f = (fun x => f x) by simp]
    simp [heq]
    rw [deriv_sin (by fun_prop), deriv_add_const, deriv_const_mul _ (by fun_prop), deriv_id'', mul_one]

    rw [show ω * (π / 2 / ω) = π / 2 by field_simp; ring, add_comm]
    rw [cos_add_pi_div_two, sin_pi_div_four]
    ring_nf
    simp
    linarith

  suffices k = 0 by

    simp [this] at hk

    rw [← sq_eq_sq₀ (by positivity) (by positivity)]
    rw [div_pow, sq_sqrt (by positivity)]
    linarith

  contrapose! hk
  apply ne_of_lt
  calc

    ω^2 ≤ (π / 2)^2 := by
      rw [sq_le_sq₀ (by positivity) (by positivity)]
      exact hω2

    _ < π + π / 4 := by nlinarith [pi_lt_d2]

    _ ≤ k * π + π / 4 := by
      replace hk : 1 ≤ k := by omega
      rify at hk
      nlinarith

theorem algebra_292734 (a b c : ℤ) (ha : 0 < a) (hb : 0 < b) (hc : 0 < c)
    (h₂ : (a^2 - a - c)/(b : ℚ) + (b^2 - b - c)/(a : ℚ) = a + b + 2) :
    IsSquare (a + b + c) := by

qify at h₂ ha hb
  field_simp [ha.ne, hb.ne] at h₂

  have h : (a + b) * (a + b + c) = (a + b) * (a - b) ^ 2 := by
    qify
    linear_combination -h₂

  simp [show a + b ≠ 0 by qify; linarith] at h

  use (a - b);
  linear_combination h

theorem geometry_94936
  (a b c : ℝ)
  (ha : 0 < a) (hb : 0 < b) (hc : 0 < c)
  (h1 : a * b / (sqrt (a^2 + b^2)) = 15 / sqrt 10)
  (h2 : a * c / (sqrt (a^2 + c^2)) = 30 / (sqrt 13))
  (h3 : b * c / (sqrt (b^2 + c^2)) = 10 / (sqrt 5)) :
  a * b * c = 750 := by

{

  have ha2ge : a ^ 2 ≥ 0 := by { rw [ge_iff_le]; exact sq_nonneg a }
  have hb2ge : b ^ 2 ≥ 0 := by { rw [ge_iff_le]; exact sq_nonneg b }
  have hc2ge : c ^ 2 ≥ 0 := by { rw [ge_iff_le]; exact sq_nonneg c }

  have h1' := congrArg (λ x : ℝ ↦ x^2) h1
  simp at h1'
  rw [div_pow,Real.sq_sqrt,div_pow,Real.sq_sqrt] at h1'

  have h2' := congrArg (λ x : ℝ ↦ x^2) h2
  simp at h2'
  rw [div_pow,Real.sq_sqrt,div_pow,Real.sq_sqrt] at h2'

  have h3' := congrArg (λ x : ℝ ↦ x^2) h3
  simp at h3'
  rw [div_pow,Real.sq_sqrt,div_pow,Real.sq_sqrt] at h3'

  rw [←one_div_div,mul_pow,add_div,div_mul_cancel_left₀,div_mul_cancel_right₀] at h1'
  rw [←one_div_div,mul_pow,add_div,div_mul_cancel_left₀,div_mul_cancel_right₀] at h2'
  rw [←one_div_div,mul_pow,add_div,div_mul_cancel_left₀,div_mul_cancel_right₀] at h3'

  let a' := (a ^ 2)⁻¹
  let b' := (b ^ 2)⁻¹
  let c' := (c ^ 2)⁻¹

  have h1'' : a' + b' = 10 / 15^2 := by {
    unfold a'
    unfold b'
    field_simp
    field_simp at h1'
    symm
    rw [mul_comm,mul_comm (a^2) (b^2),mul_comm (b^2 + a^2) (15^2),add_comm,h1']
  }

  have h2'' : a' + c' = 13 / 30^2 := by {
    unfold a'
    unfold c'
    field_simp
    field_simp at h2'
    symm
    rw [mul_comm,mul_comm (a^2) (c^2),mul_comm (c^2 + a^2) (30^2),add_comm,h2']
  }

  have h3'' : b' + c' = 5 / 10^2 := by {
    unfold b'
    unfold c'
    field_simp
    field_simp at h3'
    symm
    rw [mul_comm,mul_comm (b^2) (c^2),mul_comm (c^2 + b^2) (10^2),add_comm,h3']
  }

  have ha' : a' = 1 / 15^2 := by {
    calc a' = 2 * a' / 2 := by simp
      _ = ((a' + b') + (a' + c') - (b' + c')) / 2 := by ring
      _ = (10 / 15^2 + (13 / 30^2) - 5 / 10^2) / 2 := by rw [h1'',h2'',h3'']
      _ = 1 / 15^2 := by norm_num
  }

  have hb' : b' = 1 / 5^2 := by {
    calc b' = 2 * b' / 2 := by simp
      _ = ((a' + b') - (a' + c') + (b' + c')) / 2 := by ring
      _ = (10 / 15^2 - (13 / 30^2) + 5 / 10^2) / 2 := by rw [h1'',h2'',h3'']
      _ = 1 / 5^2 := by norm_num
  }

  have hc' : c' = 1 / 10^2 := by {
    calc c' = 2 * c' / 2 := by simp
      _ = (-(a' + b') + (a' + c') + (b' + c')) / 2 := by ring
      _ = (-(10 / 15^2) + (13 / 30^2) + 5 / 10^2) / 2 := by rw [h1'',h2'',h3'']
      _ = 1 / 10^2 := by norm_num
  }

  have ha'' : a = 15 := by {
    unfold a' at ha'
    simp at ha'
    rw [sq_eq_sq_iff_abs_eq_abs,abs_of_nonneg _] at ha'
    simp at ha'
    exact ha'
    linarith
  }

  have hb'' : b = 5 := by {
    unfold b' at hb'
    simp at hb'
    rw [sq_eq_sq_iff_abs_eq_abs,abs_of_nonneg _] at hb'
    simp at hb'
    exact hb'
    linarith
  }

  have hc'' : c = 10 := by {
    unfold c' at hc'
    simp at hc'
    rw [sq_eq_sq_iff_abs_eq_abs,abs_of_nonneg _] at hc'
    simp at hc'
    exact hc'
    linarith
  }

  rw [ha'',hb'',hc'']

  norm_num
  norm_num
  linarith
  intro hb2
  rw [sq_eq_zero_iff] at hb2
  linarith
  intro hc2
  rw [sq_eq_zero_iff] at hc2
  linarith
  intro ha2
  rw [sq_eq_zero_iff] at ha2
  linarith
  intro hb2
  rw [sq_eq_zero_iff] at hb2
  linarith
  intro ha2
  rw [sq_eq_zero_iff] at ha2
  linarith
  norm_num
  linarith
  linarith
  linarith
  norm_num
  linarith
}

theorem algebra_9407 {f : ℝ → ℝ}
(hodd : ∀ x, f x = - f (-x)) (hf : ∀ x < 0, f x = -x * logb 2 (2 - x)) :
∀ x, f x = if x < 0 then -x * logb 2 (2 - x) else -x * logb 2 (2 + x) := by

intro x; split; rename_i hx

  apply hf; assumption

  rename_i hx; push_neg at hx; rw [le_iff_eq_or_lt] at hx
  cases hx; rename_i hx; symm at hx; simp [hx]
  have := hodd 0; symm at this
  simp at this; rw [neg_eq_self ℝ] at this; assumption

  rename_i hx; rw [hodd, hf]; ring_nf
  linarith

theorem inequalities_131136 :
  let f := fun (n : ℕ) => ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (1 : ℚ) / (n + 1 + i);
  IsLeast {a : ℕ | ∀ n : ℕ, f n < a - 2007} 2009 := by

intro f

  have f_anti : StrictAnti f
  · apply strictAnti_nat_of_succ_lt
    intro n
    simp [f]
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ' _ n]
    conv => enter [2, 1, 2, k]; rw [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, add_assoc, add_comm _ 1, ←add_assoc, ←add_assoc]
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, Finset.sum_range_succ, add_assoc (∑ k ∈ _, _) _ _]
    apply add_lt_add_left
    calc
      _ = (2 * (n : ℚ) + 2)⁻¹ + (2 * (n : ℚ) + 3)⁻¹ := by rw [Nat.cast_add]; congr 1 <;> ring
      _ < 2 * (2 * (n : ℚ) + 2)⁻¹ := by
        rw [two_mul (2 * (n : ℚ) + 2)⁻¹]
        apply add_lt_add_left
        rw [inv_lt_inv₀ (by positivity) (by positivity)]
        linarith
      _ = 2 * (2 * ((n : ℚ) + 1))⁻¹ := by ring
      _ = _ := by rw [mul_inv]; ring

  have hf0 : f 0 = 1
  · simp [f]
  constructor

  · intro n
    calc
      f n ≤ 1 := by rw [←hf0]; apply f_anti.antitone (Nat.zero_le n)
      _ < 2009 - 2007 := by norm_num

  intro a h
  specialize h 0
  rw [hf0] at h
  have : 2008 < (a : ℚ)
  · linarith
  norm_cast at this

theorem number_theory_106683 (a b c : ℕ)
  (h0 : PythagoreanTriple a b c)
  (co_ab : Nat.Coprime a b)
  (co_bc : Nat.Coprime b c)
  (co_ac : Nat.Coprime a c):
  Odd c ∧ ((Even a ∧ Odd b) ∨ (Odd a ∧ Even b)) := by

have odd_sq_mod4 {n:ℕ} (hn: Odd n):
    n^2 ≡ 1 [MOD 4] := by
    have: Odd (n:ℤ) := by exact (Int.odd_coe_nat n).mpr hn
    replace := Int.sq_mod_four_eq_one_of_odd this
    exact Int.natCast_modEq_iff.mp this

  have even_sq_mod4 {n:ℕ} (hn: Even n):
    n^2 ≡ 0 [MOD 4] := by
    rw [even_iff_exists_two_mul] at hn
    rcases hn with ⟨m, rfl⟩
    rw [Nat.modEq_zero_iff_dvd]
    rw [mul_pow]
    exact Dvd.dvd.mul_right (by norm_num) _

  have odd_of_co_even {m n: ℕ} (co: Nat.Coprime m n)
    (hn: Even m): Odd n := by
    rw [← Nat.not_even_iff_odd]
    rintro hm
    absurd co
    rw [Nat.Prime.not_coprime_iff_dvd]
    use 2
    refine ⟨(by norm_num), ?_, ?_⟩
    · exact even_iff_two_dvd.mp hn
    · exact even_iff_two_dvd.mp hm

  have parity_cases {m n:ℕ} (co: Nat.Coprime m n):
    (Even m ∧ Odd n) ∨ Odd m := by
    rcases (Nat.even_or_odd m) with evenm | oddm
    · have := odd_of_co_even co evenm
      simp [evenm, this]
    · simp [oddm]

  have even_odd_sq_add {m n:ℕ} (hm: Even m) (hn: Odd n):
    ¬ m^2 + n^2 ≡ 0 [MOD 4] := by
    have h1: m^2 + n^2 ≡ 0+1 [MOD 4] := by
      apply Nat.ModEq.add ?_ ?_
      · apply even_sq_mod4 hm
      · apply odd_sq_mod4 hn
    rintro h2
    have h3: 0+1 ≡ 0 [MOD 4] := h1.symm.trans h2
    contradiction

  have odd_odd_sq_add {m n:ℕ} (hm: Odd m) (hn: Odd n):
    ¬ m^2 + n^2 ≡ 0 [MOD 4] := by
    have h1: m^2 + n^2 ≡ 1+1 [MOD 4] := by
      apply Nat.ModEq.add ?_ ?_
      · apply odd_sq_mod4 hm
      · apply odd_sq_mod4 hn
    rintro h2
    have h3: 1+1 ≡ 0 [MOD 4] := h1.symm.trans h2
    contradiction

  have co_sq_add_mod4 {m n: ℕ} (co: Nat.Coprime m n):
    ¬ m^2 + n^2 ≡ 0 [MOD 4] := by
    rcases parity_cases co with ⟨evenm, oddn⟩ | oddm
    · apply even_odd_sq_add evenm oddn
    · rcases (Nat.even_or_odd n) with evenn | oddn
      · rw [add_comm]
        apply even_odd_sq_add evenn oddm
      · apply odd_odd_sq_add oddm oddn

  dsimp [PythagoreanTriple] at h0
  simp only [← pow_two] at h0
  norm_cast at h0

  have oddc: Odd c := by
    rw [← Nat.not_even_iff_odd]
    rintro hc
    have h1 := even_sq_mod4 hc
    rw [← h0] at h1
    absurd h1
    apply co_sq_add_mod4 co_ab

  rcases parity_cases co_ab with ⟨evena, oddb⟩ | odda
  · simp [oddc, evena, oddb]
  · rcases (Nat.even_or_odd b) with evenb | oddb
    · simp [oddc, odda, evenb]
    · have h1: a^2 + b^2 ≡ 1 [MOD 4] := by
        rw [h0]
        apply odd_sq_mod4 oddc
      have h2: a^2 + b^2 ≡ 1+1 [MOD 4] := by
        apply Nat.ModEq.add ?_ ?_
        · apply odd_sq_mod4 odda
        · apply odd_sq_mod4 oddb
      have h3: 1 ≡ 1+1 [MOD 4] := h1.symm.trans h2
      contradiction

theorem algebra_607365 {a : ℕ → ℝ} (ha0 : a 0 = 1)
    (han : ∀ n ≥ 1, IsLeast {x | x > 0 ∧ (x - a (n - 1)) * (x + a (n - 1) - 2 * Real.sqrt n) = 2}
      (a n)) :
    IsLeast {n | a n ≥ 2022} (1011 ^ 2) := by

have han {n: ℕ}: a n = √n + √(n + 1) := by
    induction n with
    | zero => simp [ha0]
    | succ n' ih =>
      specialize han (n' + 1) (by linarith)

      conv at han =>
        arg 1
        arg 1
        intro x
        arg 2
        simp
        rw [
          ih,
          show x - (√n' + √(n' + 1)) = x - √(n' + 1) - √n' by ring,
          show x + (√n' + √(n' + 1)) - 2 * √(n' + 1) = x - √(n' + 1) + √n' by ring,
          mul_comm,
          <-sq_sub_sq,
          Real.sq_sqrt (by linarith),
          <-sub_eq_zero,
          show (x - √(n' + 1)) ^ 2 - n' - 2 = (x - √(n' + 1)) ^ 2 - (n' + 2) by ring,
          show (n' + 2) = √(n' + 2) ^ 2 by rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by linarith)],
          sq_sub_sq,
          mul_eq_zero,
          sub_add,
          sub_eq_zero,
          <-sub_add_eq_sub_sub,
          sub_eq_zero,
        ]

      have hset : {x | x > 0 ∧ (x = √(↑n' + 1) - √(↑n' + 2) ∨ x = √(↑n' + 1) + √(↑n' + 2))} = {√(↑n' + 1) + √(↑n' + 2)} := by
        ext x
        simp
        constructor
        . intro h
          rw [and_or_left] at h
          cases h with
          | inl h =>
            have : x < 0 := by
              rw [h.2]
              apply sub_neg_of_lt
              apply Real.sqrt_lt_sqrt
              norm_cast
              simp
              simp
            linarith
          | inr h =>
            exact h.2
        . intro h
          constructor
          . rw [h]
            apply add_pos
            rw [Real.sqrt_pos]; norm_cast; simp
            rw [Real.sqrt_pos]; norm_cast; simp
          . rw [h]
            simp

      rw [hset] at han
      unfold IsLeast lowerBounds at han
      simp at han
      simp
      rw [show (n':ℝ) + 1 + 1 = n' + 2 by ring]
      exact han.1

  unfold IsLeast lowerBounds
  simp only [ge_iff_le, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  constructor

  . rw [han]
    rw [Nat.cast_pow, Real.sqrt_sq (by norm_num)]
    have : 1011 < √(1011 ^ 2 + 1) := by
      rw [Real.lt_sqrt (by norm_num)]
      simp
    linear_combination this

  . intro n hn
    rw [han] at hn
    by_contra n_max
    simp only [not_le] at n_max
    have h1 : √n < 1011 := by
      rw [Real.sqrt_lt (by norm_num) (by norm_num)]
      norm_cast
    have h2 : √(↑n + 1) ≤ 1011 := by
      rw [Real.sqrt_le_left (by norm_num)]
      norm_cast
    linarith only [h1, h2, hn]

theorem number_theory_61488 (S : Finset ℕ) (h1 : S.card = 756)
    (h2 : S ⊆ Finset.Icc 1 2008) :
    ∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ 8 ∣ a + b := by

let S0 := S.filter (· % 8 = 0)
  let S1 := S.filter (· % 8 = 1)
  let S2 := S.filter (· % 8 = 2)
  let S3 := S.filter (· % 8 = 3)
  let S4 := S.filter (· % 8 = 4)
  let S5 := S.filter (· % 8 = 5)
  let S6 := S.filter (· % 8 = 6)
  let S7 := S.filter (· % 8 = 7)

  have h_card : ∀ n < 8, (S.filter (· % 8 = n)).card ≤ 251 := by
    intros n h
    have := Finset.filter_subset_filter (· % 8 = n) h2
    have := Finset.card_le_card this
    interval_cases hn : n
    all_goals
    have : ((Finset.Icc 1 2008).filter (· % 8 = n)).card = 251 := by
      subst n
      native_decide
    subst n
    omega

  have h_union : S = S0 ∪ S1 ∪ S2 ∪ S3 ∪ S4 ∪ S5 ∪ S6 ∪ S7 := by
    apply Finset.ext
    intro a
    constructor
    . intro h
      let r := a % 8
      have : r < 8 := by omega
      simp [S0, S1, S2, S3, S4, S5, S6, S7]
      interval_cases h1 : r <;> tauto
    . simp [S0, S1, S2, S3, S4, S5, S6, S7]
      rintro (h|h|h|h|h|h|h|h) <;> tauto

  by_contra! h

  have h_card_S0 : S0.card ≤ 1 := ?h0
  have h_card_S4 : S4.card ≤ 1 := ?h4
  case h0 | h4 =>

    by_contra! h1
    obtain ⟨t, h1, h2⟩ := Finset.exists_subset_card_eq (Nat.succ_le_of_lt h1)
    rw [Finset.card_eq_two] at h2
    obtain ⟨x, y, hne, h2⟩ := h2
    simp [h2, S0, S4, Subset] at h1
    specialize h x (by tauto) y (by tauto) hne
    omega

  have h_card_general : ∀ n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 3,
      (S.filter (· % 8 = n)).card + (S.filter (· % 8 = 8 - n)).card ≤ 251 := by
    intro n hn
    simp at hn
    by_cases h1 : S.filter (· % 8 = n) = ∅
    . simp [h1]
      apply h_card
      omega
    by_cases h2 : S.filter (· % 8 = 8 - n) = ∅
    . simp [h2]
      apply h_card
      omega
    rw [←ne_eq, ←Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty] at h1 h2
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h1
    obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := h2
    simp at hx hy
    specialize h x (by tauto) y (by tauto) (by omega)
    omega

  have h_card_S1_S7 : S1.card + S7.card ≤ 251 := by
    simp [S1, S7]
    apply h_card_general
    simp

  have h_card_S2_S6 : S2.card + S6.card ≤ 251 := by
    simp [S2, S6]
    apply h_card_general
    simp

  have h_card_S3_S5 : S3.card + S5.card ≤ 251 := by
    simp [S3, S5]
    apply h_card_general
    simp

  have h_card_S_le : S.card ≤ 755 := by
    rw [h_union]
    calc (S0 ∪ S1 ∪ S2 ∪ S3 ∪ S4 ∪ S5 ∪ S6 ∪ S7).card
      _ ≤ (S0 ∪ S1 ∪ S2 ∪ S3 ∪ S4 ∪ S5 ∪ S6).card + S7.card := ?le1
      _ ≤ (S0 ∪ S1 ∪ S2 ∪ S3 ∪ S4 ∪ S5).card + S6.card + S7.card := ?le2
      _ ≤ (S0 ∪ S1 ∪ S2 ∪ S3 ∪ S4).card + S5.card + S6.card + S7.card := ?le3
      _ ≤ (S0 ∪ S1 ∪ S2 ∪ S3).card + S4.card + S5.card + S6.card + S7.card := ?le4
      _ ≤ (S0 ∪ S1 ∪ S2).card + S3.card + S4.card + S5.card + S6.card + S7.card := ?le5
      _ ≤ (S0 ∪ S1).card + S2.card + S3.card + S4.card + S5.card + S6.card + S7.card := ?le6
      _ ≤ S0.card + S1.card + S2.card + S3.card + S4.card + S5.card + S6.card + S7.card := ?le7
      _ ≤ 755 := by omega
    all_goals
    repeat apply add_le_add_right
    apply Finset.card_union_le
  omega

theorem number_theory_233916 (n:ℕ):
n * (Nat.digits 10 (3*n)).sum  * 2 = 2022 ↔ n=337 := by

constructor

theorem algebra_9182 :
  ∀ (x : ℝ), (4 * x - 8 ≤ 0 ∧ (x + 3) / 2 > 3 - x) ↔ (x > 1 ∧ x ≤ 2) := by

intro x
  have second_ineq_equiv : (x + 3) / 2 > 3 - x ↔ x > 1 := by
    constructor
    · intro h

      have pos_two : 0 < (2 : ℝ) := by norm_num
      have h1 : 2 * ((x + 3) / 2) > 2 * (3 - x) := by
        exact mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left h pos_two

      have h2 : 2 * ((x + 3) / 2) = x + 3 := by
        field_simp

      have h3 : 2 * (3 - x) = 6 - 2*x := by
        ring
      rw [h2, h3] at h1
      linarith
    · intro h

      have h1 : (x + 3)/2 > 3 - x := by
        linarith
      have pos_two : 0 < (2 : ℝ) := by norm_num
      calc (x + 3) / 2 = (2 * ((x + 3) / 2)) / 2 := by ring_nf
      _ > (2 * (3 - x)) / 2 := by
        have left_eq : 2 * ((x + 3) / 2) / 2 = (x + 3) / 2 := by ring
        have right_eq : 2 * (3 - x) / 2 = 3 - x := by ring
        rw [left_eq, right_eq]
        exact h1
      _ = 3 - x := by
        field_simp
  have first_ineq_equiv: 4 * x - 8 ≤ 0 ↔ x ≤ 2 := by
    constructor
    · intro h
      linarith
    · intro h
      linarith
  constructor
  · intro h
    constructor
    · exact (second_ineq_equiv.mp h.2)
    · exact (first_ineq_equiv.mp h.1)
  · intro h
    constructor
    · exact (first_ineq_equiv.mpr h.2)
    · exact (second_ineq_equiv.mpr h.1)

theorem algebra_13400 {secret_known : ℕ → ℕ} (h : ∀ n, secret_known n = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), 2 ^ i) :

intro h'

  have : ∀ n, secret_known n = 2 ^ (n + 1) - 1 := by

    | zero => simp [h]
    | succ n ih =>
      rw [h, Finset.sum_range_succ, ← h, ih, ← Nat.sub_add_comm]
      ring_nf; apply Nat.one_le_pow; norm_num

  rw [this] at h'; apply Nat.eq_add_of_sub_eq at h'
  rw [show 1023+1=2^10 by norm_num] at h'; apply Nat.pow_right_injective at h'
  simp at h'; rw [h']; norm_num
  apply Nat.one_le_pow; norm_num

lemma sum_id: ∀ n, (Finset.sum (Finset.range n) fun x => (x : ℝ)) = (↑n - 1) * ↑n / 2 := by sorry

theorem algebra_4022 (a : ℤ → ℝ) (n : ℕ)(ha0 : a 0 = 0) : ((i : ℕ) → i ≤ n ∧ 1 ≤ i → 0 < a i) →
((i : ℕ) → i ≤ n ∧ 1 ≤ i → (Finset.sum (Finset.range (i + 1)) fun i => a i ^ 3) = (Finset.sum (Finset.range (i + 1)) fun j => a j) ^ 2)
→ ((i : ℕ) → i ≤ n ∧ 1 ≤ i → a i = i) := by

intro n; symm; apply div_eq_of_eq_mul (by norm_num)
  induction' n with n ih
  · simp
  rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, add_mul, ← ih]
  simp; ring

theorem algebra_4022 (a : ℤ → ℝ) (n : ℕ)(ha0 : a 0 = 0) : ((i : ℕ) → i ≤ n ∧ 1 ≤ i → 0 < a i) →
((i : ℕ) → i ≤ n ∧ 1 ≤ i → (Finset.sum (Finset.range (i + 1)) fun i => a i ^ 3) = (Finset.sum (Finset.range (i + 1)) fun j => a j) ^ 2)
→ ((i : ℕ) → i ≤ n ∧ 1 ≤ i → a i = i) := by

  induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ih

  cases le_or_gt n 1 with
  | inl h => apply Nat.le_one_iff_eq_zero_or_eq_one.mp at h

             cases h with
             | inl h => simp only [h]; simp
             | inr h => simp only [h]; simp; intro t1 t2 i hi1 hi2
                        have t3 : i = 1 := by linarith
                        have t4 : (Finset.sum (Finset.range (1 + 1)) fun i => a ↑i ^ 3) = (Finset.sum (Finset.range (1 + 1)) fun j => a ↑j) ^ 2 := by
                          apply t2 1; linarith; linarith
                        repeat rw [Finset.sum_range_add] at t4
                        repeat rw [Finset.sum_range_one] at t4; simp at t4; repeat rw [ha0] at t4; simp at t4
                        rw [t3]; apply sub_eq_zero.mpr at t4; have : a 1 ^ 3 - a 1 ^ 2 = a 1 ^ 2 *  (a 1 - 1) := by ring
                        rw [this] at t4; simp at t4; cases t4 with
                                                     | inl h' => have t1 : 0 < a 1 := by
                                                                   apply t1 1; linarith; linarith
                                                                 linarith
                                                     | inr h' => simp; linarith

  | inr h' => intro h1 h2 k ⟨hk1, hk2⟩; apply le_iff_lt_or_eq.mp at hk1; cases hk1 with

              | inl h => apply ih k; exact h; intro i ⟨hi1, hi2⟩; apply h1 i
                         constructor; linarith; linarith
                         intro j ⟨hj1, hj2⟩; apply h2 j
                         constructor; linarith; linarith
                         constructor; linarith; linarith

              | inr h => have h2n : (Finset.sum (Finset.range (n + 1)) fun i => a i ^ 3) = (Finset.sum (Finset.range (n + 1)) fun j => a j) ^ 2 := by
                           apply h2 n; constructor; linarith; linarith
                         rw [Finset.sum_range_add, Finset.sum_range_add, Finset.sum_range_one, Finset.sum_range_one] at h2n
                         simp at h2n; rw [h]; rw [h] at hk2

                         have h3 : (Finset.sum (Finset.range n) fun x => a ↑x ^ 3) = (Finset.sum (Finset.range n) fun x => a ↑x) ^ 2 := by
                           have : n = n - 1 + 1 := by symm; apply Nat.sub_add_cancel; exact hk2
                           rw [this]; apply h2 (n-1); constructor; linarith; have t1 : 1 < n := by linarith
                           rw [this] at t1; apply Nat.lt_add_one_iff.mp at t1; exact t1
                         have h4 : (Finset.sum (Finset.range n) fun x => a ↑x) = (n - 1) * n / 2 := by
                           have t1 : ∀ x ∈ Finset.range n, a x = x := by
                             intro x hx; simp at hx; cases le_or_lt x 0 with
                             | inr h'x => apply ih x; exact hx;
                                          intro i ⟨hi1, hi2⟩; apply h1 i; constructor; linarith; exact hi2
                                          intro i ⟨hi1, hi2⟩; apply h2 i; constructor; linarith; exact hi2
                                          constructor; linarith; apply Nat.lt_iff_add_one_le.mp at h'x; linarith
                             | inl h'x => apply Nat.le_zero.mp at h'x; rw [h'x]; simp; exact ha0
                           have t2 : (Finset.sum (Finset.range n) fun x => (x : ℝ)) = (↑n - 1) * ↑n / 2 := sum_id n
                           rw [← t2]; apply Finset.sum_congr; rfl; exact t1
                         rw [h3, h4, add_pow_two, add_assoc] at h2n; apply add_left_cancel at h2n
                         apply sub_eq_zero.mpr at h2n

                         have : a ↑n ^ 3 - (2 * ((↑n - 1) * ↑n / 2) * a ↑n + a ↑n ^ 2) = a ↑n * (a ↑n - n) * (a ↑n + n - 1) := by ring
                         rw [this] at h2n; simp at h2n; cases h2n with
                           | inl h => cases h with
                             | inl h => have : 0 < a (n : ℤ) := by apply h1 n; constructor; linarith; linarith
                                        linarith
                             | inr h => linarith
                           | inr h => have t1 : a (n : ℤ) = 1 - (n : ℤ) := by
                                        rw [add_sub_assoc] at h; apply add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg.mp at h; rw [h]; simp
                                      have t2 : 0 < a (n : ℤ) := by apply h1 n; constructor; linarith; linarith
                                      rw [t1] at t2; have t3 : (n : ℝ) < 1 := by linarith
                                      simp at t3; rw [t3] at t1; simp at t1; linarith

open Polynomial

theorem inequalities_205736 {c x y: ℝ}
    (h : (X ^ 2 + (C (-c)) * X + C (- c)).roots = {x, y}) :
    x ^ 3 + y ^ 3 + (x * y) ^ 3 ≥ 0 := by

let P := X ^ 2 + (C (-c)) * X + C (- c)
  have P_roots : P.roots = {x, y} := by simp only [P]; rw [h]
  have P_deg : P.natDegree = 2 := by simp only [P]; compute_degree!
  have P_coeff_zero : P.coeff 0 = -c := by simp [P]
  have P_nextCoeff : P.nextCoeff = -c := by rw [nextCoeff_of_natDegree_pos (by positivity)]; rw [P_deg]; simp [P]
  have monic : P.Monic := by simp [P]; monicity!
  have splits := splits_iff_card_roots.mpr (show P.roots.card = P.natDegree by simp only [P]; rw [P_deg, h]; simp)

  have e1 : x + y = c := by
    have := sum_roots_eq_nextCoeff_of_monic_of_split monic splits
    rw [P_nextCoeff, P_roots] at this
    simp at this
    linarith only [this]

  have e2 : x * y = -c := by
    have := prod_roots_eq_coeff_zero_of_monic_of_splits monic splits
    rw [P_coeff_zero, P_roots, P_deg] at this
    simp at this
    linarith only [this]

  calc
    _ = (x + y) ^ 3 - 3 * x ^ 2 * y - 3 * x * y ^ 2 + (x * y) ^ 3 := by ring
    _ = c ^ 3 - 3 * x * (-c) - 3 * y * (-c) + (-c) ^ 3 := by
      congr! 1; swap; rw [← e2]
      congr! 1; swap; rw [← e2]; ring
      congr! 1; rw [e1]; rw [← e2]; ring
    _ = 3 * c * (x + y) := by ring
    _ = 3 * c ^ 2 := by rw [e1]; ring
    _ ≥ 0 := by simp [sq_nonneg]

theorem number_theory_286511 (total_people : ℕ) (h : total_people = 1240)
    (people_belief : ℕ) (people_not_belief : ℕ) (people_refuse : ℕ)(h1: people_belief + people_not_belief + people_refuse = total_people)
    (h_people_belief : people_belief = round ((46 / 100 : ℝ) * total_people))
    (h_people_not_belief : people_not_belief = round ((31 / 100 : ℝ) * total_people)) :
    people_belief ≥ 565 ∧ people_refuse ≤ 296 := by

rw [h] at h_people_belief h_people_not_belief
  have h1 : (people_belief : ℝ) = round ((46 / 100 : ℝ) * (1240 : ℕ)) := by
    exact_mod_cast h_people_belief
  have h2 : (people_not_belief : ℝ) = round ((31 / 100 : ℝ) * (1240 : ℕ)) := by
    exact_mod_cast h_people_not_belief
  have h3 : (people_belief : ℝ) = 570 := by
    rw [h1]
    norm_num [round_eq]
  have h4 : (people_not_belief : ℝ) = 384 := by
    rw [h2]
    norm_num [round_eq]
  have h5 : people_belief = 570 := by
    exact_mod_cast h3
  have h6 : people_not_belief = 384 := by
    exact_mod_cast h4
  constructor
  · -- Prove people_belief ≥ 565
    omega
  · -- Prove people_refuse ≤ 296
    omega

  simp[all_people, permutations]
  decide

def appears_before (p1 p2 : Person) (ordering : List Person)
     : Prop :=
  ordering.indexOf p1 < ordering.indexOf p2

instance appears_before_decidable (p1 p2 : Person) (ordering : List Person):
    Decidable (appears_before p1 p2 ordering ) := by
  unfold appears_before
  exact Nat.decLt _ _

def event_E1 : Finset (List Person) :=
  all_orderings.filter (fun ordering =>
    appears_before Person.David Person.Delong ordering
  )

def event_E2 : Finset (List Person) :=
  all_orderings.filter (fun ordering =>
    appears_before Person.David Person.Justin ordering
  )

def event_E1_cap_E2 : Finset (List Person) :=
  event_E1 ∩ event_E2

lemma card_event_E1 : event_E1.card = 3 := by

  rw [show event_E1.card = (all_orderings.filter (fun p => (indexOf Person.David p < indexOf Person.Delong p))).card by
      native_decide
  ]
  simp[indexOf, all_orderings,all_people, permutations]
  decide

lemma card_event_E1_cap_E2 : event_E1_cap_E2.card = 2 := by

  have h_elements : ∀ p ∈ event_E1,
    p ∈ event_E2 ↔
    (p = [Person.David, Person.Delong, Person.Justin] ∨
     p = [Person.David, Person.Justin, Person.Delong]) := by
    intro p hp_E1
    simp [event_E1, mem_filter] at hp_E1
    rcases hp_E1 with ⟨hp_all, h_D_lt_L_prop⟩
    constructor
    intro h
    simp [event_E2, appears_before, all_orderings ,all_people, permutations] at h

    simp [appears_before] at h_D_lt_L_prop
    rcases h with ⟨h | h | h | h | h | h, h1⟩ <;> simp [h] <;> simp [h] at h_D_lt_L_prop
    simp [h] at h1
    intro h
    simp [event_E2, appears_before, all_orderings ,all_people, permutations]

    rcases h with h | h <;>
    simp[h]

  norm_num [card_event_E1, event_E1_cap_E2, event_E2, appears_before]
  native_decide

def final_probability : ℚ :=
  (↑(event_E1_cap_E2.card ) : ℚ) / (↑(event_E1.card) : ℚ)

theorem combinatorics_608741 :
    final_probability = (2 : ℚ) / 3 := by
  unfold final_probability
  rw [card_event_E1_cap_E2, card_event_E1]
  norm_cast

theorem number_theory_104494 (p q : ℕ) (hp : p.Prime) (hq : q.Prime)
    (h : p < q ∧ q < 2 * p) :
    ∃ n, n > 0 ∧ IsGreatest (Nat.primeFactors n) p ∧
    (IsGreatest (Nat.primeFactors (n + 1)) q ∨ IsGreatest (Nat.primeFactors (n - 1)) q):= by

have pq_coprime : gcd p q = 1 := by
      have : p ≠ q := by omega
      rw [← Nat.coprime_primes hp hq] at this
      exact this

    have : ∃ a b : ℤ, - q + 1 ≤ 2 * a ∧ 2 * a ≤ q - 1 ∧ a * p = b * q + 1 := by
      set a1 := Nat.gcdA p q with ha1

      have a1eq : a1 = q * (a1.bdiv q) + (a1.bmod q) := by
        unfold Int.bdiv Int.bmod
        simp only [mul_ite, mul_zero]
        by_cases h' : q = 0
        · exfalso
          exact Nat.Prime.ne_zero hq h'
        · simp only [h', ↓reduceIte]
          by_cases h'' : a1 % ↑q < (↑q + 1) / 2
          · simp only [h'', ↓reduceIte]
            exact Eq.symm (Int.ediv_add_emod a1 ↑q)
          · simp only [h'', ↓reduceIte]
            ring_nf
            exact Eq.symm (Int.ediv_add_emod a1 ↑q)

      use (a1.bmod q)
      use (- Int.gcdB p q - p * a1.bdiv q)
      constructor
      · unfold Int.bmod
        simp only [mul_ite, neg_add_le_iff_le_add]
        by_cases h' : a1 % ↑q < (↑q + 1) / 2
        · simp only [h', ↓reduceIte]
          rw [(by omega : (1 : ℤ) = 1 + 0)]
          gcongr
          · have : q ≠ 0 := Nat.Prime.ne_zero hq
            omega
          · simp only [Nat.ofNat_pos, mul_nonneg_iff_of_pos_left]
            refine Int.emod_nonneg a1 ?_
            exact_mod_cast Nat.Prime.ne_zero hq
        · simp only [h', ↓reduceIte]
          ring_nf
          simp only [not_lt] at h'
          have : q + 1 ≤ a1 % ↑q * 2 := by
            have : q ≠ 2 := by
              have : 2 < q := by
                apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ h.1
                exact Nat.Prime.two_le hp
              omega
            have := Nat.Prime.odd_of_ne_two hq this
            have : 2 ∣ q + 1 := by
              have : Even (q + 1) := by
                simp [this]
              rw [even_iff_two_dvd] at this
              exact this
            obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := this
            rw_mod_cast [hk] at h' ⊢
            ring_nf
            simp only [Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_ofNat, Nat.ofNat_pos, mul_le_mul_right, ge_iff_le]
            simp only [ne_eq, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true, mul_div_cancel_left₀] at h'
            exact h'
          omega

      · constructor
        · unfold Int.bmod
          have : a1 % q < q := by
              nth_rw 2 [(by simp : (q : ℤ) = |(q : ℤ)| )]
              apply Int.emod_lt a1
              exact_mod_cast Nat.Prime.ne_zero hq
          by_cases h' : a1 % ↑q < (↑q + 1) / 2
          all_goals
            simp only [h', ↓reduceIte]
            omega
        · zify at pq_coprime
          have : (gcd p q)= p.gcd q := rfl
          rw [this, Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab p q, ← ha1, a1eq] at pq_coprime
          ring_nf
          rw [← pq_coprime]
          ring_nf
          simp only [self_eq_add_right]
          rw [sub_eq_zero]
          congr

    obtain ⟨a,b,ha1,ha2,hab⟩ := this

    use Int.natAbs a * p

    have anezero : a ≠ 0 := by
      intro hazero
      rw [hazero] at hab
      ring_nf at hab
      symm at hab
      rw [add_comm, ← sub_neg_eq_add, sub_eq_zero] at hab
      have qdvd1 : (q : ℤ) ∣ 1 := by use -b; linarith
      have : Prime q := by rw [← Nat.prime_iff]; exact hq
      apply Prime.not_dvd_one this
      exact_mod_cast qdvd1
    have bnezero : b ≠ 0 := by
      intro hbzero
      rw [hbzero] at hab
      ring_nf at hab
      have pdvd1 : (p : ℤ) ∣ 1 := by use a; linarith
      have : Prime p := by rw [← Nat.prime_iff]; exact hp
      apply Prime.not_dvd_one this
      exact_mod_cast pdvd1
    by_cases apos : a > 0

    · have bpos : 0 < b := by
        have : a * p > 0 := by
          apply Int.mul_pos
          · omega
          · exact_mod_cast Nat.Prime.pos hp
        rw [hab] at this
        have : b * q ≥ 0 := by omega
        simp_rw [Int.mul_nonneg_iff] at this
        omega

      · constructor

        · simp only [gt_iff_lt, CanonicallyOrderedCommSemiring.mul_pos, Int.natAbs_pos]
          constructor
          · intro h; omega
          · exact Nat.Prime.pos hp
        · constructor

          · rw [Nat.primeFactors_mul (by rw [Int.natAbs_ne_zero]; omega) (Nat.Prime.ne_zero hp), IsGreatest]
            constructor

            · simp only [Finset.coe_union, Set.mem_union, Finset.mem_coe, Nat.mem_primeFactors, Int.natAbs_eq_zero, dvd_refl, true_and]
              right
              exact ⟨hp,Nat.Prime.ne_zero hp⟩
            · simp only [Finset.coe_union, upperBounds_union, Set.mem_inter_iff]
              constructor

              · have : q - 1 ≤ 2 * p := by omega
                have : a ≤ p := by omega
                rw [upperBounds]
                simp only [Finset.mem_coe, Nat.mem_primeFactors, ne_eq, Int.natAbs_eq_zero, and_imp, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
                intro p' hp' hpdvd hpnezero
                have : p' ≤ a := by
                  apply Nat.le_of_dvd at hpdvd
                  · omega
                  · simp only [Int.natAbs_pos, ne_eq]
                    omega
                omega

              · rw [upperBounds]
                simp only [Finset.mem_coe, Nat.mem_primeFactors, ne_eq, and_imp, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
                intro p' hp' hpdvd hpnezero
                rw [Nat.dvd_prime hp] at hpdvd

            have : (a.natAbs * p - 1) = b.natAbs * q := by
              have aeq := Int.natAbs_eq a
              have beq := Int.natAbs_eq b
              rcases aeq with aeq | aeq

                  rw_mod_cast [hab]
                  omega
                · omega
              · omega
            rw [this]

            rw [Nat.primeFactors_mul (by rw [Int.natAbs_ne_zero]; omega) (Nat.Prime.ne_zero hq), IsGreatest]
            constructor

            · simp only [Finset.coe_union, Set.mem_union, Finset.mem_coe, Nat.mem_primeFactors, ne_eq, Int.natAbs_eq_zero, dvd_refl, true_and]
              right
              exact ⟨hq,Nat.Prime.ne_zero hq⟩

            · simp only [Finset.coe_union, upperBounds_union, Set.mem_inter_iff]
              constructor

              · have : b * q ≤ a * p := by omega
                have : 2 * a * p ≤ p * q := by
                  rw [mul_comm]
                  gcongr
                  omega
                have : 2 * b * q ≤ p * q := by
                  apply le_trans _ this
                  rw [mul_assoc, mul_assoc]
                  gcongr
                have : 2 * b ≤ p := by
                  apply Int.le_of_mul_le_mul_right this (by exact_mod_cast Nat.Prime.pos hq)
                have : b < q := by omega
                rw [upperBounds]
                simp only [Finset.mem_coe, Nat.mem_primeFactors, ne_eq, Int.natAbs_eq_zero, and_imp, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
                intro q' hq' hqdvd hbnezero
                have : q' ≤ b := by
                  apply Nat.le_of_dvd at hqdvd
                  · omega
                  · simp only [Int.natAbs_pos, ne_eq]
                    exact hbnezero
                omega

              · rw [upperBounds]
                simp only [Finset.mem_coe, Nat.mem_primeFactors, ne_eq, and_imp, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
                intro q' hq' hqdvd hqnezero
                rw [Nat.dvd_prime hq] at hqdvd
                simp [Nat.Prime.ne_one hq'] at hqdvd
                omega

    · simp only [gt_iff_lt, not_lt] at apos
      have bneg : b < 0 := by
        have : a * p < 0 := by
          rw [mul_neg_iff]
          right
          constructor
          · omega
          · exact_mod_cast Nat.Prime.pos hp
        rw [hab] at this
        by_contra bpos
        simp only [gt_iff_lt, not_lt] at bpos
        have : q > 0 := Nat.Prime.pos hq
        have : b * q ≥ 0 := by simp_rw [mul_nonneg_iff]; simp only [Nat.cast_nonneg, and_true, Nat.cast_nonpos]; left; exact bpos
        linarith
      constructor
      · simp only [gt_iff_lt, CanonicallyOrderedCommSemiring.mul_pos, Int.natAbs_pos, ne_eq]
        constructor
        · exact anezero
        · exact Nat.Prime.pos hp
      · constructor
        · unfold IsGreatest
          constructor
          · rw [Nat.primeFactors_mul (by simp [anezero]) (Nat.Prime.ne_zero hp)]
            simp only [Finset.coe_union, Set.mem_union, Finset.mem_coe, Nat.mem_primeFactors, ne_eq, Int.natAbs_eq_zero, dvd_refl, true_and]
            right
            exact ⟨hp,Nat.Prime.ne_zero hp⟩
          · rw [upperBounds]
            simp only [Finset.mem_coe, Nat.mem_primeFactors, ne_eq, mul_eq_zero, Int.natAbs_eq_zero, not_or, and_imp, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
            intro p' hp' hpdvd hanezero hpnezero
            rw [Nat.Prime.dvd_mul hp'] at hpdvd
            rcases hpdvd with hpdvd | hpdvd
            · have : p' ≤ a.natAbs := by
                apply Nat.le_of_dvd
                · omega
                · exact hpdvd
              apply le_trans this
              omega
            · apply Nat.le_of_dvd
              · exact Nat.Prime.pos hp
              · exact hpdvd
        · have eq : b.natAbs * q = a.natAbs * p + 1 := by
            have : b = - b.natAbs := by
              rw [← neg_eq_iff_eq_neg]
              symm
              refine (Int.natAbs_inj_of_nonneg_of_nonpos ?_ ?_).mp rfl
              · simp
              · omega
            rw [this] at hab
            have : a = - a.natAbs := by
              rw [← neg_eq_iff_eq_neg]
              symm
              refine (Int.natAbs_inj_of_nonneg_of_nonpos ?_ ?_).mp rfl
              · simp
              · omega
            rw [this] at hab
            ring_nf at hab
            omega
          left
          unfold IsGreatest
          constructor
          · rw [← eq]
            simp only [Finset.mem_coe, Nat.mem_primeFactors, dvd_mul_left, ne_eq, mul_eq_zero, Int.natAbs_eq_zero, not_or, true_and]
            constructor
            · exact hq
            · constructor
              · omega
              · exact Nat.Prime.ne_zero hq
          · rw [← eq, upperBounds]
            simp only [Finset.mem_coe, Nat.mem_primeFactors, ne_eq, mul_eq_zero, Int.natAbs_eq_zero, not_or, and_imp, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
            intro p' hp' hpdvd hbnezero hpnezero
            rw [Nat.Prime.dvd_mul hp'] at hpdvd
            rcases hpdvd with hpdvd | hpdvd
            · have : p' ≤ b.natAbs := by
                apply Nat.le_of_dvd
                · omega
