open Finset Set Nat
noncomputable section
theorem number_theory_640586 (k : ℕ) :
    ((3^k + 3^(k+1)) * (3^(k+1) + 3^(k+2)) * (3^(k+2) + 3^(k+3)) *
    (3^(k+3) + 3^(k+4))).divisors.card % 1000 = (36 * k + 63) % 1000 := by

let N := (3^k + 3^(k+1)) * (3^(k+1) + 3^(k+2)) * (3^(k+2) + 3^(k+3)) * (3^(k+3) + 3^(k+4))

  have hN_factor : N = 2^8 * 3^(4*k + 6) := by

    have h1 : 3^k + 3^(k+1) = 2^2 * 3^k := by
      rw [Nat.pow_succ]
      have : 4 = 2^2 := rfl
      rw [← this]
      ring
    have h2 : 3^(k+1) + 3^(k+2) = 2^2 * 3^(k+1) := by
      have : k+2 = k + 1 + 1 := rfl
      rw [this]
      rw [Nat.pow_succ 3 (k + 1)]
      have : 4 = 2^2 := rfl
      rw [← this]
      ring
    have h3 : 3^(k+2) + 3^(k+3) = 2^2 * 3^(k+2) := by
      have : k + 3 = k + 2 + 1 := rfl
      rw [this]
      rw [Nat.pow_succ 3 (k + 2)]
      have : 4 = 2^2 := rfl
      rw [← this]
      ring
    have h4 : 3^(k+3) + 3^(k+4) = 2^2 * 3^(k+3) := by
      have : k + 4 = k + 3 + 1 := rfl
      rw [this]
      rw [Nat.pow_succ 3 (k + 3)]
      have : 4 = 2^2 := rfl
      rw [← this]
      ring

    unfold N
    rw [h1, h2, h3, h4]
    rw [← Nat.mul_assoc, ← Nat.mul_assoc, ← Nat.mul_assoc]
    ring

  have h_divisors : N.divisors.card = 36 * k + 63 := by
    rw [hN_factor]

    have hN_nonzero : 2^8 * 3^(4*k + 6) ≠ 0 := by
      apply Nat.mul_ne_zero
      · exact pow_ne_zero 8 (by norm_num)
      · exact pow_ne_zero (4*k + 6) (by norm_num)
    have : (2^8 * 3^(4*k + 6)).divisors.card = ∏ x ∈ (2^8 * 3^(4*k + 6)).primeFactors, ((2^8 * 3^(4*k + 6)).factorization x + 1) := by
      apply Nat.card_divisors hN_nonzero
    rw [this]
    have h_prime_factors : (2^8 * 3^(4*k + 6)).primeFactors = {2, 3} := by
      rw [Nat.primeFactors_mul]
      · have h_nezero1: 4 * k + 6 ≠ 0 := by omega
        have h_nezero2: 8 ≠ 0 := by linarith
        rw [Nat.primeFactors_pow , Nat.primeFactors_pow ]
        have h_p2 : Nat.Prime 2 := by norm_num
        have h_p3 : Nat.Prime 3 := by norm_num
        simp [Nat.Prime.primeFactors h_p2,Nat.Prime.primeFactors h_p3]
        rfl
        exact h_nezero1
        exact h_nezero2
      · exact pow_ne_zero 8 (by norm_num)
      · exact pow_ne_zero (4*k + 6) (by norm_num)
    rw [h_prime_factors]

    have h_factorization_2 : (2^8 * 3^(4*k + 6)).factorization 2 = 8 := by
      rw [Nat.factorization_mul, Nat.factorization_pow, Nat.factorization_pow]
      simp
      · norm_num
      · exact pow_ne_zero 8 (by norm_num)
      · exact pow_ne_zero (4*k + 6) (by norm_num)
    have h_factorization_3 : (2^8 * 3^(4*k + 6)).factorization 3 = 4*k + 6 := by
      rw [Nat.factorization_mul, Nat.factorization_pow, Nat.factorization_pow]
      simp
      · norm_num
      · exact pow_ne_zero 8 (by norm_num)
      · exact pow_ne_zero (4*k + 6) (by norm_num)

    have : ∏ x ∈ ({2, 3} : Finset ℕ), ((2^8 * 3^(4*k + 6)).factorization x + 1) = (8 + 1) * ((4*k + 6) + 1) := by
      rw [Finset.prod_pair]
      · rw [h_factorization_2, h_factorization_3]
      · norm_num

    have h₁: 8 + 1 = 9 := by norm_num
    have h₂: 4 * k + 6 + 1 = 4 * k + 7 := by ring
    have h₃: 9 * (4 * k + 7) = 36 * k + 63 := by ring
    rw [this, h₁, h₂, h₃]

  have h_mod : N.divisors.card % 1000 = (36 * k + 63) % 1000 := by
    rw [h_divisors]

  exact h_mod

lemma sum_splits (a b c: ℕ) (h1: a ≤ b) (h2: b ≤ c):
  ∑ i ∈ Icc a c, Nat.factorial i = (∑ i ∈ Icc a b, Nat.factorial i) + (∑ i ∈ Icc (b + 1) c, Nat.factorial i) := by

    have s1: Icc a c = Icc a b ∪ Icc (b + 1) c := by
      ext i
      constructor
      .
        intro h
        simp at h
        simp
        by_cases l: i ≤ b
        .
          left
          omega
        .
          right
          omega
      .
        intro h
        simp at h
        rcases h with h | h
        .
          simp
          omega
        .
          simp
          omega

    have s2: Disjoint (Icc a b) (Icc (b + 1) c) := by
      intro x h1 h2
      simp at h1 h2
      simp
      ext y
      simp
      by_contra! h
      have l1: y ∈ Icc a b := by
        exact Set.mem_of_mem_of_subset h h1
      have l2: y ∈ Icc (b + 1) c := by
        exact Set.mem_of_mem_of_subset h h2
      simp at l1 l2
      omega

    rw [s1]
    clear s1
    rw [Finset.sum_union]
    exact s2

lemma sq_mod_5 (n: ℕ): n ^ 2 % 5 = 0 ∨ n ^ 2 % 5 = 1 ∨ n ^ 2 % 5 = 4 := by
  rw [Nat.pow_mod]
  set b:= n % 5
  have o: b < 5 := by omega
  clear_value b
  interval_cases b
  all_goals simp

theorem number_theory_310562: {(m, n, k): ℕ × ℕ × ℕ | 1 < m ∧ 1 < n ∧ 1 < k ∧ ∑ i ∈ Icc 1 m, Nat.factorial i = n ^ k}
  = {(3, 3, 2)} := by

have s1: Icc a c = Icc a b ∪ Icc (b + 1) c := by
      ext i
      constructor
      .
        intro h
        simp at h
        simp
        by_cases l: i ≤ b
        .
          left
          omega
        .
          right
          omega
      .
        intro h
        simp at h
        rcases h with h | h
        .
          simp
          omega
        .
          simp
          omega

    have s2: Disjoint (Icc a b) (Icc (b + 1) c) := by
      intro x h1 h2
      simp at h1 h2
      simp
      ext y
      simp
      by_contra! h
      have l1: y ∈ Icc a b := by
        exact Set.mem_of_mem_of_subset h h1
      have l2: y ∈ Icc (b + 1) c := by
        exact Set.mem_of_mem_of_subset h h2
      simp at l1 l2
      omega

    rw [s1]
    clear s1
    rw [Finset.sum_union]
    exact s2

lemma sq_mod_5 (n: ℕ): n ^ 2 % 5 = 0 ∨ n ^ 2 % 5 = 1 ∨ n ^ 2 % 5 = 4 := by
  rw [Nat.pow_mod]
  set b:= n % 5
  have o: b < 5 := by omega
  clear_value b
  interval_cases b
  all_goals simp

theorem number_theory_310562: {(m, n, k): ℕ × ℕ × ℕ | 1 < m ∧ 1 < n ∧ 1 < k ∧ ∑ i ∈ Icc 1 m, Nat.factorial i = n ^ k}
  = {(3, 3, 2)} := by

    ext ⟨m, n, k⟩
    constructor

    .
      intro h
      simp at h
      rcases h with ⟨hm, hn, hk, h⟩
      simp
      by_cases l: m < 8

      .
        have r: n ^ 2 ≤ n ^ k := by
          apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right
          omega
          omega
        interval_cases m

        .
          simp [Finset.sum_Icc_succ_top] at h
          have d: n ∣ 3 := by
            rw [show n = n ^ 1 by simp]
            rw [h]
            apply Nat.pow_dvd_pow
            omega
          apply Nat.le_of_dvd at d
          interval_cases n
          .
            have o: 2 ∣ 3 := by
              rw [show 2 = 2 ^ 1 by simp]
              rw [h]
              apply Nat.pow_dvd_pow
              omega
            norm_num at o
          .
            symm at h
            rw [Nat.pow_eq_self_iff ] at h
            simp [h] at hk
            norm_num
          norm_num

        .
          simp [Finset.sum_Icc_succ_top] at h
          rw [show 3 + 3! = 9 by decide] at h
          rw [← h] at r
          have ln: n ≤ 3:= by nlinarith
          interval_cases n
          .
            have o: 2 ∣ 9 := by
              rw [show 2 = 2 ^ 1 by simp]
              rw [h]
              apply Nat.pow_dvd_pow
              omega
            norm_num at o
          .
            rw [show 9 = 3 ^ 2 by decide] at h
            rw [pow_right_inj₀] at h
            simp [h]
            norm_num
            norm_num

        .
          simp [Finset.sum_Icc_succ_top] at h
          rw [show 3 + 3! + 4! = 33 by decide] at h
          rw [← h] at r
          have ln: n ≤ 5 := by nlinarith
          have dn: 11 ∣ n := by
            have o: 11 ∣ n ^ k := by
              rw [← h]
              norm_num
            apply Nat.Prime.dvd_of_dvd_pow at o
            exact o
            norm_num
          apply Nat.le_of_dvd at dn
          linarith
          linarith

        .
          simp [Finset.sum_Icc_succ_top] at h
          rw [show 3 + 3! + 4! + 5! = 153 by decide] at h
          rw [← h] at r
          have ln: n ≤ 12 := by nlinarith
          have dn: 17 ∣ n := by
            have o: 17 ∣ n ^ k := by
              rw [← h]
              norm_num
            apply Nat.Prime.dvd_of_dvd_pow at o
            exact o
            norm_num
          apply Nat.le_of_dvd at dn
          linarith
          linarith

        .
          simp [Finset.sum_Icc_succ_top] at h
          rw [show 3 + 3! + 4! + 5! + 6! = 873 by decide] at h
          rw [← h] at r
          have ln: n ≤ 29 := by nlinarith
          have dn: 97 ∣ n := by
            have o: 97 ∣ n ^ k := by
              rw [← h]
              norm_num
            apply Nat.Prime.dvd_of_dvd_pow at o
            exact o
            norm_num
          apply Nat.le_of_dvd at dn
          linarith
          linarith

        .
          simp [Finset.sum_Icc_succ_top] at h
          rw [show 3 + 3! + 4! + 5! + 6! + 7! = 5913 by decide] at h
          rw [← h] at r
          have ln: n ≤ 77 := by nlinarith
          have dn: 73 ∣ n := by
            have o: 73 ∣ n ^ k := by
              rw [← h]
              norm_num
            apply Nat.Prime.dvd_of_dvd_pow at o
            exact o
            norm_num
          apply exists_eq_mul_right_of_dvd at dn
          obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := dn
          have lt: t = 1 := by omega
          simp [lt] at ht
          simp [ht] at h
          have o: 3 ∣ 73 := by
            have o: 3 ∣ 5913 := by norm_num
            rw [h] at o
            apply Nat.Prime.dvd_of_dvd_pow at o
            exact o
            norm_num
          norm_num at o

      .
        simp at l

        have vk: k = 2 := by
          by_contra! lk
          replace lk: 3 ≤ k := by omega
          have eq: ∑ i ∈ Icc 1 m, Nat.factorial i =
            (∑ i ∈ Icc 1 8, Nat.factorial i) + (∑ i ∈ Icc 9 m, Nat.factorial i) := by
            exact sum_splits 1 8 m (by omega) (by omega)
          have o: ∑ i ∈ Icc 1 8, Nat.factorial i = 46233 := by
            simp [Finset.sum_Icc_succ_top]
            decide
          rw [o] at eq
          clear o

          have f: 27 ∣ ∑ i ∈ Icc 9 m, Nat.factorial i := by
            apply Finset.dvd_sum
            intro i hi
            simp at hi
            have g: 27 ∣ 9! := by
              rw [show 9! = 362880 by decide]
              norm_num
            have g2: 9! ∣ Nat.factorial i := by
              apply Nat.factorial_dvd_factorial
              omega
            apply dvd_trans g g2
          rw [h] at eq
          clear h
          have f2: 3 ∣ n ^ k := by
            rw [eq]
            apply Nat.dvd_add
            .
              norm_num
            .
              have o: 3 ∣ 27 := by norm_num
              apply dvd_trans o f
          apply Nat.Prime.dvd_of_dvd_pow at f2
          replace f2: 27 ∣ n ^ k := by
            have o: 27 ∣ n ^ 3 := by
              rw [show 27 = 3 ^ 3 by simp]
              rw [Nat.pow_dvd_pow_iff]
              exact f2
              norm_num
            have o2: n ^ 3 ∣ n ^ k := by
              apply Nat.pow_dvd_pow
              omega
            apply dvd_trans o o2
          rw [eq] at f2
          have c: 27 ∣ 46233 := by
            rw [show 46233 = 46233 + ∑ i ∈ Icc 9 m, Nat.factorial i - ∑ i ∈ Icc 9 m, Nat.factorial i by omega]
            apply Nat.dvd_sub
            omega
            exact f2
            exact f
          norm_num at c
          norm_num

        .
          simp [vk] at *
          clear hk vk

          have o: n ^ 2 % 5 = 3 := by
            rw [← h]
            clear h hn
            rw [sum_splits 1 4 m (by omega) (by omega)]
            rw [show 4 + 1 = 5 by simp]
            rw [show ∑ i ∈ Icc 1 4, Nat.factorial i = 33 by decide]
            rw [Nat.add_mod]
            rw [show 33 % 5 = 3 by decide]
            have r: (∑ i ∈ Icc 5 m, Nat.factorial i) % 5 = 0 := by
              apply Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd
              apply Finset.dvd_sum
              intro i hi
              simp at hi
              apply Nat.dvd_factorial
              norm_num
              omega
            simp [r]

          have c:= sq_mod_5 n
          simp [o] at c

    .
      intro h
      simp at h
      simp [h]
      simp [Finset.sum_Icc_succ_top]
      decide

theorem inequalities_117037
    (a b c : ℝ)
    (ha : a ∈ Set.Icc 2 4)
    (hb : b ∈ Set.Icc 2 4)
    (hc : c ∈ Set.Icc 2 4) :
    2 / (a + b ^ 2 + c ^ 3) + 2 / (b + c ^ 2 + a ^ 3) +
    2 / (c + a ^ 2 + b ^ 3) ≤
    3 / (a + b + c)
  := by

rw [←tsub_nonpos]

    convert_to (2 / (a + b ^ 2 + c ^ 3) - 1 / (a + b + c)) + (2 / (b + c ^ 2 + a ^ 3) - 1 / (a + b + c)) + (2 / (c + a ^ 2 + b ^ 3) - 1 / (a + b + c)) ≤ 0
    · ring

    convert_to (2 / (a + b ^ 2 + c ^ 3) - 1 / (a + b + c)) + (2 / (b + c ^ 2 + a ^ 3) - 1 / (b + c + a)) + (2 / (c + a ^ 2 + b ^ 3) - 1 / (c + a + b)) ≤ 0
    · ring

    have nonpositive : ∀ {a b c : ℝ}, a ∈ Set.Icc 2 4 → b ∈ Set.Icc 2 4 → c ∈ Set.Icc 2 4 → (2 / (a + b ^ 2 + c ^ 3) - 1 / (a + b + c)) ≤ 0 := by
      intro a b c ha hb hc

      have : 0 < a := by linarith only [Set.mem_Icc.mp ha]
      have : 0 < b := by linarith only [Set.mem_Icc.mp hb]
      have : 0 < c := by linarith only [Set.mem_Icc.mp hc]

      have pos_pows : (a + b ^ 2 + c ^ 3) ≠ 0 := by positivity
      have pos_sum : (a + b + c) ≠ 0 := by positivity
      rw [div_sub_div _ _ pos_pows pos_sum]

      have div_le_zero : ∀ {x y : ℝ}, x ≤ 0 → 0 < y → x / y ≤ 0 := by
        intro x y hx hy
        rw [←mul_le_mul_left hy, mul_zero, mul_div_cancel₀ x (ne_of_lt hy).symm]
        exact hx

      apply div_le_zero

      · convert_to a + b * (2 - b) + c * (2 - c ^ 2) ≤ 0
        · ring

        have bound_a : a ≤ 4 := (Set.mem_Icc.mp ha).2
        have bound_b : b * (2 - b) ≤ 0 := by
          nlinarith only [Set.mem_Icc.mp hb]
        have bound_c : c * (2 - c ^ 2) ≤ -4 := by
          nlinarith only [Set.mem_Icc.mp hc]

        linarith only [bound_a, bound_b, bound_c]

      · positivity

    linarith only [nonpositive ha hb hc, nonpositive hb hc ha, nonpositive hc ha hb]

theorem number_theory_605479 (k : ℕ) (a b : Fin k → ℝ)
    (h : ∃ d, ∀ n : ℕ, ∑ i, ⌊a i * n + b i⌋ = ∑ i, ⌊a i * 0 + b i⌋ + d * n) :
    ∃ m : ℤ, ∑ i, a i = m := by

rcases k.eq_zero_or_pos with hk | hk; · subst hk; use 0; simp

  let X : ℕ → ℤ := fun n ↦ ∑ i, ⌊a i * n + b i⌋
  rw [show (0 : ℝ) = (0 : ℕ) by norm_cast] at h
  change ∃ d, ∀ n, X n = X 0 + d * n at h
  set A := ∑ i, a i
  let B := ∑ i, b i
  have AnB : ∀ n, A * n + B = ∑ i, (a i * n + b i) := fun n ↦ by
    unfold A B; rw [sum_mul, sum_add_distrib]

  have X_bounds : ∀ (n : ℕ), (X n : ℝ) ∈ Set.Ioc (A * n + B - k) (A * n + B) := fun n ↦ by
    simp_rw [X, Int.cast_sum, AnB]
    constructor
    · simp_rw [show k = ∑ i : Fin k, 1 by simp, Nat.cast_sum, ← sum_sub_distrib, Nat.cast_one]
      exact sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty ⟨⟨0, hk⟩, mem_univ _⟩ fun i _ ↦ Int.sub_one_lt_floor _
    · exact sum_le_sum fun i _ ↦ Int.floor_le _

  obtain ⟨d, hd⟩ := h

  have nd_bounds : ∀ (n : ℕ),
      (n * d : ℝ) ∈ Set.Ioc (A * n + (B - X 0) - k) (A * n + (B - X 0)) := fun n ↦ by
    have := X_bounds n
    rw [hd n, Int.cast_add, Int.cast_mul, Int.cast_natCast, mul_comm (d : ℝ)] at this
    rw [Set.mem_Ioc] at this ⊢
    constructor
    · replace this := this.1
      rwa [← add_sub_assoc, sub_right_comm, sub_lt_iff_lt_add, add_comm _ (X 0 : ℝ)]
    · replace this := this.2
      rwa [← add_sub_assoc, le_sub_iff_add_le, add_comm _ (X 0 : ℝ)]

  replace nd_bounds : ∀ (n : ℕ), (n * d : ℝ) ∈ Set.Ioo (A * n - k) (A * n + k) := fun n ↦ by
    obtain ⟨lb, ub⟩ := X_bounds 0
    rw [Nat.cast_zero, mul_zero, zero_add] at lb ub
    refine ⟨lt_of_le_of_lt ?_ (nd_bounds n).1, (nd_bounds n).2.trans_lt ?_⟩
    · rwa [sub_le_sub_iff_right, le_add_iff_nonneg_right, sub_nonneg]
    · rwa [add_lt_add_iff_left, sub_lt_comm]

  have diff_bounds : ∀ (n : ℕ), 0 < n → |A - d| < k / n := fun n hn ↦ by
    rw [abs_sub_lt_iff, lt_div_iff₀ (Nat.cast_pos'.mpr hn), lt_div_iff₀ (Nat.cast_pos'.mpr hn),
      sub_mul, sub_mul, sub_lt_comm]
    nth_rw 2 [sub_lt_iff_lt_add']
    rw [← Set.mem_Ioo, mul_comm (d : ℝ)]
    exact nd_bounds n

  use d
  suffices |A - d| = 0 by rwa [abs_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] at this
  apply eq_of_ge_of_not_gt (abs_nonneg (A - d)); by_contra h
  obtain ⟨n₀, hn₀⟩ := exists_nat_one_div_lt h
  specialize diff_bounds ((n₀ + 1) * k) (Nat.succ_mul_pos n₀ hk)
  rw [Nat.cast_mul, div_mul_cancel_right₀ (by positivity), inv_eq_one_div, Nat.cast_add,
    Nat.cast_one] at diff_bounds
  exact lt_asymm hn₀ diff_bounds

theorem algebra_608794: {x: ℤ | ∃ a: ℤ, (Prime a) ∧ (0 < a) ∧ (∃ n: ℕ, 1 ≤ n ∧ 2 * x ^ 2 + x - 6 = a ^ n)} = {-3,2,5} := by

ext x
  constructor

  . intro h
    simp at h
    obtain ⟨a,hap,ha,n,hn,h⟩ := h
    simp
    have id: 2 * x ^ 2 + x - 6 = (2 * x - 3) * (x + 2) := by ring
    rw [id] at h
    clear id
    by_contra! rr -- for convenience, we assume the contrary --

    have d1: a ∣ 2 * x - 3 := by
       rw [show (a: ℤ) ^ n = 1 * a ^ n by ring] at h
       apply mul_eq_mul_prime_pow hap at h
       obtain ⟨i,j,b,c,hij,hbc,hb,hc⟩ := h
       by_cases t: 1 ≤ i
       . rw [hb]
         have o: a ∣ a ^ i := by
            apply dvd_pow_self
            omega
         have s: a ^ i ∣ b * a ^ i := by
            apply dvd_mul_left
         apply dvd_trans o s
       . simp at t
         simp [t] at hb
         by_cases ss: 0 ≤ b
         . symm at hbc
           have l:= hbc
           apply Int.eq_one_of_mul_eq_one_right at hbc
           simp [hbc] at l
           simp [l] at hc
           simp [hbc] at hb
           replace hb : x = 2 := by omega
           omega
           exact ss
         . simp at ss
           set u:= -b with hu
           replace hu: b = -u := by simp [hu]
           set v:= -c with hv
           replace hv: c = -v := by simp [hv]
           simp [hu,hv] at hbc
           symm at hbc
           have l:= hbc
           apply Int.eq_one_of_mul_eq_one_right at hbc
           simp [hbc] at hu
           simp [hu] at hb
           simp [hbc] at l
           simp [l] at hv
           simp [hv] at hc
           replace hb: x = 1 := by omega
           simp [hb] at hc
           have contra: -a ^ j ≤ 0 := by
             have o: 0 ≤ a ^ j := by
              apply Nonneg.pow_nonneg
              omega
             omega
           rw [← hc] at contra
           tauto
           omega

    have d2: a ∣ x + 2 := by
       rw [show (a: ℤ) ^ n = 1 * a ^ n by ring] at h
       apply mul_eq_mul_prime_pow hap at h
       obtain ⟨i,j,b,c,hij,hbc,hb,hc⟩ := h
       by_cases t: 1 ≤ j
       . rw [hc]
         have o: a ∣ a ^ j := by
            apply dvd_pow_self
            omega
         have s: a ^ j ∣ c * a ^ j := by
            apply dvd_mul_left
         apply dvd_trans o s
       . simp at t
         simp [t] at hc
         by_cases ss: 0 ≤ b
         . symm at hbc
           have l:= hbc
           apply Int.eq_one_of_mul_eq_one_right at hbc
           simp [hbc] at l
           simp [l] at hc
           simp [hbc] at hb
           replace hc : x = -1 := by omega
           simp [hc] at hb
           have q: 0 ≤ a ^ i := by
             apply Nonneg.pow_nonneg
             omega
           rw [← hb] at q
           tauto
           exact ss
         . simp at ss
           set u:= -b with hu
           replace hu: b = -u := by simp [hu]
           set v:= -c with hv
           replace hv: c = -v := by simp [hv]
           simp [hu,hv] at hbc
           symm at hbc
           have l:= hbc
           apply Int.eq_one_of_mul_eq_one_right at hbc
           simp [hbc] at hu
           simp [hu] at hb
           simp [hbc] at l
           simp [l] at hv
           simp [hv] at hc
           replace hb: x = 1 := by omega
           simp [hb] at hc
           have contra: -a ^ j ≤ 0 := by
             have o: 0 ≤ a ^ j := by
              apply Nonneg.pow_nonneg
              omega
             omega
           omega

    have d3: a ∣ 7 := by
      rw [show 7 = 2 * (x + 2) - (2 * x - 3) by ring]
      replace d2: a ∣ 2 * (x + 2) := by
        have o: x + 2 ∣ 2 * (x + 2) := by
          apply dvd_mul_left
        apply dvd_trans d2 o
      apply Int.dvd_sub d2 d1

    have a_val: a = 7 := by
      have o: a.natAbs ∣ 7 := by
        rw [← Int.natAbs_dvd_natAbs] at d3
        simp at d3
        exact d3
      have hp: Nat.Prime 7 := by norm_num
      rw [Nat.Prime.dvd_iff_eq hp] at o
      omega
      by_contra! no
      replace no: a = 1 ∨ a = -1 := by omega
      rcases no with no | no
      . rw [no] at hap
        absurd hap
        norm_num
      . rw [no] at ha
        omega

    simp [a_val] at *
    clear d1 d2
    have H:= h
    rw [show (7: ℤ) ^ n = 1 * 7 ^ n by ring] at H
    replace hap: Prime (7: ℤ) := by norm_num
    apply mul_eq_mul_prime_pow hap at H
    obtain ⟨i,j,b,c,hij,hbc,hb,hc⟩ := H
    clear hap
    by_cases rb: 0 ≤ b

    . symm at hbc
      have l:= hbc
      apply Int.eq_one_of_mul_eq_one_right at hbc
      simp [hbc] at l
      simp [l] at hc
      simp [hbc] at hb
      clear hbc rb d3 a_val ha h hn
      by_cases o: 2 ≤ i

      . have j_val: j < 2 := by
          by_contra! no
          replace hc: 7 ^ 2 ∣ x + 2 := by
            rw [hc]
            apply pow_dvd_pow
            exact no
          replace hb: 7 ^ 2 ∣ 2 * x - 3 := by
            rw [hb]
            apply pow_dvd_pow
            exact o
          have contra: 7 ^ 2 ∣ (7: ℤ) := by
            nth_rewrite 2[show (7: ℤ)  = 2 * (x + 2) - (2 * x - 3) by ring]
            replace hc: 7 ^ 2 ∣ 2 * (x + 2) := by
              have f: x + 2 ∣ 2 * (x + 2) := by
                apply dvd_mul_left
              apply dvd_trans hc f
            apply Int.dvd_sub hc hb
          omega
        replace j_val: j = 0 ∨ j = 1 := by omega
        rcases j_val with j_val | j_val
        . simp [j_val] at hc
          replace hc: x = -1 := by omega
          simp [hc] at hb
          have v: (7: ℤ) ∣ 7 ^ i := by
            apply dvd_pow_self
            omega
          rw [← hb] at v
          omega
        . simp [j_val] at hc
          omega

      . replace o: i = 0 ∨ i = 1 := by omega
        rcases o with o | o
        . simp [o] at hb
          replace hb: x = 2 := by omega
          omega
        . simp [o] at hb
          replace hb: x = 5 := by omega
          omega
      exact rb

    . simp at rb
      set u:= -b with hu
      replace hu: b = -u := by simp [hu]
      set v:= -c with hv
      replace hv: c = -v := by simp [hv]
      simp [hu,hv] at hbc
      symm at hbc
      have l:= hbc
      apply Int.eq_one_of_mul_eq_one_right at hbc
      simp [hbc] at hu
      simp [hu] at hb
      simp [hbc] at l
      simp [l] at hv
      simp [hv] at hc
      clear hij hu hv l hbc rb d3 a_val ha hn
      by_cases o: 2 ≤ i

      . have j_val: j < 2 := by
          by_contra! no
          replace hc: 7 ^ 2 ∣ x + 2 := by
            rw [hc]
            rw [Int.dvd_neg]
            apply pow_dvd_pow
            exact no
          replace hb: 7 ^ 2 ∣ 2 * x - 3 := by
            rw [hb]
            rw [Int.dvd_neg]
            apply pow_dvd_pow
            exact o
          have contra: 7 ^ 2 ∣ (7: ℤ) := by
            nth_rewrite 2[show (7: ℤ)  = 2 * (x + 2) - (2 * x - 3) by ring]
            replace hc: 7 ^ 2 ∣ 2 * (x + 2) := by
              have f: x + 2 ∣ 2 * (x + 2) := by
                apply dvd_mul_left
              apply dvd_trans hc f
            apply Int.dvd_sub hc hb
          omega
        replace j_val: j = 0 ∨ j = 1 := by omega
        rcases j_val with j_val | j_val
        . simp [j_val] at hc
          replace hc: x = -3 := by omega
          omega
        . simp [j_val] at hc
          replace hc: x = -9 := by omega
          simp [hc] at hb
          have il: i < 2 := by
            by_contra! no
            have contra: 7 ^ 2 ≤ (21: ℤ)  := by
              rw [hb]
              rw [pow_le_pow_iff_right₀]
              exact no
              norm_num
            tauto
          replace il : i ≤ 1 := by omega
          have contra: (21: ℤ) ≤ 7 ^ 1 := by
            rw [hb]
            rw [pow_le_pow_iff_right₀]
            exact il
            norm_num
          tauto

      . replace o: i = 0 ∨ i = 1 := by omega
        rcases o with o | o
        . simp [o] at hb
          replace hb: x = 1 := by omega
          simp [hb] at hc
          have v: (7: ℤ) ∣ -7 ^ j := by
            rw [Int.dvd_neg]
            apply dvd_pow_self
            by_contra! no
            simp [no] at hc
          rw [←hc] at v
          omega
        . simp [o] at hb
          replace hb: x = -2 := by omega
          simp [hb] at hc
      omega

  . intro h
    simp at h
    simp
    rcases h with h | h | h

    . simp [h]
      use 3
      simp
      norm_num
      use 2
      simp

    . simp [h]
      use 2
      simp
      norm_num
      use 2
      simp

    . simp [h]
      use 7
      simp
      norm_num
      use 2
      simp

theorem algebra_599852:
  IsGreatest {y | ∃ x : ℝ, x ∈ Ioo 0 (π/2) ∧ y = 3 * cos x + 4 * sqrt (1 + sin x ^ 2)} (5 * sqrt 2) := by

have cauchy_ineq: ∀ a b c d: ℝ, 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∧ 0 < c ∧ 0 < d →
  (a * c + b * d) ^ 2 ≤ (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) * (c ^ 2 + d ^ 2) := by
    intro a b c d h
    rcases h with ⟨ha, hb, hc, hd⟩
    have ineq: 0 ≤ (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) * (c ^ 2 + d ^ 2) - (a * c + b * d) ^ 2 := by
      rw [show (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) * (c ^ 2 + d ^ 2) - (a * c + b * d) ^ 2
       = (a * d - b * c) ^ 2 by ring]
      apply sq_nonneg
    nlinarith

  constructor

  .
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    use arccos (3 / 5 * √2)
    constructor
    .
      simp
      rw [show 3 / 5 * √2 = 3 * √2 / 5 by ring]
      rw [div_lt_one]
      .
        rw [← sq_lt_sq₀]
        rw [show (3 * √2) ^ 2 = 9 * √2 ^ 2 by ring]
        rw [show √2 ^ 2 = 2 by norm_num]
        norm_num
        have o:= sqrt_nonneg 2
        nlinarith
        norm_num
      .
        norm_num
    .
      rw [Real.cos_arccos]
      rw [Real.sin_arccos]
      rw [show (3 / 5 * √2) ^ 2 = 9 / 25 * √2 ^ 2 by ring]
      rw [show √2 ^ 2 = 2 by norm_num]
      norm_num
      rw [show (√7 / √25) ^ 2 = √7 ^ 2 / √25 ^ 2 by ring]
      rw [Real.sq_sqrt]
      rw [Real.sq_sqrt]
      rw [show (1: ℝ) + 7 / 25 = 32 / 25 by norm_num]
      rw [Real.sqrt_div]
      have s1: √32 = 4 * √2 := by
        rw [← sq_eq_sq₀]
        rw [Real.sq_sqrt]
        ring_nf
        rw [Real.sq_sqrt]
        all_goals norm_num
      have s2: √25 = 5 := by
        rw [← sq_eq_sq₀]
        rw [Real.sq_sqrt]
        all_goals norm_num
      rw [s1,s2]
      ring
      all_goals norm_num
      . have o: 0 ≤ √2 := by apply Real.sqrt_nonneg
        nlinarith
      . rw [show 3 / 5 * √2 = 3 * √2 / 5 by ring]
        rw [div_le_one]
        rw [← sq_le_sq₀]
        rw [show (3 * √2) ^ 2 = 9 * √2 ^ 2 by ring]
        rw [show √2 ^ 2 = 2 by norm_num]
        norm_num
        have o:= sqrt_nonneg 2
        nlinarith
        norm_num
        norm_num

  .
    intro y h
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h
    obtain ⟨x, hx, h⟩ := h
    replace hx: 0 < cos x := by
      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
      simp at *
      rcases hx with ⟨l1, l2⟩
      constructor
      .
        nlinarith [Real.pi_gt_d2]
      .
        nlinarith [Real.pi_gt_d2]
    have hy: y ^ 2 ≤ 50 := by
      rw [h]  -- we use cauchy_ineq to prove this
      specialize cauchy_ineq 3 4 (cos x) (sqrt (1 + sin x ^ 2))
      norm_num at cauchy_ineq
      simp [hx] at cauchy_ineq
      have o: 0 < 1 + sin x ^ 2 := by
        nlinarith
      simp [o] at cauchy_ineq
      have eq: cos x ^ 2 + √(1 + sin x ^ 2) ^ 2 = 2 := by
        rw [Real.sq_sqrt]
        have r:= Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq x
        nlinarith
        linarith
      rw [eq] at cauchy_ineq
      norm_num at cauchy_ineq
      exact cauchy_ineq
    have o: 50 = (5 * √2) ^ 2 := by
      ring_nf
      rw [show √2 ^ 2 = 2 by norm_num]
      norm_num
    rw [o] at hy
    rw [sq_le_sq₀] at hy
    exact hy
    have i: 0 ≤ √(1 + sin x ^ 2) := by
      apply Real.sqrt_nonneg
    nlinarith
    have j:= Real.sqrt_nonneg 2
    nlinarith

theorem number_theory_604657 (n : ℕ) :
    (digits 10 (n ^ 2)).sum ≡ 0 [MOD 9] ∨ (digits 10 (n ^ 2)).sum ≡ 1 [MOD 9] ∨
    (digits 10 (n ^ 2)).sum ≡ 4 [MOD 9] ∨ (digits 10 (n ^ 2)).sum ≡ 7 [MOD 9] := by

have h_digit_sum : n ^ 2 ≡ (digits 10 (n ^ 2)).sum [MOD 9] := by
    exact Nat.modEq_nine_digits_sum (n ^ 2)

  let r := n % 9
  have h_mod : n ≡ r [MOD 9] := by
    have : n % 9 = r % 9 := by
      unfold r
      rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (Nat.mod_lt n (by exact Nat.zero_lt_succ 8))]
    show n % 9 = r % 9
    exact this

  have h_square : n ^ 2 ≡ r ^ 2 [MOD 9] := by
    exact Nat.ModEq.pow 2 h_mod

  have h_digit_square : (digits 10 (n ^ 2)).sum ≡ r ^ 2 [MOD 9] := by
    apply Nat.ModEq.trans h_digit_sum.symm h_square

  have h_r_bound : r < 9 := Nat.mod_lt n (by norm_num)
  match r with
  | 0 =>
    have h_r : 0 ^ 2 = 0 := by norm_num
    left
    simp [h_r] at h_digit_square
    exact h_digit_square
  | 1 =>
    have h_r : 1 ^ 2 = 1 := by norm_num
    right; left
    simp [h_r] at h_digit_square
    exact h_digit_square
  | 2 =>
    have h_r : 2 ^ 2 = 4 := by norm_num
    right; right; left
    simp [h_r] at h_digit_square
    exact h_digit_square
  | 3 =>
    have h_r : 3 ^ 2 = 9 := by norm_num
    left
    simp [h_r] at h_digit_square
    exact h_digit_square
  | 4 =>
    have h_r : 4 ^ 2 = 16 := by norm_num
    right; right; right
    simp [h_r] at h_digit_square
    exact h_digit_square
  | 5 =>
    have h_r : 5 ^ 2 = 25 := by norm_num
    right; right; right
    simp [h_r] at h_digit_square
    exact h_digit_square
  | 6 =>
    have h_r : 6 ^ 2 = 36 := by norm_num
    left
    simp [h_r] at h_digit_square
    exact h_digit_square
  | 7 =>
    have h_r : 7 ^ 2 = 49 := by norm_num
    right; right; left
    simp [h_r] at h_digit_square
    exact h_digit_square
  | 8 =>
    have h_r : 8 ^ 2 = 64 := by norm_num
    right; left
    simp [h_r] at h_digit_square
    exact h_digit_square

theorem algebra_14923 {x y : ℝ} (h₀ : x + y = 9) (h₁ : x * y = 10) :

theorem algebra_605136 (a b c d : ℝ) (h1 : a + b + c + d = -2) (h2 : a * b + a * c + a * d + b * c + b * d + c * d = 0) :
a ≤ -1 ∨ b ≤ -1 ∨ c ≤ -1 ∨ d ≤ -1 := by

by_contra H

    simp at H

    rcases H with ⟨H1, H2, H3, H4⟩

    replace H1 : a + 1 > 0:= by linarith
    replace H2 : b + 1 > 0:= by linarith
    replace H3 : c + 1 > 0:= by linarith
    replace H4 : d + 1 > 0:= by linarith

    set A:= a + 1 with hA
    set B:= b + 1 with hB
    set C:= c + 1 with hC
    set D:= d + 1 with hD

    clear_value A B C D

    replace hA : a = A - 1:= by linarith
    replace hB : b = B - 1:= by linarith
    replace hC : c = C - 1:= by linarith
    replace hD : d = D - 1:= by linarith

    subst a b c d

    replace h1 : A + B + C + D = 2:= by linarith
    replace h2 : A * B + A * C + A * D + B * C + B * D + C * D = 0:= by linarith

    have h3 : A * B + A * C + A * D + B * C + B * D + C * D > 0:= by positivity

    linarith

import Mathlib

theorem algebra_604232 (x y z : ℝ) (hx : x > 0) (hy : y > 0) (hz : z > 0) : (x + y) * √((z + x) * (z + y)) + (y + z) * √((x + y) * (x + z)) + (z + x) * √((y + z) * (y + x)) ≥ 4 * (x * y + y * z + z * x):= by

have h1 : ∀ x y z : ℝ, x > 0 → y > 0 → z > 0 → (x + y) * √((z + x) * (z + y)) ≥ 2 * x * y + y * z + z * x:= by
    intro x y z hx hy hz

    have h1 : 2 * x * y + y * z + z * x ≥ 0:= by positivity

    have h2 : ((x + y) * √((z + x) * (z + y))) ^ 2 ≥ (2 * x * y + y * z + z * x) ^ 2:= by

      rw [show ((x + y) * √((z + x) * (z + y))) ^ 2 = (x + y) ^ 2 * (√((z + x) * (z + y))) ^ 2 by ring]

      rw [show (√((z + x) * (z + y))) ^ 2 = (z + x) * (z + y) by refine Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)]

      suffices (x * y + y * z + z * x) * (x - y) ^ 2 ≥ 0 by linarith
      positivity

    apply sq_le_sq.1 at h2

    rw [show |2 * x * y + y * z + z * x| = 2 * x * y + y * z + z * x by exact abs_of_nonneg h1] at h2
    rw [show |(x + y) * √((z + x) * (z + y))| = (x + y) * √((z + x) * (z + y)) by exact abs_of_nonneg (by positivity)] at h2
    exact h2

  have h2:= h1 x y z hx hy hz
  have h3:= h1 y z x hy hz hx
  have h4:= h1 z x y hz hx hy

  linarith

theorem number_theory_4852_1 {a n : ℕ} (ha : a = 7) (hn : n = 10) : a^1000 ≡ 1 [MOD n] := by

  have hnt : n.totient = 4 := hn ▸ by decide
  have hacon : a.Coprime n := ha ▸ hn ▸ by norm_num

  haveI := Nat.ModEq.pow_totient hacon
  haveI := Nat.ModEq.pow 250 this

  rwa [hnt, ← pow_mul, show 4*250=1000 by norm_num, one_pow] at this

theorem number_theory_4852_2 {a n : ℕ} (ha : a = 5) (hn : n = 16) : a^1000000 ≡ 1 [MOD n] := by

have hnt : n.totient = 4 := hn ▸ by decide
  have hacon : a.Coprime n := ha ▸ hn ▸ by norm_num

  haveI := Nat.ModEq.pow_totient hacon
  haveI := Nat.ModEq.pow 250 this

  rwa [hnt, ← pow_mul, show 4*250=1000 by norm_num, one_pow] at this

theorem number_theory_4852_2 {a n : ℕ} (ha : a = 5) (hn : n = 16) : a^1000000 ≡ 1 [MOD n] := by

  have hnt : n.totient = 8 := hn ▸ by decide
  have hacon : a.Coprime n := ha ▸ hn ▸ by norm_num

  haveI := Nat.ModEq.pow_totient hacon
  haveI := Nat.ModEq.pow 125000 this
  set N := 125000 with hN

  rwa [hnt, ← pow_mul, show 8*N=1000000 by norm_num, one_pow] at this

open Nat

theorem number_theory_138530 (X : Finset ℕ) (hX : ∀ x ∈ X, x > 1)
    (hX' : ∀ n > 0, ∃ m ∈ X, m ∣ n ∨ Nat.Coprime m n) :
    ∃ p, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∈ X ∨ ∃ x ∈ X, ∃ y ∈ X, x ≠ y ∧ Nat.gcd x y = p := by

have h_exists_n : ∃ n > 0, ∀ m ∈ X, ¬ Nat.Coprime m n := by
    let n := X.prod id
    have n_pos : n > 0 := by
      apply Finset.prod_pos
      intro x hx
      exact Nat.zero_lt_of_lt (hX x hx)
    use n, n_pos
    intro m hm
    rw [Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one]
    have : m ∣ n := by
      apply Finset.dvd_prod_of_mem
      exact hm
    have h_gcd : m ∣ Nat.gcd m n := by
      exact Nat.dvd_gcd (Nat.dvd_refl m) this
    have m_gt_1 : m > 1 := hX m hm
    have m_gt_0 : m > 0 := by omega
    have gcd_mn_gt_0 : Nat.gcd m n > 0 := by
      apply Nat.gcd_pos_of_pos_left
      exact m_gt_0
    have gcd_ge_m : Nat.gcd m n ≥ m := by exact Nat.le_of_dvd gcd_mn_gt_0 h_gcd
    have gcd_gt_1 : Nat.gcd m n > 1 := by
      apply lt_of_lt_of_le m_gt_1 gcd_ge_m
    exact Nat.ne_of_gt gcd_gt_1

  have h_min_n : ∃ n > 0, (∀ m ∈ X, ¬ Nat.Coprime m n) ∧ ∀ k > 0, k < n → ∃ m ∈ X, Nat.Coprime m k := by
    let S := { k | k > 0 ∧ ∀ m ∈ X, ¬ Nat.Coprime m k }
    have h_n : Nat.find h_exists_n ∈ S ∧ ∀ k < Nat.find h_exists_n, k ∉ S := by
      have h_find : Nat.find h_exists_n > 0 ∧ ∀ m ∈ X, ¬ Nat.Coprime m (Nat.find h_exists_n) := Nat.find_spec h_exists_n
      constructor
      · exact h_find
      · intro k hk_lt
        intro h_k_in_S
        have : k ≥ Nat.find h_exists_n := Nat.find_le h_k_in_S
        linarith
    rcases h_n with ⟨⟨hn_pos, hn_nocoprime⟩, h_min⟩
    use Nat.find h_exists_n, hn_pos, hn_nocoprime
    intro k hk_pos hk_lt_n
    have : k ∉ S := by
      apply h_min
      exact hk_lt_n
    rw [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at this
    push_neg at this
    exact this hk_pos

  rcases h_min_n with ⟨n, n_pos, hn_nocoprime, hn_min⟩
  have h_div : ∃ m ∈ X, m ∣ n := by
    rcases hX' n n_pos with ⟨m, hm, h_div_or_coprime⟩
    use m, hm
    cases h_div_or_coprime with
    | inl h => exact h
    | inr h => exfalso; exact hn_nocoprime m hm h

  rcases h_div with ⟨m, hm, h_m_div_n⟩
  have h_m_prime_or_not : Nat.Prime m ∨ ¬ Nat.Prime m := by
    apply em
  cases h_m_prime_or_not with
  | inl h_m_prime =>

    have h_conclusion : ∃ p, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∈ X := by
      use m, h_m_prime, hm
    use m
    exact Or.inl ⟨h_m_prime, hm⟩
  | inr h_m_not_prime =>

    have h_exists_p : ∃ p, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∣ m := by
      have h_m_ne_1 : m ≠ 1 := (hX m hm).ne.symm
      rcases Nat.exists_prime_and_dvd h_m_ne_1 with ⟨p, hp_prime, hp_div_m⟩
      use p
    rcases h_exists_p with ⟨p, hp_prime, hp_div_m⟩

    have h_p_div_n : p ∣ n := by
      exact Nat.dvd_trans hp_div_m h_m_div_n

    set n' := n / p with h_n'
    have h_n_pos : n > 0 := n_pos
    have h_p_pos : p > 0 := Nat.Prime.pos hp_prime
    have h_n'_lt_n : n' < n := by
      rw [h_n']
      apply Nat.div_lt_self h_n_pos (Nat.Prime.one_lt hp_prime)
    have h_n'_pos : n' > 0 := by
      rw [h_n']
      exact Nat.div_pos (Nat.le_of_dvd h_n_pos h_p_div_n) h_p_pos

    have h_exists_m' : ∃ m' ∈ X, Nat.Coprime m' n' := by
      exact hn_min n' h_n'_pos h_n'_lt_n
    rcases h_exists_m' with ⟨m', hm', h_coprime_m'_n'⟩

    have h_p_div_m' : p ∣ m' := by
      have h_n_eq : n = n' * p := by
        rw [h_n']
        exact Eq.symm (Nat.div_mul_cancel (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero (Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd h_p_div_n)))
      have h_not_coprime_m'_n : ¬ Nat.Coprime m' n := by
        exact hn_nocoprime m' hm'
      rw [h_n_eq, Nat.coprime_mul_iff_right] at h_not_coprime_m'_n
      have h_coprime_m'_p : ¬ Nat.Coprime m' p := by
        exact not_and.mp h_not_coprime_m'_n h_coprime_m'_n'
      have h_coprime_p_m' : ¬ Nat.Coprime p m' := by
        rwa [Nat.coprime_comm]
      exact (Nat.Prime.dvd_iff_not_coprime hp_prime).mpr h_coprime_p_m'

    have h_gcd_m_m'_p : Nat.gcd m m' = p := by

      have h_p_dvd_gcd : p ∣ Nat.gcd m m' := Nat.dvd_gcd hp_div_m h_p_div_m'
      have h_gcd_dvd_m : Nat.gcd m m' ∣ m := Nat.gcd_dvd_left m m'
      have h_gcd_dvd_m' : Nat.gcd m m' ∣ m' := Nat.gcd_dvd_right m m'

      by_contra h_gcd_ne_p
      have h_m_pos : m > 0 := by
        apply Nat.lt_trans
        · exact Nat.zero_lt_one
        · exact hX m hm
      have h_gcd_pos : Nat.gcd m m' > 0 := Nat.gcd_pos_of_pos_left m' h_m_pos
      have h_gcd_ge_p : Nat.gcd m m' ≥ p := Nat.le_of_dvd h_gcd_pos h_p_dvd_gcd
      have h_gcd_ne_p' : Nat.gcd m m' ≠ p := h_gcd_ne_p
      have h_gcd_gt_p : Nat.gcd m m' > p := by
        apply Nat.gt_of_not_le
        intro h_le
        apply h_gcd_ne_p'
        omega

      have h_exists_d : ∃ d > 1, Nat.gcd m m' = p * d := by
        have h_p_pos : p > 0 := Nat.Prime.pos hp_prime
        have h_gcd_div_p : (Nat.gcd m m') / p > 1 := by
          have h_gcd_pos : Nat.gcd m m' > 0 := Nat.gcd_pos_of_pos_left m' (by linarith [hX m' hm'])
          have h_gcd_gt_p : Nat.gcd m m' > p := h_gcd_gt_p
          have h_div_pos : (Nat.gcd m m') / p > 0 := Nat.div_pos (Nat.le_of_dvd h_gcd_pos h_p_dvd_gcd) h_p_pos
          have h_div_not_1 : (Nat.gcd m m') / p ≠ 1 := by
            intro h_eq
            have h_tmp : (Nat.gcd m m') / p * p = Nat.gcd m m' := Nat.div_mul_cancel h_p_dvd_gcd
            have : Nat.gcd m m' = p := by
              have h_tmp' : (Nat.gcd m m') / p = 1 := h_eq
              rw [h_tmp',one_mul] at h_tmp
              exact h_tmp.symm
            linarith [h_gcd_gt_p]
          omega
        use (Nat.gcd m m') / p
        constructor
        · exact h_gcd_div_p
        · conv_lhs => rw [← Nat.div_mul_cancel h_p_dvd_gcd]
          rw [mul_comm]
      rcases h_exists_d with ⟨d, hd_gt_1, h_gcd_eq_pd⟩

      have h_pd_dvd_n : p * d ∣ n := by
        rw [← h_gcd_eq_pd]
        apply Nat.dvd_trans h_gcd_dvd_m h_m_div_n

      have h_n_eq : n = n' * p := by
        rw [h_n']
        exact Eq.symm (Nat.div_mul_cancel (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero (Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd h_p_div_n)))
      have h_d_dvd_n' : d ∣ n' := by
        rw [h_n_eq] at h_pd_dvd_n
        have h_p_dvd_n : p ∣ n := h_p_div_n
        have h_p_pos : p > 0 := Nat.Prime.pos hp_prime
        have h_pd_dvd_n'p : d * p ∣ n' * p := by
          rwa [mul_comm p d] at h_pd_dvd_n
        exact (Nat.mul_dvd_mul_iff_right h_p_pos).mp h_pd_dvd_n'p

      have h_d_dvd_m' : d ∣ m' := by
        rw [h_gcd_eq_pd] at h_gcd_dvd_m'
        exact Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.dvd_mul_left d p) h_gcd_dvd_m'

      have h_coprime_n'_m' : Nat.Coprime n' m' := h_coprime_m'_n'.symm
      have h_gcd_n'_m'_eq_1 : Nat.gcd n' m' = 1 := Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one.mp h_coprime_n'_m'
      have h_d_dvd_gcd_n'_m' : d ∣ Nat.gcd n' m' := Nat.dvd_gcd h_d_dvd_n' h_d_dvd_m'
      have h_d_eq_1 : d = 1 := by
        rw [h_gcd_n'_m'_eq_1] at h_d_dvd_gcd_n'_m'
        exact Nat.dvd_one.mp h_d_dvd_gcd_n'_m'
      linarith [hd_gt_1, h_d_eq_1]

    have h_m_ne_m' : m ≠ m' := by
      intro h_eq
      rw [h_eq] at h_gcd_m_m'_p
      have : Nat.gcd m' m' = m' := Nat.gcd_self m'
      rw [this] at h_gcd_m_m'_p
      rw [h_eq] at h_m_not_prime
      have : m' = p := Nat.dvd_antisymm (by rw [h_gcd_m_m'_p]) h_p_div_m'
      rw [this] at h_m_not_prime
      contradiction

    have h_conclusion : ∃ x ∈ X, ∃ y ∈ X, x ≠ y ∧ Nat.gcd x y = p := by
      use m, hm, m', hm', h_m_ne_m', h_gcd_m_m'_p
    use p
    exact Or.inr h_conclusion

theorem number_theory_639037 (k N: ℕ) (h: N = 4 * k + 1): (2 ^ N - 1) % 10 = 1 := by

zify
  set a:= 2 ^ N
  have la: 2 ≤ a := by
    simp [a]
    nth_rewrite 1 [show 2 = 2 ^ 1 by simp]
    apply Nat.pow_le_pow_right
    omega
    omega
  have f: ↑(a - 1) = (a - (1: ℤ)) := by
    apply Int.natCast_sub
    simp [a]
    apply Nat.pow_pos
    omega
  rw [f]
  clear f
  rw [Int.sub_emod]
  rw [show 1 % 10 = (1: ℤ) by simp]
  suffices a % 10 = 2 by
    zify at this
    simp [this]
  simp [a]
  rw [Nat.pow_mod]
  rw [show 2 % 10 = 2 by simp]
  suffices (2 ^ N - 2) % 10 = 0 by
    rw [show 2 ^ N = 2 + (2 ^ N - 2) by omega]
    rw [Nat.add_mod]
    simp [this]
  apply Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd
  suffices 2 ∣2 ^ N - 2 ∧ 5 ∣ 2 ^ N - 2 by
    rw [show 10 = 2 * 5 by simp]
    apply Nat.Coprime.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd
    norm_num
    tauto
    tauto
  constructor
  .
    apply Nat.dvd_sub
    .
      omega
    .
      rw [show N = N - 1 + 1 by omega]
      ring_nf
      simp
    .
      norm_num
  .
    simp [h]
    ring_nf
    rw [show k * 4 = 4 * k by omega]
    rw [Nat.pow_mul]
    suffices 5 ∣  (2 ^ 4) ^ k * 2 + 3 by
      rw [show (2 ^ 4) ^ k * 2 - 2 = (2 ^ 4) ^ k * 2 + 3 - 5 by omega]
      apply Nat.dvd_sub
      .
        omega
      .
        tauto
      .
        simp
    apply Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero
    rw [Nat.add_mod]
    suffices (2 ^ 4) ^ k % 5 = 1 by
      rw [Nat.mul_mod]
      rw [this]
    rw [show 2 ^ 4 = 16 by simp]
    rw [Nat.pow_mod]
    simp

variable (n : ℤ)

abbrev is_factor (a b : ℤ) : Prop :=
  a > 0 ∧ b > 0 ∧ a * b = n

abbrev is_diff_of_squares (x y : ℤ) : Prop :=
  x ^ 2 - y ^ 2 = n

abbrev f_4600 (p : ℤ × ℤ) : ℤ × ℤ :=
  ((p.1 + p.2) / 2, (p.1 - p.2) / 2)

abbrev g1 (q : ℤ × ℤ) : ℤ × ℤ :=
  (q.1 + q.2, q.1 - q.2)

theorem number_theory_4600 (hn : Odd n) :
    (∀ a b : ℤ, is_factor n a b → g1 (f_4600 (a, b)) = (a, b)) ∧
    (∀ x y : ℤ, is_diff_of_squares n x y → f_4600 (g1 (x, y)) = (x, y)) := by

constructor

  . rintro a b ⟨_, ⟨_, hab⟩⟩
    obtain ⟨⟨ka, hka⟩, ⟨kb, hkb⟩⟩ := Int.odd_mul.mp (show Odd (a * b) by simp [hab, hn])
    simp only [g1]
    ext <;> omega

  . rintro x y hxy
    rw [is_diff_of_squares] at hxy
    simp only [g1, f_4600]
    ext <;> omega

import Mathlib
theorem five_power_congruence
  (r:ℕ)
  (h_1:k ≥ n)
  (h_2:m = orderOf (5 : ZMod (2^n)))
  (h_3:r≡k-n [ZMOD m]):
  5^k ≡ (((5^r) :ZMod (2^n)).val) * 5^n [ZMOD 10^n] :=
by

unfold r
      simp [ZMod.val_intCast]
    rw [h]
    apply Int.modEq_iff_dvd.2
    have h_mod : p % (2^n) = r := by
      rw [ZMod.val_intCast]
      norm_cast
    rw [← h_mod]
    rw [← Int.neg_sub]
    apply Int.dvd_neg.mpr
    norm_cast
    exact Int.dvd_emod_sub_self

  have h5:(5 ^ r:ZMod (2^n)).val ≡ 5^r [ZMOD (2^n)] :=by
    let R:=R_mod ((5^r) :ℤ )
    simp at R
    simp --get (5 ^ r).cast ≡ 5 ^ r [ZMOD 2 ^ n]
    tauto
  simp at h5
  simp

  have h6:5^r ≡ 5^(k-n) [ZMOD (2^n)]:=by

    have t1:((5^m):ZMod (2^n))=1:=by
      simp[h_2]
      exact pow_orderOf_eq_one 5

    have h_eq : (5 ^ r : ZMod (2 ^ n)) = (5 ^ (k - n) : ZMod (2 ^ n)) := by

      have h_exp : (r : ZMod m) = ((k - n): ZMod m) := by
        norm_cast
        rw [ZMod.natCast_eq_natCast_iff']
        norm_cast at h_3
        exact Eq.symm ((fun {m n} => Int.ofNat_inj.mp) (id (Int.ModEq.symm h_3)))
      norm_cast at h_exp

      have h_nat_mod : r ≡ k - n [MOD m] := by
        rw [Nat.ModEq]
        rw [ZMod.natCast_eq_natCast_iff'] at h_exp
        exact h_exp

      have h_mod : r % m = (k - n) % m := by
        rw [ZMod.natCast_eq_natCast_iff'] at h_exp
        exact h_exp

      have h_mod':r ≡ (k-n) [MOD m]:=by exact h_mod
      rw [h_2] at h_mod'

      have m1: (5 : ZMod (2^n)) ^ r = (5 : ZMod (2^n)) ^ (r % m) := by
        symm
        exact Eq.symm (pow_eq_pow_mod r t1)
      rw [m1]

      have m2: (5 : ZMod (2^n)) ^ (k - n) = (5 : ZMod (2^n)) ^ ((k - n) % m) := by
        symm
        exact Eq.symm (pow_eq_pow_mod (k - n) t1)
      rw [m2]

      congr 1

    norm_cast at h_eq
    have t2:5 ^ r ≡ 5 ^ (k - n) [MOD 2 ^ n]:=by
      apply (ZMod.eq_iff_modEq_nat (2^n)).mp h_eq

    have t3:((5:ℤ)^r:ZMod (2^n))=((5:ℤ)^(k-n):ZMod (2^n)):=by
      simp
      simp at h_eq
      exact h_eq

    refine Int.modEq_of_dvd ?_
    have t4:(((5:ℤ)^(k-n)-(5:ℤ)^(r)):ZMod (2^n))=0:=by
      exact sub_eq_zero_of_eq (id (Eq.symm t3))
    norm_cast at t4
    norm_cast
    exact (ZMod.intCast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd (Int.subNatNat (5 ^ (k - n)) (5 ^ r)) (2 ^ n)).mp t4

  exact Int.ModEq.trans (id (Int.ModEq.symm h6)) (id (Int.ModEq.symm h5))

theorem algebra_16461 :
IsLeast {n | (∃ k, n = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range 18, (k + i)) ∧ ∃ m, m ^ 2 = n} 225 := by

rw [IsLeast, lowerBounds]; simp; constructor

  · constructor; use 4; norm_num
    use 15; norm_num

  intro a x h;
  have : ∑ i ∈ Finset.range 18, (a + i) = 9 * (2 * a + 17) := by
    rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_const]
    simp; rw [Finset.sum_range_id]; ring

  rw [this]; by_contra h'; push_neg at h'
  rw [show 225=9*25 by norm_num, Nat.mul_lt_mul_left] at h'
  rw [show 25=8+17 by norm_num, Nat.add_lt_add_iff_right] at h'
  rw [show 8=2*4 by norm_num, Nat.mul_lt_mul_left] at h'

  interval_cases a
  · rw [this] at h; norm_num at h
    have : x < 13 := by rw [← Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_left (show 2≠0 by norm_num)]; linarith
    have : 12 < x := by rw [← Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_left (show 2≠0 by norm_num)]; linarith
    linarith
  · simp_all
    have : x < 14 := by rw [← Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_left (show 2≠0 by norm_num)]; linarith
    have : 13 < x := by rw [← Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_left (show 2≠0 by norm_num)]; linarith
    linarith
  · simp_all
    have : x < 14 := by rw [← Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_left (show 2≠0 by norm_num)]; linarith
    have : 13 < x := by rw [← Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_left (show 2≠0 by norm_num)]; linarith
    linarith
  · simp_all
    have : x < 15 := by rw [← Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_left (show 2≠0 by norm_num)]; linarith
    have : 14 < x := by rw [← Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_left (show 2≠0 by norm_num)]; linarith
    linarith
  any_goals norm_num

lemma lemma_1 (M : List ℕ) (h1 : ∀ d ∈ M, d < 10) :
  ∃ N : List ℕ, (∀ d ∈ N, d = 2 ∨ d = 3) ∧ M.sum = N.sum + M.count 1 ∧ M.prod ≤ N.prod := by sorry

lemma lemma_2 (M : List ℕ) (r : ℕ) (h1 : ∀ d ∈ M, d = 2 ∨ d = 3) (h2 : M ≠ []) :
  ∃ N : List ℕ, N ≠ [] ∧ (∀ d ∈ N, d = 2 ∨ d = 3) ∧ M.sum + r = N.sum ∧ M.prod ≤ N.prod := by sorry

lemma lemma_prod_of_2_3 (M : List ℕ) (h1 : ∀ d ∈ M, d = 2 ∨ d = 3) :
    M.prod = 3 ^ M.count 3 * 2 ^ M.count 2 := by sorry

lemma lemma_sum_of_2_3 (M : List ℕ) (h1 : ∀ d ∈ M, d = 2 ∨ d = 3) :
    M.sum = 3 * M.count 3 + 2 * M.count 2 := by sorry

lemma lemma_3 (M : List ℕ)
  (h1 : ∀ d ∈ M, d = 2 ∨ d = 3) (h2 : M.sum = 23) :
  M.prod ≤ 4374 := by sorry

theorem number_theory_44187 :
    IsGreatest {p | ∃ n, n > 0 ∧ (Nat.digits 10 n).sum = 23 ∧ (Nat.digits 10 n).prod = p} 4374 := by

induction M with
  | nil => use []; simp
  | cons h t ih =>
      simp at h1
      obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := h1
      specialize ih h2
      obtain ⟨xs, ih, hsum, hprod⟩ := ih

      interval_cases heq : h

      case «2» | «3» =>
          use (h :: xs)
          rw [heq]
          simp
          constructor
          . assumption
          . omega

      case' «0» => use xs
      case' «1» => use xs

      case' «4» => use (2 :: 2 :: xs)
      case' «5» => use (2 :: 3 :: xs)
      case' «6» => use (3 :: 3 :: xs)
      case' «7» => use (2 :: 2 :: 3 :: xs)
      case' «8» => use (2 :: 3 :: 3 :: xs)
      case' «9» => use (3 :: 3 :: 3 :: xs)
      all_goals
      . constructor
        . try simp
          assumption
        simp
        omega

lemma lemma_2 (M : List ℕ) (r : ℕ) (h1 : ∀ d ∈ M, d = 2 ∨ d = 3) (h2 : M ≠ []) :
  ∃ N : List ℕ, N ≠ [] ∧ (∀ d ∈ N, d = 2 ∨ d = 3) ∧ M.sum + r = N.sum ∧ M.prod ≤ N.prod := by
  induction r with
  | zero =>
      use M
      simp
      tauto
  | succ r ih =>
      obtain ⟨N, ⟨_, h2, h3, h4⟩⟩ := ih
      let (x :: xs) := N
      simp at *
      rcases h2 with ⟨(h1 | h1), h2⟩
      case' inl => use (3 :: xs)
      case' inr => use (2 :: 2 :: xs)
      all_goals
      . simp
        constructor
        . assumption
        subst x
        omega

lemma lemma_prod_of_2_3 (M : List ℕ) (h1 : ∀ d ∈ M, d = 2 ∨ d = 3) :
    M.prod = 3 ^ M.count 3 * 2 ^ M.count 2 := by
  induction M with
  | nil => simp
  | cons h t ih =>
      simp at h1
      rcases h1 with ⟨(h1 | h1), h2⟩
      all_goals
      . rw [h1]
        simp
        specialize ih h2
        rw [ih]
        ring_nf

lemma lemma_sum_of_2_3 (M : List ℕ) (h1 : ∀ d ∈ M, d = 2 ∨ d = 3) :
    M.sum = 3 * M.count 3 + 2 * M.count 2 := by
  induction M with
  | nil => simp
  | cons h t ih =>
      simp at h1
      rcases h1 with ⟨(h1 | h1), h2⟩
      all_goals
      . rw [h1]
        simp
        specialize ih h2
        rw [ih]
        ring_nf

lemma lemma_3 (M : List ℕ)
  (h1 : ∀ d ∈ M, d = 2 ∨ d = 3) (h2 : M.sum = 23) :
  M.prod ≤ 4374 := by
  have msum := lemma_sum_of_2_3 M h1
  have : M.count 3 ≤ 7 := by
    by_contra! h
    have msum := lemma_sum_of_2_3 M h1
    omega

  interval_cases h : M.count 3
  all_goals
  . first | omega |
    have : M.count 2 = (23 - 3 * M.count 3) / 2 := by omega
    rw [lemma_prod_of_2_3 M h1, this, h]
    simp

theorem number_theory_44187 :
    IsGreatest {p | ∃ n, n > 0 ∧ (Nat.digits 10 n).sum = 23 ∧ (Nat.digits 10 n).prod = p} 4374 := by
  constructor
  . -- The greatest case is taken when the number consists solely of 2 and 3,

    use 23333333
    simp
  . simp [upperBounds]
    intros p n h hsum hp
    subst p
    have : ∀ d ∈ (Nat.digits 10 n), d < 10 := by
      intros d h
      apply Nat.digits_lt_base
      . simp
      . assumption

    obtain ⟨N, hn1, hn2, hn3⟩ := lemma_1 (Nat.digits 10 n) this
    by_cases h : N = []
    . -- We handle an edge case: if there are all 1s,

      simp [h] at hn3
      omega

    obtain ⟨N, hn1, hn2, hn3, hn4⟩ := lemma_2 N ((Nat.digits 10 n).count 1) hn1 h

    have := lemma_3 N hn2

    omega

theorem algebra_604413 (g : ℝ → Prop) (hg : g = fun x : ℝ => ⌊x⌋ * (x^2 + 1) = x^3) :
  (∀ n : ℤ, 0 < n →  ∃! x : ℝ, n < x ∧ x < n + 1 ∧ g x) ∧ ∀ q : ℚ, 0 < q → ¬ g q := by

constructor
    · intro n npos
      simp [hg]

      have h1 (y : ℝ) : y * (n + y)^2 = n ↔ n * ((n + y)^2 + 1) = (n + y)^3 := by
          constructor <;> intro h
          · nth_rw 1 [← h]
            calc
            _ = (y * (n+y)^2 + y) * (n + y)^2 := by nlinarith
            _ = _ := by nth_rw 1 [h, ← pow_one (n + y), ←pow_add]
          · nlinarith
      let f : ℝ → ℝ := fun y => y * (n + y)^2

      have hf : StrictMonoOn f (Set.Ici 0) := by
        intro a ha b hb hab
        simp [f]
        have npos' : (n : ℝ) > 0 := by norm_cast
        simp at ha hb
        by_cases hcase : 0 < (n + a)^2
        apply mul_lt_mul (by linarith) _ hcase hb
        apply pow_le_pow_left₀ <;> try nlinarith
        have : (n + a)^2 = 0 := by nlinarith
        simp [this]
        have : 0 < b := by linarith
        positivity

      have contf : ContinuousOn f (Set.Icc 0 1) := by
        simp [f]

        apply ContinuousOn.mul
        · rw [←Function.id_def]
          exact Continuous.continuousOn continuous_id
        · have : ContinuousOn (fun (x : ℝ)=> ↑n + x) (Set.Icc 0 1) := by
            apply ContinuousOn.add
            simp [continuousOn_const]
            rw [←Function.id_def]
            exact Continuous.continuousOn continuous_id
          exact ContinuousOn.pow this 2

      have ⟨y, hy, ypos, ylt1⟩ : ∃ y, f y = n ∧ 0 < y ∧ y < 1 := by
        have f0 : f 0 = 0 := by simp [f]
        have f1 : f 1 = (n + 1)^2 := by simp [f]

        have h2 := intermediate_value_Ioo (by simp) contf
        simp [f0, f1] at h2
        have h3 : (n : ℝ) ∈ Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) ((n + 1)^2) := by simp; split_ands <;> nlinarith
        obtain ⟨ y, hy⟩ := h2 h3
        simp at hy
        exact ⟨y, by split_ands <;> simp [hy]⟩
      use n + y
      simp [ypos, ylt1]

      constructor
      · have : ⌊y⌋ = 0 := by simp; split_ands <;> linarith
        simp [f] at hy
        simp [this, ←h1 y, hy]
      · intro x x1 x2 hx
        let k := Int.fract x
        have : ⌊x⌋ = n := by simp [Int.floor_eq_iff]; split_ands <;> linarith
        simp [this] at hx
        have hh : x = n + k := by rw [←Int.floor_add_fract x, this]
        have : f k = n := by
          rw [hh, ←h1 k] at hx
          simp [f, hx]
        simp [hh]
        exact (StrictMonoOn.eq_iff_eq hf (by simp [k]) (by simp [le_of_lt ypos])).1 (this.trans hy.symm)

    · -- b)  Assume that \( x = k + y \) is rational and let \( x = n / d \), where \( n \) and \( d \) are relatively prime positive integers.
      intro q hq fq
      simp [hg] at fq

      have h1 : q.den ≠ 1 := by
        intro qd1
        simp [Rat.den_eq_one_iff] at qd1
        rw [← qd1] at fq
        simp [mul_add] at fq
        have : q.num = 0 := by norm_cast at fq; linarith
        simp at this
        linarith

      rw [← Rat.num_div_den q] at fq
      field_simp at fq
      nth_rw 1 [show 3 = 1 + 2 by rfl, pow_add, ←mul_assoc] at fq
      simp [ mul_eq_mul_right_iff] at fq

      obtain ⟨p, pp, pdvd⟩ := Nat.exists_prime_and_dvd h1
      have pdvd' : p ∣ q.num.natAbs := by
        norm_cast at fq
        have : (p : ℤ) ∣ q.den := by norm_cast
        exact  Int.Prime.dvd_pow pp <| fq ▸ (dvd_mul_of_dvd_right this _)
      have := q.reduced
      have h1 := Nat.dvd_gcd pdvd' pdvd
      rw [Nat.Coprime] at this
      simp [this] at h1
      simp [h1] at pp
      tauto

theorem gcd_fib_succ (n : Nat) :
  Nat.gcd (Nat.fib n) (Nat.fib (n + 1)) = 1 := by

induction n with
  | zero =>

    simp [Nat.fib_zero, Nat.fib_one]
  | succ k ih =>

    cases k with
    | zero =>

      norm_num [Nat.fib_one, Nat.fib_two]
    | succ k' =>
      cases k' with
      | zero =>

        calc
          Nat.gcd (Nat.fib 2) (Nat.fib 3)
            = Nat.gcd 1 2 := by norm_num [Nat.fib_two]
            _ = 1 := by norm_num
      | succ k'' =>

        have hmod : Nat.fib (Nat.succ (Nat.succ k'') + 2) % Nat.fib (Nat.succ (Nat.succ k'') + 1) = Nat.fib (Nat.succ (Nat.succ k'')) := by
          calc
            Nat.fib (Nat.succ (Nat.succ k'') + 2) % Nat.fib (Nat.succ (Nat.succ k'') + 1)
              = (Nat.fib (Nat.succ (Nat.succ k'') + 1) + Nat.fib (Nat.succ (Nat.succ k''))) % Nat.fib (Nat.succ (Nat.succ k'') + 1) := by simp [Nat.fib_add_two]
            _ = Nat.fib (Nat.succ (Nat.succ k'')) := by
              rw [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_mod_right]
              exact Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (Nat.fib_lt_fib_succ (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.zero_le k''))))

        calc
          Nat.gcd (Nat.fib (Nat.succ (Nat.succ k'') + 1)) (Nat.fib (Nat.succ (Nat.succ k'') + 2))
            = Nat.gcd (Nat.fib (Nat.succ (Nat.succ k'') + 2) % Nat.fib (Nat.succ (Nat.succ k'') + 1)) (Nat.fib (Nat.succ (Nat.succ k'') + 1)) := by rw [Nat.gcd_rec]
            _ = Nat.gcd (Nat.fib (Nat.succ (Nat.succ k''))) (Nat.fib (Nat.succ (Nat.succ k'') + 1)) := by simp [hmod]
            _ = 1 := ih

theorem algebra_609882 :
    IsLeast {n : ℕ | 0 < n ∧ 100 - Real.sqrt n ≥ 0 ∧ ∃ m : ℕ, m = Real.sqrt (100 + Real.sqrt n) + Real.sqrt (100 - Real.sqrt n)} 6156 := by

simp only [IsLeast, lowerBounds]
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  . -- First show that 6156 indeed makes the expression integral.
    simp
    have : 100 - Real.sqrt 6156 ≥ 0 := by
      simp
      rw [Real.sqrt_le_iff]
      norm_num
    refine ⟨by simp_all, ?_⟩

    let x : ℝ := Real.sqrt (100 + Real.sqrt 6156) + Real.sqrt (100 - Real.sqrt 6156)

    have h₀ : x ^ 2 = 18 ^ 2 := by
      simp [x, add_sq]
      field_simp
      ring_nf
      rw [<-Real.sqrt_mul (by positivity)]
      suffices (100 + Real.sqrt 6156) * (100 - Real.sqrt 6156) = 62 ^ 2 by
        field_simp [this]
        norm_num
      ring_nf
      field_simp
      norm_num
    rw [sq_eq_sq₀ (by positivity) (by norm_num)] at h₀
    use 18
    rify
    rw [<-h₀]
  . -- Show that n is at least 6156.
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf]
    rintro n ⟨h₀, h₁, m, h₂⟩

    replace h₂ := congr_arg (· ^ 2) h₂
    simp [add_sq] at h₂
    rw [mul_assoc, <-Real.sqrt_mul (by positivity), <-sq_sub_sq] at h₂
    field_simp at h₂
    ring_nf at h₂

    have h₃ : m ^ 2 < 20 ^ 2 := by
      rify
      calc
        _ = 200 + Real.sqrt (10000 - n) * 2 := h₂
        _ < 200 + 100 * 2 := by
          apply add_lt_add_left
          apply mul_lt_mul_of_pos_right
          . rw [Real.sqrt_lt]
            norm_num
            exact h₀

            simp at h₁ ⊢
            rw [Real.sqrt_le_iff] at h₁
            norm_num at h₁
            exact h₁
            norm_num
          . norm_num
        _ = 20 ^ 2 := by norm_num
    rw [Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_left (by norm_num)] at h₃

    have : m ≠ 19 := by
      by_contra!

      simp [this] at h₂

      have h₅ : ¬Irrational (Real.sqrt (10000 - n : ℚ)) := by
        simp [Irrational]
        use 161 / 2
        linarith

      rw [irrational_sqrt_ratCast_iff_of_nonneg, show (10000 - n : ℚ) = (10000 - n : ℤ) by simp, Rat.isSquare_intCast_iff] at h₅
      simp at h₅
      obtain ⟨m', h₅⟩ := h₅
      rify at h₅
      rw [h₅, <-pow_two, <-sq_abs (m' : ℝ), Real.sqrt_sq] at h₂
      norm_cast at h₂
      omega
      simp
      simp [Real.sqrt_le_iff] at h₁
      norm_num at h₁
      simp [h₁]

    replace h₃ : m ≤ 18 := by
      omega
    clear this

    rify at h₃
    rw [<-sq_le_sq₀ (by simp) (by norm_num)] at h₃
    replace h₂ : Real.sqrt (10000 - n) ≤ 62 := by
      linarith

    rw [Real.sqrt_le_iff] at h₂
    norm_num at h₂
    norm_cast at h₂
    omega

theorem algebra_24132 (f : ℤ → ℤ) (h1 : ∀ x > 0, f x > 0) (h2 : ∀ m > 0, ∀ n > 0, f (f m + f n) = m + n) : f 1988 = 1988 := by

have g1 : ∀ m > 0, ∀ n > 0, f (f 1 + n + m) = 1 + f n + f m := by

    intro m hm n hn
    have g2:= h2 n hn m hm
    rw [(show f 1 + n + m = f 1 + (n + m) by ring_nf), ←g2]
    have g3 := h1 n hn
    have g4 := h1 m hm

    specialize h2 1 (by omega) (f n + f m) (by omega)
    simp [h2]
    linarith

  have g2 : ∀ n > 0, f (n + 1) + f 1 = f n + f 2 := by
    intro n hn
    have g3 := g1 (n + 1) (by omega) 1 (by omega)
    have g4 := g1 n hn 2 (by omega)
    rw [show f 1 + 1 + (n + 1) = f 1 + 2 + n by ring_nf] at g3
    omega
  clear g1

  have g1 : ∀ (n : ℕ), n ≥ 1 → f ↑n = ↑n * (f 2 - f 1) + 2 * f 1 - f 2:= by
    intro n hn
    induction n, hn using Nat.le_induction with

    | base =>
      simp
      ring_nf
    | succ m hm ih =>

      specialize g2 m (by omega)
      rw [show (↑(m + 1) : ℤ) = ↑m + 1 by norm_num]
      replace g2 : f (↑m + 1) = f ↑m + f 2 - f 1:= by linarith
      rw [g2, ih]
      linarith

  replace g1 : ∀ n ≥ 1, f n = n * (f 2 - f 1) + 2 * f 1 - f 2:= by
    intro n hn
    specialize g1 (n.natAbs) (by omega)
    simp at g1
    rw [show |n| = n by exact abs_of_pos hn] at g1
    exact g1

  replace h2 : ∀ m > 0, ∀ n > 0, (m + n) * ((f 2 - f 1) ^ 2 - 1) + (4 * f 1 - 2 * f 2) * (f 2 - f 1) + 2 * f 1 - f 2 = 0:= by
    intro m hm n hn
    specialize h2 m hm n hn

    have g3 := g1 m (by omega)
    have g4 := g1 n (by omega)
    rw [g3, g4] at h2

    have g5 := h1 n (by omega)
    have g6 := h1 m (by omega)
    rw [g3] at g6
    rw [g4] at g5

    rw [show m * (f 2 - f 1) + 2 * f 1 - f 2 + (n * (f 2 - f 1) + 2 * f 1 - f 2) = (m + n) * (f 2 - f 1) + 4 * f 1 - 2 * f 2 by ring_nf] at h2
    have g7 := g1 ((m + n) * (f 2 - f 1) + 4 * f 1 - 2 * f 2) (by linarith)
    rw [g7] at h2
    linarith

  have h3 : (4 * f 1 - 2 * f 2) * (f 2 - f 1) + 2 * f 1 - f 2 = 0:= by
    have g3 := h2 1 (by omega) 1 (by omega)
    have g4 := h2 1 (by omega) 2 (by omega)
    linarith

  have h4 : (f 2 - f 1) ^ 2 - 1 = 0:= by
    have g5 := h2 1 (by omega) 2 (by omega)
    linarith
  have h5 : f 2 - f 1 = 1:= by

    have g3 : f 2 - f 1 ≥ 0:= by
      by_contra H
      simp at H

      have g4 := h1 1 (by omega)
      specialize g1 (f 1 + 1) (by omega)
      specialize h1 (f 1 + 1) (by omega)

      replace H : f 2 - f 1 + 1 ≤ 0:= by omega
      rw [show (f 1 + 1) * (f 2 - f 1) + 2 * f 1 - f 2 = f 1 * (f 2 - f 1 + 1) by linarith] at g1
      rw [g1] at h1

      nlinarith only [g4, H, h1]
    replace h4 : (f 2 - f 1 - 1) * (f 2 - f 1 + 1) = 0:= by linarith
    have g4 : f 2 - f 1 + 1 ≠ 0:= by omega
    suffices f 2 - f 1 - 1 = 0 by linarith
    exact eq_zero_of_ne_zero_of_mul_right_eq_zero g4 h4
  replace h5 : f 2 = f 1 + 1:= by linarith
  rw [h5] at h3
  ring_nf at h3

  replace h3 : f 1 = 1:= by linarith
  replace h5 : f 2 = 2:= by linarith
  simp [h3, h5] at g1

  specialize g1 1988 (by omega)
  exact g1

import Mathlib
open Real Set

theorem algebra_9142 : image (λ x => logb 2 (-x^2 + 2 * x + 7)) {x | -x^2 + 2 * x + 7 > 0} = {y | y ≤ 3} := by

let g := λ (x : ℝ) => 8 - (x-1)^2

  suffices h : image (λ x => logb 2 (g x)) {x | g x > 0} = {y | y ≤ 3} by

    have hg (x : ℝ) : g x = -x^2 + 2 * x + 7 := by
      simp [g]
      ring
    simp only [hg] at h
    exact h

  have hg' : range g = {y | y ≤ 8} := by
    ext y
    simp

    constructor <;> intro h
    . obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h
      subst y
      simp [g]

      linarith [sq_nonneg (x-1)]
    . -- 8 - (1 + √(8-y) - 1)^2 = y
      use (1 + √(8 - y))
      simp [g]
      rw [sq_sqrt (by linarith)]
      simp

  have hg : image g {x | g x > 0} = {y | 0 < y ∧ y ≤ 8} := by
    ext y
    simp

    constructor <;> intro h
    . -- 0 < g x = y ∈ range g
      obtain ⟨x, hx, hgx⟩ := h
      subst y
      refine ⟨hx, ?_⟩
      suffices _ : g x ∈ {y | y ≤ 8} by simpa
      rw [← hg']
      exact mem_range_self x
    . obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := h
      apply_fun (y ∈ ·) at hg'
      simp [h2] at hg'

      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hg'
      use x
      constructor <;> linarith

  have k1 : (fun x ↦ logb 2 (g x)) = logb 2 ∘ g := rfl
  have k2 : logb 2 8 = 3 := by
    rw [(by norm_num : (8 : ℝ) = 2^(3 : ℝ))]
    exact logb_rpow (by norm_num) (by norm_num)

  rw [k1, ← k2, image_comp, hg]
  ext y
  simp

  constructor <;> intro h
  . obtain ⟨x, ⟨hx1, hx2⟩, hgx⟩ := h
    subst y

    exact (logb_le_logb (by norm_num) hx1 (by norm_num)).2 hx2
  . -- 2 ^ y satisfies the conditions
    use 2 ^ y
    refine ⟨⟨?_, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
    . positivity
    . exact (le_logb_iff_rpow_le (by norm_num) (by norm_num)).1 h
    . exact logb_rpow (by norm_num) (by norm_num)

import Mathlib
open Nat List
def get_digit_pairs_from_int (N_val : ℕ) : List ℕ :=
  if N_val = 0 then [0] else
  let s_digits := (Nat.digits 10 N_val).reverse
  if h_empty : s_digits = [] then
    [0]
  else
    let rec make_pairs_from_even_list (l : List ℕ) : List ℕ :=
      match l with
      | [] => []
      | d1 :: d2 :: ds => (d1 * 10 + d2) :: make_pairs_from_even_list ds
      | _ :: [] => panic! "make_pairs_from_even_list called with odd length list"
    if s_digits.length % 2 = 1 then
      s_digits.head h_empty :: make_pairs_from_even_list (s_digits.tail)
    else
      make_pairs_from_even_list s_digits
def calculate_sqrt_digits (X : ℕ) : List ℕ :=
  let digit_pairs := get_digit_pairs_from_int X
  if digit_pairs.isEmpty then [] else
  let find_d_digit (P_current : ℕ) (C_current : ℕ) : ℕ :=
    let X_trial := P_current * 20
    let check_condition (d : ℕ) : Bool :=
      if P_current = 0 then d * d ≤ C_current
      else d * (X_trial + d) ≤ C_current
    match (List.range 10).reverse.find? check_condition with
    | some d_val => d_val
    | none       => 0
  let initial_state : (ℕ × ℕ × List ℕ) := (0, 0, [])
  let process_pair (state : ℕ × ℕ × List ℕ) (current_pair : ℕ) : (ℕ × ℕ × List ℕ) :=
    let (P_old, R_old, digits_acc) := state
    let C := R_old * 100 + current_pair
    let d_found := find_d_digit P_old C
    let X_trial_for_Y_sub := P_old * 20
    let Y_sub := if P_old = 0 then d_found * d_found else d_found * (X_trial_for_Y_sub + d_found)
    let P_new := P_old * 10 + d_found
    let R_new := C - Y_sub
    let new_digits_acc := digits_acc.concat d_found
    (P_new, R_new, new_digits_acc)
  let final_state := digit_pairs.foldl process_pair initial_state
  final_state.2.2
def pi_scaled_N : ℕ :=
  314159265358979323846264338327950288419716939
def sqrt_pi_digits_list : List ℕ := calculate_sqrt_digits pi_scaled_N
theorem number_theory_609021 :
  Nat.ofDigits 10  sqrt_pi_digits_list.reverse = 17724538509055160272981 := by
native_decide

theorem number_theory_124291 :
    (∃ x : ℝ, x > 0 ∧ Int.fract x + Int.fract (1 / x) = 1) ∧
    ¬∃ q : ℚ, q > 0 ∧ Int.fract q + Int.fract (1 / q) = 1 := by

constructor

  · use 2 + Real.sqrt 3
    constructor

    · apply add_pos
      · linarith
      · exact Real.sqrt_pos.2 (by norm_num)
    · norm_num

      have h1 : Int.fract √3 = √3 - 1 := by
        rw [Int.fract_eq_iff]
        constructor
        · simp
        · constructor
          · suffices √3 < 2 by linarith
            rw [Real.sqrt_lt]
            all_goals norm_num
          · use 1; ring

      have h2 : Int.fract (2 + √3)⁻¹ = (2 + √3)⁻¹ := by
        simp only [Int.fract_eq_self, inv_nonneg]
        have := lt_add_of_pos_right 2 (Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (by norm_num : 0 < (3 : ℝ)))
        constructor
        · linarith
        · rw [inv_lt_one_iff₀]; right; linarith

      rw [h1, h2]
      field_simp
      rw [mul_add, sub_mul, sub_mul, ← sub_eq_zero, Real.mul_self_sqrt (by linarith)]
      ring

  · by_contra!
    obtain ⟨x, hpos, h⟩ := this

    wlog h1 : x >= 1
    · apply this (1/x)
      · simp only [one_div, gt_iff_lt, inv_pos]; exact hpos
      · simp only [one_div, div_inv_eq_mul, one_mul]
        rw [one_div, add_comm] at h
        exact h
      · rw [ge_iff_le, one_le_div hpos]
        exact le_of_not_ge (this x hpos h)

    · by_cases h1' : x = 1
      · subst h1'
        simp at h
      · have hx := h

        have : Int.fract (1/x) = 1/x := by
          rw [Int.fract_eq_self]
          constructor
          · rw [one_div, inv_nonneg]; exact le_of_lt hpos
          · exact Bound.div_lt_one_of_pos_of_lt hpos (lt_of_le_of_ne h1 fun a ↦ h1' (id (Eq.symm a)))
        rw [this, Eq.symm (Rat.num_div_den x), one_div, inv_div] at h

        have ppos : x.num > 0 := by simp [hpos]
        obtain ⟨p, q, hq, cop⟩ := x
        dsimp at *

        rw [Int.fract_div_intCast_eq_div_intCast_mod, ← mul_right_cancel_iff_of_pos
            (by simp [ppos, Nat.zero_lt_of_ne_zero hq] : p * q > (0 : ℚ)), add_mul, ← sub_eq_zero] at h
        ring_nf at h
        rw [mul_inv_cancel_right₀ (Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr hq),
            mul_inv_cancel_right₀ (by exact Ne.symm (ne_of_lt hpos)), ← sub_mul] at h

        have : (↑(p % ↑q) - ↑q) * ↑p + ↑q ^ 2 = (0 : ZMod q) := by rw_mod_cast [h]; simp
        simp only [ZMod.intCast_mod, CharP.cast_eq_zero, sub_zero, ne_eq, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero,
          not_false_eq_true, zero_pow, add_zero] at this
        rw [← Int.cast_mul, ZMod.intCast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd] at this

        have : q ∣ p.natAbs * p.natAbs := by zify; simp [this]
        nth_rw 1 [← mul_one p.natAbs] at this
        apply Nat.Coprime.dvd_of_dvd_mul_right (Nat.coprime_comm.mp cop) at this
        apply Nat.Coprime.dvd_of_dvd_mul_left (Nat.coprime_comm.mp cop) at this
        simp only [Nat.dvd_one] at this
        simp only [this, Rat.mk_den_one, Int.fract_intCast, one_div, zero_add] at hx

        exact ne_of_lt (Int.fract_lt_one (p : ℚ)⁻¹) hx

theorem Number_Theory_n2 (b n : ℕ) (hb1 : 1 < b) (hb2 : 1 < n) (h : ∀ k : ℤ, 1 < k → ∃ a : ℤ, k ∣ (b - a^n)) :
    ∃ A : ℕ, b = A^n := by

let α := b.factorization

  suffices ∀ p ∈ α.support, n ∣ α p by
    let β := α.mapRange (fun p => p / n) (by simp)
    let A := β.prod (· ^ ·)
    use A
    have h1 : α = n • β := by
      ext p
      simp [β]
      rw [Nat.mul_div_cancel']
      by_cases hp : p ∈ α.support
      · apply this _ hp
      · simp at hp
        simp [hp]
    suffices b.factorization = (A ^ n).factorization by
      apply Nat.factorization_inj (by simp; omega) _ this
      simp
      intro h
      simp [h] at this
      rw [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_iff'] at this
      rcases this <;> omega
    simp
    convert h1
    simp [A]
    apply Nat.prod_pow_factorization_eq_self
    intro p hp
    replace hp : p ∈ α.support := by
      simp [β] at hp ⊢
      omega
    exact Nat.prime_of_mem_primeFactors hp

  let k : ℤ := b^2
  obtain ⟨a_k, ha_k⟩ := h k (by simpa [k])

  have h1 : ∀ p ∈ α.support, (p ^ (2 * α p) : ℤ) ∣ (b - a_k^n) := by
    intro p hp
    calc
      (p ^ (2 * α p) : ℤ) ∣ b^2 := by
        convert_to ((p ^ (α p)) ^ 2 : ℤ) ∣ b^2
        · apply pow_mul'
        rw [Int.pow_dvd_pow_iff]
        · convert_to ((p ^ (α p) : ℕ) : ℤ) ∣ (b : ℤ)
          · rw [Int.natCast_pow]
          rw [Int.ofNat_dvd]
          exact Nat.ordProj_dvd b p
        · norm_num
      _ ∣ _ := ha_k

  have h2 : ∀ p ∈ α.support, a_k^n ≡ 0 [ZMOD (p ^ (α p))] := by
    intro p hp
    specialize h1 p hp
    replace h1 : (p ^ (α p) : ℤ) ∣ (b - a_k^n) := by
      rw [pow_mul'] at h1
      calc
        _ ∣ (p ^ α p : ℤ) ^ 2 := by exact Dvd.intro_left ((p ^ α p : ℤ)^1) rfl
        _ ∣ _ := h1
    apply Int.ModEq.trans (b := b)
    · exact Int.modEq_iff_dvd.mpr h1
    suffices p ^ (α p) ∣ b by
      apply Dvd.dvd.modEq_zero_int
      rwa [← Int.natCast_pow, Int.ofNat_dvd]
    exact Nat.ordProj_dvd b p
  have h3 : ∀ p ∈ α.support, ¬ a_k^n ≡ 0 [ZMOD (p ^ (α p + 1))] := by
    intro p hp h
    specialize h1 p hp
    replace h1 : (p ^ (α p + 1) : ℤ) ∣ (b - a_k^n) := by
      calc
        _ ∣ (p ^ (2 * α p) : ℤ) := by
          rw [pow_dvd_pow_iff]
          · simp at hp
            omega
          · simp
            apply Nat.Prime.ne_zero
            exact Nat.prime_of_mem_primeFactors hp
          · rw [Int.ofNat_isUnit]
            simp
            apply Nat.Prime.ne_one
            exact Nat.prime_of_mem_primeFactors hp
        _ ∣ _ := h1
    rw [Int.modEq_zero_iff_dvd] at h
    have := Int.dvd_add h h1
    conv at this => rhs; ring_nf
    rw [← Int.natCast_pow, Int.ofNat_dvd] at this
    contrapose! this
    apply Nat.pow_succ_factorization_not_dvd (by omega)
    exact Nat.prime_of_mem_primeFactors hp

  have h4 : ∀ p ∈ α.support, multiplicity (p : ℤ) (a_k^n) = α p := by
    intro p hp
    specialize h2 p hp
    specialize h3 p hp
    rw [Int.modEq_zero_iff_dvd] at h2 h3
    observe : FiniteMultiplicity (↑p) (a_k ^ n)
    rw [← FiniteMultiplicity.multiplicity_lt_iff_not_dvd (by assumption)] at h3
    rw [FiniteMultiplicity.pow_dvd_iff_le_multiplicity (by assumption)] at h2
    omega

  intro p hp
  specialize h4 p hp
  rw [FiniteMultiplicity.multiplicity_pow] at h4
  · rw [← h4]
    apply Nat.dvd_mul_right
  · rw [← Nat.prime_iff_prime_int]
    exact Nat.prime_of_mem_primeFactors hp
  · rw [Int.finiteMultiplicity_iff_finiteMultiplicity_natAbs, Nat.finiteMultiplicity_iff]
    simp
    constructor
    · exact Nat.Prime.ne_one <| Nat.prime_of_mem_primeFactors hp
    intro ha_k'
    rw [ha_k', zero_pow (by omega)] at ha_k
    simp [k] at ha_k
    rw [← Int.natCast_pow, Int.ofNat_dvd] at ha_k
    exact Nat.not_pos_pow_dvd (a := b) (n := 2) (by assumption) (by norm_num) ha_k

theorem number_theory_638338 (D:ℕ) (Dpos: 0 < D) (x y z:ℕ) (xu: x < 10) (yu: y < 10) (zu: z < 10) (hD: D = 783428) (N: ℕ) (hN: N = 100000*x+10000*y+3420+z):
(D ∣ N)
↔
x = 7 ∧ y = 8 ∧ z = 8 := by

constructor

  intro h
  obtain ⟨k,hk⟩ := h

  have ke : k = 1 := by
    by_contra
    have kge2 : 2 ≤ k := by
      by_cases ke0 : k = 0
      simp [ke0, hN] at hk
      omega
    have Nge : 1500000 ≤ N := by
      rw [hk, hD]
      linarith
    omega

  simp [hk,hD] at hN
  omega

  simp [hD,hN,xe,ye,ze]

rcases h with ⟨x1, x2, hx12, h1, h2⟩

  have h_eq : 4 * a * (x1 + x2) + 4 * (a + 1) = 0 := by
    have h1_eq : 4 * a * x1^2 + 4 * (a + 1) * x1 + a^2 + a + 3 + 1 / a = 0 := h1
    have h2_eq : 4 * a * x2^2 + 4 * (a + 1) * x2 + a^2 + a + 3 + 1 / a = 0 := h2
    have h_sub : 4 * a * (x1^2 - x2^2) + 4 * (a + 1) * (x1 - x2) = 0 := by
      have h : 4 * a * x1^2 + 4 * (a + 1) * x1 + a^2 + a + 3 + 1 / a - (4 * a * x2^2 + 4 * (a + 1) * x2 + a^2 + a + 3 + 1 / a) = 0 := by
        linarith
      field_simp at h
      nlinarith
    have h_ne : x1 - x2 ≠ 0 := by exact sub_ne_zero.mpr hx12
    have h_eq : 4 * a * (x1 + x2) + 4 * (a + 1) = 0 := by
      apply (mul_left_inj' h_ne).mp
      linarith [h_sub]
    linarith

  have h3 : a < 0 := by
    have eq1 : 4 * a * x1^2 + 4 * (a + 1) * x1 + a^2 + a + 3 + 1 / a = 0 := h1
    have eq2 : 4 * a * x2^2 + 4 * (a + 1) * x2 + a^2 + a + 3 + 1 / a = 0 := h2
    have h_eq1 : a^3 + a < 0 := by
      have eq1' : 4 * a^2 * x1^2 + 4 * a * (a + 1) * x1 + a^3 + a^2 + 3 * a + 1 = 0 := by
        have h1_eq : 4 * a * x1^2 + 4 * (a + 1) * x1 + a^2 + a + 3 + 1 / a = 0 := h1
        have h1_mul : a ≠ 0 := ha
        field_simp at h1_eq
        nlinarith
      have eq2' : 4 * a^2 * x2^2 + 4 * a * (a + 1) * x2 + a^3 + a^2 + 3 * a + 1 = 0 := by
        have h2_eq : 4 * a * x2^2 + 4 * (a + 1) * x2 + a^2 + a + 3 + 1 / a = 0 := h2
        have h2_mul : a ≠ 0 := ha
        field_simp at h2_eq
        nlinarith
      nlinarith [sq_pos_of_ne_zero ha, sq_pos_of_ne_zero (show x1 - x2 ≠ 0 by exact sub_ne_zero.mpr hx12),
        sq_nonneg (x1 + x2), sq_nonneg (x1 - x2),
        sq_nonneg (x1 + (a + 1) / (2 * a)), sq_nonneg (x2 + (a + 1) / (2 * a))]
    have h4 : a * (a^2 + 1) < 0 := by nlinarith
    have h5 : a < 0 := by
      have h6 : a^2 + 1 > 0 := by
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg a]
      have h7 : a < 0 := by
        apply mul_neg_iff.mp at h4
        cases h4 with
        | inl h8 =>
          nlinarith
        | inr h9 =>
          nlinarith
      exact h7
    linarith
  exact h3

open Nat Finset

def num_digits (n : Nat) : Nat :=
  if n < 10 then 1
  else if n < 100 then 2
  else Nat.log 10 n + 1

def subsequence_length (n : Nat) : Nat :=
  (∑ i in range (n), i.succ * num_digits i.succ)

lemma subsequence_length_formula (n : Nat) (hn : 10 ≤ n) (hnn : n ≤ 99) :
  subsequence_length n = n^2 + n - 45 := by
  unfold subsequence_length num_digits
  simp
  transitivity (∑ x ∈ range 9, if x + 1 < 10 then x + 1 else if x + 1 < 100 then (x + 1) * 2 else (x + 1) * (log 10 (x + 1) + 1)) + (∑ x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 n, if x + 1 < 10 then x + 1 else if x + 1 < 100 then (x + 1) * 2 else (x + 1) * (log 10 (x + 1) + 1))
  sorry
  transitivity (∑ x ∈ Finset.range n, if x + 1 < 10 then x + 1 else if x + 1 < 100 then (x + 1) * 2 else (x + 1) * (log 10 (x + 1) + 1)) - ∑ x ∈ range 9, if x + 1 < 10 then x + 1 else if x + 1 < 100 then (x + 1) * 2 else (x + 1) * (log 10 (x + 1) + 1)
  sorry
  have h1 : (∑ x ∈ range n, if x + 1 < 10 then x + 1 else if x + 1 < 100 then (x + 1) * 2 else (x + 1) * (log 10 (x + 1) + 1)) = n ^ 2 + n := by sorry
  have h2 : (∑ x ∈ range 9, if x + 1 < 10 then x + 1 else if x + 1 < 100 then (x + 1) * 2 else (x + 1) * (log 10 (x + 1) + 1)) = 45 := by sorry
  rw [h1, h2]

theorem numbertheory_608190 : length_up_to_67 = 4511 := by

unfold subsequence_length num_digits
  simp
  transitivity (∑ x ∈ range 9, if x + 1 < 10 then x + 1 else if x + 1 < 100 then (x + 1) * 2 else (x + 1) * (log 10 (x + 1) + 1)) + (∑ x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 n, if x + 1 < 10 then x + 1 else if x + 1 < 100 then (x + 1) * 2 else (x + 1) * (log 10 (x + 1) + 1))
  sorry
  transitivity (∑ x ∈ Finset.range n, if x + 1 < 10 then x + 1 else if x + 1 < 100 then (x + 1) * 2 else (x + 1) * (log 10 (x + 1) + 1)) - ∑ x ∈ range 9, if x + 1 < 10 then x + 1 else if x + 1 < 100 then (x + 1) * 2 else (x + 1) * (log 10 (x + 1) + 1)
  sorry
  have h1 : (∑ x ∈ range n, if x + 1 < 10 then x + 1 else if x + 1 < 100 then (x + 1) * 2 else (x + 1) * (log 10 (x + 1) + 1)) = n ^ 2 + n := by sorry
  have h2 : (∑ x ∈ range 9, if x + 1 < 10 then x + 1 else if x + 1 < 100 then (x + 1) * 2 else (x + 1) * (log 10 (x + 1) + 1)) = 45 := by sorry
  rw [h1, h2]

theorem algebra_313199 {a b c d : ℝ} (ha : |a| > 1) (hb : |b| > 1) (hc : |c| > 1) (hd : |d| > 1) (h : a * b * c + a * b * d + a * c * d + b * c * d + a + b + c + d = 0) : 1 / (a - 1) + 1 / (b - 1) + 1 / (c - 1) + 1 / (d - 1) > 0 := by

let x := (a + 1) / (a - 1)
  let y := (b + 1) / (b - 1)
  let z := (c + 1) / (c - 1)
  let t := (d + 1) / (d - 1)

  have pos_of_abs_gt_1 {x : ℝ} (hx : |x| > 1) : (x + 1) / (x - 1) > 0 := by
    by_cases h : x ≥ 0
    · rw [abs_of_nonneg h] at hx
      apply div_pos
      · linarith only [hx]
      · linarith only [hx]
    · push_neg at h
      rw [abs_of_neg h] at hx
      apply div_pos_of_neg_of_neg
      · linarith only [hx]
      · linarith only [hx]
  have hxpos : x > 0 := by apply pos_of_abs_gt_1 ha
  have hypos : y > 0 := by apply pos_of_abs_gt_1 hb
  have hzpos : z > 0 := by apply pos_of_abs_gt_1 hc
  have htpos : t > 0 := by apply pos_of_abs_gt_1 hd
  have : a - 1 ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply sub_eq_zero.mp at h; simp [h] at ha
  have : b - 1 ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply sub_eq_zero.mp at h; simp [h] at hb
  have : c - 1 ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply sub_eq_zero.mp at h; simp [h] at hc
  have : d - 1 ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply sub_eq_zero.mp at h; simp [h] at hd

  have hmul : x * y * z * t = 1 := by
    unfold x y z t
    field_simp
    trans (a * b * c * d + a * b + a * c + a * d + b * c + b * d + c * d + 1)
    · apply sub_eq_zero.mp
      rw [←h]
      ring_nf
    · apply sub_eq_zero.mp
      rw [←h]
      ring_nf

  apply lt_of_lt_of_eq (b := (x + y + z + t - 4) / 2)
  · simp
    apply sub_pos.mp
    apply lt_of_lt_of_eq (b := (√x - √y) ^ 2 + (√z - √t) ^ 2 + 2 * (√√(x * y) - √√(z * t)) ^ 2)
    · apply lt_of_le_of_ne
      · positivity
      · by_contra h
        have h₁ : √x = √y := by
          by_contra h₁
          have : (√x - √y) ^ 2 + (√z - √t) ^ 2 + 2 * (√√(x * y) - √√(z * t)) ^ 2 > 0 := by
            apply add_pos_of_pos_of_nonneg ?_ (by positivity)
            apply add_pos_of_pos_of_nonneg ?_ (by positivity)
            apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
            exact sub_ne_zero_of_ne h₁
          simp [←h] at this
        simp [h₁] at h
        have h₂ : √z = √t := by
          by_contra h₂
          have : (√z - √t) ^ 2 + 2 * (√√(x * y) - √√(z * t)) ^ 2 > 0 := by
            apply add_pos_of_pos_of_nonneg ?_ (by positivity)
            apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
            exact sub_ne_zero_of_ne h₂
          simp [←h] at this
        simp [h₂] at h
        apply sub_eq_zero.mp at h
        have h₁ : x = y := by
          apply Real.sqrt_inj ?_ ?_ |>.mp h₁
          all_goals positivity
        have h₂ : z = t := by
          apply Real.sqrt_inj ?_ ?_ |>.mp h₂
          all_goals positivity
        rw [h₁, ←h₂, Real.sqrt_mul_self, Real.sqrt_mul_self] at h
        have h₃ : y = z := by
          apply Real.sqrt_inj ?_ ?_ |>.mp h
          all_goals positivity
        rw [h₁, h₃, h₂] at hmul
        have : t ^ 4 = 1 := by rw [←hmul]; ring
        have ht : t = 1 := by
          apply pow_eq_one_iff_of_nonneg ?_ ?_ |>.mp this
          all_goals positivity
        field_simp [t] at ht
        apply sub_eq_zero.mpr at ht
        simp at ht
        all_goals positivity
    · rw [sub_sq, sub_sq, sub_sq, Real.sq_sqrt, Real.sq_sqrt, Real.sq_sqrt, Real.sq_sqrt, Real.sq_sqrt, Real.sq_sqrt]
      rw [mul_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_assoc, ←Real.sqrt_mul,  ←Real.sqrt_mul,  ←Real.sqrt_mul, ←Real.sqrt_mul, ←mul_assoc, hmul]
      simp
      ring
      all_goals positivity
  · unfold x y z t
    field_simp
    ring
