theorem number_theory_120461 (n : ℕ) (hn : (2^(2^n) + 1).Prime) :
    ¬ ∃ a > 0, ∃ b > 0, 2^(2^n) + 1 = a^5 - b^5 := by

push_neg

  intro a ha b hb h
  have : 0 ≤ a := Nat.zero_le a
  have : 0 ≤ b := Nat.zero_le b

  have : b < a := by
    rw[← not_le]
    intro le
    have : a ^ 5 ≤ b ^5 := by mono
    have : a^5 - b^5 = 0 := by rwa[Nat.sub_eq_zero_iff_le]
    rw[this] at h
    rw[h] at hn
    contradiction
  have := this.le

  have : a ^ 5 - b ^ 5 = (a - b) * (a^4 + a^3 * b + a^2 * b^2 + a * b^3 + b^4) := by
    zify
    rw[Nat.cast_sub (by mono), Nat.cast_sub (by mono)]
    push_cast
    ring
  rw[this] at h
  rw[h] at hn

  rw[Nat.prime_mul_iff] at hn
  cases hn with

  | inl h =>

      have : 1 + 0 + 0 + 0 + 1 ≤ a ^ 4 + a ^ 3 * b + a ^ 2 * b ^ 2 + a * b ^ 3 + b ^ 4 := by
        have aa : 1 ≤ a^4 := Nat.pow_pos ha
        have bb : 1 ≤ b^4 := Nat.pow_pos hb
        gcongr
        · simp only [zero_le]
        · simp
        · simp
      rw[h.2] at this
      contradiction

  | inr h' =>
    obtain rfl : a = b + 1 := by omega

    rw[← this, add_pow] at h

    simp only [Nat.reduceAdd, one_pow, mul_one, Nat.cast_id, Finset.sum_range_succ,
      Finset.range_one, Finset.sum_singleton, pow_zero, Nat.choose_zero_right, pow_one,
      Nat.choose_one_right, Nat.choose_succ_self_right, Nat.choose_self, add_tsub_cancel_right] at h

    have : 2 ^ 2 ^ n = b * 5 + b ^ 2 * Nat.choose 5 2 + b ^ 3 * Nat.choose 5 3 + b ^ 4 * 5 := by linarith

    have : 2 ^ 2 ^ n = 5 * b + 10 * b^2 + 10 * b^3 + 5 * b^4 := by
      convert this using 1
      ring_nf
      congr

    have : 2 ^ 2 ^ n = 5 * (b + 2 * b^2 + 2 * b^3 + b^4) := by rw[this]; ring
    have : 5 ∣ 2 := Nat.Prime.dvd_of_dvd_pow Nat.prime_five ⟨_,this⟩
    norm_num at this

theorem my_favorite_theorem {A N M : ℤ}
  (hA : A > 0)
  (h : M = A * N + 11 * (N - 1))
  (h' : M = 8 * A + 77)
  : N = 8 := by

have h₁ : A * N + 11 * (N - 1) = 8 * A + 77 := by
    rw [← h, h']

  have h₂ : (A + 11) * N = 8 * (A + 11) := by
    calc
      (A + 11) * N = A * N + 11 * N := by ring
      _ = (A * N + 11 * (N - 1)) + 11 := by ring
      _ = (8 * A + 77) + 11           := by rw [h₁]
      _ = 8 * A + 88                 := by ring
      _ = 8 * (A + 11)               := by ring

  have hA : A + 11 ≠ 0 := by linarith [hA]

  apply_fun (· / (A + 11)) at h₂
  rw [mul_div_cancel_left₀ _ hA] at h₂
  have h₃ : 8 * (A + 11) / (A + 11) = 8 := by
    exact Int.mul_ediv_cancel 8 hA
  rw [h₃] at h₂
  exact h₂

theorem algebra_9393 (α : ℝ) (hαne : ∀ k : ℤ, π / 2 + k * π ≠ α) : tan α + √3 / 3 > 0 ↔
    ∃ k : ℤ, α ∈ (Set.Ioo (- π / 6 + k * π) (π / 2 + k * π) : Set ℝ) := by

have inv_sqrt_three : 1 / √3 = √3 / 3 := by
    rw [← mul_left_inj' (show √3 ≠ 0 by norm_num)]
    conv_rhs => rw [mul_comm, ← mul_div_assoc]
    simp
  constructor
  . intro hα

    set k : ℤ := ⌊α / π - 1 / 2⌋
    have h1 : k ≤ α / π - 1 / 2 := Int.floor_le _
    have h2 : α / π - 1 / 2 < k + 1 := Int.lt_floor_add_one _
    use k + 1
    constructor
    . replace h1 : -1 / 2 ≤ α / π - (k + 1) := by linarith
      rw [← mul_le_mul_iff_of_pos_left (show 0 < π from pi_pos), mul_sub, mul_comm _ (α / π),
        div_mul_cancel₀ _ (by positivity), mul_comm _ ((k : ℝ) + 1)] at h1
      replace h2 : α / π - (k + 1) < 1 / 2 := by linarith
      replace h2 := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left h2 (show 0 < π from pi_pos)
      rw [mul_sub, mul_comm _ (α / π), div_mul_cancel₀ _ (by positivity), mul_comm _ ((k : ℝ) + 1)] at h2

      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      push_cast at h
      replace h : α - (k + 1) * π ≤ -π / 6 := by linarith
      set θ := α - (k + 1) * π

      have hθmemIoo : θ ∈ Set.Ioo (-(π / 2)) (π / 2) := by
        constructor
        . rw [lt_iff_le_and_ne]
          refine ⟨by linarith, ?_⟩
          dsimp [θ]
          intro hαk
          replace hαk : π / 2 + (k : ℝ) * π = α := by linear_combination hαk
          exact hαne _ hαk
        linarith

      have htanθ : tan θ = tan α := by
        dsimp [θ]
        rw [sub_eq_add_neg, ← neg_mul, show -((k : ℝ) + 1) = ((-k - 1 : ℤ) : ℝ) by norm_cast; ring, tan_add_int_mul_pi]
      rcases eq_or_ne θ (-π / 6) with hθ | hθ

      . rw [← htanθ, hθ, neg_div, tan_neg, tan_pi_div_six, inv_sqrt_three] at hα
        norm_num at hα
      replace h : θ < -π / 6 := by
        rw [lt_iff_le_and_ne]
        constructor <;> assumption

      have := Real.strictMonoOn_tan (by assumption) (by constructor <;> linarith) h
      rw [neg_div, tan_neg, tan_pi_div_six, inv_sqrt_three] at this
      linarith
    have := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left h2 (show 0 < π from pi_pos)
    rw [mul_sub, mul_comm, div_mul_cancel₀ _ (by positivity), one_div] at this
    push_cast
    rw [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_comm _ π]
    linarith

  rintro ⟨k, hk⟩
  simp at hk
  let θ := α - k * π
  have htanθ : tan θ = tan α := by
    dsimp [θ]
    rw [show α - k * π = α + (-k) * π by ring]
    exact_mod_cast tan_add_int_mul_pi _ _
  rw [← htanθ]

  suffices tan θ > tan (- (π / 6)) by
    rw [tan_neg, tan_pi_div_six] at this
    linarith

  apply Real.strictMonoOn_tan
  . constructor <;> linarith
  . constructor <;> linarith
  . linarith

theorem algebra_13884 (a b c : ℂ) (hx: ∀x, (x - a) * (x - b) * (x - c) = x^3 - 20*x^2 + 18*x - 7)
    : (a+b)^2+(b+c)^2+(c+a)^2 = 764 := by

have eq₁ : ∀x, -(a + b + c) * x^2 + (a * b + a * c + b * c) * x - (a * b * c) =

    intro x
    specialize hx x
    apply add_left_cancel
    case a => exact x^3
    have : x ^ 3 + (-20 * x ^ 2 + 18 * x - 7) = x^3 - 20*x^2 + 18*x - 7 := by
      apply Complex.ext
      repeat simp; linarith
    rw [this, hx.symm]
    ring_nf

  have eq₂ : ∀x, (-(a + b + c) - (-20)) * x^2
           + ((a * b + a * c + b * c) - 18) * x
           + (-(a * b * c) - (-7)) = 0 := by
    intro x
    have : a * b * c = 7 := by
      specialize hx 0
      simp at hx
      exact hx
    rw [this]
    simp
    specialize eq₁ x
    rw [this] at eq₁
    simp at eq₁
    rw [←sub_eq_iff_eq_add'] at eq₁
    rw [sub_mul, add_mul, add_sub, eq₁.symm]
    ring_nf
  simp at eq₂
  have : (a + b + c) = 20 ∧
         (a * b + a * c + b * c) = 18 ∧
         (a * b * c) = 7 := by
    have : ∃(P : Polynomial ℂ),
             P = (Polynomial.C (-(a + b + c) - (-20))) * Polynomial.X^2
               + (Polynomial.C ((a * b + a * c + b * c) - 18)) * Polynomial.X
               + (Polynomial.C (-(a * b * c) - (-7))) := by simp
    rcases this with ⟨P, hP⟩
    have : P = 0 := by
      apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_isRoot
      simp
      have : {x | Polynomial.eval x P = 0} = Set.univ := by
        ext x
        simp
        rw [hP]
        simp
        specialize eq₂ x
        exact eq₂
      rw [this]
      exact Set.infinite_univ
    have coeff_0 : P.coeff 0 = (-(a * b * c) - -7) := by
      rw [hP]
      simp
    have coeff_1 : P.coeff 1 = (a * b + a * c + b * c) - 18 := by
      rw [hP]
      simp
      rw [←Polynomial.C_neg, ←Polynomial.C_neg, ←Polynomial.C_neg]
      rw [←Polynomial.C_add, ←Polynomial.C_add, ←Polynomial.C_add]
      rw [Polynomial.coeff_C_mul_X_pow]
      simp
    have coeff_2 : P.coeff 2 = -(a + b + c) - (-20) := by
      rw [hP]
      simp
      rw [←Polynomial.C_neg, ←Polynomial.C_neg, ←Polynomial.C_neg]
      rw [←Polynomial.C_add, ←Polynomial.C_add, ←Polynomial.C_add]
      rw [Polynomial.coeff_C_mul_X_pow]
      simp
    rw [this, Polynomial.coeff_zero, Eq.comm, sub_eq_zero, Eq.comm] at coeff_0 coeff_1 coeff_2
    constructor
    · rw [neg_eq_iff_eq_neg] at coeff_2
      rw [coeff_2]
      simp
    · constructor
      · rw [coeff_1]
      · simp at coeff_0
        exact coeff_0.symm

  rw [show (a + b) ^ 2 + (b + c) ^ 2 + (c + a) ^ 2 = 2 * (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a * b + a * c + b * c) by ring_nf, this.1, this.2.1]
  norm_num

theorem algebra_150600 (α β : ℝ) (h : sin (α + β) / sin (α - β) = 3) :
    tan α / tan β = 2 := by

have h1 : sin (α - β) ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h2
    rw [h2] at h
    norm_num at h

  have h2 : sin (α + β) = 3 * sin (α - β) := by
    field_simp [h1] at h
    linarith

  rw [sin_add, sin_sub] at h2

  have h3 : sin α * cos β + cos α * sin β = 3 * (sin α * cos β - cos α * sin β) := by linarith

  have h4 : sin α * cos β + cos α * sin β = 3 * sin α * cos β - 3 * cos α * sin β := by linarith [h3]

  have h5 : 4 * cos α * sin β = 2 * sin α * cos β := by linarith [h4]

  have hcosα : cos α ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra hcosα

    have eq1 : sin α ^ 2 + cos α ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq α
    rw [hcosα] at eq1

    have eq2 : sin α ^ 2 = 1 := by nlinarith
    have eq3 : 4 * cos α * sin β = 2 * sin α * cos β := by linarith [h5]
    rw [hcosα] at eq3

    have hcosβ : cos β = 0 := by
      cases (mul_eq_zero.mp (by linarith : 2 * sin α * cos β = 0)) with
      | inl h1 =>
        have : sin α = 0 := by linarith
        have : sin α ^ 2 = 0 := by nlinarith
        nlinarith
      | inr h2 =>
        linarith

    have eq4 : sin β ^ 2 + cos β ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq β
    rw [hcosβ] at eq4

    have eq5 : sin β ^ 2 = 1 := by nlinarith

    have h6 : sin (α + β) = 0 := by
      rw [sin_add]
      simp [hcosα, hcosβ]
    have h7 : sin (α - β) = 0 := by
      rw [sin_sub]
      simp [hcosα, hcosβ]

    rw [h6, h7] at h
    norm_num at h

  have hsinβ : sin β ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra hsinβ
    have eq1 : 4 * cos α * sin β = 2 * sin α * cos β := by linarith [h5]
    rw [hsinβ] at eq1
    have h1 : 2 * sin α * cos β = 0 := by linarith
    cases (mul_eq_zero.mp (by linarith : 2 * sin α * cos β = 0)) with
    | inl h2 =>

      have hsinα : sin α = 0 := by linarith
      have eq2 : sin α ^ 2 + cos α ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq α
      rw [hsinα] at eq2
      have eq3 : cos α ^ 2 = 1 := by nlinarith

      have h8 : sin (α + β) = 0 := by
        rw [sin_add]
        simp [hsinα, hsinβ]
      have h9 : sin (α - β) = 0 := by
        rw [sin_sub]
        simp [hsinα, hsinβ]

      rw [h8, h9] at h
      norm_num at h
    | inr h2 =>

      have hcosβ : cos β = 0 := by linarith
      have eq4 : sin β ^ 2 + cos β ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq β
      rw [hsinβ, hcosβ] at eq4
      norm_num at eq4

  have htan : tan α / tan β = 2 := by

    have htanα : tan α = sin α / cos α := Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos α
    have htanβ : tan β = sin β / cos β := Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos β
    rw [htanα, htanβ]

    have h6 : cos α ≠ 0 := hcosα
    have h7 : sin β ≠ 0 := hsinβ
    field_simp [h6, h7]

    linarith [h5]

  exact htan

theorem number_theory_640394 (n m : ℕ) (hn : n > 0) (hm : m = ⌊√n⌋) : ∑ i in Finset.range n, ⌊√(i + 1)⌋ = m * (n - m ^ 2 + 1) + (m - 1) * m * (4 * m + 1) / 6 := by

have h1 : n ≥ m ^ 2:= by
    rify at hm
    have h1 : m ≤ √n:= by
      rw [hm]
      exact Int.floor_le √↑n
    rw [show (↑m : ℝ) = |(↑m : ℝ)| by exact Eq.symm (abs_of_nonneg (by rw [hm] ; positivity))] at h1
    rw [show √n = |√n| by exact Eq.symm (abs_of_nonneg (by positivity))] at h1
    replace h1 : m ^ 2 ≤ √n ^ 2:= by exact sq_le_sq.mpr h1
    field_simp at h1
    rify
    linarith

  have h2 : n < (m + 1) ^ 2:= by
    rify at hm
    have h2 : m + 1 > √n:= by
      rw [hm]
      exact Int.lt_floor_add_one √↑n
    rw [show (↑m : ℝ) + 1 = |(↑m : ℝ) + 1| by exact Eq.symm (abs_of_nonneg (by rw [hm] ; positivity))] at h2
    rw [show √n = |√n| by exact Eq.symm (abs_of_nonneg (by positivity))] at h2
    replace h2 : (m + 1) ^ 2 > √n ^ 2:= by exact sq_lt_sq.mpr h2
    field_simp at h2
    rify
    linarith

  have g : ∀ m k : ℕ, k + 1 ≤ 2 * m → ⌊√(↑m ^ 2 + ↑k + 1)⌋ = m:= by
    intro m k hmk
    refine Int.floor_eq_iff.mpr ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    .
      simp
      suffices √(↑m ^ 2 + ↑k + 1) ≥ √(m ^ 2) by field_simp at this ; exact this
      suffices (↑m : ℝ) ^ 2 + ↑k + 1 ≥ m ^ 2 by exact Real.sqrt_le_sqrt this
      suffices m ^ 2 + k + 1 ≥ m ^ 2 by rify at this ; exact this
      omega
    .
      simp
      rw [show (↑m : ℝ) + 1 = |(↑m : ℝ) + 1| by exact Eq.symm (abs_of_nonneg (by positivity))]
      rw [show √(↑m ^ 2 + ↑k + 1) = |√(↑m ^ 2 + ↑k + 1)| by exact Eq.symm (abs_of_nonneg (by positivity))]
      suffices √(↑m ^ 2 + ↑k + 1) ^ 2 < (↑m + 1) ^ 2 by exact sq_lt_sq.mp this
      field_simp
      suffices m ^ 2 + k + 1 < (m + 1) ^ 2 by rify at this ; exact this
      linarith only [hmk]

  set r:= n - m ^ 2 with hr
  clear_value r
  replace hn : n = m ^ 2 + r:= by omega
  replace h2 : r ≤ 2 * m:= by linarith
  clear h1 hr
  subst n
  clear hm

  induction r with
  | zero =>
    simp
    clear h2
    induction m with
    | zero =>
      simp
    | succ m ih =>
      rw [show (m + 1) ^ 2 = m ^ 2 + 2 * m + 1 by ring]
      rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
      simp
      rw [show (↑m : ℝ) ^ 2 + 2 * ↑m + 1 = (m + 1) ^ 2 by ring_nf]
      field_simp
      have h1 : ∀ k : ℕ, k ≤ 2 * m → ∑ x ∈ Finset.range (m ^ 2 + k), ⌊√(↑x + 1)⌋ = ↑m + (↑m - 1) * ↑m * (4 * ↑m + 1) / 6 + k * m:= by
        intro k hk
        induction k with
        | zero =>
          simp
          exact ih
        | succ k ihk =>
          rw [show m ^ 2 + (k + 1) = m ^ 2 + k + 1 by ring]
          rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, ihk]
          simp
          rw [g m k hk]
          ring_nf
          omega
      rw [h1 (2 * m) (by omega)]
      simp
      rw [show (↑m : ℤ) * (↑m + 1) * (4 * (↑m + 1) + 1) = 6 * (2 * m ^ 2 + m) + (↑m - 1) * ↑m * (4 * ↑m + 1) by ring]
      rw [show (6 * (2 * (↑m : ℤ) ^ 2 + ↑m) + (↑m - 1) * ↑m * (4 * ↑m + 1)) / 6 = (2 * ↑m ^ 2 + ↑m) + ((↑m - 1) * ↑m * (4 * ↑m + 1)) / 6 by omega]
      ring_nf
  | succ i ih =>
    rw [show m ^ 2 + (i + 1) = m ^ 2 + i + 1 by ring]
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
    simp
    rw [g m i h2, ih]
    simp
    ring_nf
    omega

theorem algebra_165347 {b x : ℝ} (hb : 0 < b ∧ b ≠ 1) (hx : 0 < x ∧ x ≠ 1)
    (h : Real.logb b x ^ 2 + Real.logb x b ^ 2 = 1) : x = b := by

have h1 : Real.logb b x ^ 2 + Real.logb x b ^ 2 = 1 := h

  have h2 : Real.logb b x = Real.log x / Real.log b := by
    field_simp [Real.logb]

  have h3 : Real.logb x b = Real.log b / Real.log x := by
    field_simp [Real.logb]

  rw [h2, h3] at h1

  have h4 : Real.log b ≠ 0 := by
    have hb2 : b ≠ 1 := hb.2
    have h_log_b_ne_zero : Real.log b ≠ 0 := by
      by_contra h
      have h1 : b = 1 := by
        have h2 : Real.log b = 0 := by linarith
        rw [Real.log_eq_zero] at h2
        cases h2 with
        | inl h3 => linarith
        | inr h3 =>
          cases h3 with
          | inl h4 => linarith
          | inr h5 => linarith
      contradiction
    exact h_log_b_ne_zero

  have h5 : Real.log x ≠ 0 := by
    have hx2 : x ≠ 1 := hx.2
    have h_log_x_ne_zero : Real.log x ≠ 0 := by
      by_contra h
      have h1 : x = 1 := by
        have h2 : Real.log x = 0 := by linarith
        rw [Real.log_eq_zero] at h2
        cases h2 with
        | inl h3 => linarith
        | inr h3 =>
          cases h3 with
          | inl h4 => linarith
          | inr h5 => linarith
      contradiction
    exact h_log_x_ne_zero

  have h6 : (Real.log x / Real.log b) ^ 2 + (Real.log b / Real.log x) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    linarith

  have h7 : Real.log x ^ 4 - Real.log b ^ 2 * Real.log x ^ 2 + Real.log b ^ 4 = 0 := by
    have h8 : (Real.log x / Real.log b) ^ 2 + (Real.log b / Real.log x) ^ 2 = 1 := h6
    have h9 : Real.log x ≠ 0 := h5
    have h10 : Real.log b ≠ 0 := h4
    have eq1 : (Real.log x / Real.log b) ^ 2 + (Real.log b / Real.log x) ^ 2 =
      (Real.log x ^ 4 + Real.log b ^ 4) / (Real.log b ^ 2 * Real.log x ^ 2) := by
      field_simp [h9, h10]
      ring

    have eq2 : (Real.log x ^ 4 + Real.log b ^ 4) / (Real.log b ^ 2 * Real.log x ^ 2) = 1 := by
      rw [←eq1]
      linarith [h8]

    have h11 : Real.log x ^ 4 + Real.log b ^ 4 = Real.log b ^ 2 * Real.log x ^ 2 := by
      have h12 : Real.log b ^ 2 * Real.log x ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
        apply mul_ne_zero
        · -- Show that Real.log b ^ 2 ≠ 0
          have h13 : Real.log b ≠ 0 := h4
          exact pow_ne_zero 2 h13
        · -- Show that Real.log x ^ 2 ≠ 0
          have h14 : Real.log x ≠ 0 := h5
          exact pow_ne_zero 2 h14
      have h15 : Real.log x ^ 4 + Real.log b ^ 4 = Real.log b ^ 2 * Real.log x ^ 2 := by
        have h16 : Real.log x ^ 4 + Real.log b ^ 4 = (Real.log b ^ 2 * Real.log x ^ 2) := by
          field_simp at eq2 ⊢
          linarith
        linarith
      linarith
    nlinarith [h11]

  have h9 : Real.log b ^ 2 > 0 := by
    have h10 : Real.log b ≠ 0 := h4
    exact sq_pos_of_ne_zero h10

  have h10 : Real.log x ^ 2 > 0 := by
    have h11 : Real.log x ≠ 0 := h5
    exact sq_pos_of_ne_zero h11

  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (Real.log x ^ 2 - Real.log b ^ 2 / 2), sq_nonneg (Real.log b ^ 2), sq_nonneg (Real.log x ^ 2), h9, h10]

theorem algebra_18569 : ∑ i in Finset.range 30, (28 + 2 * i) = 1710 := by

have h1 : ∑ i in Finset.range 30, (28 + 2 * i) = ∑ i in Finset.range 30, 28 + ∑ i in Finset.range 30, 2 * i := rfl

  have h2 : ∑ i in Finset.range 30, 28 = 28 * 30 := by apply Finset.sum_const

  have h3 : ∑ i in Finset.range 30, 2 * i = 2 * ∑ i in Finset.range 30, i := rfl

  have h4 : ∀ n : ℕ, ∑ i in Finset.range n, i = n * (n - 1) / 2 := fun n => Finset.sum_range_id n
  specialize h4 30
  rw [h4] at h3
  rw [h2, h3] at h1
  rw [h1]

theorem number_theory_18978 (x : ℕ) (hx : x ∈ Finset.Icc 100 999) :
    100 * x ≡ 1 [MOD 997] ↔ x = 668 := by

simp [Nat.ModEq]
  norm_num at hx
  omega

constructor
    . -- prove existence for 6
      use 19
      use 20
      use 10
      use 5
      use 6
      use 2
      use 1
      norm_num

    . -- prove impossibility for 5 and 4
      constructor
      . -- prove impossibility for 5
        by_contra! h
        obtain ⟨a0, a1, a2, a3, a4, a5, h⟩ := h
        rcases h with ⟨h5,h4,h3,h2,h1,s0,s5⟩
        simp [s5] at h5
        simp [s0] at *
        clear s0 s5

        have o: ¬ a4 = 0 := by
          by_contra! o
          simp [o] at h4
          field_simp at h4
          rcases h4 with h4 | h4 | h4
          .
            replace h4: a3 = -1 := by linarith
            simp [h4] at h3
            field_simp at h3
            rcases h3 with h3 | h3 | h3
            .
              replace h3: a2 = -2 := by linarith
              simp [h3] at h2
              field_simp at h2
              norm_num at h2
              rcases h2 with h2 | h2 | h2
              .
                replace h2: a1 = -3 := by linarith
                simp [h2] at h1
                norm_num at h1
              .
                rw [← h2] at h1
                norm_num at h1
              .
                rw [← h2] at h1
                norm_num at h1
            .
              simp [← h3] at h2
              rcases h2 with h2 | h2 | h2
              .
                replace h2: a1 = -3 := by linarith
                simp [h2] at h1
                norm_num at h1
              .
                replace h2: a1 = -4 := by linarith
                simp [h2] at h1
                norm_num at h1
              .
                replace h2: a1 = -6 := by linarith
                simp [h2] at h1
                norm_num at h1
            .
              simp [← h3] at h2
              field_simp at h2
              rcases h2 with h2 | h2 | h2
              .
                replace h2: a1 = -4 := by linarith
                simp [h2] at h1
                norm_num at h1
              .
                replace h2: a1 = -6 := by linarith
                simp [h2] at h1
                norm_num at h1
              .
                replace h2: a1 = -9 := by linarith
                simp [h2] at h1
                norm_num at h1

          .
            field_simp at h3
            rcases h3 with h3 | h3
            .
              replace h3: a2 = -1 := by linarith
              simp [h3] at h2
              field_simp at h2
              rcases h2 with h2 | h2 | h2
              .
                replace h2: a1 = -2 := by linarith
                simp [h2] at h1
                norm_num at h1
              .
                  rw [← h2] at h1
                  norm_num at h1
              .
                  rw [← h2] at h1
                  norm_num at h1
            . simp [← h3] at h2
              field_simp at h2
              rcases h2 with h2 | h2
              .
                  replace h2: a1 = -1 := by linarith
                  simp [h2] at h1
                  norm_num at h1
              .
                  rw [← h2] at h1
                  norm_num at h1

        simp [o] at h5
        clear o
        field_simp at *
        rcases h5 with h5 | h5

        .
          simp [← h5] at *
          clear h5
          rcases h1 with h1 | h1 | h1
          <;> rcases h2 with h2 | h2 | h2
          <;> rcases h3 with h3 | h3 | h3
          <;> rcases h4 with h4 | h4 | h4
          <;> nlinarith

        .
          simp [← h5] at *
          clear h5
          rcases h1 with h1 | h1 | h1
          <;> rcases h2 with h2 | h2 | h2
          <;> rcases h3 with h3 | h3 | h3
          <;> rcases h4 with h4 | h4 | h4
          <;> nlinarith

      . -- prove impossibility for 4
        by_contra! h
        obtain ⟨a0, a1, a2, a3, a4, h⟩ := h
        rcases h with ⟨h4,h3,h2,h1,s0,s4⟩
        simp [s4] at h4
        simp [s0] at *
        clear s0 s4
        rcases h1 with h1 | h1 | h1
        <;> rcases h2 with h2 | h2 | h2
        <;> rcases h3 with h3 | h3 | h3
        <;> rcases h4 with h4 | h4 | h4
        <;> nlinarith

theorem inequalities_173340 {n : ℕ} (hn : 0 < n) (a b c : ℝ)
  (ha : 0 < a) (hb : 0 < b) (hc : 0 < c) (hsum : a + b + c = 1)
  (x : Fin n → ℝ) (hx : ∀ i, 0 < x i) (hxprod : ∏ i, x i = 1) :
  ∏ i, (a * (x i)^2 + b * x i + c) ≥ 1 := by

have hx' : ∀ i, 0 ≤ x i := by
    rintro i
    exact le_of_lt <| hx i
  calc

    ∏ i, (a * x i ^ 2 + b * x i + c) ≥ ∏ i, ((x i ^ 2)^a * (x i)^b) := by
      rw [ge_iff_le]
      apply Finset.prod_le_prod
      all_goals rintro i hi
      . have := hx i
        positivity
      . convert Real.geom_mean_le_arith_mean3_weighted (show 0 ≤ a by linarith) (show 0 ≤ b by linarith) (show 0 ≤ c by linarith)
          (show 0 ≤ (x i)^2 by positivity) (show 0 ≤ x i by linarith [hx i]) (show 0 ≤ 1 by norm_num) (by assumption) using 1
        all_goals simp

    _ = (∏ i, (x i ^ 2)^a) * (∏ i, (x i)^b) := by exact Finset.prod_mul_distrib

    _ = ((∏ i, x i)^2)^a * (∏ i, x i)^b := by
      congr
      . rw [Real.finset_prod_rpow Finset.univ _ (by simp_rw [sq_nonneg]; simp)]
        rw [Finset.prod_pow]
      . exact Real.finset_prod_rpow Finset.univ x (by simp [hx']) b

    _ = 1 := by rw [hxprod]; simp

theorem algebra_202551 : ∃! (x : ℝ), 0 < x ∧ (x + 1) ^ logb 3 2 = x := by

suffices ∃! (t : ℝ) , (3 ^ t : ℝ) = 2 ^ t + 1 by
    obtain ⟨t, ht1, ht2⟩ := this

    have : t ≠ 0 := by
      by_contra ht
      rw [ht] at ht1
      norm_num at ht1

    use 3 ^ t - 1
    and_intros

    . rw [ht1]
      simp
      apply rpow_pos_of_pos (by norm_num)

    . nth_rw 2 [ht1]
      simp
      rw [← logb_eq_iff_rpow_eq]

      any_goals (apply rpow_pos_of_pos (by norm_num))
      . rw [logb, logb, log_rpow (by norm_num), log_rpow (by norm_num)]
        field_simp
        ring

      . simp
        by_contra h
        rw [show (1 : ℝ) = 3 ^ (0 : ℝ) by norm_num] at h
        have : StrictMono fun (x : ℝ) ↦ ((3 : ℝ) ^ x) := by
          apply strictMono_rpow_of_base_gt_one (by norm_num)
        have := (StrictMono.injective this)  h
        contradiction

    . simp
      rintro y hy1 hy2
      specialize ht2 (logb 3 (y + 1))

      rw [eq_sub_iff_add_eq', add_comm, eq_comm]
      apply logb_eq_iff_rpow_eq (by norm_num) (by norm_num) (by linarith) |>.mp

      apply ht2

      rw [rpow_logb (by norm_num) (by norm_num) (by linarith)]
      congr

      rw [eq_comm, ← logb_eq_iff_rpow_eq (by norm_num) (by norm_num) (by linarith), logb, logb]
      field_simp
      rw [← logb_eq_iff_rpow_eq (by linarith) (by linarith) (by assumption), logb, logb] at hy2
      have : log (y + 1) ≠ 0 := by
        apply log_ne_zero_of_pos_of_ne_one (by linarith) (by linarith)
      field_simp at hy2
      linarith

  use 1

  norm_num

  rintro y hy

  have : y ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h
    rw [h] at hy
    norm_num at hy

  replace hy := congrArg (· / ((3 : ℝ) ^y)) hy
  ring_nf at hy
  have : (3 ^ y) * (3 ^ y)⁻¹ = (1 : ℝ) := by
    apply GroupWithZero.mul_inv_cancel
    apply rpow_ne_zero (by norm_num) (by assumption) |>.mpr (by norm_num)
  rw [this] at hy
  have : (3 ^ y)⁻¹ * 2 ^ y = (2 / 3 : ℝ) ^ y := by
    rw [div_rpow (by norm_num) (by norm_num)]
    ring
  rw [this] at hy

  let f (x : ℝ) := ((1 / 3) ^ x + (2 / 3) ^ x : ℝ)
  have hf : Function.Injective f := by
    apply StrictAnti.injective
    apply StrictAnti.add
    . apply strictAnti_rpow_of_base_lt_one <;> norm_num
    . apply strictAnti_rpow_of_base_lt_one <;> norm_num

  apply hf
  simp [f]
  norm_num
  nth_rw 2 [hy]
  simp
  apply inv_rpow (by norm_num)

theorem algebra_604655 (a b c : ℝ) (ha : 0 < a) (hb : 0 < b) (hc : 0 < c) :
    √(a ^ 2 - a * b + b ^ 2) + √(b ^ 2 - b * c + c ^ 2) ≥
    √(a ^ 2 + a * c + c ^ 2) := by

have g1 : a ^ 2 - a * b + b ^ 2 ≥ 0:= by
            have g1 : (a - b) ^ 2 ≥ 0:= by positivity
            have g2 : a * b ≥ 0:= by positivity
            linarith
        have g2 : b ^ 2 - b * c + c ^ 2 ≥ 0:= by
            have g2 : (b - c) ^ 2 ≥ 0:= by positivity
            have g3 : b * c ≥ 0:= by positivity
            linarith

        rw [show √(a ^ 2 + a * c + c ^ 2) = |√(a ^ 2 + a * c + c ^ 2)| by exact Eq.symm (abs_of_nonneg (by positivity))]
        rw [show √(a ^ 2 - a * b + b ^ 2) + √(b ^ 2 - b * c + c ^ 2) = |√(a ^ 2 - a * b + b ^ 2) + √(b ^ 2 - b * c + c ^ 2)| by exact Eq.symm (abs_of_nonneg (by positivity))]

        suffices (√(a ^ 2 - a * b + b ^ 2) + √(b ^ 2 - b * c + c ^ 2)) ^ 2 ≥ (√(a ^ 2 + a * c + c ^ 2)) ^ 2 by exact sq_le_sq.mp this

        rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)]
        rw [show (√(a ^ 2 - a * b + b ^ 2) + √(b ^ 2 - b * c + c ^ 2)) ^ 2 = (√(a ^ 2 - a * b + b ^ 2)) ^ 2 + (√(b ^ 2 - b * c + c ^ 2)) ^ 2 + 2 * √(a ^ 2 - a * b + b ^ 2) * √(b ^ 2 - b * c + c ^ 2) by ring_nf]
        rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)]
        rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)]

        suffices 2 * √(a ^ 2 - a * b + b ^ 2) * √(b ^ 2 - b * c + c ^ 2) ≥ a * b + b * c + a * c - 2 * b ^ 2 by linarith
        have g3 : |a * b + b * c + a * c - 2 * b ^ 2| ≥ a * b + b * c + a * c - 2 * b ^ 2:= by exact le_abs_self (a * b + b * c + a * c - 2 * b ^ 2)

        suffices 2 * √(a ^ 2 - a * b + b ^ 2) * √(b ^ 2 - b * c + c ^ 2) ≥ |a * b + b * c + a * c - 2 * b ^ 2| by linarith
        rw [show 2 * √(a ^ 2 - a * b + b ^ 2) * √(b ^ 2 - b * c + c ^ 2) = |2 * √(a ^ 2 - a * b + b ^ 2) * √(b ^ 2 - b * c + c ^ 2)| by exact Eq.symm (abs_of_nonneg (by positivity))]
        suffices (2 * √(a ^ 2 - a * b + b ^ 2) * √(b ^ 2 - b * c + c ^ 2)) ^ 2 ≥ (a * b + b * c + a * c - 2 * b ^ 2) ^ 2 by exact sq_le_sq.mp this

        rw [show (2 * √(a ^ 2 - a * b + b ^ 2) * √(b ^ 2 - b * c + c ^ 2)) ^ 2 = 4 * (√(a ^ 2 - a * b + b ^ 2)) ^ 2 * (√(b ^ 2 - b * c + c ^ 2)) ^ 2 by ring_nf]
        rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)]
        rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)]

        suffices 4 * (a ^ 2 - a * b + b ^ 2) * (b ^ 2 - b * c + c ^ 2) - (a * b + b * c + a * c - 2 * b ^ 2) ^ 2 ≥ 0 by linarith
        ring_nf
        suffices 2 * a * b ^ 2 * c + a ^ 2 * b ^ 2 + a ^ 2 * c ^ 2 + b ^ 2 * c ^ 2 ≥ 2 * a ^ 2 * b * c + 2 * a * b * c ^ 2 by linarith

        have g4 : (a * b + b * c - a * c) ^ 2 ≥ 0:= by positivity
        linarith

lemma lemma_1
  (a b c : Nat)
  (ha : a ∣ c)
  (hb : b ∣ c)
  (hc : ∀ m, a ∣ m → b ∣ m → c ∣ m)
  : lcm a b = c :=
by sorry

theorem number_theory_641307
  (n_D n_W n_B n_C M : ℕ)
  (hn_D : 0 < n_D)
  (hn_W : 0 < n_W)
  (hn_B : 0 < n_B)
  (hn_C : 0 < n_C)
  (Mcm : n_D ∣ M ∧ n_W ∣ M ∧ n_B ∣ M ∧ n_C ∣ M)
  (Mpos : M ≠ 0)
  (Mleast : ∀ c, n_D ∣ c → n_W ∣ c → n_B ∣ c → n_C ∣ c → M ∣ c)
  : M = Nat.lcm (Nat.lcm (Nat.lcm n_D n_W) n_B) n_C :=
by

simp [Nat.lcm_assoc]
  rw [this]
  have : n_D.lcm n_W ∣ M := by
    apply lcm_dvd
    tauto
    tauto
  have : n_B.lcm n_C ∣ M := by
    apply lcm_dvd
    tauto
    tauto
  have : Nat.lcm (Nat.lcm n_D n_W) (Nat.lcm n_B n_C) ∣ M := by
    apply lcm_dvd
    tauto
    tauto
  symm
  apply lemma_1
  . assumption
  . assumption
  . intro c hc hc'
    have := Nat.lcm_dvd_iff.mp hc
    have := Nat.lcm_dvd_iff.mp hc'
    all_goals tauto

theorem calculus_608264 (y : ℝ) (hy : y > 1) :
    ∫ (x : ℝ) in (1 : ℝ)..y, x * log x = 1 / 4 ↔ y = √ (exp 1) := by

let u := log
  let v : ℝ → ℝ := fun x ↦ 1 / 2 * (x ^ 2)
  let u' : ℝ → ℝ := fun x ↦ 1 / x
  let v' : ℝ → ℝ := fun x ↦ x
  have ucts : ContinuousOn u [[1, y]] := by
    apply ContinuousOn.log
    · exact continuousOn_id' [[1, y]]
    · intro x hx
      rw [Set.uIcc_of_le, Set.mem_Icc] at hx
      linarith only [hx]
      exact hy.le
  have vd : Differentiable ℝ v := by simp [v]
  have vcts : ContinuousOn v [[1, y]] := Continuous.continuousOn (Differentiable.continuous vd)
  have hys : [[1, y]] = Set.Icc 1 y := Set.uIcc_of_lt hy
  have huu' : ∀ x ∈ [[1, y]], HasDerivAt u (u' x) x := by
    intro x hx
    rw [hys] at hx
    simp only [Set.mem_Icc] at hx
    simp [u, u']
    exact hasDerivAt_log (by linarith only [hx])
  have hvv' : ∀ x ∈ [[1, y]], HasDerivAt v (v' x) x := by
    intro x hx
    rw [hys] at hx
    simp only [Set.mem_Icc] at hx
    have dv : deriv v = v' := by simp [v, v']
    rw [← dv]
    simp only [hasDerivAt_deriv_iff]
    exact vd x
  have hu' : IntervalIntegrable u' MeasureTheory.volume 1 y := by
    simp only [one_div, intervalIntegrable_inv_iff, u'] ; right
    simp only [hys, Set.mem_Icc, not_and, not_le, isEmpty_Prop, zero_lt_one, IsEmpty.forall_iff]
  have hv' : IntervalIntegrable v' MeasureTheory.volume 1 y :=
    intervalIntegral.intervalIntegrable_id
  have int1 : ∫ (x : ℝ) in (1 : ℝ)..y, u' x * v x = 1 / 4 * y ^ 2 - 1 / 4 := by
    calc
      _ = ∫ (x : ℝ) in (1 : ℝ)..y, 1 / 2 * x := by
        apply integral_congr
        intro x hx
        rw [hys] at hx
        simp only [Set.mem_Icc] at hx
        simp only [u', v]
        have : x ≠ 0 := by
          linarith only [hx]
        field_simp [this] ; ring
      _ = 1 / 2 * ∫ (x : ℝ) in (1 : ℝ)..y, x := by apply integral_const_mul
      _ = _ := by
        simp only [one_div, integral_id, one_pow]
        field_simp ; left
        norm_num
  have int2 : ∫ (x : ℝ) in (1 : ℝ)..y, x * log x = 1 / 2 * y ^ 2 * log y - 1 / 4 * y ^ 2 + 1 / 4 :=
      calc
        _ = ∫ (x : ℝ) in (1 : ℝ)..y, u x * v' x := by
          congr 1 ; simp only [mul_comm, u, v']
        _ = u y * v y - u 1 * v 1 - ∫ (x : ℝ) in (1 : ℝ)..y, u' x * v x :=
          intervalIntegral.integral_mul_deriv_eq_deriv_mul huu' hvv' hu' hv'

        _ = 1 / 2 * y ^ 2 * log y - 1 / 4 * y ^ 2 + 1 / 4 := by
          rw [int1]
          simp only [log_one, one_pow, mul_one, zero_mul, sub_zero, u, v]
          ring

  rw [int2]
  clear* -y hy
  field_simp
  rw [mul_eq_zero]
  norm_num
  rw [sub_eq_zero, mul_assoc]
  nth_rw 3 [mul_comm]
  rw [mul_eq_mul_left_iff]
  have : y ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
    apply ne_of_gt
    apply pow_pos
    linarith only [hy]
  simp only [this, or_false]
  rw [← eq_div_iff (by norm_num)]
  norm_num

  have hlog : log (√(rexp 1)) = 1 / 2 := by
    rw [log_sqrt (by exact exp_nonneg 1)]
    field_simp
  rw [← hlog]
  constructor
  · apply Real.log_injOn_pos

    · simp only [Set.mem_Ioi]
      linarith only [hy]
    · simp only [Set.mem_Ioi]
      rw [sqrt_pos]
      exact exp_pos 1
  · intro h
    congr

theorem algebra_13702 :
    {n | n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 53 ∧ (54 - n) % 10 = n % 10}.ncard = 11 := by

have :∃s, s = {n | n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 53 ∧ (54 - n) % 10 = n % 10} := by simp
  rcases this with ⟨s, hs⟩
  rw [hs.symm]
  simp at hs

  have : s = {2, 7, 12, 17, 22, 27, 32, 37, 42, 47, 52} := by
    rw [hs]
    ext n
    simp
    constructor
    . rintro ⟨⟨hx₁, hx₂⟩, hx₃⟩
      rw [←Nat.ModEq] at hx₃

      have _n_lt_54 : n < 54 := by linarith
      have _54_sub_n_int := Int.ofNat_sub _n_lt_54.le
      have : n ≡ 2 [MOD 10] ∨ n ≡ 7 [MOD 10] := by
        repeat rw [Nat.ModEq]
        rw [Nat.ModEq] at hx₃
        omega
      rcases this with (eq2 | eq7)
      . -- n ≡ 2 [MOD 10]
        have : ∀n < 54, n % 10 = 2 → n = 2 ∨ n = 12 ∨ n = 22 ∨ n = 32 ∨ n = 42 ∨ n = 52 := by

          decide
        rw [Nat.ModEq] at eq2
        simp at eq2
        specialize this n (by linarith) eq2
        repeat rcases this with (r | this); rw [r]; simp
        rw [this]; simp
      . have : ∀n < 54, n % 10 = 7 → n = 7 ∨ n = 17 ∨ n = 27 ∨ n = 37 ∨ n = 47 := by

          decide
        rw [Nat.ModEq] at eq7
        simp at eq7
        specialize this n (by linarith) eq7
        repeat rcases this with (r | this); rw [r]; simp
        rw [this]; simp
    . intro hx
      repeat rcases hx with (r | hx); rw [r]; simp
      rw [hx]; simp

  rw [this]
  repeat rw [Set.insert_eq, Set.ncard_union_eq, Set.ncard_singleton]
  rw [Set.ncard_singleton]
  repeat simp

theorem algebra_12866 {c g : Polynomial ℝ} (hc : c = Polynomial.X) (hg : g = - (3 - c) * (c + 2 * (3 - c))) :
    ∑ n ∈ Finset.range (g.natDegree + 1), g.coeff n = -10 := by

have degree : g.natDegree = 2 := by

    have degree₂ : (Polynomial.X ^ 2 : Polynomial ℝ).natDegree = 2 := by
      apply Polynomial.natDegree_eq_of_le_of_coeff_ne_zero
      apply Polynomial.natDegree_X_pow_le
      simp

    have degree₁ : (Polynomial.X * 9 : Polynomial ℝ).natDegree = 1 := by
      simp

    replace degree₂ : (Polynomial.X * 9 - Polynomial.X ^ 2 : Polynomial ℝ).natDegree = 2 := by
      nth_rewrite 2 [<-degree₂]
      apply Polynomial.natDegree_sub_eq_right_of_natDegree_lt
      linarith only [degree₁, degree₂]

    rw [hg, hc]
    ring_nf
    nth_rewrite 2 [<-degree₂]
    apply Polynomial.natDegree_add_eq_right_of_natDegree_lt
    rw [degree₂]
    simp

  rw [degree]
  simp [Finset.sum]
  rw [hg, hc]
  ring_nf
  rw [Polynomial.coeff_add, Polynomial.coeff_sub]
  simp
  rw [Polynomial.coeff_X]
  simp

  have coeff (n : ℕ) (hn : n ≠ 0) : Polynomial.coeff (18 : Polynomial ℝ) n = 0 := by
    apply Polynomial.coeff_C_ne_zero
    exact hn
  have coeff₂ := coeff 2 (show 2 ≠ 0 by norm_num)
  have coeff₁ := coeff 1 (show 1 ≠ 0 by norm_num)
  rw [coeff₁, coeff₂]
  norm_num
